Name: Interwaste (Pty) Ltd
Description:
As environmental stewards, Interwaste’s holistic approach to waste management combined with global best practice, latest legislation and leading technology provides our clients with innovative, viable and compliant solutions. By developing integrated waste management services, we’re making a sustainable future possible for all. Serving land and life. 

With a long record of service delivery and technological excellence, Interwaste prides itself in being the leading waste management company operating in Southern Africa. Equipped with passion and driven by the determination to realise our vision of leading in the sustainable preservation of our environment, we consistently innovate and create winning solutions for a range of waste problems.

At Interwaste, values are not an afterthought, they are integral to the company and are embedded in all policy decisions and operations. Guided by integrity, accountability, excellence, innovation and sustainability, you can be assured that the Interwaste team has committed to the highest standard of performance, ethical behaviour and business practices.

Interwaste provides integrated waste management services to a wide range of industries from manufacturing, mining and petro chemicals to oil and gas, construction, FMCG, pharmaceuticals and automotive. By understanding the specific requirements of each company in each sector, aligning their strategy to their waste solutions, incorporating current and future legislation, we are able to provide innovative, sustainable waste solutions tailored to their needs.

Interwaste is proud to be a Séché Environnement owned company. Séché Environnement, is one of France's leading players in the recovery and treatment of all types of waste. The company is a specialist in highly complex waste, operating within regulated waste recovery and treatment markets with high barriers to entry. Interwaste is excited to bring international expertise and solutions to the South African market.

Name: Viridor
Description:
Viridor is one of the UK’s leading resource and waste management companies. Our ambition is to build a world where nothing goes to waste.

In May 2021, we committed to becoming the UK’s first climate positive waste management company by 2045 – removing more emissions from the atmosphere than we create.

Name: Néolithe
Description:
Néolithe est une entreprise de 200 personnes installée en Anjou, à proximité d’Angers, spécialisée dans la valorisation matière de déchets non-recyclables, non-dangereux et non-inertes. Ces déchets sont transformés en matériaux de construction, qui prennent la forme de granulats utilisés dans des bétons pour le BTP. Ce processus industriel réduit la quantité de déchets envoyés en décharge et diminue les émissions de CO2 associées, une alternative circulaire à l’enfouissement et à l’incinération.

Après avoir installé deux premiers sites pilotes à côté d’Angers, nous préparons le déploiement d’usines de grande capacité, partout en France et à l’étranger, qui emploieront une soixantaine de personnes.

Name: Almar Water Servicios Latam
Description:
Almar Water Services is the Almar Water Solutions services business line, dedicated to providing integral solutions in sustainable water management, maintaining quality standards, and with a national and international presence.

Our services:
- Development of water management solutions
- Transportation and water supply
- Operation and Maintenance 
- Control Center
- Lease of containerized water plants
- Integrated waste management
- Handling and management of mobile sanitation systems
- Industrial water

Name: sinba
Description:
Sinba es una empresa social peruana y Certified B Corporation, fundada a fines de 2016, que busca darle un nuevo sentido a los residuos, transformándolos en impacto positivo social y ambiental. Propone un modelo de economía circular que comprende el 100% de los residuos orgánicos, que son convertidos en alimento animal y abono, así como los residuos inorgánicos reciclables, que son recuperados en colaboración con recicladores. 

De esta manera, Sinba logra reducir hasta en un 95% la cantidad de desechos que terminan en vertederos para las empresas que se han inscrito, principalmente del sector de alimentos y bebidas, industria, instituciones educativas y centros comerciales que buscan gestionar sus residuos de manera más sostenible, logrando una reducción de más de 3,000 toneladas de CO2 a la fecha. Por otro lado, Sinba ha producido más de 850 toneladas de alimento para cerdos, que se ha distribuido a unas 15 granjas en Lima.

Name: Avfall Sverige
Description:
Avfall Sverige is the Swedish Waste Management Association. Our members – the municipalities and the municipal companies together with private companies as associated members – ensure that waste is collected and treated in a sustainable way. Our vision is Zero waste. We strive to reduce waste, to increase reuse and to provide best possible management for the waste that does emerge. Swedish municipalities are the fascilitators for the transition towards Zero Waste.
Through our memebes, we represent 100 per cent of the Swedish population.

Name: Without
Description:
At Without, we are re-imagining waste and poverty here in India, starting with packets of chips.

As a proof of concept of our patented recycling technology, we made the world's first recycled sunglasses from packets of chips through. This plastic waste (multi-layered plastic or MLP) is considered "impossible" to recycle, but we have found a way. 

We have proprietary tech around MLP recycling where we chemically de-metalize it and extract/separate polyolefins (PP+PE) and PET, converting them into consistent, high-quality, more recyclable materials and products while empowering waste-pickers out of multidimensional poverty.

All in all, we are a social enterprise focused on increasing the value of waste through deep tech and fairly redistributing that value to stakeholders in the supply chain, especially those that are the poorest: waste-pickers.

We are now B Corp certified organization.

Name: Okena
Description:
A Okena is a wastewater treatment plant providing environmental destination for raw industrial wastewater.  We recognize the interdependence and believe in the power of business and the human being to create a new a new paradigm in the economy.
OKENA means "access pathway" in the indigenous language tupi-guarani. Because we want to become a pathway for a conscious way of doing doing things. 
We are a BCorp because we believe business should be a force for good. 

Join us!

Description:

Name: Rekart Innovations Private Limited
Description:
Rekart is a leading Producer Responsibility Organization (PRO) that works with a vision to manage waste in smart cities through a technology-enabled integrated approach. We provide end-to-end waste management solutions, from collection to disposal.  

Our goal is to help PIBOs (Producers, Importers, and Brand Owners) fulfill their Extended Producer Responsibility (EPR) compliances. To achieve this, we have developed a system that brings together three key stakeholders: Recyclers, Urban Local Bodies (ULBs), and Brands.

We work with over 250+ brands and 178+ municipalities across 28 states in India, which gives us a strong Pan-India presence. Our services range from:

We have successfully created an IoT-based model which is financially viable, operationally easy, and environmentally friendly.

Name: ENCYCLIS
Description:
Encyclis provides energy-from-waste services which turn residual waste into low-carbon electricity, heat and other reusable materials. 

Formerly known as Covanta Europe, our state-of-the-art energy recovery facilities support the transition to a circular economy by making productive use of residual waste that would otherwise go to landfill. 

With over 250 employees, our portfolio includes three facilities in the UK and Ireland, which operate 24/7 to collectively divert over 1.4 million tonnes of waste from landfill every year and generate enough electricity to power nearly 300,000 homes. Two further facilities are currently under construction. 

With expertise stretching back over three decades, extensive partnerships and a commitment to continuous innovation, Encyclis provides a progressive solution for waste management which accelerates the journey to net-zero.

Name: Augean
Description:
Augean specialises in managing hard to handle wastes. We have UK waste treatment and disposal infrastructure, and we focus on delivering best environmental outcomes. We service the Renewable Energy, Infrastructure and Construction, Nuclear and Radioactive, Processing and Manufacturing, and Oil and Gas Sectors.  Acquired by Augean in 2023, Future Industrial Services is a UK market leader and provides Specialist Industrial Cleaning, decommissioning and decontamination for the Energy, Petrochemical, Manufacturing, Utilities, and Cement sectors throughout the UK.

Please contact us on: 
Tel: 0333 034 9004
Email: sales@augean.co.uk
Website: www.augean.co.uk

Name: SARL LE PAON ENVIRONNEMENT
Description:
SARL LE PAON ENVIRONNEMENT, Entreprise de gestion des déchets agréée par le ministère de l'environnement, "Ils ont réuni leur vaste expérience, force, savoir-faire, et amour pour l'environnement.
Des ingénieurs hautement qualifiés en HSE, Chimie, contrôle qualité, Environnement, des administrateurs et des cadres technico-commerciaux dévoués pour la seule et bonne raison
"La satisfaction client" en matière de gestion des déchets et la protection de l'environnement

Name: KALTANI
Description:
KALTANI is a clean tech waste mgmt, recycling and carbon sequestration company. We are the exclusive waste concessionaire for the 4.5 million residents and 800,000 households of Abia State.

Our process is simple – we COLLECT, SORT, RECYCLE all waste forms (organic, plastic, ferrous & non ferrous metal, waste tire, paper/cardboard, e-waste) etc.

Name: SIGMADAF Clarifiers
Description:
SIGMADAF Clarifiers is a water treatment company with over 30 years of experience in the field of DAF manufacturing and whose infrastructure is based in providing a modular, cost-effective and proven solutions. 

Our main activity is the design and manufacture of DAF but we also provide alternative or complementary solutions to reuse water and be applied to the agriculture or other industries.

Our products are distinct, and our systems are high-quality. We can offer:

- The FPAC flotation system is a large surface air flotation system with cross flow separation. The system has been designed to treat wastewater flows heavily loaded.

- The FPBC flotation system is a high built separator designed to treat low to medium loaded waste waters, even those containing low buoyancy particles.

- The FPHF flotation system is a separation system that represents an improvement over the existing lamellar plate technology that uses a combination of cross flow and countercurrent flow.

We have experience in a broad range of markets, although the core of our business is:
•	Chemical and pharmaceutical sector 
•	Slaughterhouses, rendering plants and dairy industry
•	Power generation and renewable energy

Our goal is to offer fully automated turnkey solutions for each project and allow our customers to cover their specific needs at reduced costs.

"Coming together is a beginning. Keeping together is progress. Working together is success."  -Henry Ford 

The adherence to this working philosophy has led to our staff, highly trained and experienced, enjoy the highest consideration within the sector and a good reputation among some of the best known companies in the industry. 

For further information, please visit our website www.sigmadafclarifiers.com or contact us through info@sigmadafclarifiers.com

Name: Twence
Description:
Twence produces raw materials and energy from waste flows and biomass. We contribute to reducing CO2 emissions, reintroducing raw materials to the cycle and reducing the use of fossil fuels. We extract raw materials from waste supplied by customers in the Netherlands, Germany and the United Kingdom.
 
Twence has seventeen shareholders and we are firmly rooted in the Twente region. With a turnover of EUR 100 million and more than 220 employees, Twence is a significant employer and economic motor in the region. We feel very strongly about sustainable business practices and we contribute to social projects concerning the development of the natural environment, environmental education and culture.

Twence is by far the largest renewable energy generator in the province of Overijssel. Nationally we are also one of the largest generators of renewable energy. We improve our processes continually in order to make increasingly more waste materials suitable for recycling and we generate as much energy as possible from the residue. The synergy between our plants and the possibility of supplying steam and heat as well as electricity means that our energy efficiency is extremely high.

Our ultimate goal is a zero waste society, with optimal reuse of goods and recovery of raw materials. Ultimately, energy has to come exclusively from renewable resources. Yet as long as any waste remains that cannot be reused or recycled, we will use that for the efficient production of energy.

More information: twence.com

Name: Luthra Group
Description:
The Luthra Group is one of the leading and well equipped processing house of Surat , which ever since its inception has been moving ceaselessly on a growth track. Founded in the year 1980 and headquartered at Surat, the group possesses a formidable base of skills and equipment that can be scaled to meet any requirement within a short turnaround time. Right from inception, it has created a niche for itself as a progressive, forward-looking and entrepreneurial organization. The Luthra Group started its business with a Textile industry at Surat, and diversified into Infrastructure development and Environment Protection and is spreading geographically to several parts of the country. It believes in being up-to-date in its management style and practice and believes in being a professionally managed family group.

The company has grown by leaps and bounds, and is today, a specialist multidisciplinary organization marked by a substantial contribution to the growth of the country in the spheres of infrastructure development and waste management. From an asset value of less than 10 crores to over more than 400 crores today, with more than 1500 employees, 7 full-fledged offices, and 5 divisions, the 25 year old Luthra Group has already seen a tremendous growth!

Innovative ideas that need unconventional thinking is exactly what the strategy team at Luthra applies to provide viable solutions for challenging projects. At its disposal is a talent pool of Technical Manpower and a panel of consultants who have proven expertise in various fields of civil and infrastructure engineering. A highly advanced, optimized operations model ensures timely, efficient and cost effective deliveries to clients.

Name: Livium Ltd
Description:
Livium is dedicated to leading the clean energy transition by securing critical materials from sustainable material recovery. The company's core focus is to the recycling of clean energy waste.

Livium's subsidiary, Envirostream, is Australia’s market-leading lithium-ion battery recycler. Envirostream is seeking to expand its services into recycling rare earth elements and solar panels, and processing of black mass, to meet its customers' needs.

Beyond recycling, Livium has developed other innovative technologies. Lithium extraction technology, LieNA, has progressed to a 50:50 joint venture with Mineral Resources. Livium’s subsidiary, VSPC, has developed lithium ferro phosphate (LFP), the fastest growing battery material.

Name: Cory
Description:
Incorporated in 1896, Cory has evolved from a coal distribution company on the River Thames into one of the UK’s leading recycling and waste management companies. The company continues to operate on the Thames and employs around 400 people.

Cory's river-based infrastructure extends from Wandsworth in West London to Gravesend in Kent, providing London and the South East with a sustainable way of managing its recyclable and non-recyclable waste.

Name: Mycocycle, Inc.
Description: At Mycocycle, we are driven by a powerful vision: to not only imagine a world without waste but to create it—through innovation, sustainability, and the power of nature. As pioneers in mycelium-based technology, we are committed to transforming waste into better, more sustainable materials. Our unique ability to upcycle waste into high-performance products challenges the traditional systems of production and consumption, offering scalable solutions that help build a cleaner, more circular economy. This document outlines the strategic vision for Mycocycle, Inc., highlighting our goals to revolutionize waste management and material production for a better, waste-free world.

Name: Hardlevel - Energias Renováveis
Description:
Hardlevel is a Waste Management operator whose core business is Used Cooking Oil (UCO) management under
the current accreditation of the International Sustainability & Carbon Certification – ISCC-EU,
within the European legislation for Sustainable Biofuels.


Hardlevel has set itself a benchmark company in which relates with UCO management.
Hardlevel’s success relies on its vertically integrated business structure that extends from UCO Selective Collection
until its valorization on Advanced Biofuel production feedstock.


Hardlevel possesses several logistics platforms in Portugal, including Madeira and Azores Islands.
Moreover, Hardlevel also operates from Rotterdam Port (Netherlands),
in a high-quality tank terminal right in heart of Rotterdam and commercial trading of Europe.

Name: Greene
Description:
Greene es líder mundial en tecnología de valorización material de residuos sólidos no peligrosos, especializada en la fracción rechazo. Somos la única empresa que ha desarrollado una tecnología propia capaz de valorizar el 100% de estos residuos, transformándolos en materias primas que se reintegran al ciclo productivo.

 INNOVACIÓN Y TECNOLOGÍA
Nuestra tecnología pionera resuelve uno de los mayores desafíos ambientales actuales: la gestión de la fracción rechazo, que representa más del 50% de los residuos industriales y hasta el 70% de los residuos urbanos. A diferencia de las soluciones tradicionales como vertederos o incineradoras, nuestra tecnología ofrece una alternativa sostenible y circular.

 DOBLE IMPACTO
Operamos en dos áreas estratégicas:
• I+D+i: Desarrollo continuo de soluciones innovadoras en valorización de residuos
• Valogreene: Diseño, construcción y puesta en marcha de plantas de valorización material.

 COMPROMISO CON LA SOSTENIBILIDAD
Nuestro proceso único:
• Valoriza el 100% de la fracción rechazo
• Reduce significativamente la emisión de gases de efecto invernadero
• Elimina la necesidad de vertederos e incineradoras
• Genera materias primas circulares de alta calidad
• Contribuye activamente a la economía circular

 IMPACTO GLOBAL
Como socios estratégicos en la construcción de plantas de valorización, no solo proporcionamos tecnología, sino que nos involucramos directamente en cada proyecto, garantizando su éxito y maximizando su impacto positivo en el medio ambiente.

#EconomíaCircular #Sostenibilidad #GestiónDeResiduos #InnovaciónVerde #TecnologíaAmbiental #ZeroWaste

 Our Commitment:
•	Dedicated to sustainable solutions and impactful collaborations.
•	Join us in reshaping waste management. For more information, call (+91) 0120-699-3119 or email info@alliedwastesolutions.com

Name: Sanivation
Description: Sanivation is a social enterprise dedicated to improving the  overall health,  dignity, and environment of urbanizing  communities in East Africa through delivering clean, safe,  and efficient sanitation services.

Name: ARC – Amager Ressourcecenter
Description:
Hos ARC tager vi os af alt med affald. Vores opgave er at hjælpe dig og de øvrige borgere og virksomheder af med affaldet på den miljø- og klimamæssigt bedst mulige måde. Vi tager os af alt med affald inden for vores fem ejerkommuner – Dragør, Frederiksberg, Hvidovre, København og Tårnby.

ARC understøtter den cirkulære økonomi ved at arbejde for mest mulig genbrug og genanvendelse, så produkter og materialer bevares i cirkulation så længe som muligt.

ARC arbejder for at minimere vores miljø- og klimaaftryk i hele vores værdikæde. Vores mål er at blive CO2-neutrale.

Vi driver genbrugspladser og nærgenbrugsstationer, hvor borgere og virksomheder kan sortere og aflevere affald. Vi står for affaldsindsamlingen i Tårnby, Dragør og København, hvor borgerne sorterer affaldet i ti fraktioner.

Amager Bakke er et af verdens reneste og mest energieffektive affaldsenergianlæg. Her udnytter vi det restaffald, som ikke kan bruges eller genanvendes, og omdanner det til el og varme. Årligt  energiudnytter vi ca. 600.000 tons affald, som bliver til el og fjernvarme til op til 95.000 husstandes årlige forbrug. Ved forbrændingen kommer der stort set kun damp og CO2 ud af skorstenen, da næsten alle skadelige stoffer bliver renset ud af røgen. Derfor kan vi også have en skibakke og et rekreativt areal på tagfladen, som borgerne kan nyde godt af.

ARC har en ambition om, at affaldsenergianlægget skal blive CO2-neutralt. Derfor arbejder vi hårdt på at kunne fange op til 90% af den udledte CO2. Det svarer til 500.000 tons om året, som atmosfæren bliver skånet for.

Vi deler vores viden om affald både nationalt og internationalt igennem samarbejder, netværk og besøgende på ARC. Men vi tænker også på fremtiden, og inviterer skoleelever og studerende fra vores fem ejerkommuner til at deltage i målrettede læringsforløb, så de kan få indblik i energiteknologi og får forståelse for, hvordan vi passer på ressourcerne. På den måde forsøger vi at så bæredygtige frø.

Name: ZeroCarbon
Description:
ZeroCarbon is a leading Decarbonizing force in Egypt and the Middle East. We are carrying the torch of Egypt’s fight against Environmental Degradation and Climate Change Mitigation. We are committed to using Innovation, New Technologies and Techniques to become a global leader in the Decarbonization of Nature, Society, and Heavy Industry. Since 2015, ZeroCarbon has managed the Full Integrated system of Treatment & Disposal of the Municipal Solid Waste (MSW) in Ismailia and Port Said. Through our innovative solid waste treatment facilities, we produce high quality Alternative Fuels for the Cement Industry, high quality biofertilizers and recovery of all different plastic and aluminium waste streams reaching Landfill Diversion rates of over 90%. As part of our Climate Change Mitigation mandate, we have bio-renovated tens of acres of old wastelands. 

We have prevented the emission of more than 4 Million tonnes of CO2 and other Greenhouse gases (GHG) since the start of operation of treatment of Solid Waste and the production of Alternative Fuels.. ZeroCarbon is also heavily engaged with the Cement Industry to produce Green Cement in Egypt and the Middle East. Through the supply of Alternative Fuels and Substitute Cementitious Material (SCMs), we aid our cement customers in reducing their carbon footprint by more than 40%.

In our stride to promote Green Building, ZeroCarbon has set up Egypt’s first Construction & Demolition Waste recycling facility producing high quality Green Aggregates, saving Egypt’s natural resources, and treating millions of tons of C&D to reclaim millions of acres of land.

The Sky of Decarbonization has no limits and ZeroCarbon aims to soar high to fight for our planet.

Name: Posiva Oy
Description:
Posiva Oy is an expert organisation responsible for the final disposal of spent nuclear fuel of the owners. Posiva has been established in 1995. 

Posiva's People

Posiva employs around 100 people. The company had a turnover of some EUR 116,8 million in 2022 and is headquartered in Olkiluoto, Finland in the municipality of Eurajoki. The personnel works in three locations: Main Office in Olkiluoto, ONKALO Project Office in Olkiluoto and Helsinki office.

Posiva's Owners

Posiva is owned by Teollisuuden Voima Oyj (60%) and Fortum Power & Heat Oy (40%), both of which share the cost of nuclear waste management.

Extensive Co-operation

Posiva works together with numerous Finnish and foreign expert organisations from a multitude of fields, and commissions studies related to nuclear waste management from universities and other institutions of higher education as well as from research institutes and consulting businesses.

Name: Earthwake Entreprise
Description:
Fondé par Samuel Le Bihan, Earthwake développe une solution unique de pyrolyse, appelée Chrysalis, pour valoriser les déchets plastiques difficilement recyclables en énergie. En effet, les enjeux sont d’une ampleur inégalée : si la demande de matières plastiques suit la trajectoire actuelle, le volume des déchets va être multiplié par trois dans les années à venir alors que seuls 16% des plastiques sont recyclés à l’échelle mondiale. 

Le projet Chrysalis se déploie à la fois :
- avec Earthwake Association qui développe des projets de solidarité internationale,
- avec Earthwake Entreprise qui développe et produit la solution Chrysalis.

Name: Geo Pomona Waste Management Pvt Ltd
Description:
Geo Pomona Waste Management (Pvt) Ltd. is a waste management company dedicated to developing sustainable solutions that minimise negative environmental impact. We utilise innovative technologies and best practices from local and international experts to create a healthier and safer environment for our communities. 

Our vision is to be Southern Africa’s first, best and most efficient waste management and power generation project, setting the standard for private/public partnerships in the provision of a better and more sustainable life for all citizens.

Name: Heartland
Description: Heartland is a complete end-to-end waste solutions provider, industry recognized since beginning operations in 2008. Enabled by unique, proprietary technologies and with a partnership approach rooted in decades of operational expertise, Heartland doesn’t just treat waste, we solve problems at the source. Our proven on-site technologies and unique build-own-operate business model are advancing sustainable waste solutions that create shared value for our customers, communities and the planet.

Name: Ladurner Enviro
Description:
The industrial group Ladurner Ambiente SpA offers solutions in the environmental field, in technologies for the collection and treatment of urban waste, in the production of renewable energy and in environmental reclamation.

"Ladurner Enviro" is the commercial brand of Ladurner Srl, the historic industrial company that turned thirty in 2021. It inherits the skills of the "Plants & Technologies" division and its mission is to focus, from an organizational and operational point of view, the design, construction and management of waste treatment plants, as well as the development of related technologies and land reclamation technologies.

Name: Daka Denmark A/S
Description:
Daka Denmark A/S which operates in the international rendering industry, processing animal by-products for the pet food, animal feed and fertilizer industry. Daka also produces animal nutrition applications. Further, Daka produces high-quality, second-generation biodiesel made of animal waste. 

Daka employs some 280 people in Denmark and Sweden and administers four business areas: Daka SARVAL, Daka ReFood, Daka SecAnim and Daka ecoMotion. 

Daka serves a large number of suppliers: slaughterhouses, country butchers, retail customers, mink farmers and farmers incl. hobby farmers, veterinary hospitals and stud farms. Our products are exported to local as well as global markets (Europe, Chile, Thailand, South Africa etc.). All our products and production plants meet the highest international quality standards. Daka is part of a green cycle and continually invests in high environmental standards. We want to be regarded as a competitive and reliable partner to suppliers and customers, and we consistently strive to optimise processes, products and services.

Daka Denmark is owned by SARIA holding 51% in Daka Denmark A/S, and the remaining 49%-shares are held by Danish Crown, Scan AB, Tican a.m.b.a. and Slagteriet Brørup A/S.

Name: GrupoGVC
Description:
O Grupo GVC é o alicerce de uma jornada transformadora rumo à sustentabilidade e segurança ambiental.
Com um compromisso inabalável com o planeta, lideramos um grupo de 4 empresas especializadas no gerenciamento
e valorização de resíduos, com 9 unidades no nordeste. 
Através do conhecimento especializado e tecnologias inovadoras, o Grupo GVC se dedica a preservar o
meio ambiente e proteger as comunidades, garantindo que os resíduos sejam gerenciados com responsabilidade e em conformidade com o mais rigorosos padrões de segurança.


Nossa missão é impactar gerações com soluções socioambientais sustentáveis para um mundo melhor.

Conheça nossos serviços e faça parte dessa causa!

Name: Advanced Circular Materials Company
Description:
ACMC is a trailblazer in advancing global sustainability and circular investment. That was the goal from day one of the partnership with Shell, AMG Recycling Company (SARBV) and United Company for Industry (UCI — a subsidiary of Aljomaih Group) - established in 2022. Our vision for that partnership was to create a hub for sustainability in Jubail Industrial City, Saudi Arabia. That's exactly what we're doing: developing a state-of-the-art Catalyst Manufacturing and Metals Reclamation Supercenter there. This facility will make Saudi Arabia a global leader in vanadium supply — a critical material for energy storage technologies and high-strength steel infrastructure.
Our operations are built on three main pillars. We use cutting-edge technology to make the most of our resources and minimize waste. We have closed-loop systems to reclaim critical metals and reduce our environmental footprint. And we have strategic partnerships like the landmark 2021 Supply Sales Agreement with Saudi Aramco to process Gasification Ash from the Jazan Refinery.
By localizing value chains and supporting Saudi Arabia’s Vision 2030, we bridge economic growth with sustainable industrial transformation. That’s where our mission comes in: to accelerate the global energy transition by building a complex that reclaims critical metals and manufactures premium catalysts. Through circular innovation, we deliver real environmental and economic impact — and empower industries to meet their renewable energy targets and GHG reduction goals.
In 2021, the Shareholders have signed a Supply Sales Agreement with Saudi Aramco to off-take a key feedstock of Gasification Ash from its Jazan Refinery. The recycling Supercenter is proposed to be built in phases. In 2022, the Shareholders established the local Joint Venture, ACMC.

Name: ARA - Altstoff Recycling Austria AG
Description:
All-round circular economy expertise for your business!

ARA offers a one-stop shop for all waste disposal, resource management und logistics services.

Our team is made up of profound experts of national and international recycling markets, experienced resource managers and logistics specialists, circular economy and sustainability pioneers as well as visionary digital experts - all at hand for our customers' needs.

We live recycling - We breathe sustainability - We create new benefits for your business's future!

Name: 3R Management
Description:
Today, waste, water & energy can all be recovered – transforming what is discarded into a valuable resource. 3R embraces this future by developing sustainable solutions to reprocess reject at a point it originates, thereby preserving and replenishing the world’s resources and reducing carbon footprint.

We are pioneer in decentralized, compact, energy efficient and remotely monitored solutions. Leveraging our cumulative experience of more then 100 years in technology and environmental domain, we blend skills in engineering, technology and operations with innovative business models, offering a range of smart environmental solutions for the development & upliftment of urban and rural infrastructure.

Name: Andusia Holdings Limited
Description:
Andusia is one of the UK’s leading providers of supply chain services for Refuse Derived Fuel (RDF) producers and incinerators. 

We have established invaluable relationships with some of Europe and Scandinavia’s premier waste to energy facilities and a significant number of leading independent UK waste management companies. 

Paramount to our business are the core values of honesty, integrity, trust and transparency: values that will enable us to grow long terms business relationships.

As experts in our field, we strive to deliver best value for both ends of the value chain. By efficient use of logistics and innovative solutions we have developed business in new geographical areas as well as supplying more traditional routes.

We are happy to work with new or unusual requirements, and are always interested to hear from professional material suppliers and recovery plants looking for their first or additional export routes for RDF.

The company has recently expanded its offering, using their expertise in the RDF field to begin export of SRF to cement plants throughout Europe, and more recently hazardous and clinical waste.

Name: The Waste Transformers
Description:
Based in the Netherlands, we offer innovative solutions to organizations and communities facing food waste challenges. Our containerized anaerobic digesters, monitored from the Netherlands, transform food waste into value on-site.

Our modular biodigester, known as Waste Transformers, efficiently convert food waste into biogas and natural fertilizer. This biogas is used to generate electricity and heat, directly benefiting the building, while the natural fertilizer serves as a sustainable alternative to artificial fertilizers, suitable for open fields and vertical farms.

By installing a Waste Transformer on-site, organizations can work towards 11 out of the 17 Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs). Our solutions are designed for businesses producing a minimum of 300kg of food waste per day.

Operating globally, we provide comprehensive waste management solutions to businesses and communities worldwide.

Name: The Recycling Company
Description: We help organisations achieve their sustainability goals. The team brings over 20 years of combined experience in sustainability, waste management, recycling & climate change.

Name: Xeon Waste Managers Pvt Ltd
Description: We manufacture Fully Automated Pre-Fabricated Containerized Bio-Methanation plants of various Capacities from processing 25 Kg Waste Per Day to 5000 Kg waste per day and more (Plug & Play Units)

Name: Shou'alah
Description: Waste Treatment FZCO (WTFZCO) is a joint venture between BESIX and Hitachi Zosen Inova to operate and maintain one of the world's largest “Energy from Waste” plants in Dubai. The plant has a treatment capacity of 1.9 million tones a year of municipal waste producing 1.37Gigawatt of energy. In addition, the plant will recover valuable metals which will be re-used for several purposes. Contributing towards a greener, cleaner, and nurturing circular economy.

Name: Ecotec Solution Srl
Description:
Proponiamo tecnologie e soluzioni per l'ecologia e nell'ottica della green economy perseguiamo l'idea di migliorare il ciclo integrato dei rifiuti. 

Puntiamo ad incrementare le performance dei nostri clienti e partner con soluzioni innovative ed affidabili, che valorizzano il rifiuto in risorsa.

Name: IWMSA - Institute of Waste Management of Southern Africa
Description:
When the IWMSA was established over 40 years ago, it was the vision of the founders to provide South Africa with a clean and healthy environment. Today this is still the very core of the organisation. 

The role of the private sector in the affairs of the Institute has grown over the years as has the co-operation between government and waste managers at all levels of civil society.

Name: APER -  Eco-organisme bateaux de plaisance
Description:
L’Association pour la Plaisance Eco-Responsable (APER) créée en 2009 par la Fédération des Industries Nautiques (FIN) a été officiellement agréée le 2 mars par le Ministère de la Transition Ecologique et Solidaire (arrêté du 21 février 2019, publié au Journal Officiel du 2 mars), en tant qu’éco-organisme de la filière des déchets issus de bateaux de plaisance ou de sport, dans le cadre de la mise en oeuvre d’une responsabilité élargie des producteurs (REP).

Entre l'automne 2019 et janvier 2024, plus de 10000 bateaux de plaisance en fin de vie ont été collectés, recyclés, valorisés dans l'un des 35 centres de traitement agréés en métropole et en DROM-COM.

Name: Spentica Chemicals - Hazardous Waste Management Company
Description: Spentica Chemicals is a leading waste management company in Gujarat. We specialize in the safe and responsible disposal of Industrial Waste, providing our clients with a reliable and sustainable solution to their chemical waste management needs.

Name: Green Eco Technologies
Description:
Green Eco Technologies (GET) develops, supplies and manages innovative, efficient, and environmentally beneficial, on-site solutions for the conversion and re-purposing of food waste into reusable resources. Contact us at enquiries@greenecotec.com.

The company’s WasteMaster food conversion system uses unique proprietary technology to convert and reduce food waste, without additives or water, into a residual material which can be re-used in positive ways such as the production of green energy through anaerobic digestion. 

With offices and manufacturing sited in the UK and Australia, as well as representation in the United States, the United Arab Emirates, Singapore and Spain, GET supports customers to reduce the impact of food waste disposal both on their businesses and the Environment.

Name: ECOVALO
Description:
ECOVALO est une jeune entreprise créée par deux professionnels du recyclage issus de grands groupes industriels. Nous avons mis à profit notre expérience afin de palier à certains dysfonctionnements que vous rencontrez tous les jours. Notre seul objectif est : LA SATISFACTION CLIENT.
Comme notre nom l'indique, notre expérience nous permet de trouver la filière la plus adaptée pour votre déchet afin de lui offrir une seconde vie ET vous faire bénéficier des meilleurs tarifs de traitement disponibles sur le marché.Notre bureau de recherche et développement en filières de valorisation accompagne les particuliers, les PMI/PME ainsi que les grosses industries dans ses démarches et trouve la solution adaptée à chaque problématique.

WWW.ECOVALO.FR

Com o avanço das exigências ambientais determinadas por Lei, a Supply ampliou suas operações para o recebimento de resíduos sólidos contaminados com óleo, sendo hoje a empresa mais completa em soluções de Tratamento de Resíduos Classe I, lavagem por hidrojateamento e reciclagem e Rerrefino de Óleos lubrificantes.

Atualmente, o Grupo Supply Service conta com quatro fábricas, sendo que estão localizadas nos Estados de São Paulo, Mato Grosso, Mato Grosso do Sul e Paraná, possui uma frota com mais de 80 caminhões para coleta e transporte de resíduos e mais de 3.500 contratos de coletas de resíduos com postos de combustíveis / concessionárias / transportadoras, espalhados por todo o Brasil.

Realizamos também a Logística Reversa de diversos resíduos contaminados.

Un’attività svolta a 360 gradi in campo ambientale, in grado di soddisfare le più diverse esigenze dei clienti.

Visita le pagine del nostro sito e scopri di più sulle nostre attività!

and more...

Our proprietary products and cutting-edge methods not only manage waste efficiently but also contribute significantly to renewable energy generation, aligning with global sustainability goals.

At Aggro Flame, we are dedicated to driving positive environmental impact. Whether handling municipal waste, industrial by-products, or other forms of waste, our comprehensive approach guarantees effective management and energy recovery.

As a forward-thinking company, we continue to expand our reach and capabilities, always striving to set new benchmarks in the industry. Join us on our mission to turn waste into a powerful resource and shape a cleaner, greener future for all.

The Adelaide Hills Region Waste Management Authority (AHRWMA) is a Local Government Regional Subsidiary coordinating waste management and recycling on behalf of its Member Councils. The AHRWMA receives and processes waste material at its facilities promoting a cleaner and healthier environment by increasing recycling options and reducing waste going to landfill.

L’attività della "Rail & Recycling s.r.l." è rivolta ai soggetti pubblici e privati, su territorio nazionale ed internazionale e consta di un sistema a filiera complessa, in cui devono essere contemperate diverse esigenze impiantistiche e gestionali per garantire la più efficace ed efficiente chiusura del ciclo dei rifiuti.

Semaval est une filiale de Semardel, basée sur l'Ecosite de Vert-le-Grand / Echarcon. 

 POUR TOUTE INFORMATION SUR L'ACTUALITE DE SEMAVAL, NOUS VOUS INVITONS A VOUS CONNECTER SUR LA PAGE LINKEDIN DE SEMARDEL 

Semaval a démarré l’exploitation d’un ensemble industriel permettant d’améliorer la valorisation des déchets issus des activités économiques et des collectivités en 2012. 
Cet ensemble permet de proposer une offre attractive et d’accroître la réception, les types et les tonnages de déchets triés et valorisés.

Description:
En Ecotransa SAS transformamos residuos en combustibles sostenibles.
Somos una empresa ambiental dedicada al acopio, recolección, transporte y tratamiento de aceites y lubricantes usados, garantizando un manejo seguro, responsable y alineado con la normatividad ambiental vigente.

Impulsamos la economía circular al convertir residuos peligrosos en soluciones energéticas que reducen impactos, optimizan recursos y aportan valor a las industrias que confían en nosotros.

• Recolección y transporte certificado de aceites usados

• Transformación de aceites usados en combustibles alternativos

trasporto, recupero/smaltimento dei rifiuti delle seguenti tipologie:
- SPECIALI NON PERICOLOSI E SPECIALI PERICOLOSI
(solidi, liquidi, fanghi, polveri)

- DA TERMODISTRUZIONE

- LIQUIDI DA DEPURAZIONE
Alm.Eco da oltre 20 anni opera nel settore dell’intermediazione rifiuti speciali pericolosi e non, dal 2013 è iscritta alla categoria 8 Classe A dell’Albo Nazionale Gestori Ambientali per la gestione di quantitativi illimitati.

Name: TrustDam Waste Services (TWS)
Description:
Trustdam Waste Services is a fully Ghanaian-owned setup aimed at households and commercial clients with a complete solution to managing their liquid waste. Considering the impact of waste pollution on the immediate environment, it is the owners’ vision that adopting an effective and efficient approach to handling liquid waste is the way to go. Guided by the motto – Respect the environment, we believe this is the way to protect the harsh impact on our waterbodies and arable lands. 

As a business, our vision is – “To provide a cost-effective waste management alternative for low-income earners through collaboration with large waste processing entities in the country”. Specifically, our mission remains:

- To have personalized service and contact with our clients
- To provide an on-time waste dislodgement option for the low-income earner
- To educate households on the impact of waste on their immediate environment

Name: Miljøsektionen
Description:
Miljøsektionen er til for skabe værdi for sine medlemmer ved, at samle og koordinere den erhvervspolitiske indsats indenfor miljøserviceområdet for at sikre at bygge-, anlægs- og produkti-onsaffald bliver håndteret på den mest samfundsoptimale måde. Miljøsektionen vil fungere som miljøets vagthund, og derudover er Miljøsektionen også til for at øge vidensdelingen og samarbejdet i branchen.

Uden Miljøsektionen ville fokusset på håndteringen af bygge-, anlægs og produktionsaffald være overladt til andre organisationer og enkelte virksomheder, hvoraf håndteringen af affaldet ikke ville få samme fokus. Sammen i Miljøsektionen står branchen stærkere.

Miljøsektionen ønsker at medvirke til at rette op på de markedsfejl, der står i vejen for at øge bæredygtigheden, genanvendelsen og den cirkulær økonomi i byggebranchen og in-dustrien. Nogle af pejlemærkerne er:
- En fair og lige konkurrence på markedsvilkår i affaldssektoren
- Ens og klar forvaltning af lovgivning og rammevilkår på tværs af landet

Miljøsektionen søger at indfri visionen ved at samarbejde med andre organisationer/myndigheder for at søge indflydelse, skrive koordinerede høringssvar og ved at forfølge enkelt-sager, der udstiller de markedsfejl som Miljøsektionen ønsker at rette.

Miljøsektionen søger at synliggøre sin mission via trykte, digitale og sociale medier samt ved selv at afholde arrangementer sammen med relevante interessenter.

Name: Secure E Waste Recycling
Description:
Welcome to Secure E-waste, your trusted partner in IT recycling and e-waste management solutions! 

 About Us:
At Secure E-waste, we are passionate about protecting the environment and creating a sustainable future. We specialize in providing comprehensive IT recycling and e-waste management services to individuals, businesses, and organizations across the globe. With our expertise and commitment to responsible electronic waste disposal, we help you minimize your carbon footprint and contribute to a greener planet.

 What We Do:
 IT Recycling: We offer efficient and secure IT recycling services, ensuring the proper disposal of outdated or unwanted electronics. Our dedicated team follows industry-leading practices to handle the collection, sorting, and recycling of electronic devices, including computers, laptops, printers, servers, and more.

 E-waste Management: We take the responsibility of managing electronic waste off your hands. From small-scale residential collections to large-scale corporate projects, we have the knowledge and resources to handle e-waste disposal efficiently and responsibly. Our focus is on minimizing the environmental impact by promoting the reuse, refurbishment, and recycling of electronic equipment.

 Data Security: Your data security is our top priority. We guarantee the complete erasure of sensitive information from all electronic devices we handle. Our processes adhere to the highest data security standards, ensuring your confidential data remains protected throughout the recycling and disposal process.

 Sustainability: We are committed to sustainable practices and operate with a strong environmental conscience. By choosing [Company Name], you join us in reducing electronic waste and conserving natural resources. Together, we make a positive impact by diverting e-waste from landfills and promoting the circular economy.

Name: The Waste and Recycling Industry Association of WA
Description:
The Waste and Recycling Industry Association of Western Australia Incorporated was established in 2017.  WRIWA has two broad objectives that it pursues on behalf of its members;
- to achieve best practice environmental outcomes from collection, processing, recycling and disposal of waste
- to ensure markets are fair and transparent, ensuring competition occurs on a "level playing field" that drives value for customers and a fair return on investment for members.
WRIWA members are drawn from private sector operators with direct investment in plant and equipment. Members include the large nationally based waste collection and recycling companies, landfill owners and operators, and state/locally based C&I and C&D collection, processing and recycling companies.
WRIWA is committed to improving the Western Australian waste and recycling industry through the creation and promotion of industry driven policy.

Name: ECOWEST VERBUND
Description:
Mit über 250 Kolleg*innen sorgen wir im ECOWEST VERBUND tagtäglich für nachhaltige, umweltkonforme und verlässliche Abfallverwertung und -beseitigung in der Region. Zu uns gehören die beiden kommunal geführten Entsorgungsgesellschaften der Kreise Warendorf (AWG) und Gütersloh (GEG) sowie die gemeinsam gegründete ECOWEST Entsorgungsverbund Westfalen GmbH.

Rest- und Gewerbeabfälle werden in unserer Mechanisch-Biologischen Abfallbehandlungsanlage separiert, so dass aus den enthaltenen Wertstoffen Sekundärbrennstoffe für Kohle- und Zementkraftwerke produziert werden. Aus den Bioabfällen beider Kreise entstehen in den Kompostwerken hochwertiger Kompost und Biogas.

Mit unserem Umweltbildungsmobil und unserem außerschulischen Lernort „Wertstoffwerkstatt" leben wir unser Umweltbildungskonzept in beiden Kreisgebieten und spiegeln so die enge Zusammenarbeit auch außerhalb der Hauptstandorte Ennigerloh und Wiedenbrück wider.

Als kommunales Dienstleistungsunternehmen bieten wir nicht nur krisensichere Jobs, auch eine langfristige Perspektive erwartet dich bei uns. Jeden Tag sorgen wir gemeinsam dafür, dass alles rund läuft; sowohl in unseren Entsorgungsanlagen und auf unseren Recyclinghöfen, als auch im Arbeitsalltag untereinander. 

Wir sind stolz auf unsere KreislaufWIRtschaft!

Folgt uns doch auch auf Instagram: @ecowestverbund

Name: HEPT Co., Ltd.
Description:
HEPT (Hera Environmental Protection Technologies) is a Chinese Joint Venture between the Italian Hera Group and local partner Hi-Firm Group. The company was established in China in 2013 with the aim of providing a full range of waste treatment and disposal solutions.

HEPT is specialised in the supply of waste to energy (WtE) incineration lines:

-	Rotary kiln systems for hazardous waste incineration
-	Water cooled moving grate systems for municipal solid waste (MSW) incineration

HEPT has become a leading provider of European technology and components for the design and construction of high efficiency WtE plants with the lowest emissions in the sector, working with its Italian partners to locally manufacture all incineration line components according to HEPT design and specification.

The company has grown significantly and today has offices in Beijing, Shanghai, Xi’an and Chongqing, as well as in Prato, Italy. Having a considerable pipeline of projects across China, HEPT is now looking to extend its geographical reach as a technology provider by identifying partners with whom to deliver WtE plants in high potential markets where there is a clear need for new waste treatment capacity.

Description:
Established in 2005, Freedom Recycling is a family run business offering a variety of waste and recycling solutions.
Operating from our Environment Agency licensed 50000 tonne facility at Hockwold Norfolk, we cover everything from a 4 yard household skip to commercial scale bespoke recycling solutions.
We take pride in offering a friendly, efficient and competitive service.
The demands to recycle are ever increasing and Freedom Recycling are constantly striving to meet these demands through investment in new and innovative technology and methods of recycling.

We embrace the idea that all waste produced has a better secondary use than purely disposal to landfill both environmentally and economically.

2008: Established as a biomedical waste management service provider.
Transition to Manufacturing: Shifted to producing plastic shredders, incinerators, and solid waste management equipment.
2015: Launched the first garbage collection battery vehicle under the Swachh Bharat Mission, promoting environmental sustainability.
Post-2015: Expanded into door-to-door waste collection services.
2016 Onwards: Entered the legacy waste reclamation market with bioremediation projects, reclaiming 30 lakh MT of waste across pan India.

Key Strengths:
- In-house Manufacturing: Dedicated unit for waste management machinery.
- Research and Development: Focused on reducing carbon emissions and achieving sustainability goals.
- ESG Practices: Initiated Environmental, Social, and Governance practices to enhance sustainability.

Innovation and Future Focus:
Implementing robotics in Waste Management, with ongoing research to integrate advanced robotic technologies, enhancing efficiency and effectiveness.

Market Presence:
Services span across India and internationally to Malaysia, Singapore, and Dubai.

Leadership:
Led by Dr. Z. Azad, CEO, whose vision has driven Neptune’s growth and success.

Achievements:
- Pioneered the launch of garbage collection battery vehicles, delivering 7000 electric vehicles in India.
- Made significant contributions to Waste Management and Environmental Sustainability.
- Conducted extensive bioremediation projects, reclaiming vast amounts of legacy waste.

Neptune Automation excels in waste management through its service provision, in-house manufacturing, and innovative approaches. With a focus on robotics integration, Neptune continues to advance sustainable waste management practices.

Name: Battery Pollution Technologies
Description:
Battery Pollution Technologies is an Australian innovator advancing proprietary low-impact, high-recovery hydrometallurgical solutions across multiple battery chemistries (LCO, NMC, LFP & 2 others).

We believe the future belongs to companies that can recover critical battery metals at the lowest true cost—not just financially, but also in terms of energy use, CO2 production and waste generation (tailings equivalent).

Battery recycling is complex, and a number of large Northern Hemisphere “brute force” players are already failing after raising many billions of dollars. Our approach is different - as a privateer we seek to sweat every dollar in the genesis and advancing of proprietary technology that is subject to patent application.  We seek to deliver the lowest cost producer model.

We move quietly and decisively on our mission to "deal with the dark side of the battery revolution".

Der Handel und weltweite Im- und Export von Wertstoffen gehört zu unseren Aufgaben ebenso wie Dienstleistungen im Bereich der datenschutzgerechten Akten- und Datenträgervernichtung.

Wir entwickeln branchenspezifische Entsorgungskonzepte und finden lukrative Verwertungswege für Ihre Rohstoffe. Versierte Melosch-Techniker konzipieren maßgeschneiderte Entsorgungsanlagen, die vor Ort bei unseren Kunden zum Einsatz kommen.

Unsere Angebote richten sich an Unternehmen aus Industrie, Handel, Dienstleistung und Gesundheitswesen sowie an Behörden und Kommunen.

Name: Ecopôle de Champagne
Description:
Ecopôle de Champagne est une plateforme de récupération, de recyclage, de vente de béton et de matériaux de construction.

L'objectif ? 
Notre plateforme est ouverte aux particuliers et aux professionnels. Elle permet de récupérer, recycler et de vendre des matériaux de construction sur un même site, afin de limiter l'impact écologique lié au transport et donner une seconde vie aux matériaux inertes. 

Celle-ci s'inscrit dans une démarche environnementale, donnant une seconde vie à des matériaux jusque-là non valorisés.

Le fonctionnement de la plateforme ? 
Nous récupérons gratuitement les gravats et autres matériaux inertes valorisables non pollués comme du béton pur ou ferraillé, de la brique ou de l'enrobé. Pour les autres types de déchets inertes, un simulateur est disponible sur notre site web afin d'estimer le coût de dépôt ou de vente de nos matériaux.

Pour plus de renseignements, n'hésitez pas à nous contacter

Name: BeyondBattRec
Description:
Lithium-ion batteries are the backbone of modern technology, powering electric vehicles (EVs), renewable energy systems, and countless electronic devices. As Europe transitions towards a greener economy, these batteries are essential for reducing transport emissions and supporting clean energy storage. However, the environmental and economic challenges associated with end-of-life (EoL) batteries must be urgently addressed to ensure sustainability. The BeyondBattRec project, funded under the Horizon Europe programme with €9 million, is at the forefront of this effort.
Coordinated by Aalborg University in Denmark, BeyondBattRec unites 12 leading partners from seven European countries to develop groundbreaking technologies for battery recycling.

Name: CRS - Carpet Recycling Solutions
Description:
Carpet Recycling Solutions is part of UBH Group who have been finding waste solutions in the industry for over 20 years.
Carpet has long been a waste issue in the UK, with no real long term solutions for all mixed carpet waste. Having partnered with Innovate Recycling we are now in a position to recycle 80% of all post consumer carpet. With 100% landfill avoidance. 
At our sites across the country we can accept all types of mixed carpet. Pre and post consumer. Through our process and scanning we can identify and separate the carpets in to their different types. Mainly being PP, PET, Nylon, wool, underlay and vinyl.
Once separated we can then process them further and get them to end markets to be recycled back into plastic pellets or fibres to be reused to manufacture. So a real closed loop solution and the only one available in the UK especially now that Equine use for shredded carpet has been fully banned by the Environment Agency.

Name: GreenWay Recycling
Description:
Mailing Address: 15204 SE River Forest Dr. Milwaukie, OR 97267


Greenway is celebrating its 20th anniversary with the completion of a $7 million facility upgrade, giving it the highest recycling rates in the Portland Oregon metropolitan region. 

The company’s recent rebuild included a major redesign and retrofit of its dry waste material recovery facility with 40 new and repurposed machines and conveyors, demonstrating its innovative “can-do” approach produces results.

This is the first facility in the region to become Recycling Certification Institute (RCI) certified, so it provides accurate and achievable recovery rates for projects to obtain the coveted LEED Gold and Platinum ratings.

Name: SICCUM AB
Description: Challenges with low dry matter content? We transform waste into value. Our motto "Extract value from waste" reflects our commitment to a sustainable future and our determination to change the perception of how waste, sludge, and contamination with low dry matter content are managed. Our freeze-dewatering technology is tailored for both batch and continuous processes. With our solutions, we can efficiently achieve the desired dry matter content without the use of chemicals or fossil fuels. Waste and sludge should not be seen as a problem, but as an opportunity to recycle back into the value chain. Let's work together to extract value from your waste and contribute to a more sustainable future. Start the journey to transform your waste into value today.

Name: PT Tata Tirta Utama
Description:
Tata Tirta Utama bergerak di bidang rancang bangun atau design and build, baik itu instalasi pengolahan air limbah maupun instalasi pengolahan air bersih (IPAL/IPA). Kami handal di bidang ini karena sudah berkecimpung sejak tahun 1994 dan terus berkembang pesat hingga sekarang.

Tata Tirta Utama lahir dari pemikiran kreatif, setelah ditemukan banyak kegagalan proses dari instalasi pengolahan. Seiring berjalannya waktu, bertambahnya pengetahuan dan pengalaman dalam rancang bangun instalasi pengolahan air limbah industri, dan kebutuhan akan jasa di bidang rancang bangun , kini Tata Tirta Utama semakin handal dan selalu dapat dipercaya.

Hingga tahun 2015, dengan bangga kami telah menangani lebih dari 20 jenis industri dengan lebih dari 60 pekerjaan, kami sudah dipercaya dalam merancang juga membangun fasilitas instalasi pengolahan air limbah baru, perbaikan instalasi, peningkatan kapasitas, serta peningkatan efisiensi. Tentu saja dilengkapi dengan sumber daya manusia yang handal dan terlatih dalam bidang proses pengolahan, desain engineering, dan konstruksi. Name: simbionet
Description:
La celulosa bacteriana es un polímero extracelular sintetizado por bacterias principalmente del género Acetobacter. 
La “celulosa” es sintetizada por bacterias pertenecientes a los géneros Aceto- bacter, Rhizobium, Agrobacterium y Sarcina
La celulosa bacteriana es un polímero obtenido por fermentación con microrganismos de los géneros “Acetobacter”, “Rhizobium”, “Agrobacterium” y “Sarcina”, de las cuales la especie más eficiente es la “Acetobacter Xylinum”.
La mayor parte de la celulosa utilizada en la industria es de origen vegetal, que se encuentra asociada a lignina y hemicelulosa.
Sin embargo, en los últimos veinte años la celulosa de origen bacteriano ha tomado importancia debido a sus propiedades mecánicas, de pureza y alto grado de cristalinidad, entre otras, que la hacen atractiva para aplicaciones específicas.
La Biotextil de celulosa bacteriana, puede ser una solucions para la industria textil es uno de los principales contribuyentes a las emisiones de gases de efecto invernadero, el consumo mundial de agua y la contaminación ( Ellen MacArthur Foundatio, 2017 ).
 En su trayectoria actual la industria textile, tiene una gran dependencia de los recursos no renovables, la industria  es reponsable del 26 % del presupuesto de carbono asociado con un aumento de la temperatura global de 2 °C para 2050. 
Bajo la presión de aumentar la sostenibilidad y minimizar el impacto ambiental en sus prácticas, la industria textil está buscando alternativas para satisfacer las demandas globales ( Proyecto Textiles 2030, 2021 ), y los reemplazos de las fuentes de fibra tradicionales son un área de exploración.
Una de estas fibras tradicionales de algodón representa aproximadamente un tercio de las fibras utilizadas en todo el mundo, y se espera que la demanda crezca debido a la versatilidad de su base celulósica ( Voora et al., 2020 ).

This quality production coupled with the level of service provided by our large urban quarry recycling facility in Poulton-le-Fylde, gives us the confidence that we can comfortably meet all our clients needs, how ever big or small; throughout Blackpool, Wyre & the Fylde Coast boroughs and beyond.

Name: ECO-FRANTUMAZIONI S.R.L. SB
Description:
Eco-Frantumazioni Srl SB nasce nel 1999 nello stabilimento di Via Cella Raibano 13 a Misano Adriatico (RN) dalla sinergia di tre aziende leader nel settore degli autotrasporti, urbanizzazioni, demolizioni e recupero materiali, tra cui CTR Consorzio trasporti Riviera, che risulta tutt’oggi proprietaria di maggioranza di Eco-Frantumazioni.

Da allora, Eco-Frantumazioni Srl SB si occupa di recupero di rifiuti inerti, mediante il trattamento fisico meccanico di rifiuti urbani e speciali non pericolosi derivanti da demolizioni civili ed industriali, da scavi e fondamenta, da scarti di lavorazione industriali ed artigianali, da ripristini ambientali dell’arenile, da attività di potatura verde pubblico, nonché da cantieri di bonifica e da siti colpiti da calamità naturali (terremoti).

Eco-Frantumazioni Srl SB si inserisce perfettamente nel progetto di economia circolare e rispetto sostenibile dell’ambiente, fornendo un servizio altamente specializzato, mirato al recupero dei rifiuti e al loro reimpiego e valorizzazione come prodotti (End Of Waste), rispondenti ai dettami della Det. Amb 6431 del 31/12/2020 e smi.

L’impianto è autorizzato al recupero (R13, R12, R5) di 200.000 t annue di rifiuti non pericolosi, mediante macchinari all’avanguardia con finalità di selezione, frantumazione e vagliatura.

Eco-Frantumazioni Srl SB, oltre a gestire rifiuti da C&D (inclusa guaina bituminosa, fibrocemento, ecc..), può gestire fanghi, ceneri da biomassa, rifiuti assorbenti di natura inerte (quarzite, zeolite, ecc..), rifiuti da sabbiatura e moli inerti, rifiuti urbani (da spazzamento, da pulizia arenile, biodegradabili, legno), nonché rifiuti dal trattamento meccanico di impianto di natura inerte.

Eco-Frantumazioni Srl SB ha conseguito la certificazione di qualità UNI EN ISO 9001:2015 e la certificazione ambientale UNI EN ISO 14001: 2015.

L'azienda svolge inoltre un servizio di rivendita materiali di cava, tutti forniti con le idonee certificazioni.

Our pilot facility in Vancouver, BC opened in 2017 and now processes over 1 million lbs of organic waste each month with the potential to reach over 4 million lbs. Located mere blocks away from residential communities on just 3.5 acres of land, it has become an important part of the city's waste processing infrastructure and its commitment to using local, green and forward-thinking solutions. 100% Australian owned the application reflects the importance of resource recovery in addressing Sydney’s growing waste issues,  sustainable development and future preservation of our urban environments.

With Potential to be NSW’s first Energy-from-Waste Facility. The proposed technology has the potential to generate enough energy to power the equivalent of  100,000 homes and businesses whilst simultaneously helping to address Sydney's waste disposal issues in an Environmentally responsible green conscious and responsible manner.

Energy from Waste is common place in Europe and is well overdue to come to Australia. It is a Safe and Green solution for residual waste that is end of life and can no longer be recycled and it is essential that combustible waste stops being landfill and creating methane gas.

TNG, Energy from Waste offers the Environmental Solution.

Name: Karl Meyer AG
Description:
Mit der Erfahrung aus mehr als sieben Jahrzehnten bietet Karl Meyer Ihnen individuelle Lösungen in den Bereichen Entsorgung, Containerdienst Transport und Logistik. Wir gehören zu den führenden Umwelt- und Entsorgungsdienstleistern in Norddeutschland und sind zertifizierter Entsorgungsfachbetrieb. Unser Kerngeschäft erstreckt sich von der Abfallentsorgung und der Transportlogistik über das Recycling bis zum Rohstoffhandel. Und wir geben unser Know-How weiter. In unserer eigenen Akademie bieten wir Seminare, Fortbildungen und Trainings an. Wir schulen Ihre Mitarbeiter praxisnah u. a. in den Bereichen Abfall und Gefahrgut sowie Logistik nach den gesetzlichen Vorgaben.

Doch wir sind nicht nur auf der Straße, sondern auch auf dem Wasser zu Hause. Unsere Schiffe transportieren in der Regel Schüttgüter wie Saatgut oder Futtermittel, aber auch Stückgut in Nord- und Ostsee. Die Karl Meyer Flotte umfasst firmeneigene Schiffe mit einer individuellen Ladekapazität von bis zu 3.850 Tonnen. 
Mehr als ein Umweltdienstleister: Photovoltaik, Blockheizkraftwerke, Industrieservice und ein eigenes Autohaus mit Werkstatt im Landkreis Stade als Partner von VW, VW Nutzfahrzeuge und Audi Service.

Seit vielen Jahren verkaufen, installieren und warten wir nicht nur Blockheizkraftwerke, Photovoltaikanlagen und Energiespeicher zwischen Elbe und Weser, sondern sind auch zuverlässiger Partner für Industriebetriebe rund um unseren Firmenstammsitz in Wischhafen.

Vor mehr als 50 Jahren wurde das Karl Meyer Autohaus in Wischhafen eröffnet. Als langjähriger Partner von Volkswagen, VW Nutzfahrzeuge und Audi Service sind wir Ihr  Partner in den Bereichen Werkstatt und Service. Testen Sie es aus. Wir überzeugen unsere Kunden mit individueller Beratung, persönlichem Service und höchster Qualität im Kundendienst, Vertrieb und der Werkstatt.

Name: Nativa Supply
Description:
Regenerating the Future, One Ton at a Time.

At NATIVA SUPPLY, we are on a mission to transform waste into value and build a regenerative economy across Uruguay and Latin America. With deep roots in the local community and eyes on the future, we specialize in the collection, classification, and transformation of waste, producing high-quality recycled products like plastic pellets from silo bags and other agro-industrial waste streams.

We operate with a clear purpose and a set of values that guide every decision we make:

Our Values
- Integrity
We do what’s right, even when it’s hard. No shortcuts. Long-term impact over quick fixes.

- Commitment to People
We care for our team and the communities we serve. We create dignified employment and foster trust-based relationships.

- Commitment to the Environment
Regeneration is our reason for being. We eliminate illegal dumps, reduce pollution, and restore value to the land.

- Excellence with Humility
We strive to do things well, and then improve them. We listen, we learn, we grow.

Whether you are a municipality seeking a reliable recycling partner, an industry stakeholder aligned with circular economy goals, or a passionate changemaker—we’d love to connect.

Name: AHE GmbH
Description:
Als führendes Entsorgungsunternehmen des Ennepe-Ruhr-Kreises ist es wichtig sich stetig weiter zu entwickeln und das Vertrauen der Kunden in unsere Dienstleistungen zu stärken. 
Deshalb geben rund 300 Mitarbeiter in allen Bereichen der Abfallerfassung und Abfallentsorgung täglich ihr Bestes. 
Der Erfolg der AHE beruht auf vielen Jahren Arbeit, wobei bestimmte Ereignisse die Unternehmensgeschichte ganz besonders geprägt haben.

Im Jahr 1991 wurde die AHE durch einen Zusammenschluss des Versorgungsunternehmens AVU mit dem Entsorgungsunternehmen Gerhard Heintke GmbH & Co. gegründet. Im Jahr 1993 wurde dann das Entsorgungsunternehmen Rosteck Transporte GmbH übernommen und damit auch die Entsorgungsanlage Gevelsberg. 1998 wurde der Unternehmenssitz von Hattingen nach Witten verlegt. Im Jahr 2006 folgte die Übernahme der Wesendrup-AVU-Recycling GmbH&Co. KG. Übernommen und ausgebaut wurden damit auch die Aktivitäten im Bereich Papierverwertung und Aktenvernichtung. Im gleichen Jahr wurde der Unternehmenssitz ein zweites Mal verlegt und zwar von Witten nach Wetter, wo sich bis heute die Hauptniederlassung befindet. 2009 wurde die Entsorgungsanlage der AGR-Gruppe in Witten übernommen. 

Im Jahr 2012 folgte schließlich die Inbetriebnahme der Vergärungsanlage in Witten, welche die gesamten Bioabfälle des Ennepe-Ruhr-Kreises verwertet. Bis heute vereinigt die AHE vier Tochterunternehmen. Diese sind Vorberg Recycling GmbH, Vorberg Tiefbau GmbH, Containerdienst Rolf Hinrichs GmbH sowie Gekom GmbH & Co KG. Da wir uns unserer Verantwortung gegenüber Kunden und Mitarbeitern bewusst sind, setzen wir alles daran die Zukunft weiterhin erfolgreich zu gestalten!

Unter diesem Link finden Sie unser Impressum und unsere Datenschutzerklärung:
https://impressum.ahe.de

Name: Solidarité Technologique
Description:
Solidarité Technologique est une association française loi 1901 fondée en 2001 et reconnue d’intérêt général. 

Elle a pour vocation de garantir l’accès à la dignité par l’outil et le savoir aux populations défavorisées dans les pays en voie de développement.

Solidarité Technologique a pour objectifs l'insertion professionnelle des jeunes adultes (18-35 ans) défavorisés, la promotion des TIC comme vecteur de développement et l'appui aux bonnes pratiques environnementales. Opérant actuellement au Cameroun, elle a plusieurs modes d'action :

- Formation professionnelle en Maintenance Informatique et Secrétariat Bureautique,
- Recyclage et revalorisation des déchets d'équipements électriques et électroniques (DEEE),
- Don de matériel et appui à l'entrepreneuriat,
- Equipement et maintenance de salles informatiques et multimédia,
- Accompagnement des recycleurs informels "de rue" dans les grandes villes.

Ces projets sont mis en oeuvre au sein d'un centre de formation professionnelle et d'un centre de recyclage implantés à Yaoundé. 

L'activité de revalorisation et de recyclage des DEEE de Solidarité Technologique est pionnière en Afrique Centrale. Démarrée en 2011 avec le soutien du MAEE, de la GIZ et de l'entreprise SPB, son succès ouvre la voie à un nouveau secteur d'activité créateur d'emplois verts sur le continent. 

Web :              www.solidarite-technologique.org

Twitter :          Solid_Techn

Name: Lokkho
Description:
Lokkho – Leading the Change in Sustainable Scrap Management. We don’t just manage waste—we redefine it. 

As a forward-thinking company based in Bangladesh, we specialize in recycling medical, industrial, plastic, and metal waste with a mission to turn environmental challenges into economic opportunities.

We believe every piece of scrap has value—not just in market terms, but in its potential to help create a cleaner, more responsible world. Through technology-driven processes, ethical sourcing, and sustainable practices, we are reshaping the future of recycling.

Lokkho provides end-to-end scrap management solutions through a reliable, tech-enabled system.

Bangladesh generates approximately 3,000 tons of plastic waste every day, which adds up to around 1.1 million tons annually. Only 30% is recycled, leaving 70% uncollected—polluting rivers, soil, and ecosystems.

Lokkho dreams of a Bangladesh where waste is no longer a burden but a resource—empowering industries, protecting ecosystems, and building a more sustainable tomorrow.

Lokkho is more than a company—it’s a commitment to sustainability, innovation, and impact. Whether you're a business, institution, or everyday citizen, we invite you to be part of our mission to fight waste, protect the planet, and build a better Bangladesh.

 Join Bangladesh’s Green Industrial Revolution!


#Lokkho #SustainableScrapManagement #RecycleForABetterFuture #ReuseDonateSell #ReduceWaste #JoinTheMovement

    #Mission :
Notre mission est de transformer les déchets solides ménagers en ressources précieuses par des processus de recyclage innovants et durables, tout en contribuant à la protection de l'environnement et à la création de valeur pour la société. Nous nous engageons à réduire l'empreinte écologique du Niger en particulier et de l’Afrique en général en offrant des solutions de gestion des déchets innovantes et en sensibilisant la communauté à l'importance du recyclage.
     #Vision :
Nous aspirons à devenir le leader du recyclage et de la gestion des déchets en Afrique de l'Ouest, en établissant des pratiques de recyclage exemplaires, durables et innovantes et en contribuant à un environnement plus propre et plus sain pour les générations futures.
    #Valeurs :
1.Durabilité : Nous nous engageons à des pratiques respectueuses de l'environnement qui favorisent la durabilité à long terme.
2.Innovation : Nous investissons dans des technologies avancées et des méthodes innovantes pour améliorer constamment nos processus de recyclage.
3.Communauté : Nous valorisons la collaboration avec la communauté locale et nous nous engageons à améliorer la qualité de vie de nos concitoyens.
4.Responsabilité sociale : Nous croyons en l'importance de l'engagement communautaire et du développement socio-économique par la création d'emplois et l'éducation environnementale
5.Transparence : Nous maintenons une communication ouverte et honnête avec nos partenaires, nos clients et notre communauté.
6.Excellence : Nous visons l'excellence dans tous les aspects de notre entreprise, de la collecte des déchets à la production de produits recyclés de haute qualité.

Name: Hamptons Group
Description:
We are a family-run materials recovery and recycling business based in Newcastle-under-Lyme.

In 1978, Tidysite Skip Services was founded by Alan Butters, setting up shop in Trent Vale in Newcastle-under-Lyme. The first truck – a Commer – and the first team member soon followed.

The company went from strength to strength, and as soon as 1979, we secured our first major contract for operational services with Stoke-on-Trent Council.

In 1985, we opened our first waste transfer station, and in 2003, we were acquired by Hamptons Metal Merchants.

We moved to our new yard, at Hamptons Way, in 2019 and have been investing in our recycling facilities ever since.

2019 saw the introduction of our Kiverco Trommel picking station. This was followed by a Tana Shark 440 DT shredder joining our yard in 2020, and a Guidetti granulator being set up in 2021. Our most recent addition – a CK International TR82-120 twin ram baler – was also installed in 2021.

We aim to build a diversified clean tech portfolio, beginning with packaged sewage treatment plants (Terra S Series) and green hydrogen systems, with plans to expand into other high-impact verticals.
Our packaged STP range (5–100 KLD) addresses urgent compliance needs under the Draft Liquid Waste Management Rules 2024, while long-term R&D will explore advanced solutions like biochar, graphene membranes, AI/IoT integration, and synthetic microbial consortia.
Bharat Ecolabs is currently founder-funded, with plans to seek incubation at a leading engineering institute and apply for national and global clean tech grants to support product development and scale.

Name: Münzer Bioindustrie GmbH
Description:
Die Münzer Bioindustrie GmbH ist Österreichs führender Produzent von Biodiesel aus Altspeiseöl und ein europaweit aktiver Vorreiter in der Kreislaufwirtschaft. An unseren beiden Produktionsstandorten – im Wiener Ölhafen Lobau und im steirischen Paltental – erzeugen wir jährlich über 200.000 Tonnen hochwertigen, nachhaltigen Biodiesel gemäß EN 14214. Dabei setzen wir vorwiegend auf recycelte Rohstoffe wie Altspeiseöl, was eine CO2-Einsparung von bis zu 93% gegenüber fossilem Diesel ermöglicht.

Unser Leistungsportfolio reicht von der Sammlung von Altspeiseöl über die Produktion biogener Kraftstoffe bis hin zur Erzeugung wertvoller Nebenprodukte wie Pharmaglycerin und Kaliumsulfat. Weltweit engagieren wir uns mit über 800 Mitarbeitenden auf drei Kontinenten für eine nachhaltige Energiezukunft – mit Innovationskraft, Umweltverantwortung und höchster Qualität.
________________________________________________________

Münzer Bioindustrie GmbH is Austria’s leading producer of biodiesel made from used cooking oil and a pioneer in circular economy practices across Europe. At our two state-of-the-art production facilities – located at the Port of Lobau in Vienna and in the Styrian region of Paltental – we produce more than 200,000 tons of high-quality, sustainable biodiesel each year in accordance with EN 14214. We rely almost exclusively on recycled feedstocks such as used cooking oils and fats, enabling up to 93% CO2 savings compared to fossil diesel.

Our service portfolio covers the full value chain – from the collection and logistics of waste oils to the production of advanced biofuels and the refinement of valuable by-products such as pharmaceutical-grade glycerin and potassium sulfate. With more than 700 employees active in over 20 countries worldwide, we are committed to shaping a sustainable energy future through innovation, environmental responsibility and uncompromising quality.
