Name: REGRIP "RE-ENGINEERED TYRES"
Description:
REGRIP: Pioneering a Sustainable Solution for a Cleaner World

In a world that generates an astonishing 1.5 billion discarded tires annually, the environmental impact cannot be understated. Shockingly, only a mere 20% of these tires find their way to recycling facilities, leaving a staggering 80% to languish in landfills for hundreds of years, wreaking havoc on our environment and health. It's a challenge that calls for innovative solutions, and that's precisely where REGRIP steps in.

At REGRIP, we are committed to addressing this global tire crisis head-on by embracing the principles of the circular economy within the tire industry. Our mission is clear: to breathe new life into discarded tires, extending their usefulness and minimizing their adverse effects on the planet.

We accomplish this in two crucial ways:

Maximizing Tire End Life: Instead of allowing tires to become waste prematurely, we employ advanced techniques and technologies to make them reusable once more. This not only conserves valuable resources but also extends the lifespan of each tire, reducing the need for new tire production and minimizing the environmental footprint.

Converting Non-Reusable Tires into Raw Materials: For tires that have reached the end of their usable life, we take an eco-friendly approach. By transforming these non-reusable tires into valuable raw materials, we ensure they are efficiently removed from the environment, mitigating the pollution and harm they would otherwise cause.

At REGRIP, we are dedicated to driving change in the tire industry, moving it towards a more sustainable and responsible future. By redefining the fate of discarded tires and embracing a circular economy mindset, we are not only reducing pollution but also contributing to the well-being of both the environment and humanity.

Join us on our mission to create a cleaner, greener world, one tire at a time. Together, we can make a profound impact and pave the way for a more sustainable future.

Name: FastFeetGrinded
Description:
FastFeetGrinded developed a process to recycle used shoes for new uses, such as sports floors, shoes and other products. Sports and play can now literally be done "on" old shoes.

Waste lump full of shoes
Every year, 12 trillion pairs of shoes are produced worldwide (2010 Lougborough University UK). Most of these shoes end up as trash in a landfill, with all the consequences that entails. Think of a growing landfill and polluted groundwater.

Initiatives that collect used (sports) shoes sell or donate them to developing countries. Apart from the fact that the shipping is often not very ecological, the shoes also end up in a landfill or pyre there. Only 5% of the total shoes produced are currently recycled (World Footwear 2005).

Recycle
FastFeetGrinded therefore developed an innovative process to disassemble the returned athletic shoes into different parts. The recycled material must be obtained as pure as possible for recycling. By grinding the shoes, we separate different materials that can be reused. We resell these materials to producers to fund our recycling process. They are FFGRD RUBBER, FFGRD FOAM and FFGRD FIBER.

Name: Sustainable Organic Integrated Livelihoods (SOIL)

By producing organic, agriculture-grade compost from safely-treated human waste, SOIL is transforming a public health crisis into an environmentally restorative solution. SOIL now serves 19,500+ individuals with safe sanitation services while transforming over 1,300 tons of collected waste into 250+ tons of compost and offsetting 3,900+ metric tons of GHGs each year. Our team operates on the belief that expanding access to sanitation is not only a matter of public safety but of social justice.

Name: RiverRidge

As the largest exporter of RDF from Northern Ireland, RiverRidge provides its customers with a fully transparent and traceable landfill diversion service.

Name: Heros Sluiskil B.V.
Description:
At Heros, sustainability means a continuous focus on letting 'nothing' got to waste, and recycling it in new products. We call this 'urban mining'.
An increasing number of raw materials are required to keep the motor of our economy running (and thus also the production in your company). In the coming years, this will present us with an enormous challenge in terms finding alternative raw materials and sources. Of course, with the same quality and characteristics that your products require. From this perspective, we are working towards sustainability at Heros. We take this matter seriously and are doing something about it. We are looking for alternative raw materials to replace the (increasing amount of) residual waste symbolized by our prosperity. Urban mining, or the recovery of raw materials from domestic waste and industrial waste, is our answer to the demand for a sustainable future.

1.Sostenibilidad: Nuestros sistemas no emiten gases de efecto invernadero y no generan malos olores. Contribuimos al bienestar del planeta.

2.Eficiencia Energética: No requerimos derivados del petróleo ni energía adicional para funcionar. Esto se traduce en costos de operación y mantenimiento a bajo costo.

3. Reutilización Inteligente: El agua recuperada puede reutilizarse en diversas aplicaciones: riego de cultivos, jardines, lavado de zonas comunes e incluso en sanitarios y orinales.

¿Listo para dar el siguiente paso? Póngase en contacto con nosotros. Nuestro equipo técnico de profesionales está listo para asesorarlo en su proyecto y llevarlo hacia un futuro más limpio y sostenible.

Name: BIONERVAL

Bienvenue chez ReFood France - votre partenaire engagé dans la gestion responsable des biodéchets.

Depuis 1993, ReFood France se consacre à la gestion responsable des biodéchets. Née de la fusion entre Bionerval et Oléo Recycling (Allô à l'huile), ReFood France s'est affirmé comme un acteur majeur du secteur.
 
Notre mission est claire : accompagner les collectivités, les professionnels de la filière alimentaire et de la restauration dans une gestion et une prise en charge globales des biodéchets et des huiles alimentaires usagées.

Nous sommes les moteurs de l'économie circulaire, transformant intégralement les biodéchets et les huiles alimentaires usagées en ressources précieuses : de l'électricité verte à l'énergie thermique, du biocarburant au fertilisant naturel. 

En partenariat avec de nombreuses collectivités, groupes et entreprises, notre présence sur le terrain crée une économie circulaire locale, durable et mutuellement bénéfique.

Chez ReFood France, nous croyons en la transformation des défis en opportunités. Chaque déchet peut être une opportunité et chaque action, aussi petite soit-elle, peut catalyser un changement positif. 

En 2022, nous avons collecté plus de 100 000 tonnes de biodéchets. Nous avons permis de produire 100 000 MWh d'électricité verte, 100 000 MWh d'énergie thermique, 100 000 litres de biocarburant et 100 000 tonnes de fertilisant naturel.

Rejoignez-nous dans notre quête pour une planète plus propre, plus verte et plus prospère.

Name: Groupe ABCDE - Triage à façon - Valorisation des déchets organiques
Description:
Depuis 1988, l'entreprise ABCDE ne cesse de se développer en mettant au cœur de ses activités l’aspect environnemental. Nous proposons une offre complète de services en faveur de l’économie circulaire. 

Le fonctionnement d’un groupe et l’âme d’une famille au service de l’économie circulaire
Liés aux agriculteurs depuis le commencement, nous proposons des prestations de triage à façon. L’équipe ABCDE Grain est équipée de stations mobiles de tri pour venir vous rencontrer et vous accompagner dans la préparation de vos semences. 
Innovantes, nos stations mobiles de tri sont chaque année développées et améliorées par notre bureau d'études pour satisfaire vos besoins. Elles sont conçues par nos équipes dans notre atelier, à proximité de Chaumont.

Très vite, l’activité s’est étendue avec notre pôle organique. Sous la marque ABCDE Organique, nous nous sommes spécialisés dans la collecte, le traitement et la valorisation du sable de voirie, des biodéchets et autres matières organiques.
Nos différents écopôles (Mandres-sur-Vair, Port-sur-Seille, Zittersheim) permettent de recycler la matière organique par compostage ou méthanisation dans le but de créer des énergies renouvelables : chaleur, électricité, fertilisants et BioGNV.

Grâce à notre flotte de véhicules, nous collectons boues, biodéchets/déchets verts et restes alimentaires : 
•	Centres de soin (hôpitaux et EHPAD), 
•	Collectivités,
•	Restaurations collectives, 
•	Restaurants et traiteurs,
•	Commerces d’alimentation,
•	Industries agro-alimentaires.

Nous mettons un point d’honneur à penser chaque process de façon à limiter notre impact sur l’environnement. Du triage de semences de ferme, à la valorisation de la matière organique, l’équipe ABCDE groupe accompagne tous les professionnels du secteur en proposant une offre de service sur-mesure.


Cette page est soumise à l'application d'une charte d'utilisation des Médias Sociaux, à retrouver ici : https://abcde-groupe.com/Charte-Medias-Sociaux_GroupeABCDE.pdf

Name: Responsible Energy Inc.
Description:
Responsible Energy Inc. is a Canadian clean technology company transforming hazardous liquid waste management through innovation and proven science. For nearly two decades, we have advanced our multi-patented Free Radical Gasification (FRG) process, which permanently destroys a wide range of contaminants, including PFAS, hydrocarbons, and other complex chemical compounds, without dilution.

Independent third-party validation has confirmed that FRG is ideally suited for PFAS destruction, with all test results exceeding 99.99%, building on its proven performance in hazardous liquid waste destruction. The modular process converts waste into a hydrogen-rich gas with minimal inert byproducts, providing a scalable, regulation-ready solution that supports sustainable waste treatment and clean energy recovery.

Responsible Energy is advancing a multinational, high-impact business positioned for its pending RTO transaction and prepared to capitalize on the expanding market for advanced waste and resource management technologies, helping industries meet compliance goals and reduce waste liabilities.

Name: ITAD e.V. - Interessengemeinschaft der Thermischen Abfallbehandlungsanlagen in Deutschland e.V.
Description:
Nachhaltige Entsorgungssicherheit im Rahmen der Daseinsvorsorge

Die thermische Verwertung von Abfällen ist ein zentraler Baustein der modernen Kreislaufwirtschaft – und weit mehr als nur ein letzter Schritt im Entsorgungsprozess. Als Interessengemeinschaft vertreten wir 93 Thermische Abfallbehandlungsanlagen (TAB) und damit mehr als 95% der bundesweiten TAB-Kapazität. 

Unsere Mitglieder verwerten jährlich über 25,9 Mio. Tonnen Abfälle der Bürgerinnen, Bürger und Unternehmen – effizient, sicher und umweltschonend. Die dabei entstehende Abwärme wird zurückgewonnen: über 10 Mio. MWh Strom und mehr als 26 Mio. MWh an Prozessdampf bzw. Fernwärme – klimafreundlich, kostengünstig und zuverlässig. Millionen Menschen und Unternehmen profitieren davon. 

Doch thermische Abfallbehandlung kann noch mehr: Metalle werden aus den anfallenden Rückständen zurückgewonnen, mineralische Reststoffe als Ersatzbaustoffe nutzbar gemacht und Umwelt und Klima aktiv geschützt, indem Schadstoffe dauerhaft zerstört bzw. aus der Umwelt entfernt werden. Damit sorgt sie nicht nur für Ressourcenschonung, sondern auch für eine nachhaltige Entsorgung.

Die Branche ist sich ihrer Verantwortung für den Klimaschutz bewusst. Nicht nur die Steigerung der Abwärmenutzung und Ressourcenrückgewinnung, sondern auch der mögliche Aufbau einer Kohlenstoff-Kreislaufwirtschaft, sind aktuelle Schwerpunkte. Die unvermeidbaren CO2-Emissionen können unter geeigneten Rahmenbedingungen aufgefangen werden – CO2 lässt sich als Rohstoff nutzen (CCU) bzw. kann Negativemissionen erzeugen, wenn es langfristig in der Erdkruste eingelagert wird (CCS).

ITAD bündelt die Interessen der TAB-Betreiber und ist Ansprechpartner für Politik, Behörden und Öffentlichkeit – auf Landes-, Bundes- und EU-Ebene. Wir setzen uns für eine leistungsfähige Infrastruktur, für ökologische Verantwortung und für eine zukunftsfähige Kreislaufwirtschaft ein, die die Energie- und Klimapolitik mitdenkt.

Tratamiento de aguas residuales y efluentes: Pretratamiento y deshidratación de lodos con cumplimiento normativo.
Separación centrífuga: Equipos que optimizan la gestión de residuos y mejoran procesos productivos.
Transferencia de calor: Intercambiadores que ahorran energía y potencian la productividad.
Nuestro enfoque se basa en entregar soluciones personalizadas, con acompañamiento integral desde la identificación de necesidades hasta la implementación y mantenimiento de los equipos.

En Biosur, encontrarás el aliado estratégico de empresas comprometidas con la eficiencia, sostenibilidad y crecimiento responsable.

Name: NEGOMETAL ENVIRONNEMENT
Description:
Créée en 1978 à Romans sur Isère, NEGOMETAL s’est historiquement imposée comme le pionnier du recyclage industriel sur l’ensemble des départements Drôme, Ardèche et Isère.

Initialement spécialisée dans la collecte des métaux ferreux et non-ferreux, l’entreprise a, depuis 1989, complété son offre de service pour la collecte des DIB (Déchets Industriels Banal) soit tous déchets industriels type carton, plastique, bois, verre, pneu etc.

NEGOMETAL, ce sont 70 personnes à votre écoute, répondant à vos besoins avec réactivité

Name: Creative Recycling
Description:
Creative Recycling is Saudi Arabia’s first recycling factory, setting a new benchmark in the recycling industry through advanced industrial capabilities and innovative technology. By transforming waste into valuable resources, we lead the way in plastic recycling while reinforcing our commitment to environmental responsibility and the circular economy.

Join us as we drive innovation toward a cleaner, greener, and more sustainable future.

Name: Intro Resource Recovery
Description:
Intro Resource Recovery (IRR) is at the forefront of the technological revolution in sustainable waste management. As a pioneering holding group, we are comprised of three dynamic subsidiaries: Bariq, Environ Adapt, and Dawar, each contributing uniquely to our mission of creating a more sustainable future.

Bariq sets the standard in the recycling industry with its robust industrial capabilities, seamlessly integrating innovative technology to transform waste into valuable resources. Specializing in plastic recycling, Bariq represents our commitment to reducing environmental impact and promoting a circular economy through technological excellence.

Environ Adapt and Dawar are our trailblazers in clean tech solutions, focusing on circular solutions to waste management that prioritize sustainability and efficiency. Through cutting-edge applications and services, they address the pressing need for adaptable, scalable solutions in waste management, underscoring our holistic approach to environmental stewardship.

At Intro Resource Recovery, we believe in leveraging technology to tackle environmental challenges. Our subsidiaries are united in their goal to provide advanced, sustainable waste management solutions that are not only beneficial for the planet but also drive economic value. Through innovation, collaboration, and dedication, we are redefining waste management for the betterment of society and the environment.

Join us in our journey towards a cleaner, greener, and more sustainable future.

Name: Infiniti Recycling Ltd
Description:
At Infiniti Recycling, we're pioneering the future of recycling. Our mission is simple yet profound: to revolutionize the way we recycle lithium ion batteries, creating a sustainable pathway for a greener tomorrow. 

With a relentless focus on innovation, technology, and environmental stewardship, we're redefining the recycling industry one step at a time. Our cutting-edge solutions streamline the recycling process, reducing waste, conserving resources, and minimizing environmental footprint.

Name: Ecoo
Description:
Van jouw restplastics opnieuw mogelijkheden maken, daarom bestaat Ecoo. 

Sinds 1989 recycleren we jouw huishoudelijke restplastics uit de nieuwe blauwe zak tot gerecycleerde grondstoffen en nieuwe producten voor jouw tuin die ertoe doen. Zo geven we deze grondstof opnieuw een duurzame plek in de wereld. 

100% gerecycleerd. 100% recycleerbaar. 

Het resultaat van ons recyclageproces? Dat is een product dat opnieuw gerecycleerd kan worden. En opnieuw. En opnieuw. Door bestaande plastics slimmer in te zetten in tuinen en openbare ruimtes, geven we deze grondstof weer een zinvolle plek in de wereld.

Open ecosysteem van omdenkers

Een duurzame toekomst creëren, dat doen we niet alleen. Ecoo brengt een netwerk van bedenkers en bedrijven samen dat verbindt in verantwoordelijkheid en verandering veroorzaakt door anders te denken. Samen slagen we erin om te innoveren met duurzame materialen.	

Ontdek ons verhaal op ecoo.eu

Name: Recycle Organics
Description: We combat climate change by accelerating the implementation of methane mitigation projects in the waste sector.

Name: National Radioactive Waste Disposal Institute
Description: National Radioactive Waste Disposal Institute is a state-owned entity dedicated to Waste Management and Disposal Services in terms of NRWDI Act No of 53 of 2008

Name: ISWA Africa Regional Chapter
Description: Waste-to-Wealth initiatives & concepts, solutions for sustainable future peculiar to local challenges

Name: Nature Group
Description:
Over the past three decades, Nature Group has been a hub of innovation for maritime, offshore and industrial waste treatment and cleaning. We are a leading wastewater collection and treatment company with operations throughout all ports in the Netherlands.

Our port reception facilities collect and treat maritime waste in full compliance with MARPOL Annexes I-VI. Being the largest and broadest One-Stop-Shop maritime waste collector in the Netherlands.

Nature Group offers a unique waste-oil and waste-water recycling service to the maritime and land-based industry. Nature is on a mission of creating a renewable ecosystem for oils and waste waters, securing the recovery of hydrocarbons into a recycled oil stream.

Name: Green Gorilla | Recycling and Waste
Description:
Green Gorilla is the largest full-spectrum waste services provider in New Zealand. Our focus is to maximise recycling and diversion from landfills.

Our clients are guided to the best recycling and waste service options available. Green Gorilla are here to provide your business with expert industry advice and services including waste minimisation planning, commercial and household waste collections, recycling, reuse and waste disposal services. 

Green Gorilla owns and operates a 2.7ha Waste Processing Facility in Onehunga, Auckland. Through our facility, we are able to achieve 75-80% diversion rates of construction and building waste from New Zealand landfills. Our operation includes the recycling of waste plasterboard into gypsum and chipping of waste timber into biofuel, animal bedding and landscaping wood chip. Other recyclables such as metals and cardboard are also extracted and diverted from landfill.

Green Gorilla is a proud sponsor of the NZGBC Home Star rating system and Sea Cleaners, preservers of New Zealand’s coastline. We are 100% Kiwi-owned and are investing to cultivate a legacy that will live beyond us.

Call us today on 0800 GORILLA (467455).

Find us on social media:
Facebook: @GreenGorillaNewZealand
Instagram: @greengorillanz
YouTube: @greengorilla4286

Name: MAIREC Edelmetallgesellschaft mbH
Description:
MAIREC develops and operates advanced processes for recovering precious metals such as gold, silver, platinum, palladium and rhodium – precise, efficient and „Made in Germany“. Our state-of-the-art refinery enables the safe and transparent processing of complex materials, including automotive catalysts, industrial and chemical catalysts, as well as electronic scrap and concentrates.

By combining engineering expertise, strict quality standards and a commitment to continuous improvement, we offer solutions that give our partners reliability and transparency. The result: precise metal recovery, traceable processes and long-term value creation.

Our mission: to develop precious metal recycling further, push technical boundaries and build processes that unite precision, safety and future-ready performance. In doing so, we unlock the full potential of valuable resources and actively drive the future of precious metal recycling.

Name: Toshiba water solutions
Description: We are committed to people and committed to society

Name: Dow Group UK
Description: You care about your environment. And so do we. It is at the heart of everything we do. Yes we’re a waste management company. We collect, sort and recycle household and commercial rubbish. But it’s what we do with it next that marks us out from our competitors. Every year thousands of tonnes are shipped to power peoples homes. The stuff you throw away is being re-used. And you are playing a small part in combating climate change. This makes you happy...and us proud.

Name: Sigidurs
Description:
Le Sigidurs est un établissement public qui assure ses missions de prévention, de collecte et de valorisation des déchets ménagers. 
Son territoire s’étend sur 59 communes situées entre l’est du Val d’Oise et l’ouest de la Seine et Marne, ce qui représente  419 000 habitants.
Il traite également les ordures ménagères résiduelles d’une collectivité voisine (4 communes) qui compte environ 110 000 habitants.

Name: The Waste Group - South Africa
Description:
At The Waste Group, our primary aim is to offer sustainable waste management solutions for a greener tomorrow. We are committed to providing holistic, environmentally friendly and economically viable waste management and recycling solutions to all our clients, irrespective of size.

The Waste Group has branches in various regions in Gauteng, North West, Mpumalanga, Limpopo and KZN. The company’s projects and initiatives have been recognized by numerous organizations, resulting in a host of awards over the years. The Waste Group owns two private landfill sites in Gauteng offering safe, sustainable landfill services to a range of clients.

Future developments by the company include the development of the country’s first so-called Waste City at the Mooiplaats landfill site in Gauteng where all facets and levels of waste management will be addressed. The development could serve the province’s waste disposal needs for the next 60 years.

The company is proud of its exponential growth in South Africa over the past 31 years.

Name: Green Earth Recycling
Description: Green Earth Recycling (Pakistan) is an environment friendly recycling company providing solutions, to major corporations and government organisations, in the field of waste management and resource conservation. We operate under the principles of Extended Producer Responsibility (EPR) working in partnership with stakeholders to find sustainable solutions for their packaging and factory wastes.

Name: Odense Renovation
Description:
Odense Renovation A/S driver 8 genbrugsstationer i Odense Kommune, Odense Nord Miljøcenter, det centrale affaldssug i Odense bymidte samt genbrugsuniverset og -butikken, Zirkel.

Derudover står vi for afhentning af restaffald, madaffald, papir & småt pap, glas & metal, plast og mad- & drikkekartoner, farligt affald, småt elektronik, tekstilaffald samt store effekter til genbrug og storskrald ved husstandene i Odense Kommune.

Vi er et kommunalt aktieselskab, som sørger for en sikker og en miljømæssig korrekt håndtering af affald. Vores medarbejdere på genbrugsstationerne og på skraldebilerne er den mest synlige del af virksomheden, men virksomheden rummer også flere andre funktioner. Odense Renovation står blandt andet for udvikling og planlægning af nye affalds- og genbrugsordninger, rapportering til kommunen og miljøministeriet, og vi arbejder målrettet for at skabe forudsætningerne for gode klimavalg og en grønnere udvikling. Derfor lægger vi også stor vægt på information til borgerne og tilbyder blandt andet undervisningsforløb om genbrug, affald og bæredygtighed til børnehaver, skoler og uddannelsesinstitutioner mfl.

Name: Procircular
Description: Procircular is the first multi-material producer responsibility organization (PRO) in Spain for all packaging: household, commercial and industrial.

Name: Medical Waste Services Ltd (MWSL)
Description:
Medical Waste Services Ltd ( MWSL) is a subsidiary of the Jospong Group of Companies operating in the Process Cluster of the Environment & Sanitation Group. Our core operational mandate is to provide professional healthcare waste management services to healthcare facilities across the country.

We utilize ultra-modern medical waste treatment equipment in managing the hazardous components of healthcare waste in a safe and environmentally friendly manner. Our equipment employs non incineration technologies such as steam sterilization and microwave treatment with embedded internal shredders.

We are located in the following areas across the country:
Kumasi, Ho, Mankessim, Takoradi, Sunyani, Tamale, Wa, Bolgatanga, and Koforidua.

Name: SANUVA
Description:
SANUVA est la première entreprise au Mali à proposer aux collectivités locales, entreprises et organisateurs d'événements, une offre complète de gestion des déchets multi-matériaux (déchets plastiques, métalliques et cartons). 
Notre solution comprend : 
- L’installation des contenants (EcoBOX, Corbeilles de tri, etc.) dans votre structure
- La formation et la communication pour sensibiliser votre personnel au tri des déchets 
- La collecte optimisée de vos déchets triés
- La valorisation de tous vos déchets collectés 
- Le reporting pour évaluer le bilan environnemental, économique et social de votre action.

Name: Saalum Recyclean
Description:
Saalum Recyclean est une startup basée à Kaolack qui prône l'éco-responsabilité et les éco-gestes à travers la collecte, la valorisation des déchets plastiques et la création d'économie circulaire pour endiguer la consommation en cycle des produits dérivés du plastiques afin de créer un développement durable. 
Kaolack Soyons Eco-Responsable !!

Green Gorilla is the largest full-spectrum waste services provider in New Zealand. Our focus is to maximise recycling and diversion from landfills.

Description:
Disposición, tratamiento y valorización de Neumáticos Fuera de Uso (NFU) para la recuperación de materias primas secundarias a través de un modelo de Economía Circular. 
Venta de Diesel Pirolítico, Carbon Black y Acero reciclado.

Name: Blufox Ecoventures LLP
Description:
Blufox was founded in 2019, and we have been in the water treatment field for more than 15 years with the mother company Albion Ecotech Pvt. Ltd. Formerly known as Eco Energy Group. We have previously focused on Reverse Osmosis membranes and after we started a collaboration with a China-based reputed company for mfg. of hollow fiber membranes for the Indian market as there is a suitable environment for membranes in china.

This year, we intend to let the world hear the voice of Blufox, so we established the foreign trade department. We have seen that today there are also many factories and wholesalers internationally. However, their level of craftsmanship is still stuck in a few years ago. In fact, the production equipment of MBR Membrane has been upgraded in recent years, and Blufox hopes our advanced technology can inject fresh blood into this market.

Consumers deserve better equipment for their Plants. We are also taking job work for other brands and companies

Name: matterr
Description:
Polyester is one of the world’s most widely used materials - but circularity remains a challenge.  

matterr is a climate-tech company based in Germany that has developed a chemical recycling technology for blended polyester waste that enables circularity where conventional recycling reaches its limits. Using alkaline hydrolysis, matterr chemically recycles mixed polyester waste - such as multilayer packaging and blended textiles - into its original monomers. After purification, the recovered monomers can be reused in established polyester production processes for textile and packaging applications.  

This allows valuable material to remain in use rather than being lost from the system, replacing fossil-based raw materials, reduce emissions, and support industrial-scale circularity.  

Backed by strategic investors and supported by EU funding, matterr is now implementing this technology at industrial scale by building its first industrial plant in North Rhine-Westphalia.  

Technology developed in Germany, designed for global impact.  

 Follow our journey or get in touch to explore partnerships

Name: Green Method Engineering (P) Ltd.
Description: GME is an approved 'A Class' consultant of Kerala State Pollution Control Board. Green Method Engineering (GME) as the name suggests is a product of coming together of some like-minded professionals who shared a concern for the ecosystem. As the promoters had the background of working in the water industry, working for the environment was only a natural transition. Though GME is a profit oriented venture, but through its deeds, it definitely wants to contribute to sustain the ecosystem. Green Method Engineering (GME) has been offering a complete range of water and wastewater solution utilizing innovative and latest equipment and technologies across a wide spectrum of applications. We have secured recognition from several industrial sectors through our determined efforts. As tightening water quality regulations are challenging the limit of conventional treatment systems, we provide cost-effective systems and services that help optimize operational efficiencies and lower life-cycle costs.

Name: Renable ApS
Description:
Certified green steel

Renable ApS works within circular economy and process optimisation by leveraging artificial intelligence and track & trace.

Our primary purpose is to create a transparent, radically open and documentable process within the recirculation of materials, starting with the dismantling and recycling of steel and other materials from the maritime industries. When the process within the maritime industries has been optimised, our method will be useful within a large segment of other industries .

Our end goal is for all steps of the process of dismantling and recycling of materials to be carried out in a responsible, documentable and efficient manner, with significant reductions of both emissions and cost. The final result is green materials for green industries.

Name: Wasted* PBC
Description: Wasted* is changing the way people think about waste. We are building the circular sanitation economy to unlock the value of human waste & connect people to their local environment every time they need to go.

Name: Siena Ambiente S.p.A.
Description:
Siena Ambiente S.p.a. è una società che opera nel ciclo integrato dei rifiuti gestendo gli impianti di selezione, valorizzazione, compostaggio e recupero di energia da rifiuti.
Coniugando efficienza di impresa e interesse pubblico, ha affrontato in modo strategico e innovativo la gestione dei rifiuti attraverso la realizzazione di un sistema dotato di tutti gli impianti di recupero, riciclaggio e smaltimento. Un’esperienza che ha assicurato l’autosufficienza impiantistica alla provincia di Siena e all’area vasta Toscana Sud. L’evoluzione di Siena Ambiente si è inoltre concretizzata nel progressivo consolidarsi delle attività connesse alla green economy, al riciclo e al potenziamento delle attività legate alle energie rinnovabili.

Name: Zoomlion Nigeria Limited
Description:
Zoomlion Nigeria Limited, a subsidiary of Jospong Group of Companies, is a waste management company dedicated to providing innovative and sustainable solutions for waste recycling and disposal designed to promote environmental sustainability and public health.

Our Mission: Improving people’s lives and their environment.

Our Vision: To be the most successful African Holding company, leading in every sector we operate Zoomlion Nigeria Limited is dedicated to effective waste management through collaboration with public and private sectors. 

Our team of highly skilled professionals is dedicated to ensuring that all waste management processes are conducted in compliance with the highest industry standards and regulations.

At Zoomlion Nigeria Limited we are committed to fostering a cleaner, healthier environment for the present and future generations.

Name: Empresas Berthier EBI de Costa Rica
Description:
Empresas Berthier EBI de Costa Rica fundada en 1998 es la empresa líder en la recolección, acopio, tratamiento y disposición final de residuos sólidos de Costa Rica. La firma, además, es parte del Grupo EBI Recycling and management of residual material con experiencia de más de 60 años en el mercado de gestión integral de los residuos sólidos.

Desde entonces, EBI de Costa Rica va más allá del cumplimiento de los requisitos técnicos y legales exigidos por las autoridades reguladoras en lo que respecta al manejo integral de residuos sólidos. Adicionalmente, EBI es reconocida por la gestión de programas ambientales que fortalecen el cumplimiento de las metas y objetivos nacionales en cuanto a la protección del recurso hídrico, la conservación de los bosques, el control de emisiones contaminantes para alcanzar la neutralidad de carbono como meta país y la participación en programas de Bandera Azul Ecológica en la modalidad de cambio climático y microcuenca; además, certifica sus procesos y asegura sus controles operacionales, el tratamiento de sus impactos y la comunicación con las partes interesadas, bajo la ISO 14001:2015 Sistema de Gestión Ambiental.

Además, EBI es una compañía certificada como empresa segura por el Consejo de Seguridad Vial y premiada por el Instituto Nacional de Seguros (INS) por sus programas de prevención de riesgos laborales.

Name: WFZruhr eV
Description: Das WFZruhr ist ein Unternehmens-Netzwerk der kommunalen und privaten Entsorgungs- sowie Recycling- und Umweltwirtschaft in NRW. Die Mitglieder decken das gesamte Leistungsspektrum der Kreislaufwirtschaft ab.

Name: Elacqua Serviços e Administração de Projetos Ambientais Ltda
Description: A Elacqua - Serviços e Administração de Projetos Ambientais Ltda, é uma empresa criada para contribuir em projetos voltados ao tratamento e reúso de águas e esgotos. Oferecemos soluções completas, guiadas pelos nossos princípios de serviço e qualidade.

Name: Blue Phoenix Deutschland GmbH
Description: Diese Seite wird unter der Marke Blue Phoenix betrieben und repräsentiert unsere Aktivitäten in Deutschland. Unsere Unternehmen agieren weiterhin lokal und unabhängig, sind aber nun global ausgerichtet – als eine Marke, ein Team, eine Vision. Um die neuesten Projekte, globalen Initiativen und Karrieremöglichkeiten zu entdecken, laden wir Sie ein, uns ab sofort auf der globalen Unternehmensseite von Blue Phoenix auf LinkedIn zu folgen. Dort finden Sie alle Neuigkeiten zu unseren Geschäftsbereichen.

Name: wempyre
Description:
wempyre is redefining plastic waste management for industrial businesses. Our decentralized solution enables companies to process plastic waste directly on-site using our specialized containers. These containers convert waste into valuable raw materials that can be reintegrated into production or transformed into 100% green energy for immediate use.

By leveraging wempyre's technology, companies can enhance sustainable production, reduce Scope 3 emissions, and lower operational waste disposal costs. Our mission is to advance circular economy practices and embed innovative, eco-friendly solutions into industrial processes.

Founded in Berlin, wempyre is an early-stage startup dedicated to sustainability, efficiency, and driving the transition to zero-waste manufacturing. Together, we’re building a future without waste.

Name: M+P Umweltdienste GmbH
Description: Die M+P Umweltdienste GmbH ist ein in 2011 gegründeter inhabergeführter Familienbetrieb und beschäftigt sich seitdem mit dem Sammeln, Sortieren, Behandeln und Verwerten von Roh- und Wertstoffen, regional und überregional. „Geben Sie uns den Rest – um alles andere kümmern wir uns dann“, das ist nicht einfach nur unser Motto. Unsere Kunden und Lieferanten aus Industrie und Gewerbe vertrauen uns ihre Abfälle genauso an wie Privatpersonen. Unser geschultes Personal berät in allen Entsorgungsfragen persönlich und individuell. Somit sind wir der Full-Service-Partner, wenn es um  individuell zugeschnittene Entsorgungskonzepte und Recycling geht.

Name: W Platform
Description:
W Platform : une entreprise engagée dans la transition écologique ! 
 
Chez W Platform, nous aidons les entreprises à transformer leurs défis environnementaux en opportunités économiques et responsables.
 
Grâce à nos solutions innovantes de captation, purification et valorisation des effluents gazeux et notamment du CO₂ fermentaire, nous accompagnons les secteurs viti-vinicole, brassicole, méthanisation et industriel dans leurs transitions vers une économie circulaire.
 
Découvrez nos quatre offres :
 CO2 Winery 
 CO2 Brasserie
 CO2 Métha
 CO2 Engineering
 
 Notre mission : Créer des solutions durables adaptées aux besoins de nos clients.
 
Ensemble, agissons et innovons !

Name: REAL Luzern
Description: REAL (Recycling, Entsorgung, Abwasser Luzern) ist ein öffentlich-rechtlicher Gemeindeverband in der Region Luzern. Er ist überkommunal verantwortlich für die Abfallwirtschaft in 21 Verbandsgemeinden sowie für die Abwasserentsorgung in den 15 Gemeinden, die an die Abwasserreinigungsanlagen (ARA) Buholz und Rontal angeschlossen sind. Von den Dienstleistungen des Gemeindeverbands profitieren über 230’000 Einwohner in rund 110’000 Haushaltungen sowie Tausende Betriebe.

Name: Hubert Eing Kunststoffverwertung GmbH
Description:
Wir sind ein mittelständisches, inhabergeführtes Familienunternehmen, das sich seit 1992 der Förderung einer nachhaltigen Zukunft verschrieben hat. Unsere Mission ist es, durch Innovation und Engagement den Kreislauf der Nachhaltigkeit zu schließen und einen positiven Beitrag zur Umwelt zu leisten.

Bei EING Kunststoffverwertung setzen wir auf eine Vielzahl von Lösungen, um Kunststoffabfälle effizient zu recyceln und Ressourcen zu schonen. Von der Recycling verschiedenster Kunststoffe bis zur Erzeugung von Sekundärbrennstoffen aus nicht recycelbarem Material, unser vielseitiges Dienstleistungsangebot trägt dazu bei, den ökologischen Fußabdruck zu verringern und die Abhängigkeit von fossilen Brennstoffen zu reduzieren.

Folgen Sie unserem LinkedIn-Profil, um Einblicke in unsere nachhaltigen Lösungen, inspirierende Geschichten aus der Welt der Kunststoffverwertung und aktuelle Updates zu erhalten. Werden Sie Teil einer Community, die sich für eine grünere Zukunft einsetzt!

Name: Alkaline Technologies
Description:
Driven by research and innovation, we develop cutting-edge solutions for alkaline waste management, integrating advanced metal recovery, CO₂ mineralization, and low-carbon construction material manufacturing.

We provide scientific and engineering services at the interface of waste engineering, geochemistry, and industrial process design, supporting industrial actors in the development of robust, scalable, and data-driven solutions.

Our clients and partners recognize us for our expertise in:

- Advanced characterization of complex waste matrices
(QXRPD, XRF, SEM-EDS, optical microscopy, ICP-MS, IC, etc.)
- CO₂ mineralization applied to alkaline residues
(incineration bottom ash, metallurgical slags, cement kiln dusts, coal fly ash, air pollution control residues)
- Enhanced metal recovery, including density-based separation and fine-fraction upgrading
- Control and stabilization of inorganic pollutants
(Sb, As, Cr, Mo, and other critical or regulated elements)
- Development of sustainable construction materials
(low-carbon binders and aggregates)
- Data science & geochemical databases
(data collection, harmonization, statistics, and process optimization)
- High-quality deliverables
(technical reports, feasibility studies, scientific publications)

Facing a complex waste, resource, or decarbonization challenge that requires the rigor of a laboratory and the agility of a startup?
Let’s talk.

We believe that supporting the ecological transition requires smarter resource management, built on local recycling loops and the creation of high-value secondary raw materials—turning industrial residues into resources for a low-carbon future.

Name: HidroRecursos
Description: Somos ingenieros con más de 20 años de experiencia y conocimiento en equipamiento, tecnología e implementación de soluciones, para la evaluación, transporte y el tratamiento de aguas, riles y olores.

Name: Earthera Sustainable Waste Management PVT LTD
Description: Earthera SWM is Impact first startup and growing Waste Management Company in India. we rethink waste challenges to provide innovative ways to manage it. We aim to provide the best solutions to our clients and create a zero-waste future. We provide state-of-the-art services and solutions to transform environment management practices. Our sustainable and innovative services offer added value to society. We focus on cooperation between economy and research and are convinced that this is the right path to success in today’s complex world. Together, we strive to maintain and create a liveable environment.

Name: Shuddh Sustainable Solutions
Description:
Our Aim is to make mission “Clean India Mission” a success through innovation and expert
solutions working towards “A Green India”.

To integrate and bridge the relationship of Enterprises and Indian End-users to manage different
types of waste more effectively and make uses of modern technology for Integration of waste
management.

We introduce ourselves as a waste management company, single window solution source of
integrated waste management. One of the leading supplier of organic waste associated solutions,
machines/plants, and its maintenance.

The trusted Technology under diversification constituted “Shudh Sustainable Solutions” within
the vicinity of National Capital city Delhi, India. This facilitates close communication and quick
interaction with our end users. 

Shudh Sustainable Solutions established in the year 2015, after completion of long R&D started
autonomous fabrications & manufacturing of decentralized solid waste management solution. This
the company is a pioneer to the innovative idea and converting those ideas into reality by using the skills &
knowledge of long experienced, trained for multi technology & systems engineers & technicians the
Shudh.
We are Original Equipment Manufacturer (OEM) for Shudh Waste Processor (SWP) which is an
Organic Waste Composting system and associated spare parts with Quality to provide a system on
reasonable cost. We are Manufacturing and supply genuine/reliable spares parts, assemblies of
different type of SWP systems including customized/Standard solution SWP to our end-users.
Our R&D department is dedicating to improve efficiency and make it more economical through better
& usable by-products. The by-products such as Bio- manure, and energy sticks are highly in demand
and a big need of country today. The rejects of gardens are huge in volume. After imposing of

Analyse et étude : Nous réalisons des études approfondies pour évaluer et valoriser le potentiel des déchets organiques.

Conditionnement des déchets : Grâce à des techniques avancées comme le dégrillage, l'épaississement et la déshydratation, nous préparons les déchets pour leur valorisation.

Nous croyons fermement que chaque déchet a une valeur et nous efforçons de maximiser celle-ci par des solutions innovantes et durables. Notre équipe d'experts est dédiée à offrir des services de haute qualité pour contribuer à la protection de notre environnement.

Name: CCI BioEnergy
Description:
Welcome to CCI BioEnergy – Pioneering Organics Processing Solutions with Anaerobic Digestion

Established in 1992, CCI BioEnergy is recognized as a pioneer in North America for developing innovative organics processing solutions through Anaerobic Digestion (AD). Our journey began with a vision that waste management challenges present an opportunity to revolutionize our approach and recognize the organic fraction in waste as a valuable resource.

As a privately held company headquartered in Toronto, Ontario, Canada, we are the exclusive license holders for the commercially proven AD technology known as “The BTA Process” in both Canada and the USA. This North American patented solution originated in Europe and was developed and successfully commercialized in the early 1980s. Over the years, it has been effectively implemented across various countries.

The core strength of “The BTA Process” lies in its ability to efficiently process the organic fraction of Municipal Solid Waste (MSW) and heavily contaminated kitchen waste, such as Source Separated Organics (SSO) generated in homes, businesses, and industries.

Presently, our technology facilitates the annual production of more than 200 million Nm3 of biogas at over 55 BTA facilities, equivalent to approximately 120 million Nm3 of natural gas. This impressive achievement highlights the substantial impact of our environmentally friendly solutions in generating renewable energy and reducing waste.

In 2021, CCI BioEnergy was acquired by Evergreen Environmental Inc., a company specializing in developing high-quality waste facilities that provide the highest diversion rates, ensuring the highest reliability in waste management solutions.

Name: Re-nêtre
Description:
Re-nêtre est une entreprise d'insertion spécialisée dans la réutilisation et le recyclage des menuiseries vitrées, 

Pourquoi cette activité ? Ce type de déchet majoritairement orienté vers l'enfouissement (+ de 97%) est concerné par des enjeux cruciaux en matière d'économie circulaire, notamment en ce qui concerne le recyclage du verre plat. Le verre plat n'est aujourd'hui valorisé qu'à 3%, alors même que les ressources en sable s'amenuisent considérablement et que le monde fera bientôt face à une pénurie. 

En fonction de l'état des menuiseries réceptionnées et de la demande, nous effectuons une préparation à la réutilisation, permettant de redonner à ces déchets le statut de produit et d'être réintégrés sur des bâtiments ou pour de nouveaux usages.

Lorsque la réutilisation n'est pas possible, nous faisons le choix d'un procédé de démantèlement manuel afin de créer des postes de travail adaptés à des personnes éloignées de l'emploi, et pour garantir un recyclage du verre de qualité. Le verre est ainsi renvoyé directement vers des fours de fabrication de verre plat situés en France. Les métaux et le PVC composant le cadre sont également renvoyé vers des filières françaises de recyclage en boucle fermée. Le bois est broyé pour alimenter la fabrication de panneaux de bois ou pour devenir du bois de chauffe. Une réflexion sur une filière de réutilisation de bois de menuiserie est en cours.

Name: Move Fast Restoration
Description:
At Move Fast Restoration, we understand that when disaster strikes—whether it’s water damage, fire, or mold—you need immediate, expert help. Name: Verein Rheintalgas
Description:
Der Verein Rheintalgas wurde gegründet, um die Passion der beiden Gründer für das Thema Biogas an möglichst viele andere weiterzugeben. Die Erzeugung von Biogas ist aus unserer Sicht die Beste Möglichkeit Speisereste zu Verarbeiten und dabei erneuerbare Energie und einen natürlichen Dünger zu erzeugen. Im Vergleich zu Wasserkraft, Sonnen- oder Windenergie wird es sicher nur einen kleinen Teil zur Energiewende beitragen, doch wir werden alle uns zur Verfügung stehende Möglichkeiten nutzen müssen, um das 1,5°C-Ziel zu erreichen.

Ziel des Vereins ist es eine Kleinbiogasanlage im Rheintal zu errichten, um in Form eines Pilotprojekts auf das Thema Biogas aufmerksam zu machen. Dies beginnt bei der Abfallvermeidung, der sortenreinen Sammlung und endet bei der sparsamen Verwendung der erzeugten erneuerbaren Energie bzw. des Düngers.

KG in Memmingen angehört – ist seit Jahren zuverlässiger Partner von Gewerbe, Industrie, Handel, Vereinen, Privatkunden und Kommunen.

Name: Returkraft
Description:
Returkraft er et energigjenvinningsanlegg som ligger på Langemyr, 5 km nord for Kristiansand sentrum.
Vi eies av 6 interkommunale renovasjonsselskap på Agder og har vært i drift siden 2010. Vi håndterer omtrent 130 000 avfall årlig.

Returkraft sørger for forsvarlig håndtering av kommunalt restavfall på vegne av våre eiere, i tillegg til næringsavfall, og visse typer spesialavfall. Anlegget tar ikke imot avfall direkte fra privatpersoner og bedrifter, dette skjer gjennom godkjente avfallsselskaper. 

Returkrafts oppdrag er å redusere forurensning fra avfall som ikke bør eller kan beholdes i kretsløpet. Avfallet håndteres gjennom forbrenning i en stor forbrenningsovn. Energien fra avfallet gjenvinnes til elektrisitet og fjernvarme, mens de farlige stoffene som frigjøres til røyken i forbrenningsprosessen blir renset ut i avanserte renseanlegg. Returkrafts utslipp ligger langt under myndighetenes krav.

Name: Servicios Ambientales Las Chozas
Description:
SACh fue fundada en 2011 con la idea de innovar en el sector del reciclaje, concretamente de subproductos de la producción y comercialización agrícola en la comarca del Poniente almeriense, además de garantizar un control total de los procesos de tratamiento y la consecución de un valor añadido del residuo para su posterior reutilización.

Nuestra actividad principal es la gestión y tratamiento de residuos orgánicos procedentes de la agricultura bajo plástico. En SACh gestionamos alrededor de 60.000 toneladas de residuos orgánicos al año, en su inmensa mayoría biomasa vegetal de la producción agrícola en invernadero de Almería y el resto de destríos del manipulado de productos hortofrutícolas. Con esta materia prima se obtienen unas 12.000 toneladas de compost que se distribuyen a las propias explotaciones agrícolas de donde procede la biomasa.

Contamos con unas instalaciones de más de 50.000 m2 de superficie situadas en el término municipal de El Ejido (Almería).

Name: Sage Promaster Sdn Bhd
Description:
Sage Promaster Sdn Bhd is a leading provider of total waste management solutions for industrial waste streams in Malaysia. We collaborate with top manufacturing companies across Peninsular and East Malaysia, helping them minimise the environmental impact of their waste. Our operations include a fleet of purpose-built waste collection vehicles and a state-of-the-art waste treatment facility located in the green state of Melaka. We are licensed to collect, transport, and recover 14 scheduled waste codes under the Environmental Quality Act 1974.

As a Malaysian-owned company with a global mission, we aim to shift industries away from the traditional "Cradle to Grave" waste management approach—such as incineration and landfilling—towards a "Cradle to Cradle" model, promoting sustainability through recovery and reuse. Our proprietary energy recovery technology converts scheduled waste into Sagefuels, a sustainable solid fuel alternative to coal and coke, enabling energy-intensive industries to reduce their reliance on fossil fuels.

Through our innovative waste recovery processes, we significantly reduce landfill and incineration dependency while maximising the use of natural resources. This approach not only supports carbon reduction efforts but also contributes to climate action and ESG goals, aligning with Malaysia’s path towards a sustainable and circular economy.

At Sage Promaster, we are committed to driving positive change in industrial waste management and encouraging businesses to adopt responsible, low-carbon solutions that benefit both the environment and the economy.

Name: Berca Brand - Composting technologies for biowaste , green waste , sludge and others.
Description:
Berca Brand (www.berca.es) was founded with the compromise to distribute composting equipments. The dedication of our company is the whole business regarding composting
As the owner of Bigbhanna we distribute the machines worldwide now.

BERCA GROUP is a group of Spanish companies working in different sectors, some of which focus on offering consulting and advice services in the field of composting, in addition to importing and distributing different domestic and semi-industrial composting-related products in various countries around the world.

Around 50% of the content of our waste is organic matter and implementing treatment systems at the place of production will prevent this fraction from entering the management circuits, contributing to the effective reduction of waste and eliminating unnecessary transportation of waste, which will result in lower emissions of greenhouse gases and a reduction in the consumption of natural resources.

Therefore, our products are the best alternative to traditional methods used to treat organic matter in waste and this is why they are currently in high demand.

We firmly believe in composting as an alternative to waste disposal and incineration sites, which are very harmful to the environment due to the high contamination levels they generate and are responsible for extremely high greenhouse gas emissions.

BIG HANNA allows you to treat the organic matter produced in markets, shopping centres, school canteens, etc.; directly at the place of production, with almost no consumption of electricity and not requiring the transportation of the largest fraction that our waste contains. Likewise, your green areas can be fertilised with the compost produced, closing the natural cycle of organic matter.

Name: Aadvikaa Clean Tech
Description:
"Aadvikaa Clean Tech Association (A Not-For-Profit organisation) believe that "Stopping pollution is not the Best Solution“ making people aware of the consequences is. In the current scenario the entire onus for managing Plastic pollution falls on the Government or Corporates neglecting personal and individual accountability. Our association is committed to creating a Sustainable Plastic Economy, co-creating the Way Forward with Citizen, Corporates, Institutions, Plastic Handlers to build an all-inclusive Circular Economy which will be a self-sustaining Model 

Currently there are many Waste Management and State Govt. Agencies who are engaged in handling waste and trying to solve the problem of pollution and litter. This exercise has been going on for many years but nobody has been able to tackle the problem of litter on the street because of its of low value. Our aim is community educate in plastic waste disposal so that we can drive value chain and arrest its spillover to co-create sustainable circularity.

Our Objectives:
Envisaging a zero waste lifestyle together
Educating / enlightening in plastic disposal in societies / Schools / Corporates
Waste Segregation.
Cleaner and Healthy Environment for the waste handlers. If plastic or other items are disposed clean then filth is eliminated and the Rag picker community can work in clean centres. 
Organise the unorganised sector of Kabadiwala and recycler
Complete traceability of plastic through customised digital platform designed to facilitate traceability & accountability.
Ensuring sustainability & Circular economy 

Thus Aadvikaa Clean Tech Association has a complete End to End implementable solution to the entire Waste Management challenges that India or rest of the World are facing.

Name: Gestora de Runes de la Construcció
Description:
Gestora de Runes de la Construcció (GRC) és una empresa fundada l’any 1994 que gestiona la deposició controlada dels residus de la construcció i n’impulsa la seva valorització i selecció en origen a través d’una extensa xarxa de dipòsits controlats, plantes de reciclatge i plantes de transferència a tot el territori català. Pionera a Espanya i a Europa, GRC és una empresa mixte públic-privada, que ha fet compatible l’activitat constructora i la preservació del medi ambient.

L’actuació de la Gestora se sustenta en 5 principis:
· Gestió dels residus de la construcció fomentant la minimització a través del reciclatge, la reutilització en origen i la innovació.
· Prioritat de la col·laboració amb les Administracions en el desenvolupament normatiu i de les polítiques de qualitat.
· Impuls de la cooperació amb les empreses i els gremis sectorials.
· Responsabilitat corporativa i aposta per la qualitat a través d’un Sistema de Gestió Integral de Qualitat, Medi Ambient i Seguretat Laboral.
· Foment i sensibilització per una correcta gestió dels residus, pedagogia de la legislació i suport pel seu acompliment.

Name: KS-Recycling GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Wir, die KSR-Gruppe, entsorgen Abfälle und Reststoffe nicht nur fachgerecht, sondern haben es uns zur Aufgabe gemacht, sie soweit wie möglich wieder zu verwerten. Damit leisten wir einen wichtigen Beitrag zur Schonung natürlicher Ressourcen und machen das Prinzip der ökologischen und ökonomischen Nachhaltigkeit mit dem Unternehmensziel „zero-emission“ quasi zum Betriebszweck.

Wir kümmern uns seit vielen Jahren um die Entsorgung und Wiederverwertung von Sonderabfällen aus Handwerk und Industrie, insbesondere Altöle und Altölemulsionen, Schmierstoffe und Lösemittel sowie hoch kontaminierte Abwässer, aber auch feste Abfälle wie fett- und ölhaltige Betriebsmittel. Dabei garantieren wir ein Höchstmaß an Umweltverantwortung, Rechtssicherheit und Zuverlässigkeit. Durch hoch spezialisierte Aufbereitungsverfahren bieten wir Unternehmen verschiedene Produkte für diverse Einsatzzwecke an.

Durch umweltbewusstes Handeln und neue Verfahren, die über den Stand der Technik hinausgehen, wollen wir die von unserer Tätigkeit ausgehenden Umweltbelastungen verringern. Wir verpflichten uns deshalb, natürliche Ressourcen wie Trinkwasser und Energie sparsam zu verwenden und soweit wie möglich einzusparen sowie Emissionen zu vermeiden.

Name: Palsana Enviro Protection Limited (PEPL)
Description:
Palsana Enviro Protection Limited (PEPL) located at Block No 527-528, Opp- Mcdonalds, Near Kadodara Char Rasta, Mumbai-Ahmedabad NH No 8, Vill: Umbhel, Tal.: Kamrej, Dist Surat: 394325, Gujarat, is a company promoted by cluster of textile processing industries (member industries) for setting up of Common Effluent Treatment Plant (CETP) for conveyance, treatment and disposal of waste water generated from the Member industries. These industries are located in area of approximately 100 Sq Km Area. PEPL started its operational actvities from 2008 with treatment capacity of 50 MLD and as of today its capacity is 150 MLD with recycling facility of 50 MLD. PEPL started recycling its treated water to its member units to use it in their process activities.
PEPL is the first private entity who initiated to recycle the treated waste water in such a huge quantity to member units for reuse in non-potable activity. In connection of Waste to Wealth (W2W) concept PEPL installed India’s first Solar Sludge Drying System to eliminate the moisture content from sludge generated in CETP and reuse the dried sludge as a fuel in Boiler and cement Industries, in fertilizer, bricks making, In Green Highway development etc.
Apart from this PEPL also established complete Fire & Emergency Service Station operating 24/7 to tackle any emergency in entire South Gujarat zone as a CSR activity.

Name: AvaL Standard
Description:
Was ist der Standard AvaL?

Die Digitalisierung hält in der Kreislaufwirtschaft zweifelsohne Einzug. Derzeit wird an einer branchenoffenen, standardisierten Schnittstelle gearbeitet, die eine einheitliche Kommunikation der Entsorger untereinander und künftig auch zwischen Entsorgern, deren Kunden und den Behörden ermöglichen soll.

Die zu definierende Schnittstelle zum „Austausch von auftragsbezogenen Leistungsdaten“ wird dabei bewusst branchenoffen gestaltet, damit systemübergreifend in der Branche ein Austausch gleicher oder ähnlicher Leistungsdaten gewährleistet werden kann.

Nachfolgend dargestellt ist ein Überblick über die Kommunikation zwischen den verschiedenen IT‐Systemen in der Entsorgungswirtschaft über internetbasierte Mechanismen:

Wofür dient AvaL?

Ziel der Unternehmen ist es, mittels AvaL eine einheitliche Schnittstelle und Digitalisierungssprache zu erhalten, mit der in der hochgradig heterogenen Partnerstruktur kommuniziert werden kann.

Damit wollen wir in naher Zukunft zumindest Massenprozesse in der bidirektionalen Kommunikation digitalisieren. AvaL bildet dabei einen zentralen Baustein innerhalb einer größeren Digitalisierungsstrategie einschl. ZUGFeRD-Format und Dokumentenaustausch.

Vorteil von AvaL ist aus unserer Sicht dabei der pragmatische Ansatz über mehrere Stufen, die gerade in der ersten laufenden Pilotphase einen einfacheren Einstieg in das Thema Datenaustausch ohne akutes Stammdatenmatching (Leistungen etc.) beim Auftragsvorgang bietet.

Wo erleichtert AvaL die tägliche Arbeit?

Das Abtippen tausender Daten pro Tag und die "händische" Rückmeldung von geleisteten Daten wird durch die direkte Kommunikation der ERP-Systeme ersetzt.

In diesem Zusammenhang verschwinden auch die vermeintlich vielen Tippfehler und somit entstandene etliche Missverständnisse zwischen AG und AN  gehören, ebenso wie Mengen an Papier die bis dato mühsam per Post verschickt oder zusätzlich eingescannt werden mussten, der Vergangenheit an.

ENGLISH VERSION

Description:

Ora è in grado di soddisfare ogni tipo di esigenza nella gestione di rifiuti liquidi speciali e nella conduzione di acque bianche e nere.
L’azienda, nel tempo, si è nel tempo costantemente aggiornata, quanto a metodo e attrezzature, e attualmente possiede uno staff altamente qualificato nella fruizione dei seguenti servizi: 
-Smaltimento rifiuti liquidi speciali
-Trasporto rifiuti
-Noleggio Bagni chimici per Eventi/cantieri
-Sturamento reti bianche e nere
-Manutenzione reti fognarie
-Videoispezioni
-Trattamento fanghi in loco
-Aspirazione fanghi e macerie edili
-Trasporto acqua potabile
Rizzi Arcangelo Ecologia offre servizi ecologici nel pieno rispetto delle norme italiane ed europee di riferimento ed è in possesso di tutte le principali certificazioni del settore.
Questo le consente di garantire elevati standard qualitativi in tutti i processi aziendali: dal trasporto allo smaltimento dei rifiuti, dal trattamento di liquami o rifiuti speciali, alla conduzione di reti bianche e nere, fino al ripristino del corretto funzionamento dei sistemi fognari.

Name: AbfallWirtschaftsGesellschaft mbH Bassum
Description:
As AbfallWirtschaftsGesellschaft mbH (AWG), a wholly owned subsidiary of the Diepholz district, we have traditionally been entrusted with waste and recycling management in the region. Around 170 employees see it as their main task to offer the people and businesses in the Diepholz district a good and reliable service. This covers waste, recyclables and pollutants, whether from private households, agriculture or commerce.

With modern disposal vehicles, we reliably empty waste containers throughout the entire district. In addition, citizens have access to four large-scale recycling centers, numerous mini-recycling centers and various collection points for self-delivery of waste and recyclable materials. This waste is then treated and recycled at treatment facilities, for example directly at the Bassum waste disposal center or by selected contractual partners. In addition, a further focus of activities has emerged in recent years: alternative energy generation through biogas, wind power and photovoltaic systems.

Name: SYTRAIVAL
Description:

Depuis sa création, en 1978, les élus en charge de la gestion du Sytraival ont pour objectifs prioritaires la valorisation de nos déchets ménagers et la protection de notre environnement.
Au travers de l'ensemble de ses compétences, le Sytraival propose à ses neuf collectivités adhérentes un éventail complet de solutions de traitement et de valorisation des ordures résiduelles. L'objectif de tous étant que chaque objet jeté sur notre territoire se retrouve dans la bonne filière de valorisation.

Description:
Our vision is to produce CO2 cement substitute from mineral waste 

For far too long the whole world has closed its eyes to our waste problems and ignored one of the most challenging environmental problems of our time.

Sweeping our waste problem under the carpet. Concealing waste materials under the same soil that should be feeding generations to come. Reducing our consumption of raw materials is not the answer alone — It's time to look towards circular solutions. 

It takes three to create a global impact.

Trinity Synergies is on a mission to revolutionize the waste industry by converting environmentally challenging mineral waste into new recyclable cement substitute. 
We bring valuable wasted raw materials back into circulation through our innovative technology with a minimal environmental impact.

If we stand together, we can make an even greater and more noticeable impact on the global waste crisis. That’s why we are teaming up with the best and most ambitious companies in the industry. Creating valuable synergies and facing the problems in trinity.

Name: Dabbouza
Description:
Dabbouza est un concept basé sur la récupération de bouteilles en verre (recyclage), et leur transformation en éléments de décoration uniques.

L’idée est venue lorsque on a remarqué qu’il y a de très belles bouteilles jetées à la poubelle étant utilisées, et on a vu en elles du potentiel. 

Cette bouteille en verre soigneusement fabriquée sous différentes formes et aspects ne devrait pas finir en déchet. Seulement, l’intégrer dans nos espaces de vie en tant que telle ne suffisait pas malgré la beauté de ses formes et de ses couleurs.

Chaque modèle montre un caractère distinct; fort, doux, et parfois rêveur. 

On a décidé alors de lui redonner vie et de mettre en valeur son âme, en travaillant sur l’idée du recyclage pour créer un élément décoratif composé et qui reflète la personnalité de son détenteur.

Mon équipe et moi avons travaillé dans ce sens en utilisant des matériaux différents pour créer la bouteille luminaire, que nous vous présentons au fur et à mesure; les thèmes sont aussi variés que les histoires que nous voudrions vous raconter.

Description:
Ecobionex, established in Bangladesh in 2025, a concern of Shitav Trade International, is a waste recycling management company focused on waste-recycling trade and sustainable resource recovery. Specializing in the collection, processing, and trading of Used Cooking Oil (UCO) and other waste recycling materials, the company supplies waste materials to energy-manufacturing industries, supporting cleaner energy and the circular economy. The company exports to markets across Asia, Europe, and the United States, contributing to global sustainability initiatives.

With a mission to reduce pollution, promote circular-economy practices, and support greener industries, Ecobionex partners with restaurants, hotels, food manufacturers, and households to ensure safe and efficient UCO management. Through modern logistics, strict quality protocols, and eco-friendly recycling technologies, the company helps prevent improper oil disposal while contributing to the production of biodiesel and other renewable products. The company also engages in other waste-recycling material trade and waste-to-energy initiatives, supporting cleaner energy production and circular-economy growth.

Ecobionex aims to be a leader in Bangladesh’s growing recycling sector by offering reliable waste-management solutions, disposal, raising awareness on sustainable practices, trade and driving innovation in responsible resource recovery.

Wij werken met een containerservice voor grote aanbieders zoals de metaalverwerkende industrie maar ook de particulier kan met metaal en/of afval bij ons terecht. Wij zorgen ervoor dat de diverse metaalstromen gescheiden worden en dat metaal geschikt gemaakt wordt om hergebruikt te worden. IJzer, staal, RVS, aluminium, koper, zink, lood, elektromotoren, nikkel etc. u kunt het allemaal bij ons kwijt.

Naast het recyclen van metaal biedt Schrijver ook de service voor het huren van containers. Zo maken wij bouwafval afvoeren makkelijk voor u. Bij ons kunt u afvalcontainers bestellen in diverse formaten. Hoe gaat een container huren in zijn werk? Eerst kiest u om wat voor soort afval het gaat. Misschien zoekt u een container voor bouw- en sloopafval, een ijzer en metaal container, of een groencontainer. Selecteer het juiste soort afval en kies daarna het gewenste formaat van de container.

Een container bestellen in Zutphen en omgeving kan eenvoudig en snel online, maar ook telefonisch. Is de container vol? Dan kunt u deze aanmelden via onze website of door te bellen, en dan komen wij deze ophalen!

Name: Philafeed
Description:
Philafeed is a small-scale black soldier fly farm that is committed to sustainable food and feed production. Our approach emphasizes simplicity, adaptability, and community involvement. We design our facility to minimize waste, reduce emissions, and prioritize ecological sustainability. 

At Philafeed, we're all about turning waste into gold - or rather, black soldier fly larvae and nutrient-rich frass. Using the magic of black soldier fly technology, we transform organic waste into protein-rich biomass that can be used in animal feed or fertilizer. It's a win-win for the environment and our furry and feathered friends! Black soldier fly technology is even recognized as a Sustainable Development Goals (SDG) unicorn, meaning it tackles multiple sustainability challenges at once. 

At Philafeed, we believe that sustainability should be fun! That's why we organize community events, such as workshops and educational tours, to engage with our local community and spread awareness about the benefits of black soldier fly technology, circular economy and closed food loop systems.

But fun aside, we take our mission seriously. Our goal is to create a replicable and scalable model for sustainable food and feed production that can be adapted and implemented in different contexts. We prioritize simplicity and adaptability in the design of our facility, using readily available materials and designing a system that can be easily modified or expanded as needed. 

At Philafeed, we believe that sustainable food and feed production is not only necessary for the health of our planet, but also for the well-being of our communities. Join us as we strive to create a sustainable and fun future for all!

Name: SorTex-projektet
Description:
Vores tekstilforbrug er én af tidens største klimabelastninger. I dag genereres der på verdensplan årligt 7,5 megaton tekstilaffald, og hvert eneste sekund bliver der afbrændt hvad der svarer til en lastbilfuld af tekstiler. Den udvikling skal vendes. 

EU-projektet SorTex skal teste og udvikle løsninger på, hvordan tekstilaffald kan indsamles, forsorteres og genanvendes i cirkulære forretningsmodeller, så materialerne fremover bliver en ressource fremfor affald.

SorTex samler 13 partnere i Danmark og Sverige i et partnerskab mellem offentlige og private aktører i hele værdikæden for tekstilaffald - fra indsamling til forsortering, genbrug og genanvendelse. Samarbejdet gør det muligt at kombinere teknologier og kompetencer på tværs af grænser, som er afgørende for at løse de internationale udfordringer, som den store mængde tekstilaffald i verden medfører, og som ingen kan løse alene.

Projektet er støttet med midler fra Den Europæiske Regionale Udviklingsfond og EU-Programmet Interreg Øresund-Kattegat-Skagerrak.

Name: VHE-Nord e.V. - Verband der Humus- und Erdenwirtschaft Region Nord e.V.
Description:
Herzlich willkommen!

Seit mehr als einem Vierteljahrhundert existiert eine flächendeckende Kompostwirtschaft. Private wie kommunale Kompostierungsunternehmen leisten damit bundesweit einen wichtigen Beitrag zur Kreislaufwirtschaft und zum Klimaschutz.

Kompost ist Klimaschutz. Kompost ist Ressourcenschutz. Kompost ist Kreislaufdenken: Abfall, Kompost, Humus, Boden, Pflanzen, Lebensmittel – bestenfalls beginnt alles wieder von neuem.

Der im Jahr 1995 gegründete Verband der Humus- und Erdenwirtschaft (VHE) Nord e. V. vertritt die Interessen der jungen Branche in den norddeutschen Bundesländern Niedersachsen, Bremen, Mecklenburg Vorpommern, Hamburg und Schleswig-Holstein.

Von Beginn betrachtet der VHE-Nord e.V. die Kompostierung als integrales Element einer nachhaltigen Kreislaufwirtschaft. In Zeiten des sich abzeichnenden Klimawandel ist das Ziel des Verbandes klar definiert: Weg vom Begriff Abfall, stattdessen so viel Organik wie möglich im Kreislauf zu halten.

Das klingt wie eine Selbstverständlichkeit, ist es bis dato allerdings noch nicht. Es gibt weiterhin Probleme – aber auch Widerstände. In der Politik, in der Abfallwirtschaft, in der Öffentlichkeit.

Und: Es landen immer noch viel zu viele Fehlstoffe in den Biotonnen. Und immer ist es noch so, dass es in manchen Gebieten, obschon gesetzlich vorgeschrieben, sich immer noch keine separate Sammlung von Bioabfällen bzw. Grünschnitt etabliert hat.

Nicht nur deswegen braucht die Kompostwirtschaft eine einheitliche und unabhängige Stimme, um die breite Öffentlichkeit, die Bürger und Bürgerinnen, Behörden, Politik und auch die Forschung zum Thema Kompostierung sowie ihre klima- und ressourcenpolitische Relevanz aufzuklären. Der VHE-Nord e.V. vermittelt dabei zwischen Gesetzgeber, Hersteller und Anwender von Humus- und Erdenprodukten.

Name: AGS Energy Limited
Description:
Tackling Challenging Organic Waste Streams. 

We provide a better, safer, more cost-effective way of disposing of waste. Our systems generate net positive energy, with minimal emissions and parasitic loads, from most difficult waste streams including : Medical Waste, Agricultural Food & Beverage Waste, Water & Waste Water Treatment Plants, Poultry Processing Industry, Paper Pulp Industry and Marine Waste.

Our systems generate net positive energy, with minimal emissions and parasitic loads, from most difficult waste streams. Additional benefits include:

CARBON EMISSIONS REDUCTIONS - From transport offset and fuel offset.

ZERO WASTE TO LANDFILL - The ash from our unit can be used as fertiliser in horticulture and is typically only 5-8% of input mass.

ZERO CROSS-CONTAMINATION - Waste is treated onsite and there is no need for it to traverse on public transportation infrastructure.

REDUCTION IN TRANSPORT - Less HGV’s on processing sites and road networks. Reduction in air pollution, noise and traffic as a result.

LOW MAINTENANCE AND OPERATIONAL COSTS - There are very few moving parts. 

CARBON CREDITS - Our technology qualifies for CO2 carbon credits.

In partnership with industry leading technology partners, we have developed a system that is reliable and robust and offers sector leading performance in the conversion of organic waste streams to meaningful renewable energy. 

In contrast to its simplicity of construction and installation, the technology is supplied with highly sophisticated hardware and software operating systems

OUTPUT ENERGY includes :  Constant Hot Water, Steam, Chilled Water and Electricity.

Name: Onunda
Description:

Écologiques : Nos solutions sont conçues pour minimiser l'impact environnemental en favorisant le recyclage et la valorisation des déchets organiques.
Économiques : En optimisant la gestion des biodéchets, vous pourrez réaliser des économies significatives sur les coûts liés à l'élimination des déchets.
