Name: BRUXELLES ENERGIE - BRUSSEL ENERGIE
Description:
Bruxelles Énergie est l'opérateur de l'unité de valorisation énergétique des déchets de la Région de Bruxelles-Capitale. Cette installation traite les déchets non recyclables en les incinérant pour produire de l'énergie sous forme d'électricité et de chaleur. L'électricité générée est injectée dans le réseau, tandis que la chaleur alimente le réseau de chauffage urbain, contribuant ainsi à une gestion durable des déchets et à la production d'énergie renouvelable pour la région. 

Notre entreprise contribue ainsi à la réalisation des objectifs fixés par l'Union européenne en matière de production d'énergies renouvelables, offrant aux Bruxellois la possibilité de devenir producteurs de leur propre énergie verte. 

---------------------------------------------------------------------
Brussel-Energie is de exploitant van de energievalorisatie-eenheid voor afval in het Brussels Hoofdstedelijk Gewest. Deze installatie verwerkt niet-recycleerbaar afval door het te verbranden om energie in de vorm van elektriciteit en warmte te produceren. De opgewekte elektriciteit wordt geïnjecteerd in het netwerk, terwijl de warmte het stadsverwarmingsnet van energie voorziet, wat bijdraagt aan een duurzame afvalbeheer en de productie van hernieuwbare energie voor de regio.

Ons bedrijf draagt zo bij aan de realisatie van de doelstellingen die door de Europese Unie zijn vastgesteld op het gebied van hernieuwbare energieproductie, en biedt de Brusselaars de mogelijkheid om producenten van hun eigen groene energie te worden.

Name: Zoe Waste and Recycling
Description:
The Rockstar Waste Services Limited (ThRoWS Ltd.) is a Limited Liability Company based in Sekondi-Takoradi, Western Region, extending its services to all the 16 regions in Ghana. ThRoWS Ltd. was formed in January, 2019 and it is registered with the Registrar-General’s Department with registration number CS090932019 and Public Procurement Authority with Supplier number 660851. Registration documents are attached to annex 2 of this document.
ThRoWS Ltd. is working in partnership with Ghana Hotels Association, Western Region Branch and Ghana National Association of Private Schools, Sekondi – Takoradi Zone to implement our innovative and sustainable waste management program called “Sustainable Waste Management through Partnerships (SuWMaP) Program”. 
ThRoWS limited is the only waste management company in Ghana that uniquely tackles the solid waste management challenges using intensive education on best solid waste management practices, efficient solid waste collection services with modern technology and cost effective strategies, recycling/composting and reuse. 

Our Vision 
A world in which people are concerned about environmental issues and are committed to keeping their surroundings clean.

Our Mission 
To manage solid waste as a resource, promoting sustainable, environmentally sound and cost effective practices.

Objectives 
1.	To promote and sustain a clean environment in Ghana through intensive education and waste segregation at source.
2.	To provide affordable and efficient waste collection services to Ghanaians. 
3.	To store and recycle all waste collected.
4.	To produce and process viable agricultural produce for both local consumption and for export 
5.	To improve access to affordable, reliable and modern energy to Ghanaians, especially, those living in rural areas.

Name: BEST RECYCLING MALI
Description:
Avec une expertise au cœur de l'Économie Circulaire, se concentrant sur le processus complet de transformation des déchets plastiques. Je supervise le cycle de vie qui fait passer le plastique d'un déchet à une Matière Première Secondaire (MPR) de haute qualité.
Je suis passionné(e) par la mise en œuvre technique et stratégique des étapes clés :
Collecte et Triage de Précision : Garantir la séparation efficace des polymères (PVC, PET, PE, etc.) pour une pureté maximale.
Transformation Industrielle : Gérer le broyage, le lavage et l'extrusion qui convertissent les déchets en granulés plastiques prêts à l'emploi.
Ces granulés sont ensuite réintégrés dans l'industrie pour la fabrication de produits essentiels, notamment les gaines et tuyaux en PVC et Polyéthylène.
Notre objectif : Réduire l'empreinte carbone et renforcer la résilience de la chaîne d'approvisionnement en offrant une alternative durable au plastique vierge.
Connectons-nous pour échanger sur l'innovation, l'efficacité des processus de recyclage et l'avenir durable de l'industrie.

- Plus de 38 000 tonnes par an de déchets collectés en porte-à-porte et plus de 10 000 tonnes par an en points d'apport volontaire avec une flotte de 20 bennes à ordures.

Name: The Rockstar Waste Services Ltd.
Description:
The Rockstar Waste Services Limited (ThRoWS Ltd.) is a Limited Liability Company based in Sekondi-Takoradi, Western Region, extending its services to all the 16 regions in Ghana. ThRoWS Ltd. was formed in January, 2019 and it is registered with the Registrar-General’s Department with registration number CS090932019 and Public Procurement Authority with Supplier number 660851. Registration documents are attached to annex 2 of this document.
ThRoWS Ltd. is working in partnership with Ghana Hotels Association, Western Region Branch and Ghana National Association of Private Schools, Sekondi – Takoradi Zone to implement our innovative and sustainable waste management program called “Sustainable Waste Management through Partnerships (SuWMaP) Program”. 
ThRoWS limited is the only waste management company in Ghana that uniquely tackles the solid waste management challenges using intensive education on best solid waste management practices, efficient solid waste collection services with modern technology and cost effective strategies, recycling/composting and reuse. 

Our Vision 
A world in which people are concerned about environmental issues and are committed to keeping their surroundings clean.

Our Mission 
To manage solid waste as a resource, promoting sustainable, environmentally sound and cost effective practices.

Objectives 
1.	To promote and sustain a clean environment in Ghana through intensive education and waste segregation at source.
2.	To provide affordable and efficient waste collection services to Ghanaians. 
3.	To store and recycle all waste collected.
4.	To produce and process viable agricultural produce for both local consumption and for export 
5.	To improve access to affordable, reliable and modern energy to Ghanaians, especially, those living in rural areas.

Name: M-INDUSTRIES Groupe
Description:
M-Industries est un acteur engagé dans l'économie circulaire des déchets, contribuant à la transition écologique.

 Notre Mission

Chez M-Industries, notre mission est simple : jouer un rôle significatif dans la préservation de notre planète en adoptant une approche responsable de la gestion de nos déchets. Nous nous efforçons de réduire notre impact environnemental tout en favorisant des pratiques commerciales durables.

 Nos Domaines d'Activité :

- Recyclage Responsable : Opérant des sites industriels spécialisés dans le recyclage de métaux ferreux et non ferreux, nous donnons une seconde vie aux matériaux tout en réduisant les déchets.
- Commerce International : Engagés dans le négoce international de métaux ferreux, nous exploitons également des quais maritimes et fluviaux pour faciliter l'export.
- Mobilité Durable : Avec notre centre VHU et la vente de pièces automobiles d'occasion, nous participons à la promotion d'une mobilité plus respectueuse de l'environnement.

 Décarbonation et RSE

Nous sommes résolument engagés dans la décarbonation de nos opérations, œuvrant pour réduire notre empreinte carbone et favoriser des processus respectueux du climat. Notre politique RSE est au cœur de nos décisions, guidant nos actions pour promouvoir l'éthique, la transparence, et l'inclusion sociale.

 Notre Engagement

Notre engagement en faveur du développement durable ne se limite pas aux mots, mais se traduit par des actions tangibles. Nous travaillons à minimiser notre empreinte écologique à travers des pratiques innovantes et des partenariats stratégiques.

Name: Canadian Mattress Recycling

Otra de nuestras linea de negocios ¨Energía Facil By Conviert3¨  Estamos unidos a la empresa Multinacional MASPV ENEGERY juntos realizamos estudios de ahorros energéticos, vendemos productos para ahorro de energía de impacto inmediato. 

Creemos ciegamente que, entre todos, tenemos el poder de revertir el daño que hemos causado en el planeta.

Description:
Als mittelständischer Entsorgungsfachbetrieb bieten wir umfassende Lösungen in der Recycling-und Abfallwirtschaft an. 
Unsere Dienstleistungen umfassen:

- Containerdienst: flexible und zuverlässige Bereitstellung von Containern für Ihre Entsorgungsbedürfnisse. 

- Wertstoffhof: Fachgerechte Annahme und Sortierung verschiedenster Wertstoffe. 

- Individuelle Konzeptlösung: Individualisierte Entsorgungskonzepte für Unternehmen und Privatkunden. 

Unsere Zertifizierungen nach §56 KrWG sowie DIN EN ISO 9001:2015 und 14001:2015 unterstreichen unser Engagement für Qualität und Umweltbewusstsein. Gemeinsam tragen wir dazu bei, wertvolle Ressourcen in den Wirtschaftskreislauf zurückzuführen und gefährliche Stoffe sicher zu behandeln.

Name: Lober Entsorgung und Logistik mit System
Description:
Bereits in der dritten Generation sorgt die Firmengruppe Lober für erfolgreiche Abfallsortierung, Entsorgung und Wiederverwertung. Seit unserer Gründung im Jahr 1950 haben wir uns kontinuierlich von einem Transportunternehmen zu einem der größten Entsorgungsunternehmen in der Region und darüber hinaus entwickelt.

Neben unseren kommunalen und gewerblichen regionalen Kunden, für die unsere gesamte Produktpalette gilt, arbeiten wir als Spediteur und bei der Verwertung von Produktionsabfällen auch überregional und im benachbarten Ausland.

Wir bieten Ihnen als Geschäftskunden komplette und zukunftsweisende Entsorgung sowie andere Dienstleistungen wie Kanalreinigung, Müllabfuhr, Straßenreinigung und Ersatzbrennstoffproduktion – alles aus einer Hand.

Im Vordergrund stehen dabei für uns als qualitätsbewusstes Unternehmen einerseits der Schutz der Umwelt und andererseits die bestmögliche Lösung für ihre betrieblichen Anforderungen. Dies beweisen wir mit unserem nach DIN EN ISO 9001:2008 zertifizierten Qualitätsmanagement sowie unserer Zertifizierung zum Entsorgungsfachbetrieb.

Für unsere gleichbleibend hohe Qualität sorgen wir an unseren drei Standorten selbstverständlich mit der Weiterqualifizierung unsere bereits gut ausgebildeten Mitarbeiter und der Ausbildung von Nachwuchs. Gerade im Umgang mit sensiblen Materialien wie Gefahrgut oder Wertstoffen legen wir größten Wert auf Sicherheit und Sorgfalt.

Unsere ca. 70 Fahrzeuge warten wir in unserer eigenen Werkstatt. Wir betreiben ein Labor zur Gütesicherung von Ersatzbrennstoffen und zur Analyse der zu entsorgenden Materialien.

Wir freuen uns, Sie als Kunden zu begrüßen und Sie über die Möglichkeiten für Ihr Unternehmen zu beraten.

Le SETOM de l’Eure est le Syndicat mixte pour l’Etude et le Traitement des Ordures Ménagères des communes du centre, de l'est et du sud du département de l’Eure 
 
Avec plus de 220 000 tonnes de déchets traitées chaque année, le SETOM est le syndicat de traitement des déchets ménagers le plus important du département de l’Eure.
Quais de transfert, plates-formes de compostage, centres de stockage, unité d’incinération, chaîne de tri, le SETOM dispose de 15 équipements de traitement qui lui assurent son autonomie.

Description:

 POUR TOUTE INFORMATION SUR L'ACTUALITE DE SERIVEL, NOUS VOUS INVITONS A VOUS CONNECTER SUR LA PAGE LINKEDIN DE SEMARDEL 

Serivel exploite le Centre Intégré de Traitement des Déchets (CITD) du Siredom (Syndicat pour l’Innovation, le Recyclage et l’Energie par les Déchets et Ordures Ménagères) dans le cadre d’une Délégation de Service Public (DSP) depuis le 1er janvier 2020.  

Le CITD accueille les déchets ménagers issus des 175 communes essonniennes (soit 900.000 habitants) de ce syndicat. 

Serivel apporte désormais quotidiennement son expertise technique et son savoir-faire dans l'exploitation :
- d'un centre de tri sélectif réceptionnant annuellement 70 000 tonnes avec 2 lignes de tri,
- d'une unité de valorisation énergétique avec 2 lignes d’incinération des ordures ménagères réceptionnant annuellement 241 000 tonnes permettant de produire de l'électricité et de la chaleur qui alimente le Réseau de Chaleur Urbain (RCU) d'Evry-Courcouronnes de la Communauté d'Agglomération Grand Paris Sud.

Name: Imagined Earth
Description:
Imagined Earth is at the forefront of modern environmental solutions, pioneering the transition to a circular economy in South Africa through Reverse Vending Machines (RVM) and associated technology. Partnering with TOMRA, global leaders in recycling technology, we're dedicated to making recycling easier and more rewarding for everyone. Discover more about TOMRA's groundbreaking solutions at https://www.tomra.com/en/.

Description:

Name: Becon Consortium
Description:
In response to the requirements identified by arc21, the waste management group representing 6 Councils to the east of Northern Ireland, the Becon Consortium has developed plans to co-locate a Mechanical Biological Treatment (MBT) plant, an Energy from Waste (EfW) plant at the Hightown Quarry site on the Boghill Road, Mallusk. The project is led by European waste management experts Indaver and is currently the subject of a planning application process. 

This £240m inward investment project will help Northern Ireland maximise the value from its residual (largely unrecyclable waste) waste which is currently either landfilled or exported at great financial and environmental cost to fuel energy from waste plants abroad. It will do this through firstly increasing recycling levels by up to 10% and then recovering energy from the remaining non-recyclable waste. It will use the latest technology and tried and tested methods widely used across the rest of the UK and Europe. 

The project will:
- provide a sustainable, long term solution for the management of residual municipal waste in the arc21 area.
- Create approximately 455 direct jobs at peak construction and support a significant number of additional jobs in the supply chain.
- Create / sustain 337 direct and indirect jobs annually during the operational phase – generating £7.7m in total wages and contributing £24.7m of 
- Represent a significant inward investment in critical infrastructure which will result in a publicly owned asset.
- Divert up to 250,000 tonnes of municipal waste from landfill per year, helping to meet UK and  EU targets 
- Contribute directly to NI’s decarbonisation targets by the reduction of approximately 57,500 tonnes CO2 Equivalent per year relative to sending waste to landfill.
- Export 18MW electricity to the National Grid – enough to power in excess of 30,000 homes.
- Contribute to a green recovery by enabling other decarbonisation technologies such as hydrogen fuel production

Name: Waste Management Corporation Limited (WAMCO)

¿Qué hacemos en Ferromolins? 
 Recuperamos materiales valiosos para darles una segunda oportunidad.
 Reciclamos metales y otros materiales, fomentando la conservación de recursos naturales.
 Valorizamos energéticamente residuos, contribuyendo a fuentes de energía renovable.
 Tratamos residuos peligrosos de manera segura y responsable, protegiendo a las personas y el entorno.

Nuestra tecnología innovadora y equipos especializados nos permiten realizar estas tareas de forma eficiente y amigable con el medio ambiente. 

En Ferromolins, nos enorgullecemos de ser parte activa en la economía circular , donde buscamos cerrar el ciclo de los materiales y reducir la generación de desechos. Cada acción cuenta para construir un futuro más limpio y sostenible para todos. 

Además, contamos con certificaciones y reconocimientos que avalan nuestro compromiso con la calidad y el cuidado del entorno. 

Pero nuestro impacto va más allá de nuestras operaciones: trabajamos para crear conciencia ambiental y colaborar con la comunidad en el cuidado del medio ambiente. 

Gracias a nuestros clientes por su confianza!  Cada día, nos esforzamos por brindarles soluciones personalizadas y adaptadas a sus necesidades, manteniendo la excelencia en nuestros servicios. 

El futuro nos desafía, y en Ferromolins miramos hacia adelante con entusiasmo. Continuaremos innovando y liderando en la gestión responsable de residuos! 

Si quieres ser parte del cambio y conocer más sobre Ferromolins y nuestras acciones por un mundo más verde, síguenos y únete a nuestra misión! 

#Ferromolins #MedioAmbiente #Reciclaje #Sostenibilidad #EconomíaCircular #ResponsabilidadAmbiental #CuidadoDelPlaneta #CompromisoVerde #JuntosPorUnFuturoMejor

We are currently leading two projects:

Name: BEIL Infrastructure Limited
Description:
BEIL Infrastructure Ltd., formerly known as Bharuch Enviro Infrastructure Limited, is a leading company in the Waste Management industry. Headquartered in Ankleshwar, a major chemical hub in Gujarat, BEIL has operations in over four states in India and a diverse range of ten waste management services. BEIL is committed to expanding its presence to cover almost every state in the country.
BEIL’s core business areas encompass a wide range of activities. These include the collection, segregation, transportation, trading, processing, composting, recycling,
treatment, and disposal of various types of waste. This also includes solid, liquid, and gaseous substances, as well as municipal solid waste, electronic waste (e-waste), batteries, solar plates, used oil, paint waste, construction and demolition debris, bio-medical waste, hazardous waste, sewage, wastewater, plastic waste, rubber waste, and more.
 
Additionally, our services extend to the operation and maintenance of common effluent treatment plants, sewage treatment plants, and water and wastewater treatment plants. We also undertake the use, sale, marketing, and distribution of all products and by-products that are
generated during the treatment or disposal of waste and waste products.
These products may include compost, energy, and refuse-derived fuel generated from waste-to-energy processes such as bio-methanation, methane gas from landfills, biogas, bio CNG, electronic products suitable for re-use (with or without refurbishing), paper, metals, and other materials, including chemicals obtained from the treatment of wastes.
Our Unit Facilities:
•	Landfill sites are managed by BEIL and Group companies in Ankleshwar, Dahej, Shivalik, and Kochi
•	Incineration facilities are established at Ankleshwar and Dahej units for hazardous waste, and in Kochi for bio-medical waste
•	Municipal Solid Waste recycling plants are operational in Ahmedabad and Coimbatore
•	The group oversees numerous STPs and ETPs across India

Name: Agri-Connect
Description:
Agri-Connect specialises in connecting sustainability and energy efficiency through sustainable alternatives to traditional waste management. Working closely with the Anaerobic Digestion Industry, we connect Energy Crops and Agricultural and Commercial Waste Streams into renewable energy generation, contributing to the target of NET ZERO.

At Agri-Connect, we understand the importance of reliable and proficient management of your generated organic waste. Whether your industry is food manufacturing, an agricultural farm or a processing facility, it is often vital to ensure that your activity is consistently operational and that the availability of storage capacity is maintained. Our team has a wide range of experience within the anaerobic digestion and waste sector, giving us the expertise required to ensure your waste streams are maximised to their full energy potential whilst reducing the need for alternative disposal methods such as spreading to land or landfill.

Agri-Connect can reduce your waste disposal costs and increase income with our innovative waste management solutions. By working in partnership with Agri-Connect, you will ultimately reduce greenhouse gas emissions, combat climate change, and create a brighter, cleaner future.

We cover the following range of services:

Feedstock supply to anaerobic digestion.
Organic waste management.
Energy crop supply, harvest and clamping.
Digestate management.

Contact us today to learn more.

We tailor services to help brands streamline their RMA workflows, reclaim value from returns, and meet sustainability targets — without the need for a local UK presence. Our processes reflect native customer expectations with region-specific packaging, comms, and support.

Our expertise spans consumer electronics, wearables, AV gear, and gaming devices. We identify reuse opportunities, reduce waste, and shorten turnaround times through intelligent repair, refurbishment, and recommerce workflows.

We simplify returns and recycling by offering complete service layers: branded return portals, QR code labels, UK-based repair hubs, live tracking, detailed reporting, and rapid dispatch. You get transparency, compliance, and cost savings — while your customers get a premium post-sale experience.

• Valores: Respeito, ética, responsabilidade, qualidade, competência, credibilidade, compromisso com clientes, comunidade e nossos colaboradores. •

Name: GROUPE ASTRADEC ENVIRONNEMENT
Description: Le groupe ASTRADEC ENVIRONNEMENT est spécialisé dans la collecte et le traitement de tous types de déchets.

Name: Gruppo Dimensione Ambiente spa
Description:
Dimensione Ambiente SpA is a company of the Capra Group that has been operating in the waste sector throughout Italy and abroad for several years, offering a "turnkey" service. The Group is active in the ecology, renewable energy and circular economy sectors.
Within the waste disposal sector, Dimensione Ambiente is the parent company of a team of companies and people specialized in waste management, in the construction of landfills and plants and in cross-border exports.

Name: S-FIRMA, s.r.o.
Description:
S-FIRMA, s.r.o. je ryze českou společností, založenou roku 2008, která patří do rodinného holdingu RKO GROUP a.s.. Jako „zaměstnavatel na chráněném trhu práce“ ve svých řadách úspěšně poskytuje jistotu zaměstnání až 70% osob se změněnou pracovní schopností. Cílem je také ukázat veřejnosti a zaměstnavatelům, že tělesný handicap není překážkou v možném zaměstnávání těchto osob.

S-FIRMA s.r.o. se zabývá profesionálním zpracováním a likvidací odpadu ve Východních Čechách. Nabízí velmi široké portfolio svých služeb: téměř beze zbytku zpracovává kovový i plastový odpad, stejně tak jako papír a karton. Naši zaměstnanci ale dokáží zpracovat i stavební odpad, autovraky a katalyzátory, ale i vyrábět štěpku ze starých dřevěných palet. Velikou pomocí je jim vysokokapacitní mobilní drtič UNTHA, ale i samostatné linky na zpracování odpadu. 

S-Firma s.r.o. kromě kompletního zpracování a třídění odpadu také zajišťuje jeho výkup, nakládku a svoz. Je pro nás důležitá spolupráce s obcí a městy, a to na úrovni výstavby a provozu sběrných dvorů.

Name: ecomaine
Description:
ecomaine provides comprehensive long-term solid waste solutions in a safe, environmentally responsible, economically sound manner, and is a leader in raising public awareness of sustainable waste management strategies.

ecomaine is a 501(c)3 nonprofit organization based in Portland, serving 400,000 people in 73 member communities across Maine.

ecomaine operates three waste management facilities - a waste-to-energy plant, a landfill/ashfill site and a recycling operation - and employs full-time staff in environmental education, giving tours and presentations.  We are dedicated supporters of environmental protection, as evidenced by our ISO 14001 certification for excellence in environmental management.

Name: Waste Eliminator
Description:
Waste Eliminator is one of the nation’s fastest growing and most progressive waste collection and recycling firms. We owe this remarkable growth to our dedicated employees who share a companywide respect for their colleagues, a commitment to customer service as well as a responsibility to the environment. 

At Waste Eliminator, we believe beneficial re-use and recycling is the future of waste management. Our mission is to leave the world a better place than we found it by helping its inhabitants find purpose in becoming its caretakers.

Name: C.I.S.A. S.P.A.
Description:
C.I.S.A. S.p.a. è una società dinamica che da anni opera
nel territorio pugliese, attraverso un approccio 
imprenditoriale improntato ai principi di determinazione, concretezza ed innovatività. L’impegno profuso negli anni e la garanzia del rispetto delle problematiche ambientali e del territorio hanno consentito all’Azienda di divenire uno dei riferimenti, a livello regionale, nella catena della valorizzazione del rifiuto, il quale costituisce di fatto una
risorsa primaria di investimento e non un elemento di cui disfarsi facilmente. La Società opera con impianti di
proprietà ed è concessionaria di impianti pubblici; nell’operare quotidiano persegue obiettivi di ottimizzazione e valorizzazione del processo di gestione del rifiuto. L’applicazione sistemica dei principi di tutela del territorio,
di coinvolgimento delle parti interessate e del personale aziendale e l’adozione delle più moderne tecnologie nel
campo del trattamento rifiuti e del monitoraggio e della
protezione ambientale hanno consentito alla C.I.S.A. di conseguire nel tempo e mantenere poi i certificati di conformità alle normative internazionali.

Name: BIOFUEL Réunion
Description: BIOFUEL Réunion est une startup réunionnaise qui vise à implanter une unité de valorisation d'huile alimentaire usagée en biocarburant sur le territoire de la Réunion.

Name: Gemidan A/S
Description:
Gemidan er en innovativ moderne affaldsvirksomhed, der arbejder med konkrete optimerede ressource udnyttelses projekter i affaldsstrømmene. Gemidan specialiserer sig i ressource udnyttelse, driftsoptimering, rådgivning, heriblandt rådgivning til cirkulær økonomi.
I Gemidan har en bæredygtig og miljømæssig ansvarlig behandling af affaldet altid haft højeste prioritet. Affald er ikke kun affald for os, det er en vigtig ressource. Derfor er den cirkulære økonomi i fokus i flere af vores aktiviteter, hvormed meget affald energiudnyttes og føres tilbage til kredsløbet. 
Vi skaber værdi ved at præstere højt kvalificerede løsninger og kompetent rådgivning, der er baseret på en kombination af en professionel højteknologisk maskinpark og kompetente specialiserede medarbejdere – Vi vil efterkomme værdierne kvalitet, fleksibilitet og ansvarsbevidsthed.

Name: TROPIFLOR AG
Description:
Tropiflor AG es una sólida organización de servicios ambientales Especializados en tratamiento,Destrucción, disposición final de residuos sólidos , líquidos, químicos, sanitarios y peligrosos a medida para la industria local y de petróleo.

Nuestras licencias son de operaciones a nivel nacional para Gestión y Transporte según ley 1333 y sus anexos, ley 755 para gestión integral de residuos sólidos líquidos y peligrosos.

Name: Geeco – Materiais & Engenharia
Description: Somos uma empresa especializada em soluções de materiais e engenharia, com foco na valorização de resíduos industriais de setores como a mineração, siderurgia, construção civil, agrícola e outros.

Name: Brantjes Data-Vernietiging B.V.
Description: Brantjes Data-Vernietiging faciliteert 100% vertrouwelijke vernietiging van archiefpapier, digitale datadragers en producten. Laat uw materiaal vertrouwd en CA+ gecertificeerd vernietigen. We zijn met onze locatie gevestigd aan de Rijnlanderweg 1427 in Nieuw-Vennep. Voor meer informatie bel 023 - 532 1960 of mail brantjes@recycling.nl.

Name: Grupo Fortaleza
Description:
Nós somos o Grupo Fortaleza, temos como nosso grande propósito através das empresas que nos integram contribuir para a evolução da sociedade por meio da inovação!

Visamos o reconhecimento mundial como uma empresa referência em economia circular e inovação.

Temos como valores a inovação, transparência, disponibilidade, foco, agilidade, resultado, ética e a SUSTENTABILIDADE.

Nosso grupo é composto por 3 empresas, a Esfera EPI's que é fabricante de Equipamentos de Proteção Individual, a Innova Ambiental que atua com o gerenciamento de resíduos e a Brazpol que faz o processo de reciclagem de polietileno. 

Aqui respeitamos as pessoas, os processos e o meio ambiente.

Name: Newloop
Description:
Renovando as percepções sobre a sustentabilidade e abrindo espaço para uma nova compreensão da reciclagem e da ressignificação dos resíduos.


Com nossa experiência e credibilidade, passamos a prestar outros tipos de serviços na área de gestão e destinação de resíduos, investindo em processos e colaboradores para proporcionar maior comodidade aos nossos clientes e ao mercado.

Juntos redesenhando, facilitando e democratizando a reciclagem, o reaproveitamento e correta gestão de recursos e resíduos, por meio de soluções sociais, ambientais e culturais através desse novo ciclo.

Name: SOCIETE MED ENVIRONNEMENT
Description: Centre de collecte, transport, tri, recyclage, destruction et valorisation des déchets industriels.
Location: Zaghouane, Zaghwan, Tunisia, STE MED ENVIRONNEMENT

Name: LOGÍSTICA AMBIENTAL, S.L.
Description:
LOGÍSTICA AMBIENTAL se creó en el año 2001 dedicada a la gestión de residuos industriales. Posee en la actualidad diversos centros de tratamiento en la provincia de Guadalajara, para gestionar todo todo tipo de residuos peligrosos y no peligrosos.

Gestiona más de 18.000 tn de residuos en diversas comunidades de España, dando servicio principalmente a la Comunidad de Madrid, Castilla y León y Castilla la Mancha, dónde somos un referente en el sector.

Especializada en limpiezas industriales de depósitos de combustibles de instalaciones petrolíferas y limpiezas de tanques .

Destrucción de medicamentos caducados o fuera de especificaciones provenientes de las devoluciones farmaceúticas.

Recogida y valorización de aceites usados industriales y domésticos.

Recogida de vertidos de cualquier naturaleza, procedentes de accidentes de vehículos tanques en carretera, de rotura de conducciones, etc.

Inscrita en el Registro de Empresas con Riesgo de Amianto (RERA) para trabajos de acondicionamiento de residuos.

Name: UTD Pioneira
Description:
Há mais de 30 anos tratando e destinando corretamente os resíduos.

Nossa missão é tratar corretamente os resíduos coletados e recebidos evitando com isso passivo ambiental e danos a saúde pública, por meio da incineração e autoclavagem de resíduos.


incinerador@pioneira.com.br | (11) 4748-2656

Name: Aguavaz Tratamento de Efluentes
Blue2Green Medical Waste Recycling Solutions
Description:
Samen kunnen we de zorg verduurzamen. Recycling medisch afval techniek is nu beschikbaar via Blue2Green. Onze missie is medisch afval decontamineren in plaats van verbranden. Blue2Green biedt de beste en meest duurzame oplossing voor het recyclen van afval uit de zorgsector. Daarmee verlagen we de CO2 uitstoot en zetten in op maximaal grondstoffenhergebruik. Ontdek hoe onze innovatieve aanpak werkt om de zorg vele malen duurzamer te maken. Behaal ook uw duurzaamheidsdoelen in de zorg met Blue2Green dankzij onze techniek voor duurzame afvalverwerking en een circulaire toekomst. Benieuwd naar onze werkwijze voor recycling medisch afval?

Nergens is de zorg zo goed geregeld als in Nederland. Maar is onze zorg wel zo gezond als we kijken de manier van afval verwerken? Blue2Green heeft een duurzame oplossing voor de verwerking van medisch afval. Niet langer verbranden, maar recyclen. Duurzaam recyclen. Veel gezonder door minder CO2-uitstoot en zo kunnen we medisch afval hergebruiken als grondstoffen. Wij helpen u uw duurzaamheidsdoelen in de zorgsector te behalen.

Duurzame aanpak
Blue2Green is specialist in innovatieve recyclingtechnieken in de zorgsector. Ons doel is medisch afval niet langer te verbranden. Decontamineren is onze duurzame aanpak voor afvalverwerking in de zorg. Samen werken we aan een gezonde toekomst.

Bewezen technologie
Dankzij onze bewezen technologie waarborgen we een veilige en betrouwbare verwerking van medisch afval. De Blue2Green methode om grondstoffen uit medisch afval te halen en de CO2 uitstoot te verlagen is uniek. Hiermee dragen we bij aan het verduurzamen van de zorgsector.

Meetbare rapportages
Via uw eigen dashboard krijgt u inzicht in de gehele verwerkingsketen van uw afval. Van het ontstaan tot aan de eindverwerking. In transparante rapportages leest u de impact van uw organisatie. Blue2Green biedt de zorgsector handvatten voor een verantwoord afvalbeleid.

Name: RES For Petroleum Services & Water Treatment
Description:
RES is a partnership company established in 2019, combining over 25 years of cumulative experience in manufacturing, quality control, tendering & inspection, and procurement across mega industrial and petroleum projects.

Today, RES provides integrated engineering and water treatment solutions, serving the petroleum, industrial, and infrastructure sectors in Egypt and the Middle East.

Our mission is to deliver sustainable, high-quality, and cost-efficient engineering services that ensure environmental compliance and operational excellence for our clients.

 About the Founders

Eng. Sherif Eldeeb – Co-Founder & Chairman, RES Petroleum Services and Water Treatment
Electrical engineer with over 25 years of experience in R&D, contracting, and procurement. Eng. Sherif leads RES’s operations and strategic partnerships, driving innovation and efficiency across all projects.

Eng. Mohamed Ibrahim – Co-Founder & Former Chairman
Mechanical engineer with more than 30 years of experience in heavy industries, project management, and industrial R&D. Holder of an MBA in Project Management, Eng. Mohamed played a key role in building RES’s strong foundation and expanding its market reach.

Name: My Mati Comprehensive Development Agency
Description:
My Mati is a dynamic waste management and consultancy startup founded in January 2024. We offer smart and sustainable solutions for managing both dry and wet waste, aiming to create a cleaner and greener future for our community and beyond.

At My Mati, we believe that every piece of waste has potential. Our mission is to turn waste into valuable resources while promoting eco-friendly practices that benefit both people and the planet.

Name: SetTIC
Description:
Acteur reconnu de la gestion des déchets électroniques, SetTIC a diversifié ses activités en proposant à ses clients une gestion intégrée des déchets. Notre service comprend :

- L’audit des déchets
SetTIC évalue votre système actuel de gestion des déchets et fournit une évaluation de votre production de déchets par site.

- La gestion intégrée des déchets
SetTIC accompagne aussi ses clients dans la gestion de leurs déchets avec une offre de gestion intégrée de tous les types de déchets. 

- Le Recyclage électronique des déchets
SetTIC collecte et recycle les déchets électroniques tels que les ordinateurs, les téléphones portables, les imprimantes, les équipements informatiques et réseau, les batteries et les cartouches d'imprimantes.
Outre ces équipements, SetTIC prend également en charge le recyclage des déchets spéciaux tels que les piles et les cartouches d’impression

Name: Pharmacycle
Description:
Recycle your blister packs!

Australia’s only full recycling solution for used and empty medicinal blister packs.

We manage the collection and logistics as well as the processing of blister packs using specialised technology, located right here in Australia!

Name: Spektra WaterTech Sdn Bhd
Description:
History of Spektra

We started our business as wastewater treatment consultant in year 2000 as Spektra Ikhtias with 5 employees. During that time, we mainly focusing on local wastewater industry market, assists them to achieve water discharge standard comply to DOE Regulation.

When our specialist team grew bigger, we start to step into pure water business in year 2005. We design and install the pure water system which could achieve < 1 uS/cm. For the next 10 years, we continue to expand our market in both wastewater and pure water industry. We had built and commission more than 100 water treatment system in 15 years time with ZERO failure, our customers are satisfied with our system design and after sales service. We are proud to say that our first customer is still our customer today.

With fame and reputation gains through the decades, other than being a successful player in water treatment industry, we also become sole distributor for many water treatment related products such as WTW instrument, Lovibond, Aquarator and Veolia's Products like Actiflo, Evaled, Hydrotech & Rapide Strata.

Today, Spektra WaterTech has grown to annual turnover of more than RM 20 Million and about 40 employees are working together to achieve a greater goal. We have our process design, project and service & maintenance division to provide one stop solution for our value customer. We might not the biggest water treatment company in Malaysia, but we believe every single effort we made will lead Malaysia towards a more sustainable environment for our future generation.

We Care and We Conserve Our Environment

Name: Triselec
Description:
Conjuguant obligations et choix volontaires, service public et rentabilité, nous avons développé un dispositif audacieux, innovant et atypique, sur les bassins dunkerquois, halluinois et lillois, axé sur deux activités :
    La valorisation des déchets ménagers en vue de leur recyclage,
    L’accueil de publics éloignés du monde du travail en vue de leur requalification / reconversion sociale et/ou professionnelle.

Triselec est une SPL (Société Publique Locale). Nos centres de tri sont des ICPE (Installation Classée pour la Protection de l’Environnement), soumis à des arrêtés préfectoraux qui règlementent notre activité industrielle.

Name: AQUAM SOLUTIONS
Description:
AQUAM Solutions est une société privée française spécialisée dans le traitement des eaux industrielles, des lixiviats et la valorisation du biogaz. AQUAM Solutions est le fruit de plus de 28 ans d’expérience mise au service des industriels et des collectivités afin de leur permettre de traiter et/ou de valoriser leurs déchets et recycler les effluents industriels
Afin d’apporter des solutions efficaces et locales, AQUAM Solutions a développé le concept d’INDUSTRIE EQUITABLE. Fabriquer et intégrer localement des solutions de traitement et de valorisation des eaux en coopérations avec ses clients locaux et en fonctions des moyens humains et techniques locales. Implanter et former des ingénieurs locaux pour assurer l’implantation de nouvelles techniques de traitement et rattraper le déficit des pays en développement en termes de process de traitement.

Name: Schmidt Kies- und Recycling GmbH
Description: Kieswerk, Recyclinganlage, Entsorgung Bauabfälle, Containerdienst,

Name: Regain Energies Solutions Private Limited
Description:
Regain Energies Pvt. Ltd. is a pioneering company in the field of solar panel recycling, spearheading efforts in sustainable and environmentally conscious disposal and recycling of solar panels. We are committed to addressing the critical issue of e-waste generated by solar panels, providing innovative and efficient solutions to recycle these materials responsibly.

We focus on the development and implementation of advanced technologies and processes to extract valuable materials from end-of-life solar panels while minimizing environmental impact. This commitment to sustainability aligns with the growing global emphasis on green energy and the circular economy.

Name: GTC Recycling
Description: Protecting the environment from toxic matters, keeping the health of our children well, saving the strategic mineral reserves and reducing pollutions due to mining process, that's what GTC aim to get by Electronic waste recycling using high technologies and within the international environmental standards.

Name: SE Recycling
Description:
Welcome to SE Recycling Ltd (Sustainable Electronic Recycling) Linkedin page.  We are an IT asset management service provider that collects and treats redundant/end of life IT Communication equipment from companies of all sizes.  

Our service includes a secure data cleaning service to CESG standards.  We are Environment Agency accredited recyclers of electronic waste and hold all the required certificates.  We are an AATF (Approved Authorised Treatment Facility) and hold ISO 27001 , ISO 9001, ISO 14001, and CESG (Communications Electronics Security Group) certified data sanitation. We are a Cyber Essentials Certified company.  

We are an ethical, sustainable business with a zero tolerance approach to landfill - refurbish first, recycle last, putting back into society affordable IT equipment.  We believe in the principle of 'grow and give'; recycling redundant IT and contributing to society, working with hard to reach communities through charities and education to develop joint initiatives to support the environment where we live.

In partnering with SER you are supporting our commitment to avoiding landfill, up-skilling and employing local people, and creating a sustainable society for future generations.

Visit our website – www.ser-limited.com - sign up for our newsletter and find out more about our service, the importance of IT recycling and refurbishment, latest facts and figures on WEEE and Emissions outputs, our social values in action and why we are the best people to offer you a full end of life IT asset management service.

Our Specialties
IT asset management, data removal and destruction service, IT refurbishment, WEEE Recycling, including laptops, PCs, tablets, mobile phones/devices, servers and communication equipment.  

Get in touch - info@ser-limited.com / 0161 637 5656.

Name: Valor3e
Description:
Valor3e est un syndicat mixte pour le traitement et la valorisation des déchets ménagers recyclables et des ordures ménagères résiduelles. 

Il traite et valorise les déchets ménagers d'une partie de Loire-Atlantique et d'une partie de Maine-et-Loire, soit 330 000 habitants. 

Il regroupe 4 collectivités adhérentes : 
- Cholet Agglomération 
- Mauges Communauté 
- Clisson Sèvre et Maine Agglo 
- Communauté de communes Sèvre & Loire
Location: La Séguinière, Pays de la Loire

Name: Alserkal Envirol
Description:
Alserkal Envirol is a member of the Alserkal Group of companies located in Dubai, UAE. 
Alserkal Envirol established a joint venture with the Dubai Municipality to recycle grease trap waste from food services which has provided us with the ultimate platform to display our unique technology within the region, which enables us to separate the maximum percentage of Fats, Oils, and Grease (FOG) from grease trap waste to recycle into 3 useful products. 

Our goal is to provide and provide an environmentally responsible disposal option for grease trap waste in the Middle East.

Name: GREENGOOD ECO-TECH
Description:
GreenGood has over a decade of experience in Middle East, as renowned supplier of Sustainable Packaging Solutions and exclusive distributor of OKLIN composter. Whether it’s a coffee cup, a take away bag, a wrap to serve a sandwich, paper napkins or takeaway containers, we have customised solutions.

The GreenGood Oklin food waster composter from Korea, makes composting easy and can boast of successful operations for over 10 years across a range of industries  including educational institutions, hospitality, commercial and Government enterprises. Some of the  hotel brands operating the Oklin composter are, Ramada Hotel Suites, Sheraton, Jumeirah Al Qasr, CrownePlaza Al Khobar, Vida and Westin.

Operating from the office in UAE and KSA, GreenGood supports to reduce the impact of waste disposal both for your businesses and the environment. Visit our website http://www.greengood.ae/ to learn more and contact us for your packaging or food waste needs.

Name: Exploitative Workplace Watch (EWW!)
Description:
EWW! (Exploitative Workplace Watch) calls out the filthiest labor practices dressed up as progress and impact. From nonprofits to corporates, we expose modern-day workplace slavery fueled by casteism, capitalism, and systemic oppression.

We believe workplaces aren’t just about deadlines and deliverables - they’re often crime scenes of unpaid labor, toxic policies, and empty promises of "doing good." Our mission is simple: name names, expose bad actors, and push for real change with unapologetic satire, grounded research, and fearless storytelling.

What we do:

Investigate and Expose: No spin, no sugarcoating - just brutal honesty about exploitation in action.
Amplify Workers' Stories: We share real voices that reveal the truth behind the slogans.
Celebrate What Works: We recognize organizations that treat people like humans, not cogs.

Because staying silent about exploitation isn’t neutral - it’s complicit.

Industry: Waste Treatment & Disposal (we’re cleaning up the mess, aren’t we?)

Follow us if you’re done with workplace BS and ready to fight for something better.

Name: Biocomp Nepal
Description: Biocomp Nepal is a social enterprise in Lalitpur, Nepal working in waste management and recycling. Our mission is to introduce sustainable waste management solutions and create new innovative products from recyclables for the local market. Biocomp will divert 9000 tons of plastic from the streets, rivers and municipal waste stream annually.

Name: INERTO LTD
Description: Cost effective waste disposal for Skip Hire Companies and Transfer Stations. Nationwide. Specialising in the disposal of Bulk C&D Waste, Bulk C&I Waste, Food Refuse/Black Bag Waste, Shredded Waste, RDF, SRF, Qualifying Fines, Wood Waste & Commodities.

Name: GAIA SpA
Description:
GAIA SpA (Gestione Ambientale Integrata dell’Astigiano) nasce per occuparsi del trattamento, recupero e smaltimento dei rifiuti urbani prodotti dai 114 Comuni Soci della provincia di Asti ai quali si sono aggiunti i rifiuti di altre zone d’Italia dopo l’inserimento del Socio operativo Iren Ambiente nel 2017. 
Con IrenAmbiente si è provveduto al potenziamento impiantistico e all’integrazione di GAIA in una rete di gestione rifiuti più ampia. Attualmente GAIA conta 151 dipendenti e nel 2021 ha gestito oltre 200.000 tonnellate di rifiuti. L’azienda si occupa anche di attività connesse ai rifiuti quali studi, ricerche, comunicazione, vendita dei materiali recuperati e dei prodotti e dell’energia elettrica generata attraverso la combustione del biogas di discarica.

Tutti i siti di GAIA hanno conseguito la registrazione EMAS (massimo riconoscimento europeo per la gestione ambientale). La sede legale  è ad Asti in via Brofferio 48 e, nella zona industriale, il “Polo trattamento rifiuti” che include due impianti: uno di Valorizzazione dei materiali della raccolta differenziata e l’altro per il Trattamento Meccanico Biologico del rifiuto urbano indifferenziato. 
A San Damiano d’Asti si recuperano i rifiuti organici producendo kompost e biometano da immettere in rete, a Cerro Tanaro vengono smaltiti gli scarti non recuperabili nella “discarica per rifiuti non pericolosi” ed infine nella provincia di Asti sono gestiti 12 centri di raccolta (Ecostazioni) dove conferire materiali non intercettati con le raccolte domiciliari.

Name: Servicios Ecológicos Navarra
Description:
Servicios Ecológicos Navarra es una organización empresarial con sedes en Pamplona, Cintruénigo, Vitoria, Oyón (Álava) y Sant Andreu de la Barca (Barcelona)

Somos líderes en la Gestión Integral de Residuos y trabajamos por un reciclaje óptimo cuidando del medio ambiente para dar nueva vida a los residuos.

Name: SMD3
Description: Le SMD3 (Syndicat Mixte Départemental des Déchets de la Dordogne) est une collectivité territoriale qui assure la collecte, le transport et le traitement des déchets en Dordogne.

Name: Mana
Description:
Mana exists to accelerate the shift towards a fully decarbonized and circular economy. We develop projects to transform waste into clean energy and products. Our value creation is two-fold: we deal with society's growing waste problem, and we help meet the increasing demand for clean energy.

Contacts
CEO, Jon Bergan, +47 48075269
CFO, Strategy and M&A, Elise Svedal Nilssen, +47 92255148

Name: Circular Copenhagen
Description:
Circular Copenhagen is an innovation platform run by the City of Copenhagen with the aim of developing tomorrow’s circular economy solutions for today's challenges.

Circular Copenhagen aims to establish innovative partnerships with key, national and international, industrial and academic stakeholders focusing on advancing the circular economy in Copenhagen

Why?
Cities around the globe play a crucial role in the transition from a take-make-waste system towards a resilient circular economy where growth is no longer based on consumption of finite resources. As a global leader in the green agenda, the City of Copenhagen wants to play an active role in the development of innovative solutions for advancing the circular economy.

Name: Solum A/S
Description: Solum er en af landets førende virksomheder indenfor genanvendelse. Vi er Danmarks største leverandør af jordprodukter, vækstmedier og græsplejeprodukter, specialiseret på det grønne område og udviklingshus for bæredygtige løsninger til anlæg, byggeri og energi.

Name: Sewerage Systems Ghana Limited
Description: Sewerage Systems Ghana Limited (SSGL) is a fully Ghanaian owned Engineering and Construction Company that focuses on the provision of efficient liquid waste treatment.

Name: Rå Biopark AS
Description:
Rå Biopark skal etablere anlegg for biogass- og biokullproduksjon i Nord-Norge drevet frem av avfallsselskapene Remiks Miljøpark, Avfallsservice, Hålogaland Ressursselskap, Reno-Vest, Lofoten Avfallsselskap og Finnmark Ressursselskap. 

Rå Biopark er et konsept for bærekraftig håndtering av organisk avfall, hvor man gjennom regionalt samarbeid og satsing på ny teknologi skal produsere råvarer og produkter som etterspørres av lavutslippssamfunnet. Rå Biopark har samlet en rekke aktører både innenfor håndtering av organisk avfall og aktører som etterspør bærekraftige, miljøvennlige produkter som biogass, biokull, biogjødsel og bio-CO2.

Name: Eco Circuito
Description:
Nosso propósito é promover a agenda aterro zero e reduzir o desperdício de alimentos por um mundo mais vivo para as próximas gerações.

A população, o volume de resíduos e seus impactos ao meio ambiente e à nossa saúde não param de crescer. Enquanto apenas 3% dos resíduos no Brasil são reciclados, metade é resíduo alimentar e mais de 65% dos brasileiros sabem pouco ou nada sobre reciclagem.

Nossa solução impacta diretamente em 3 dos 17 ODS (Objetivos de Desenvolvimento Sustentável) da ONU, e isso nos ajuda não apenas a nortear nossas ações de crescimento, mas também a recrutar pessoas que se identificam com nossa missão:

11.6 - reduzir o impacto ambiental negativo per capita das cidades na gestão de resíduos;

12.3 - reduzir desperdício de alimentos e 12.5 reduzir a geração de resíduos (redução, reciclagem e reuso);

13.3 - melhorar a conscientização e a capacidade sobre mitigação global do clima e redução de impactos.

Nosso Biodigestor ECO-PRO é um equipamento de tecnologia biomecânica que viabiliza o tratamento de resíduos de alimentos, sem geração de subprodutos sólidos, eliminando o envio para aterros e com inteligência para redução do desperdício. Compacto, online com processo 100% natural, é ideal para uso em cozinhas profissionais em diversos segmentos.

Vem com a gente!
Por um #mundomaisvivo

Name: Muenzer Bharat Private Limited
Description:
Muenzer Bharat Pvt. Ltd. is a 100% subsidiary of Münzer Bioindustrie GmbH, Austria – a European leader in UCO-based biodiesel production and waste-to-energy solutions since 1991.

Based in Mumbai, we focus on the structured collection of used cooking oil across India, partnering with food businesses and local authorities to ensure safe and traceable disposal. The UCO we collect is exclusively used for the production of renewable biodiesel, eliminating its re-entry into the food chain and reducing its harmful environmental impact.

Through our operations, we aim to improve public health, support India’s renewable energy goals and enhance energy self-sufficiency. Our work reflects Münzer’s global commitment to sustainable resource use, innovation and environmental responsibility under the guiding principle “Energy From Waste”.

Name: Biochop Environnement
Description:
Biochop Environnement se spécialise dans la promotion de la santé environnementale préventive en proposant des solutions intégrées pour gérer les risques environnementaux. Forts d'une expertise solide, nous anticipons et traitons les menaces environnementales, offrant ainsi des stratégies proactives pour préserver la santé et réduire les risques dans divers secteurs.

CEO: Sophia Serghini

Name: COMPOST'OND
Description:
Compost'Ond est une entreprise coopérative de collecte et valorisation de bio-déchets et de déchets compostables.
Nous développons une approche de proximité avec des outils techniques de haute qualité, mobilisant une forte compétence humaine pour un coût d'investissement réduit.
Nos emplois sont verts, non-délocalisables, et permettent de donner une réalité opérationnelle aux engagements écologiques tout en restant soutenable et rentable économiquement.

Name: N.V. Slibverwerking Noord-Brabant (SNB)
Description:
Op industrieterrein Moerdijk staat een van Europa’s grootste, milieuvriendelijkste en meest geavanceerde slibverbrandingsinstallaties van N.V. Slibverwerking Noord-Brabant (SNB). Zuiveringsslib verwerken op een energieneutrale manier, waarbij het milieu wordt gespaard en fosfaat teruggewonnen kan worden: dát is wat SNB doet.

Zuiveringsslib is het restproduct dat overblijft nadat de rioolwaterzuiveringsinstallaties van de waterschappen en bedrijven het vervuilde water zo goed als schoon weer hebben teruggebracht in de natuur. Opgeteld produceren we in Nederland 2,4 miljard kilo van dit zuiveringsslib per jaar. SNB verwerkt circa 420 miljoen kilo van dat slib per jaar op de meest milieuvriendelijke manier: door het te verbranden.

Name: Kumasi Compost & Recycling Plant Limited (KCARP)
Description:
Kumasi Compost and Recycling Plant (KCARP), a mega-scale municipal solid waste treatment plant, was set up to receive and treat municipal solid waste from the Kumasi Metropolis and adjoining district assemblies. KCARP is located at Essereso-Adagya in the Bosomtwe District of the Ashanti region. We can receive and process 1,200 tons of MSW daily. This takes care of waste generated by the entire city and adjoining communities.

We are focused on improving our communities to ensure a clean and green environment for all Ghanaians. KCARP seeks to welcome public cooperation in achieving this dream of a better environment where Ghanaians will enjoy good health, good food, high yields in crop production, and reduction of greenhouse gasses.

Name: Tircantabria
Description: Tircantabria, sociedad perteneciente al Grupo Urbaser, es la concesionaria del servicio público de tratamiento de los residuos urbanos generados en la Comunidad Autónoma de Cantabria. Las instalaciones constan de un área de pretratamiento, área de tratamiento mecánico biológico de la materia orgánica, y línea de valorización energética del rechazo combustible generado en el proceso. Dentro del proceso, además, se encuadran líneas de separación de vidrio del flujo de residuos procesados, y de maduración, extracción de metales y valorización de las escorias generadas en el proceso de valorización energética.

Name: Eco Clear Solutions
Description:
Eco Clear Solutions is recognized as a highly trusted organization in the space of circular economy. We have strategic alliances and support with recycling concerns and environmental compliance entities. By collaborating with disintegrated players like brands, consumers, institutions, waste pickers and aggregators, recyclers, regulatory bodies, and social ventures, we develop socially responsible and financially sound circular solutions.

At Eco Clear Solutions, we empower companies and brands to collect and recycle waste associated with their products. We design and implement transformative Extended Producer Responsibility (EPR) programs for Electronic Waste (E-waste), Plastic Waste, Battery Waste, and Tyre Waste. Our clients include some of the most renowned global technology and FMCG brands.

Our technology platform and systems promote good governance, fairness, trust, transparency, and traceability. These qualities are the foundation of our operations, enabling the recycling of thousands of tons of e-waste and the formalization of thousands of informal sector waste aggregators and last-mile collectors. We operate in all states of India, ensuring widespread impact.

By bringing together all parties involved in take-back logistics, we simplify take-back operations, encourage innovation, and boost revenue prospects for our clients. Our programs are designed not only to meet regulatory compliance but also to foster sustainable practices and environmental stewardship.

Eco Clear Solutions stands at the forefront of the circular economy, driving change and making a tangible impact on the environment. Join us in our mission to create a sustainable future through effective waste management and recycling solutions.

Name: Schönmackers
Description:
Schönmackers – Gemeinsam für eine nachhaltige Zukunft!
Mit über 1.700 engagierten Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeitern an mehr als 20 Standorten setzen wir auf ökonomisches und ökologisches Handeln. Der Schutz von Mensch und Umwelt ist ein zentraler Bestandteil unserer Unternehmensphilosophie – schließlich sorgen wir schon heute für morgen.
 Unsere Mission: Wir kümmern uns darum, dass Abfälle- und Wertstoffe gesetzeskonform entsorgt beziehungsweise recycelt werden – vom privaten Hausmüll bis hin zu industriellen und gewerblichen Reststoffen. Schönmackers steht für eine nachhaltige Verwertung unterschiedlichster Wertstoffe und zukunftssichere Jobs in mehr als 75 Aufgabenbereichen der gesamten Kreislaufwirtschaft. 

 Wir suchen Persönlichkeiten, die etwas bewegen wollen:
-	Berufserfahrene, die eine neue Herausforderung suchen
-	Berufseinsteiger mit Studienabschluss oder nach Abschluss der Ausbildung, die sich eine erfolgreiche Karriere wünschen
-	Werkstudenten, die auf einen soliden Start im Berufsleben setzen
-	Im kaufmännischen Bereich setzen wir auch auf zielstrebigen Nachwuchs mit Perspektiven nach der Ausbildung, wie z. B. einem dualen Studium oder einem Trainee in einem Fachbereich
-	Quereinsteiger, die mit gezielter Unterstützung einen Berufswechsel oder Neustart wagen möchten
 Unsere Unterstützung: Wir fördern die persönliche und fachliche Weiterentwicklung unserer Mitarbeitenden auf vielfältige Weise.
 Hier geht es zu allen offenen Stellen! https://jobs.schoenmackers.de/

Name: ARN BV
Description:
Als publiek/private onderneming -een participatie van samenwerkende MARN-gemeenten en het familiebedrijf REMONDIS- streeft grondstoffen- en energiecentrale ARN B.V. naar maatschappelijk verantwoord ondernemen en naar aantoonbare betrokkenheid en waardecreatie door in de samenleving vrijkomend afval duurzaam, doelmatig, economisch verantwoord en gericht op continuïteit te verwerken.

ARN B.V. begon met een stortplaats en twee verbrandingslijnen met rookgasreinigingsinstallatie. Daar zijn inmiddels een biologische drooginstallatie, een vergistings- en composteerinstallatie en een luierrecyclinginstallatie bij gekomen.

Door toepassing van hoogwaardige technologie kan ARN hoogcalorisch afval verwerken. Hiermee, en met het inzetten van moderne scheidingstechnieken is ARN een bedrijf dat toekomstbestendig is en inzet op verdergaande wijzen van recycling. Grondstoffen terugwinnen, niet-recyclebare afvalstoffen verantwoord verwerken, waarbij emissienormen leidend zijn, en energie opwekken en leveren aan onze omgeving, dat is ARN.

Name: CMW Drainage Solutions Ltd
Description: Specialist in drainage services including CCTV drainage surveys, unblocking, full site reports ,no dig repairs, installing new drainage, 24/7 call outs on domestic and commercial properties

Name: ECOSERVIS - komplexní nakládání s odpady s.r.o.
Description:
Jsme menší, spíše rodinná firma s velkým potenciálem.
Naším cílem vždy bylo pomáhat menším firmám a živnostníkům, kterým jsme chtěli ulehčit od legislativních povinností v oblasti nakládání s odpady.  A tak jsme jim nabídli komplexní službu, kdy se nemusí o nic starat. Vedeme za ně průběžnou evidenci odpadů, zpracováváme roční hlášení o produkci a nakládání s odpady, vyrábíme ILNO, označení sběrových prostředků, školíme zaměstnance, zastupujeme je při kontrolách a zároveň jim zajistíme odvoz a likvidaci či využití odpadů.

Díky této komplexnosti s námi jsou naši zákazníci spokojení, rádi nás doporučují druhým, a tak každý rok rosteme o desítky procent. Nyní mezi naše zákazníky patří i velké společnosti – nemocnice, výrobní podniky, stavební firmy, řetězce, velkoobchody a další.

Naše začátky se píší od roku 2004, kdy jsme začali a podnikali jako OSVČ, od roku 2010 jsme známí jako společnost pod názvem ECOSERVIS - komplexní nakládání s odpady s.r.o.

Působíme zejména na severu Čech, ale zákazníky máme v celé České republice a partnery i v zahraničí.

Od roku 2016 jsme spustili službu RočníHlášení.cz, kde si u nás jednoduše můžete nechat zpracovat roční hlášení o produkci a nakládání s odpady. Více informací naleznete zde: https://www.rocnihlaseni.cz/

Name: USH INDIA RECYCLER PVT LTD
Description: USH Recycler India Pvt Ltd is a leading e-waste recycling company based in India. We are committed to providing sustainable solutions for the responsible disposal and recycling of electronic waste. With state-of-the-art facilities and expertise in handling electronic waste, we ensure that all materials are processed efficiently and safely, minimizing the environmental impact. Our mission is to promote the circular economy by recovering valuable resources from e-waste and reducing landfill waste. As a trusted partner for businesses, organizations, and individuals, we offer transparent and reliable e-waste management services that comply with all regulatory standards. Join us in our commitment to creating a cleaner and greener future by choosing USH Recycler India Pvt Ltd for your e-waste recycling needs.

Name: LELY Environnement
Description:
Entreprise familiale Grenobloise depuis 1930, nous sommes spécialisés dans la gestion des déchets. 
Nous proposons à nos clients des solutions de proximité pour collecter, transporter, traiter, valoriser et recycler tous leurs déchets, grâce à des équipements modernes et un savoir faire qui se transmet de générations en générations.

Vous pouvez nous retrouver sur 4 sites :

-  St-Quentin sur Isère : Ecopôle (ISDND et Plateformes de valorisation des déchets)
-  St-Quentin (bis) : Centre de tri des Déchets Industriels (Inoval'Y)

Collecter, Trier, Valoriser, c'est notre métier !

experiences in the field of plastics processing and business.

Our Technical Department is able to study and face specific requirements to

also update know-how for different field of application.

Name: MJ Church Recycling
Description: MJ Church is a waste management business operating across the South West. We offer a comprehensive range of services to clients in the commercial and domestic sectors.

Name: KVA Linth
Description: Die KVA Linth in Niederurnen/GL erfüllt im Dienst der Gesellschaft vielfältige Aufgaben. Sie verwertet jedes Jahr bis zu 116’000 Tonnen Siedlungs- und Industrieabfälle. Ausserdem produziert sie nachhaltigen Strom, versorgt Unternehmen und Private mit hauseigener Wärme und rezykliert Metall. Eigentümer der KVA Linth ist der Zweckverband für die Kehrichtbeseitigung im Linthgebiet. Er besteht aus 28 Gemeinden in den Kantonen Glarus, Schwyz und St. Gallen. Als verlässliche und wirtschaftlich solide Arbeitgeberin beschäftigt die KVA Linth heute rund 60 Mitarbeitende. Die Anlage wurde 1973 eröffnet und seither stetig erneuert und modernisiert. In den kommenden Jahren steht nun ein weiterer wegweisender Entwicklungsschritt bevor – das Projekt KVA Linth 2025.

Name: PanelCycle
Description:
We provide a full solution to recycle combustible ACP cladding removed from Australian buildings. We will collect materials removed from your site and transport this to our facility.
Crudely speaking, the recycling process consists of the collected panels being shredded through a specialised machine and separated into aluminium & polyethylene powder.

Name: Texinco
Description: Ofrecemos soluciones sostenibles e inteligentes para la gestión integral de residuos industriales. Nuestro objetivo es ayudar a nuestros clientes a optimizar la valorización de sus residuos, cumplir con las exigencias de la Ley REP y contribuir al fomento de la economía circular en Chile.
Location: San Bernardo, Región Metropolitana de Santiago

Name: GrasaGreen SL
Description: Ofrecemos asesoramiento personalizado para cada proyecto, dándole la mejor solución en gestión medioambiental. Disponemos de un equipo especializado en desmontajes industriales y demoliciones. Somos transportistas autorizados en la comunidad autónoma de Aragón AR/RNGP‐ 1722.

Name: Frontier Carbon Solutions
Description:
Dallas, Texas-based Frontier Carbon Solutions was founded in April 2021 to offer safe and permanent carbon storage services for industrial emitters across the Rocky Mountain Region, with an initial focus in Wyoming. Specializing in the development of carbon capture infrastructure and carbon marketing, the Frontier team can provide a turnkey emissions solution for our customers.

Frontier is a portfolio company of Tailwater Capital.

Name: Re-Cig

Ci occupiamo della trasformazione del rifiuto in materiale plastico atossico per la produzione di piccola oggettistica.

Name: Progenius
Description:
Evoluímos para melhor nos conectar com o mundo. Apresentamos nossa nova identidade visual: uma marca dinâmica e vibrante que representa nosso futuro em constante transformação.

Unimos a transparência e a precisão da ciência para construir um futuro mais sustentável. Não tratamos apenas resíduos, cuidamos do legado ambiental dos nossos clientes.

Com mais de 20 anos de trajetória, somos especialistas no tratamento físico-químico de efluentes industriais, como água de lavagem, água de produção, água oleosa, lixiviados (chorume) e outros. Desenvolvemos rotas personalizadas de acordo com as propriedades de cada material e entregamos segurança ambiental para dezenas de clientes de diversos setores.

Integramos equipamentos de alto desempenho a sistemas de monitoramento contínuo, proporcionando agilidade e segurança no processamento de múltiplos efluentes. Nossa equipe multidisciplinar reúne rigor técnico e compromisso ético. Contamos com controle de qualidade rigoroso e transparente, garantindo a rastreabilidade de todo o processo.

Para resolver passivos ambientais complexos, não fazemos mágica, usamos ciência. Saiba mais em progenius.com.br.

Name: ORAC’E’ SRL
Description: Amiamo definirci: “commercialisti dell’ambiente” o “commercialisti dei rifiuti” perché, in quanto professionisti del settore, noi questa materia, che tra l’altro si incrocia con la materia “sicurezza” la conosciamo benissimo e ci confrontiamo tutti i giorni con essa. Ecco perché abbiamo messo a punto un sistema di assistenza a 360° in ambito rifiuti ed ambiente.

Name: Ab PAK

Ab PAK Company (Ab Palayesh Ara Kia) provides the following services with the aim of reducing crises in the field of water and wastewater:

•	Implementation of membrane and filtration processes such as RO, UF, …

Name: BREECUP
Description:
Inspiré par l'objectif zéro déchet
BREECUP a pour ambition de contribuer au monde durable et responsable de demain. 

Nous avons pour mission de valoriser un maximum de déchets tout en formant et sensibilisant la population aux enjeux environnementaux qui en découlent. 

 BREECUP conçoit et produit des objets issus de cartons recyclés s'incluant ainsi dans une démarche d'économie circulaire.

Name: AWIGO Abfallwirtschaft Landkreis Osnabrück GmbH
Description: Als 100-prozentige Tochtergesellschaft des Landkreises Osnabrück ist die AWIGO der zentrale Ansprechpartner für alle Belange der Kreislauf- und Abfallwirtschaft in der Region. Den rund 360.000 Einwohnern in den 21 Städten, Gemeinden und Samtgemeinden des Osnabrücker Landes sowie zahlreichen Gewerbebetrieben stehen wir als zertifizierter Entsorgungsfachbetrieb mit Rat und Tat zur Seite, wenn es um umweltgerechte Abfallvermeidung, -beseitigung und -verwertung geht.

Name: DIRECT WASTE MANAGEMENT LIMITED
Description: DIRECT WASTE MANAGEMENT LIMITED is a family owned company which established in 1998. We have two fully licensed sites in Peterhead which are covered by PPC permits which allows us to store and treat waste. these sites are monitored and regulated by SEPA. We are also fully certified to the three standards ISO 9001, ISO 14001 and ISO 45001. The services we provide include waste fluid and sludge treatment and remediation, onsite chemist and laboratory, Oil separation Process, Dissolved are flotation treatment system, all types of haulage services, Vacuum tanker hire, Oil tanker hire, Super sucker tanker hire, Special waste collection, Tank cleaning, Drums and IBCS collection, storage facilities, Pat testing, Any safety requirements, Environmental management service, Internal audits and COTC compliance. We provide Innovative waste management solutions differentiated on customer service excellence delivering value with safety and environmental focus. Direct waste management LTD are committed to sourcing alternatives for your waste

Name: AIIR Environmental Ltd
Description:
AIIR Environmental Ltd is a leading Specialist Industrial Services and Waste Management company.  Founded in 2023 by a team possesing a wealth of industry experience, AIIR has quickly established itself as a trusted provider. Based in the heart of Scotland, the company offers a comprehensive range of services.  Focusing primarily on the Marine Sector, AIIR offers bulk liquid and dry waste management services, tank cleaning, and other specialist requirements. 

Additionally, AIIR Environmental extends its expertise to Breweries, Distilleries, Gasification Plants, Oil Production Facilities and Manufacturing Businesses.  Excelling in handling all bulk waste streams, from complex sludges to weak effluents, we are commited to environmental responsibility and ensuring the regulatory treatment and disposal of all waste materials.

Serving all of Scotland and Northern England, AIIR Environmental Ltd is dedicated to delivering high-quality services and meeting the unique needs of its diverse customer base.

Name: AKAM أكام
Description: AKAM is a fully owned subsidiary of the Saudi Investment Recycling Company, specializing in recycling & managing construction and demolition waste in the Kingdom.

Name: TechzGreen
Description: Welcome to TechzGreen! We’re on a mission to create a sustainable future by transforming recycled plastic into long-lasting furniture and interior products. Our innovative process gives a second life to plastic waste, turning it into stylish, durable pieces for your home or office. Join us in making the world a greener place.

Name: Wamatech A/S
Description:
Simplicity, profitability and durability are at the core of our business. Which is, and has been since 1997, to turn your waste into profit. 

Today, 20 years later, we are still in that business with a longstanding collaboration with leading suppliers of machinery and facilities for the waste and recycling industry.

Our employees have extensive technical knowledge and experience from the waste and recycling area, thus making us able to offer: 

Extensive service, from layout layout to production device, sale, delivery and assembly of machinery and equipment, fast delivery of spare parts, solution of practical problems with existing equipment and ongoing servicing of machines.

Our experience plays a major role in a rapidly evolving market, both in terms of volume and technology. Wamatech is well-equipped for a future where recycling is playing an increasing role, both in Denmark, in the Nordic countries and in Europe. 

We constantly follow the development of new technology and are in close cooperation with our suppliers.

Name: WRZ Hörger GmbH & Co. KG
Description: WRZ Hörger GmbH & Co. Quality awareness and continuous innovation have characterized the image of the family-owned company since its foundation. Name: Das Biogas
Description: Das biogas is a leading biogas construction company specializing in innovative and eco-friendly solutions for treating sewage and food waste. We offer portable biogas systems and construct customized biogas systems that reduce waste disposal costs, generate renewable energy, and improve environmental sustainability. Our expertise in sewage and food waste treatment, combined with our commitment to biogas utilization, empowers our clients to transform organic waste into a valuable resource. Partner with Das biogas to create a cleaner, greener future through sustainable waste management practices.

Name: FRANCE COLLECT
Description:
Implantée dans la région de Nantes, France Collect vous propose un service efficace de collecte de vos huiles et graisses alimentaires usagées (HAU), huiles de cuisson, huiles de friture en conformité avec la réglementation en vigueur.
Nous collectons les huiles et les graisses usagées dans les restaurants, boucheries, boulangeries, collectivités, établissements publics ou privés, industries alimentaires…

Name: Arbocatalogus Afvalbranche
Description:
De Arbocatalogus Afvalbranche biedt maatregelen voor arbeidsomstandigheden, veiligheid en gezondheid op het werk, specifiek toegesneden op de situatie in de afvalbranche. 

De sociale partners en brancheorganisaties vormen tezamen de Stichting Arbocatalogus Afvalbranche (StAA). Deze stichting stelt zich ten doel de Arbocatalogus Afvalbranche actueel te houden en verder te ontwikkelen en het gebruik ervan te bevorderen.

Name: MCA Recycling
Description:
MCA Recycling is a SME active in office waste management sinds 1996. The company was first specialised in data media destruction and in waste management of  electrical and electronic equipment. Today, MCA Recycling is developing its offer in order to propose adapted solutions for any kind of waste. The aim is to help their customers facilitate the management of waste and to ensure the collecting in a clean and efficient way.  MCA Recycling support its customers in the optimization of waste management and in the improvement of environnemental performances. The company manages about 1000 clients in Brussel, Wallonia and Flanders.
 
In 2014, MCA Recycling obtained the ISO 14001:2004 label as well as the Environmental management System (EMAS) certification.  In 2015, the company has been nominated for the European EMAS Award, along with 22 other european companies.
 
As a SME, MCA Recycling presents the advantages of a small organisation : schedule flexibility, fast responsiveness to customers, quality of tailor-made solutions and safety as a priority.

Name: Waste Solution Services
Description:
At zero cost to you,

WSS leverages it's buying power and strong relationships with all trash haulers around the U.S. and CA. in order to secure the lowest possible rates for it's clients. 

By bringing these haulers a tremendous amount of business and helping offload many of their expenses, WSS is able to reset the client's rates even mid-contract.

Within about a week after receiving just one recent trash invoice per property, WSS will have a fully executable and concrete savings breakdown ready for review.

Name: Karl Meyer Gruppe
Description:
Mit der Erfahrung aus mehr als sieben Jahrzehnten bietet Karl Meyer Ihnen individuelle Lösungen in den Bereichen Entsorgung, Containerdienst Transport und Logistik. Wir gehören zu den führenden Umwelt- und Entsorgungsdienstleistern in Norddeutschland und sind zertifizierter Entsorgungsfachbetrieb. Unser Kerngeschäft erstreckt sich von der Abfallentsorgung und der Transportlogistik über das Recycling bis zum Rohstoffhandel. Und wir geben unser Know-How weiter. In unserer eigenen Akademie bieten wir Seminare, Fortbildungen und Trainings an. Wir schulen Ihre Mitarbeiter praxisnah u. a. in den Bereichen Abfall und Gefahrgut sowie Logistik nach den gesetzlichen Vorgaben.

Doch wir sind nicht nur auf der Straße, sondern auch auf dem Wasser zu Hause. Unsere Schiffe transportieren in der Regel Schüttgüter wie Saatgut oder Futtermittel, aber auch Stückgut in Nord- und Ostsee. Die Karl Meyer Flotte umfasst firmeneigene Schiffe mit einer individuellen Ladekapazität von bis zu 3.850 Tonnen. 
Mehr als ein Umweltdienstleister: Photovoltaik, Blockheizkraftwerke, Industrieservice und ein eigenes Autohaus mit Werkstatt im Landkreis Stade als Partner von VW, VW Nutzfahrzeuge und Audi Service.

Seit vielen Jahren verkaufen, installieren und warten wir nicht nur Blockheizkraftwerke, Photovoltaikanlagen und Energiespeicher zwischen Elbe und Weser, sondern sind auch zuverlässiger Partner für Industriebetriebe rund um unseren Firmenstammsitz in Wischhafen.

Vor mehr als 50 Jahren wurde das Karl Meyer Autohaus in Wischhafen eröffnet. Als langjähriger Partner von Volkswagen, VW Nutzfahrzeuge und Audi Service sind wir Ihr  Partner in den Bereichen Werkstatt und Service. Testen Sie es aus. Wir überzeugen unsere Kunden mit individueller Beratung, persönlichem Service und höchster Qualität im Kundendienst, Vertrieb und der Werkstatt.

This 2-year Initiative includes a series of 14 Discovery Workshops that will culminate at a 3-day Future Search strategic planning event, where a microcosm of the U.S. Composting Industry will work together to create a shared vision and long-term plan for the circularity of compostables and compost.
