Name: Glanco Recover & Recycle
Description:
As Glanco Recover & Recycle, our mission is to go beyond conventional treatment systems by prioritizing projects that enable the recovery of valuable acids, chemicals, and precious metals directly at the source. This approach is considered a true “game changer” in the industry, setting a new standard that combines environmental sustainability with significant economic benefits. Across diverse sectors such as surface treatment, steel production, galvanizing, electrolytic copper production, plating, aluminum anodizing, and nickel mining, we separate valuable components from process liquids and reintegrate them into production.

Through the systems we design, we ensure the recovery of metals such as iron sulfate, nickel sulfate, and copper, delivering process consistency and energy savings. In doing so, facilities not only reduce their carbon footprint but also achieve rapid return on investment.

In Europe and the United States, source-based recovery technologies implemented under BAT (Best Available Technique) are known to enhance product quality and improve process control. At GLANCO, we deliver effective solutions even in the most challenging, chemically demanding process baths, making these technologies applicable worldwide.

Acid Line Liquids Are Not Waste — They Are a Resource!

Recovering liquids used during production not only provides environmental benefits but also delivers significant cost savings. With Glanco Recover, valuable metals such as iron sulfate, nickel sulfate, and copper are reclaimed, reducing raw material purchases and waste management expenses. The carbon footprint is minimized, while production consistency and quality increase. Our systems offer both environmental and economic transformation, ensuring a rapid payback period.

Get in touch with us to save energy and sources.

Name: SORPA bs.
Description:
Waste management and solid waste-disposal are prominent modern urban services throughout the industrialized world. Iceland has in excess of 318,000 inhabitants, about 200,000 of whom live in Reykjavík, the capital, and its adjoining municipalities. 

Since 1991, The City of Reykjavík and fiveother municipalities have coordinated their solid waste disposal through an independent firm named SORPA, which these six municipalities jointly own and run. Seven representatives from the municipalities and the general manager, form SORPA’s Board of Directors. 

Municipalities with ownership are: 

Reykjavík 
Kópavogur
Hafnarfjörður 
Garðabær 
Seltjarnarnes 
Mosfellsbær 


The formation of SORPA received a strong push from increased debate on environmental issues. Simultaneously, its formation was influenced by an Icelandic government policy issued in the early 1990s to reduce solid waste, step by step. The most densely populated area, the capital area, had already induced problems in waste disposal that had to be dealt with. Open waste areas at city borders and areas with unsorted waste covered by thin layers of earth had been the only options. Aesthetic problems were obvious, pollution evident and recycling absent. SORPA was designated to tackle the problems. 

 SORPA has ca. 170 employment positions.

La chaleur produite au cours du processus d'incinération est ensuite transformée en énergie thermique qui peut être utilisée pour alimenter des réseaux de chauffage urbain ou chauffer des serres, et électrique qui est revendue à des distributeurs d'électricité.

Cette valorisation énergétique contribue à la préservation des ressources fossiles et à la limitation des émissions de gaz à effet de serre. Veolia applique à toutes ses installations de valorisation énergétique les normes dictées par la réglementation européenne, qui fixent notamment des valeurs limites d'émission pour les fumées.

Name: Eco Materials LLC
Description:
Eco Materials is a new, forward-thinking company that’s dedicated to promoting sustainability and protecting the environment. Our mission is to provide a safe and clean alternative for the disposal of construction site waste that’s environmentally friendly, sustainable, and financially responsible.

This mission led to the Eco Materials Wash Plant: an innovative, state-of-the-art soil wash facility providing a safe and eco-friendly option for local development and remediation companies to dispose of their construction and excavation site waste.

The Plant will utilize proven technologies and methods for reclaiming and reusing materials that would otherwise be discarded in a landfill. Through our environmentally friendly wet process utilizing reclaimed stormwater, the plant will clean and sort soil, regenerating more than 85% of inbound material, creating quality sand and aggregate materials for use in new asphalt and concrete products.

The plant will produce clean washed 3/8th stone, clean washed 3/4th stone, C33 concrete sand, and fine mason sand. We can also adjust the screens and classification equipment on an as needed basis. Eco Materials will continuously process inbound soil from our customer base, with all outbound materials meeting strict PADEP standards.

At full capacity, the Plant will divert 700,000 tons of waste from reaching landfills, which are notoriously bad for the environment. Landfills don’t shrink over time, while limited building materials and resources do. When companies bury building materials in landfills, they simply take up space and contribute to the ever-growing problem of waste management.

In contrast, sustainable resources like renewed or repurposed building materials can be used again and again, conserving natural resources and reducing waste. We’ll offer a sustainable alternative to traditional soil disposal, significantly reducing the industry’s environmental impact.

Name: JR Hammer
Description:
At JR Hammer, we’re transforming industrial scrap into valuable resources by redefining the recovery, processing and recycling of cables, metals and PVC. Many scrap merchants claim to recycle these materials, but most of the by-products end up in landfill. Josh Robinson, JR Hammer Managing Director, is driven by a belief that waste is unnecessary, unintelligent, unsustainable and uncommercial. 

At our Melbourne-based facility, the high-capacity machinery, advanced processing techniques and certified recycling solutions help electrical contractors and others in the construction industry meet ESG targets while unlocking real value from their waste – and keeping the planet free of senseless landfill. 

Leading the future of cable recycling.

JR Hammer has not only invested in the latest machinery to optimise value retention, we’re heavily involved in R&D in collaboration with CSIRO, RMIT, BYGEN, Welvic and The Vinyl Council of Australia to develop new ways to recover near-virgin PVC resin from PVC waste. We expect this to return up to 95% of even the most difficult PVC mixes (currently only 5% of Australia’s PVC is recycled). This work has earned us a federal government grant, reinforcing its contribution towards Australia’s sustainability goals. 

Recycling that makes business cents.

Sustainable solutions are critical, but we also know they need to stack up commercially. Our flexible solutions make it easy and profitable to retain value of your scrap AND accrue ESG benefits. 

 Hassle-free collections – We collect your waste when you need. 

 Certified benefits – We issue green certificates to support your ESG goals.

 Maximise returns and output – Our advanced processing achieves higher recovery rates.

 Competitive rates guarantee - for a superior service! 

Let’s move towards a more circular and sustainable future. Reach out for further information or opportunities to partner.

Name: Bianna LATAM
Description:
Ampliamos nuestra visión para transformar la circularidad en América Latina
Durante más de una década, en Bianna México hemos trabajado para diseñar las mejores soluciones en valorización de residuos en la región. 
En los últimos años aprendimos algo fundamental: la economía circular en América Latina está avanzando, y para acompañarla bien, nosotros también debíamos evolucionar.
Durante estos años hemos trabajado con visión regional, construyendo relaciones, ejecutando proyectos y ofreciendo soluciones que debían tener el mismo estándar técnico en cualquier país. Ahora esa visión toma forma en una sola unidad estratégica.
Hoy damos ese paso, que se siente natural.
Bianna México evoluciona a Bianna LATAM, una plataforma regional que reúne nuestras operaciones, proyectos y clientes en todos los países hispanohablantes del Caribe, Centro y Sudamérica.
No es un branding.
No es un cambio estético.
No es un punto de partida.
Es un cambio estructural. Es la consecuencia natural de un camino que venimos recorriendo desde hace años.
Bianna LATAM consolida a México como nuestro hub comercial y de postventa para toda la región, complementado por una presencia operativa en Colombia.
Para estar más cerca.

Fabric and Textile waste.

Name: UPCYCLE | MSCA Doctoral Network
Description:
As prevention strategies are struggling with respect to some waste categories, biogenic hard-to-recycle streams represent a critical issue, hindering circular bioeconomy and resulting in severe environmental pollution phenomena. The Waste Framework Directive and the EU Green Deal indicate the need for developing pioneering value chains to address the challenge in compliance with sustainability targets. A set of promising thermochemical processes emerged, both in dry (pyrolysis, gasification) and wet aqueous (hydrothermal carbonisation, hydrothermal liquefaction) phases, with their application still limited by technical and non-technical barriers.

The UPCYCLE MSCA Doctoral Network will train the next generation of professionals in the upscaling of these deep conversion technologies for hard-to-recycle biogenic waste and will provide innovative tools for the design of feasible waste upcycle solutions to high-value secondary materials. Such ambition will be achieved by developing an integrated methodology combining cutting-edge experimental and modelling techniques at various scales (molecular, reactor and process) and by covering the entire value chain in continuity with relevant stakeholders. Several priority waste streams will be targeted, namely highly contaminated and poorly reactive sewage sludge and derived products from municipal and industrial wastewater treatment as well as highly contaminated lignocellulosic materials.

The UPCYCLE partners will work synergistically to generate a cohort of 15 well-trained young researchers with a unique multi-disciplinary set of skills, not limited to technical ones, with the goal of making them the future research leaders or entrepreneurs capable of bringing forward a paradigm shift. At once, the project will pave the way for large-scale deployment of sustainable technologies on which a new generation of biorefineries could rely.

Name: Green America Recycling
Description:
For more than three decades, Green America Recycling (GAR) has been sustainably reusing waste materials for fuel in the cement manufacturing process. We are proudly owned by Continental Cement Company and operate a Part B permitted RCRA Treatment, Storage and Disposal (TSD) facility adjacent to the cement plant in Hannibal, Missouri. GAR’s full-service capability includes waste stream pre-qualification, unloading and processing of RCRA hazardous and non-hazardous solids and liquids.

GAR’s hazardous waste facility in Hannibal, Missouri can accept a wide variety of waste materials. This includes, but is not limited to: refinery still bottoms, paint solids, tars, solvents, degreasers, off-spec chemicals, dry powders and debris. Acceptable waste containers include: drums, end dumps, totes, roll-offs, sludge/vacuum boxes, tank trucks, cubic yard boxes and bags, rail intermodels and rail tankers. Processing systems center around totally enclosed blending and processing buildings that vent organic vapors to the burning zone of the kiln.

GAR’s non-hazardous waste facility in Davenport, Iowa can accept a wide variety of waste materials.  This includes, but is not limited to: paper, wood, plastic organic liquids, and rolled film material. Acceptable waste methods include: roll-offs, van bales, bulk trucks and belt trailers.

Our processing facilities operate 24 hours a day, seven days a week. Deliveries are typically accepted Monday through Friday and delivery times are established in accordance with a pre-arranged scheduling, including the flexibility of “drop and swap”. GAR operates a fully capable waste fuel laboratory, offering on-site analytical services to meet facility processing and regulatory analytical requirements.

The collected UCO is used exclusively for conversion into sustainable biodiesel, ensuring it does not re-enter the food chain or pollute Bangladesh’s waterways and drainage systems.

Our mission is to improve public health by eliminating the illegal reuse of degraded cooking oil – a major contributor to cardiovascular diseases – and to protect the environment through responsible waste-to-energy practices. Guided by our corporate motto, “Energy From Waste,” we contribute to cleaner cities, healthier communities and a more sustainable future for Bangladesh.

Name: Eco Clarity
Description:
Sustainable solutions for fats, oils & grease waste disposal. Our patented separation technology delivers cost savings and certified green credentials for your Food Manufacturing business.

While most companies are focused on sustainable sourcing and sustainable production practises, they tend to neglect to capitalise on the rewards for Sustainable disposal practises in their Scope 3 reporting. With Eco Clarity, you go beyond compliance, improving traceability and turning your waste into something good, whilst saving money at the same time!

Under Section 111 of the Water Industry Act, all food businesses must prevent FOG pollution and dispose of grease trap waste legally. We can help large food processors and national restaurant chains recycle FOG waste responsibly, supporting ESG goals, reducing Scope 3 emissions and compliance with UK regulations.

Wastewater from commercial and industrial food facility grease traps is packed full of valuable resources such as fats, oils and grease (FOG), which can be recycled to make biofuels, which generate significant CO2 emission savings.

Without proper handling and disposal, FOG can be extremely destructive, blocking sewer and drainage networks, polluting the environment and increasing greenhouse gas emissions.

Eco Clarity have spent over a decade developing a separation technology that can process FOG quickly, using only a fraction of the energy that conventional solutions require. This revolutionary technology can create a reliable and sustainable renewable energy source, and it also has the benefit of making water safe to return to the environment.

Name: TARDIOLI ALFREDO S.r.l.
Description:
La Tardioli Alfredo S.r.l. nasce a Foligno nella seconda metà degli anni ’50, dall’idea imprenditoriale del Sig. Tardioli Alfredo e della moglie Sig.ra Berrettoni Anna. Agli albori si trattava di una piccola azienda dedita alla raccolta dei rottami ferrosi ed alla vendita degli stessi sul territorio regionale.
Il core business della Società, dalle origini fino ad oggi, è sempre stato rappresentato dall’attività di commercializzazione, lavorazione e trattamento di metalli ferrosi e non ferrosi.
Con il passare degli anni la Società ha implementato le proprie offerte commerciali ed industriali realizzando una significativa integrazione orizzontale dei servizi resi. La Società è oggi presente nei settori del commercio e lavorazione di metalli preziosi, ferrosi e non ferrosi, nel settore delle demolizioni industriali, del noleggio containers, dei trasporti, ecc.
La Società ha investito costantemente risorse economiche nella formazione del personale, nel rinnovo degli impianti e nell’acquisto di macchinari all’avanguardia, credendo fermamente nell'innovazione e sostenibilità, conquistando così un ruolo prestigioso, a livello nazionale, nella lavorazione e nel trattamento dei rifiuti industriali metallici.
Oltre ad un forte sviluppo industriale e strategico, la Società ormai da anni ha intrapreso un’espansione commerciale in Italia ed all’Estero ottenendo risultati soddisfacenti.
La Tardioli Alfredo S.r.l. lavora con i più grandi esponenti del settore metallurgico al livello Europeo.
La Società vanta le seguenti certificazioni: UNI EN ISO 9001:2015; UNI EN ISO 14001:2015; UNI EN ISO 45001:2018. La stessa, inoltre, ha ricevuto le certificazioni di cui al Reg. No: 7233-A-E-ER/a-ER/b-I, Regolamento UE n. 333/2011 e Regolamento UE n. 715/2013.

Name: Dala Vatten och Avfall
Description:
Dala Vatten och Avfall har hand om drift, utveckling, samordning, administration och planering av vatten och avlopps- och avfallsverksamheterna i Gagnef, Leksand, Rättvik och Vansbro. Huvudkontoret ligger i Leksand.

Mycket av det arbete vi utför varken syns eller hörs, men det skulle omedelbart märkas om det upphörde. Genom planering, analys och utveckling levererar vi den kritiska infrastruktur som är grundförutsättningen för att vi ska kunna bo och leva i våra kommuner. Vårt uppdrag är att säkerställa att våra kunder har tillgång till rent vatten och miljöriktig avlopps-och avfallshantering.

Vårt uppdrag är också att skapa förutsättningar för våra kunder att göra mer hållbara val. Vi förvaltar våra verksamheter med kunden i fokus och med hjärta för miljön och den hållbara utvecklingen för våra samhällen. Vårt mål är att det ska vara lätt för våra kunder att göra rätt i alla vatten-, avfalls-och avloppsfrågor.

Vision
En bättre miljö idag och för kommande generationer.

För att bidra till visionen ska vi säkerställa friskt vatten, miljöriktig avfalls- och avloppshantering för de som lever i, verkar och besöker våra kommuner. Genom samordning och samarbete gör vi detta effektivt och med hög kvalitet för en enklare vardag.


Värdegrund
Vad vi står för och hur vi vill definiera oss som företag och arbetsgivare utgör vår värdegrund. Värdegrunden är nu under bearbetning och ska konkretiseras i ett arbete där det är viktigt att alla medarbetare deltar.

Der USB leistet damit einen aktiven Beitrag für den Umweltschutz und die Lebensqualität in Bochum. Jahr für Jahr sammeln, verwerten und entsorgen die mehr als 600 Mitarbeiter rund 170.000 Tonnen Abfälle und säubern jede Woche Straßen und Gehwege von etwa 5.300 Kilometern Länge. Dank einer nachhaltigen Unternehmensführung wird der USB dabei höchsten ökonomischen, ökologischen und sozialen Ansprüchen gerecht.

Name: Alkebulan Greens Energy Ltd
Description:
We are leading the carbon-free revolution in Africa with Waste-to-Value products that lower GHG emissions, improve communities, and create jobs.

There is massive untapped potential in Kenya’s agrarian economy, with more than 3,000 tons of waste produced each day and current briquette production at less than 5% of total demand.

At Alkebulan, we recycle this waste from a variety of sectors and convert it into activated briquettes, animal fodder, and organic fertilizer for the pharmaceutical, textile, education, hospitality, retail, and a variety of other industries.

Due to lack of technical knowhow, corporate ethics, skilled manpower and finance, existing manufacturers are unable to utilize maximum efficiency and production. At Alkebulan, we are positioned to become the single largest producer within 10 years, holding 70% of the market share.

Why Choose Us?

Cutting-Edge - Using the most progressive technologies available to the industry, our manufacturing reduces waste and improves the sustainable fuel choices available to consumers.

Scalability - Automation, strategically selected plant locations, and not one, not two, but six solid revenue streams ensure sustainability of our operations.

Business Acumen - Our founders combine 10+ years of industry knowledge, business connections, and hands on experience. 

Social Impact - We are committed to uplifting local communities through job creation, skills development, and facilities such as dispensaries, canteens and potable water hubs.

Market-Ready - We come prepared with all relevant certifications, patents, and good intentions. We are ready to take on the market as a reliable briquette manufacturer.

From start to here, we have got it all right, thanks to impeccable research and planning.

Let’s join hands to create a Circular Green Economy!

Contact us today to learn more about investment opportunities.

 alkebulan.energy
 info@alkebulan.energy

Name: Sogliano Ambiente S.p.A.
Description:
Sogliano Ambiente S.p.A. nasce nel 1996 per la gestione di Ginestreto, la discarica per rifiuti urbani e speciali di Sogliano al Rubicone (FC). In un territorio delle colline romagnole attento alla sostenibilità, l’Amministrazione comunale sceglie di affrontare il tema dei rifiuti con un approccio innovativo: trasformare un problema ambientale in un’opportunità di crescita energetica, occupazionale e territoriale, nel pieno rispetto dell’ambiente e della salute delle persone.

Nel corso degli anni, grazie allo sviluppo di solide competenze, all’acquisizione di elevate professionalità e alla definizione di un modello gestionale trasparente ed efficiente, Sogliano Ambiente ha ampliato il proprio raggio d’azione creando un vero e proprio Polo Integrato, all'interno del quale  gestisce impianti per il trattamento e il recupero di rifiuti secchi (come carta, cartone, plastica, vetro, legno e metalli), rifiuti biodegradabili e RAEE.

Accanto al core business della gestione dei rifiuti, l’azienda sviluppa in modo integrato servizi e soluzioni per la produzione di energia da fonti rinnovabili, valorizzando il biogas prodotto dai propri impianti e le altre risorse naturali – come il sole e l’acqua – attraverso impianti di cogenerazione, sistemi fotovoltaici e idroelettrici.

Sogliano Ambiente è un’impresa capace di trasformare i rifiuti in una risorsa economica, produttiva e sociale, grazie a un modello di gestione che ottimizza i processi e restituisce valore ai rifiuti, contribuendo concretamente allo sviluppo sostenibile del territorio.

La nostra visione è quella di un mondo in cui ogni soggetto – pubblico, privato e cittadino – agisca in modo responsabile nei confronti dell’ambiente, della salute e della sicurezza collettiva, trattando i rifiuti non come scarti, ma come opportunità per costruire un futuro migliore.

RecycleLab is on a mission to divert the 5.5 million tonnes of plastic lab consumable waste which is generated each year from incineration and landfill, saving millions of tonnes of GHG emissions and finite resources. 

Our goal is to create a circular economy within the plastic laboratory consumable market to achieve a more sustainable science industry.

We are proud to provide a range of environmentally-sound waste and water management solutions, and industrial services. Our sites are located in Karratha, Newman, Port Hedland, Tom Price & Perth.

Name: Enviroxcellence Services Pty(Ltd)
Description:
EnviroXcellence (EXS) was founded in 1998. We are a Consulting Environmental, Hydrogeological and Hazardous Waste Management Firm in Southern Africa.

We provide our clients with innovative and cost-effective environmental solutions with best available technology and best available technical options in ensuring the minimization of the actual/potential impacts. Recently built World Class Bioremediation Plant in South Africa.

Name: Grensol
Description:
At Grensol, we develop breakthrough technologies to recycle the unrecyclable—transforming waste destined for landfills or incineration into valuable raw materials for the circular economy.

Our advanced material separation solutions focus on challenging waste streams such as automotive shredder residue, electronic scrap, and demolition debris, with ongoing efforts to expand into new sectors and applications.

Name: ShareTex
Description: ShareTex is part of a circular economic model. We create new value from textile waste that has no or limited economic use. Thereby, we contribute to the sustainability of the textile industry and reduce its environmental impact.

Name: William Nicol (Aberdeen) Ltd
Description: 88-year-old business specialising in liquid and powder storage transportation and industrial services.

Name: Dawn To Glow International Ltd
Description:
At D2G, our vision is fueled by the ambition to promote ethical circularity. To achieve this vision, we have set forth the following objectives:

1. Divert waste away from landfills and oceans, contributing to a cleaner environment. Focusing on plastics, our first plant that started operations in mid-2022 now processes up to 200T of PET plastics per month for re-purposing.

2. Our value-chain is based on empowering the most marginalized actors in the waste collection ecosystem - the collectors. We focus on training local women to be part of their local economies by providing skills and livelihood opportunities through ethical collection. 

3. We want to be enablers in the emerging circular economy in Kenya, helping to produce to recognize and actualize the value of waste that can be repurposed and reintegrated into local production cycles. 

https://linktr.ee/dawntoglow

Name: SIGMADAF France
Description:
SIGMADAF France est une entreprise spécialisée dans le traitement des eaux qui possède plus de 40 ans d'expérience dans la fabrication de DAF et dont l'infrastructure repose sur une solution modulaire, rentable et éprouvée. 

Notre activité principale est la conception et la fabrication de DAF, mais nous proposons également des solutions alternatives ou complémentaires pour la réutilisation de l'eau.

Nos produits sont différents et nos systèmes sont de haute qualité. Nous pouvons offrir : 

- Système de flottation FPAC : système de flottation à grande surface avec séparation à flux croisé, conçu pour traiter les flux d'eaux usées très chargés. 

- Système de flottation FPBC : séparateur de haute construction pour le traitement des eaux usées à charge faible à moyenne, y compris celles contenant des particules à faible flottabilité. 

- Système de flottation FPHF : il s'agit d'un système de séparation qui représente une amélioration par rapport à la technologie existante des plaques laminaires, car il utilise une combinaison de flux croisé et à contre-courant. 

- MBR et MBBR : réacteurs biologiques à membrane (MBR) et réacteurs biologiques à lit mobile (MBBR). 

- Filtres-presses : solutions pour la déshydratation des boues. 

Nous avons de l'expérience dans un large éventail de marchés, mais notre activité principale se concentre sur : 


- Les secteurs chimique et pharmaceutique. 
- Les abattoirs, les usines de transformation et l'industrie laitière. 
- La production d'énergie et les énergies renouvelables. 

Notre objectif est d'offrir des solutions clés en main totalement automatisées pour chaque projet et permettre à nos clients de satisfaire leurs besoins spécifiques à moindre coût.

« S'unir, c'est un début. Rester ensemble, c'est progresser. Travailler ensemble, c'est réussir. » - Henry Ford.

L'adhésion à cette philosophie de travail a valu à notre personnel, hautement qualifié et expérimenté, la plus haute considération et une excellente réputation auprès

Name: Baileys Skip Hire and Recycling Ltd
Description: Bailey’s Skip Hire and Recycling Ltd provides a fast, friendly and affordable skip hire service to households and businesses throughout Corby, Kettering, Wellingborough, Market Harborough, Oundle, Rushden and the surrounding areas in Northamptonshire.

Name: Bital Ambiental
Description:
Somos uma empresa especialista em transporte e tratamentos de resíduos, sendo hoje referência no Estado do Maranhão, como empresa mais completa em documentação ambiental e estrutura para atendimento. 

Atuamos há mais de 20 anos respeitando rigorosamente critérios de responsabilidade ambiental e segurança do trabalho.

Name: SYVED
Description:
Notre raison d’être : Le SYVED regroupe les industriels de la transformation des déchets dangereux au service de la transition énergétique et matière.

Les données clés : 2 millions de tonnes de déchets gérés et 54% de valorisés.
Le SYVED est parfaitement ancré dans la réalité du moment, celle de mettre en sécurité les déchets dangereux au bénéfice de la santé publique et de l’environnement, tout en extrayant la valeur de ces déchets au bénéfice de l’intérêt général. Les entreprises constitutives du SYVED sont à taille humaine, la plupart d’origine familiale. Elles incarnent ce sens de l’intérêt général, renforcé par leur proximité de leurs clients et de leurs partenaires grâce au maillage dense qu’elles constituent sur le territoire national. L’écosystème des entreprises du SYVED est à l’image de celui de ses clients, publics et industriels, qui sont représentés aussi bien par les majeurs en France que par le tissu dense des petites communes, des TPE et PME.

Name: Irsara GmbH
Description: Risolviamo il suo problema di rifiuti! Nel campo della tecnologia di smaltimento, Irsara è lo specialista quando si tratta di una moderna tecnologia di smaltimento e di soluzioni orientate al futuro per la gestione digitale dei rifiuti. Riciclaggio sostenibile di materiali residui e di valore. L'uso responsabile delle risorse della terra è una delle grandi sfide del nostro tempo. Insieme abbiamo impostato la competenza di base per andare mano in mano al modo migliore di una soluzione sostenibile, ecologica ed economica. Risolviamo il Suo problema di rifiuti

Name: Netwerk NV
Description:
Netwerk is uw partner voor afvalinzameling en -recycling. Wij streven naar een circulaire economie door afval te recyclen en te hergebruiken als grondstoffen voor de toekomstige generaties. Met onze klantgerichte aanpak, jarenlange ervaring in de branche en transparante werkwijze ontzorgen wij u volledig, waarbij we kiezen voor milieuvriendelijke opties en duurzaamheid centraal stellen.

 Kijk voor meer informatie en een volledig overzicht van onze diensten op onze website: www.netwerknv.nl

Name: Syndicat Emeraude
Description: Le Syndicat Emeraude regroupe 17 communes réparties sur deux communautés d’agglomération. Ses principales missions sont la prévention, la collecte et le traitement des déchets ménagers et assimilés des 282 000 habitants de son territoire, avec un souci constant de réduction des tonnages et d’amélioration des performances de valorisation.

Name: STORK Unternehmensgruppe
Description:
Die STORK Unternehmensgruppe ist ein mittelständisches Dienstleistungsunternehmen im Bereich Entsorgung und Recycling mit Stammsitz in Magdeburg. In besonderem Umfang befasst sich das Unternehmen mit der Aufbereitung von mineralischen Abfällen.

Seit mehr als 25 Jahren stehen wir unseren Kunden als Ansprechpartner im Bereich Entsorgung und Recycling zur Verfügung. Unser fachliches Know-How, unsere Leidenschaft für das, was wir tun sowie unsere eigenen Qualitätsanforderungen sind Teil unserer Philosophie.

Nicht nur zufrieden zu stellen, sondern neue Wege zu gehen, ist Grundlage für langfristigen Erfolg und eine nachhaltige Unternehmensentwicklung.

Wir sind uns unserer Verantwortung, für unsere Umwelt und unser soziales Umfeld bewusst und stärken und unterstützen unsere Region in verschiedenen Bereichen.

Du willst keine News mehr verpassen? Folge uns auf Instagram.
stork_unternehmensgruppe

Name: omnicycle GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
𝗼𝗺𝗻𝗶𝗰𝘆𝗰𝗹𝗲 – 𝗪𝗶𝗿 𝘀𝗰𝗵𝗹𝗶𝗲ß𝗲𝗻 𝗱𝗲𝗻 𝗞𝗿𝗲𝗶𝘀!
Wir kaufen Kunststoff(-abfälle)  auf und bereiten diese für die Weiterverarbeitung  wieder auf. Mithilfe von umfangreich getesteten Verfahren und einer Vielzahl selbst konstruierter Maschinen  generieren wir wieder hochwertige Kunststoffe für den industriellen Gebrauch.  Durch unsere jahrelange Erfahrung in der Kunststoffbranche wissen wir, was wir tun und können für (fast) jedes Kunststoff-Problem, das Ihr in Eurem Unternehmen habt, eine Lösung finden. 

 𝗜𝗵𝗿 𝘄𝗼𝗹𝗹𝘁 𝘄𝗮𝘀 𝗹𝗼𝘀𝘄𝗲𝗿𝗱𝗲𝗻?
Habt Ihr noch massig übrig gebliebene Kunststoff-Teile und wisst nicht wohin damit?  Dann sind wir die richtigen Spezialisten für die Aufbereitung – auch wenn Ihr die Rezyklate wieder selbst für die Produktion in Eurem Unternehmen einsetzen möchtet.  Eine günstige Alternative zu den teuren Kunststoff- und Entsorgungspreisen. 

 𝗘𝘂𝗰𝗵 𝗳𝗲𝗵𝗹𝘁 𝗻𝗼𝗰𝗵 𝘄𝗮𝘀?
Falls Mahlgut oder Granulat in Eurem Unternehmen Mangelware sind, dann fragt bei uns an, was wir auf Lager haben – auf 15.000 m² finden unsere recycelten Kunststoffe viel Platz!  Damit bieten sie die perfekte Basis für Eure vielfältigen Produkte. 

P. S. Wir sind immer auf der Suche nach neuen Leuten.  Willst auch Du den Beruf ausüben, den es nicht gibt  Kunststoff-Recycler werden nämlich nicht ausgebildet, das lernst Du hautnah bei uns in Vreden!  Du musst nur Lust auf was Neues haben und etwas handwerkliches Geschick mitbringen!

Name: EcoBuild Mali
Description:
EcoBuild Mali (EBM) est une start-up malienne engagée dans la valorisation des déchets plastiques et des pneus usés. Nous préservons l’écologie en donnant vie aux déchets plastiques et pneus usés sous plusieurs formes : biens mobiliers, pavés, granulés et autres matériaux de construction.

« La Terre n'est pas un héritage de nos parents, c'est un prêt à nos enfants. » Pour ce faire, l’objectif principal d'EcoBuild Mali est de construire pour un développement durable menant à la création d'une économie circulaire, l'une des sources du progrès. EBM fait du recyclage une responsabilité en vue du progrès et non une obligation.

Avec EBM nous avons la conviction que le mot «développement» ne sera plus prononcé sans l’adjectif «durable».

Name: PYRéO -  Eco-organisme feux pyrotechniques de signalisation de détresse
Description:
PYRéO est l’éco-organisme français dédié à la collecte et au traitement des engins de signalisation de détresse utilisés, périmés, ou tout simplement dont les détenteurs souhaitent se défaire (fusées de détresse à main, fumigènes et fusées parachutes). Les contenants des produits usagés entrent également dans le périmètre d’activité de PYRéO.

PYRéO a été créé à l’origine par la Fédération des Industries Nautiques (FIN) et a été agréé par le Ministère de la transition écologique dès le 22 décembre 2015 (anciennement sous le nom d'APER PYRO) pour répondre à l’obligation des metteurs en marché de prendre en charge la fin de vie de leurs produits pyrotechniques dédiés spécifiquement au monde de la plaisance. L’APER PYRO a agi pendant 6 ans pour organiser la collecte et la destruction de ces engins en fin de vie.

L’aventure se poursuit avec un périmètre élargi depuis le 1er janvier 2022. 

La loi du 10 février 2020 (dite Loi AGEC) et l’arrêté du 1er décembre 2020 ont en effet élargi les gammes de produits concernés par la prise en charge de leur fin de vie.

Les produits collectés et traités par PYRéO seront désormais issus de différents segments d’utilisateurs : de la plaisance, de la marine professionnelle (pêche, transport de personne), du ferroviaire (torches pyrotechniques SNCF) et de tout autre domaine utilisant des engins de signalisation de détresse.

Photo de couverture : Agence Kern

Name: Spreco Recyclers
Description:
Spreco Recyclers is a leading plastic waste recycling company established in 2015. We focus on handling and recycling of plastic waste Category I (Rigid Plastic), Category II (Flexible Plastics), Category III (Multi- Layered plastics) in an environmentally friendly manner.

We are authorized by both the Central Pollution Control Board and the Uttar Pradesh Pollution Control Board with our facility being situated at Delhi-Sharanpur Road, Dundahera Khekra, Distt-Baghpat, Uttar Pradesh. 

The primary goal of the company is to become a world class provider of recycling services and minimize the buildup of used and discarded plastic, which frequently finds its way into landfills or undergoes partial recycling under unhygienic conditions by informal recyclers, thereby posing a threat to the environment. 

We are ISO 9001:2015, 14001:2015 and 45001:2018 certified. 

Spreco Recyclers takes a comprehensive approach to manage and recycle waste, promoting eco-friendly solutions and contributing to reducing the environmental impact caused. Spreco Recyclers takes pride in its growth and successful performance, which can be attributed to customer satisfaction and their confidence in the company's services. 

Come and be a part of our mission to forge a cleaner and more sustainable future.

Name: Resifluxo
Description:
A Resifluxo nasce da crescente preocupação com o meio ambiente, tendo como principal objetivo contribuir para um futuro mais sustentável e limpo, essencialmente através da valorização de resíduos.

Dedicamo-nos à Gestão Global de Resíduos, sendo que possuímos dois centros de receção e triagem, estrategicamente localizados nas sub-regiões do Vale do Sousa e do Ave, onde asseguramos de forma eficiente a triagem, o tratamento e o correto encaminhamento dos mesmos.

Por outro lado, assente no permanente objetivo de reintrodução dos materiais na cadeia de valor, desenvolvemos uma atividade industrial assente na produção de perfis em plásticos mistos 100% reciclados e 100% recicláveis - Wuud , contribuindo assim para uma economia cada vez mais circular.

Name: Ambipar | Latam
Description: Empresa manejo de residuos aprovechables y peligrosos, A través dela economía circular transformamos residuos en oportunidades: desafiando el status quo ambiental desde la basura hasta la innovación.

Name: fECO.ro
Description:
Feco.ro se distinge ca lider în domeniul soluțiilor avansate de tratare a apelor uzate în România, promovând tehnologie de ultimă generație și practici ecologice pentru protejarea mediului. Cu o experiență bogată și o echipă de specialiști dedicată, oferim soluții personalizate pentru a răspunde nevoilor specifice ale fiecărui client, fie că este vorba de industrii, comunități locale sau instituții.

Angajamentul nostru se bazează pe inovație, sustenabilitate și eficiență, asigurând nu doar conformitatea cu standardele naționale și internaționale, ci și îmbunătățirea continuă a performanței sistemelor de tratare. Portofoliul nostru include o gamă variată de servicii, de la consultanță, proiectare, instalare și până la mentenanță și monitorizare, toate concepute să ofere cea mai eficientă și economică soluție de purificare a apei.

În plus, feco.ro pune un accent deosebit pe dezvoltarea de soluții inovatoare care să minimizeze impactul asupra mediului și să promoveze reutilizarea apei în scopuri sustenabile. Acest lucru nu doar că ajută la conservarea resurselor naturale, dar contribuie și la reducerea costurilor operaționale pentru clienții noștri.

Colaborând cu feco.ro, beneficiați de expertiza unei echipe care înțelege complexitatea și provocările tratării apelor uzate și care este dedicată să găsească cele mai bune soluții pentru a asigura un mediu sănătos și curat pentru generațiile viitoare. Ne mândrim cu parteneriatele noastre pe termen lung cu clienții și suntem dedicați să continuăm să oferim servicii de înaltă calitate, care să depășească așteptările.

Descoperiți pe feco.ro cum tehnologia avansată și angajamentul nostru pentru sustenabilitate pot transforma gestionarea apelor uzate, asigurând protecția mediului și îmbunătățirea calității vieții.

Name: Nathabumi
Description: Sebagai unit bisnis PT Solusi Bangun Indonesia Tbk (SBI), sejak tahun 2007 Nathabumi telah menjadi mitra bagi perusahaan nasional dan multinasional dalam menyediakan solusi pengelolaan limbah yang ramah lingkungan dan berkelanjutan. Didukung tenaga profesional yang berpengalaman menangani limbah dari berbagai sektor industri, Nathabumi menawarkan berbagai layanan, mulai dari analisa, penanganan dan pengangkutan limbah di lokasi pelanggan, pemetaan dan konsultasi limbah, hingga penyiapan dan pemusnahan limbah menggunakan teknologi co-processing. Nathabumi merupakan mitra strategis bagi industri dan perkotaan dalam mencapai posisi lingkungan yang lebih baik, menuju masa depan tanpa limbah.

Informació i sensibilització sobre la jerarquia dels residus, la prevenció i la circularitat dels materials.

#PrevenciódeResidus #EconomiaCircular #ConsumResponsable

Name: MJ Church Waste Management
Description: MJ Church is a waste management business operating across the South West. We offer a comprehensive range of services to clients in the commercial and domestic sectors.

Name: LÜRA GmbH
Description:
Die Besten sind aus Stahl – Ihre starke Lösung für stabile und nachhaltige Lagerflächen!

Wenn es um maximale Stabilität, Flexibilität und Langlebigkeit geht, gibt es nur eine Antwort: LÜRA. Unsere hochwertigen Stahl-Stellwände sind die ideale Wahl für den Bau robuster Boxen und Hallen, perfekt zur Lagerung von Schüttgut wie Sand, Kies, Schotter, Erde oder sogar Wasser. Durch das einfache Befüllen mit diesen Materialien erreichen unsere Systeme eine beeindruckende Standfestigkeit und passen sich flexibel Ihren individuellen Anforderungen an, ob in der Entsorgung, im Recycling oder in der industriellen Lagerung.

Was macht LÜRA so besonders?

100 % Stahl. 100 % Belastbarkeit: Unsere Stellwände bestehen aus hochwertigem Stahl, der nicht nur enormen Belastungen standhält, sondern auch vollständig recycelbar ist.
Nachhaltigkeit mit Mehrwert: Nach der Nutzung können die Wände unkompliziert recycelt werden – inklusive Rückerstattung für das Material. Das spart Ressourcen und schont Ihr Budget.

Vielfalt, die begeistert:
Unsere modularen Systeme geben Ihnen maximale Gestaltungsfreiheit:

Mittelwände mit beidseitig gerader Form
Rückwände mit einseitig gerader Form
Trennwände mit beidseitig schräger Form
Abschlusswände mit vorne abgeschrägtem Anfahrschutz
So können Sie flexibel Lagerstätten jeder Größe errichten oder individuelle Trennungen schaffen – ganz nach Ihren Bedürfnissen.

Warum LÜRA?
Mit unseren Stahl-Stellwänden investieren Sie nicht nur in höchste Qualität, sondern auch in eine nachhaltige Kreislaufwirtschaft. Denn wahre Stärke zeigt sich nicht nur in der Belastbarkeit, sondern auch in der Verantwortung gegenüber unserer Umwelt.

Setzen Sie auf Lösungen, die halten, was sie versprechen.
Denn die Besten sind aus Stahl.

Name: SKIPZ Recycling
Description:
The SKIPZ Recycling business combines the trusted Delta Group know how with a strong industry experienced senior management team led by Kevin Keaney and Brendan McCormack.

Delta Group is one of the largest processors of construction & demolition waste streams in Australia and diverts more than 2m tonnes from landfill each year. 

SKIPZ Recycling is at the forefront of 21st century treatments and technologies that reduce our reliance on finite virgin construction materials by turning C&D waste streams into high quality, high value and custom engineered building materials. 

Our specialist waste management and resource recovery solutions include commercial skip bin hire, waste transfer stations, concrete recycling and contract crushing, reclaimed architectural and furniture grade timber, and scrap steel recycling.

We look forward to unveiling new customer experiences and recycling initiatives over the coming months. 

If you are interested or would like to find out more, please contact us on 1300 335 822 or Book a Skip here: https://www.skipzrecycling.com.au/book-a-skip/

Give our page a like and follow along on our journey!

#SKIPZRecycling

Name: A-Thermal Retort Technologies (Pty) Ltd
Description:
A-Thermal Retort Technologies, Leaders in Hazardous Waste Treatment in South Africa 

A-Thermal Retort Technologies (PTY) LTD specializes in the thermal treatment and management of general, hazardous and toxic waste, we primarily service the pharmaceutical and chemical manufacturing industries waste management and Treatment of Chemical Waste and Treatment of Pharmaceutical Waste. Our unique Thermal Desorption Plant utilizes pyrolysis technology that is capable of achieving a 99.9999 % (six 9’s) destruction of all hazardous waste.  

Our company grew exponentially over the past 20 years, establishing itself as a leading and only company in South Africa that has the capability to permanently dispose of halogenated organic waste, an environmentally-friendly alternative to the conventional methods of encapsulation or exportation abroad.

A-Thermal prides itself on ensuring our clients have peace of mind with the knowledge that any waste brought into its premises will be treated to ensure it becomes non-hazardous to the environment. We take our responsibility in environmentally sustainable solutions for waste treatment seriously. 

Our core business being hazardous waste treatment, has seen us maintain our ISO14001 certification since 2009. In addition, the wellbeing of our staff, maintaining a high level of customer satisfaction and service delivery is just as important to us, this is depicted by A-Thermal’s commitment in achieving additional ISO 9001 and OHSAS 18001 certification in March 2016.

Our services include:

Thermal Treatment of Hazardous Waste
On-Site Waste Management
Waste to Energy Technology
Recovery of Value Added Products
Gasification Technology
Treatment of Medical Waste (including a non-burn option)
Transport of Hazardous & General Waste
Fluidized Bed Reactor Technology
In-Situ and Ex-Situ
Remediation of Land
Disposal of General Waste
Environmental Consultancy Services
Supply of Waste Packaging 
Training on Waste Management

Name: Micr’Eau Chile - AEC/ABM
Description:
Micr'Eau, una empresa líder en el sector de tratamiento de aguas, tratamiento de biogas, con una presencia destacada tanto en Europa como en Sudamérica, especialmente en Chile. Desde su fundación en el año 2000, Micr'Eau se ha especializado en tres áreas principales: tratamiento de agua potable y servida, tratamiento de olores y biogás (gasómetros y antorchas), así como aguas industriales en diversos sectores como agroalimentación y minería.

Micr'Eau ha establecido dos filiales en Chile para asegurar la excelencia en nuestras operaciones y servicios en este importante mercado:

Micreau AEC – Aguas y Energía Consultoría: Esta filial se fundó en 2014 bajo la dirección del experimentado Pascal Guasp. Gracias a su experiencia en biogás y remoción de arsénico, AEC SpA ofrece asesoría a diversas empresas chilenas y ha estado involucrada en la implementación de plantas de tratamiento.

ABM – Andes Bio Media: Nacida de un exitoso Joint Venture franco-chileno, ABM es fruto de la colaboración entre Micr'Eau y Cobre y Metales, una empresa dedicada al reciclaje y valorización de subproductos del cobre.
Servicios y Referencias en Chile: 
En Chile, nuestras filiales desempeñan roles clave en la industria. Name: NPHarvest
Description:
At NPHarvest, we believe wastewater isn't the problem—wasting it is. 

We're transforming nutrient-rich wastewater into valuable resources, helping biogas plants, farmers, municipalities, and industrial plants do more with what's already flowing.

Our patent pending technology captures up to 90% of nitrogen and phosphorus from concentrated liquid waste. We recover these essential nutrients as pure ammonia salt and amorphous calcium phosphate—key components for fertilizer production.

The result? Lower costs and reduced environmental impact for wastewater treatment. Local nutrient sources for farmers. Less nutrient imports and increased food-security for independent nations.

The secret? Our solution combines low operational costs, industrial reliability and a high-quality end-product like no other.

Born from research at Aalto University, NPHarvest combines serious science with circular economy thinking. Today, we are building our first industrial scale Demo with €2.2M funding raised from industry-leading investors such as Nordic Foodtech VC and the Finnish Ministry of the Environment.

Join us in rethinking wastewater. Because when we stop wasting, we start thriving.

L'écologie est au cœur de nos valeurs. Nous considérons la diminution de nos impacts environnementaux comme essentielle, c'est pourquoi nous continuons d'évoluer sans cesse dans le but de proposer une meilleure qualité de produits et services.

Name: metawaste
Description:
En tant que pionnier de la gestion globale des déchets, metawaste se distingue par son expertise dans la valorisation, le recyclage, la collecte et le tri efficaces des déchets. Forts de partenariats stratégiques dans un écosystème de proximité, nous sommes en mesure d’intervenir sur toute la chaîne de gestion des déchets depuis leur émission jusqu’à leur transformation en matières premières secondaires. 

 Notre approche de la gestion des déchets repose également sur une plateforme innovante : Genius. Notre plateforme offre une traçabilité totale des déchets collectés, fournissant des données cruciales et permettant un pilotage efficace de la gestion des déchets de nos clients. Avec un accès complet au reporting, nous offrons une transparence maximale, permettant à nos clients de prendre des décisions informées pour une gestion responsable de leurs déchets. 

 Adossé à un réseau de partenaires et à une technologie avancée, metawaste redéfinie les normes de la gestion des déchets, offrant transparence maximale, traçabilité complète des déchets et accès à des informations clés. Nous forgeons un avenir où la gestion des déchets rime avec durabilité, efficacité et responsabilité environnementale.

Name: Northex Environnement inc.
Description:

Son expertise repose sur la synergie d’une équipe multidisciplinaire  chevronnée qui compte deux experts accrédités du MDDEP.  Northex  possède la plus grande plate-forme de traitement de sols contaminés au Québec, jumelant un procédé physico-chimique et un polissage biologique pour le traitement des contaminants organiques et mixtes.  Bientôt, elle sera la seule au Canada à traiter des sols contaminés uniquement aux métaux.  Plus de 65% des sols actuellement traités peuvent être réutilisés comme matériaux techniques dans des projets LEED.   Northex aide les gestionnaires immobiliers, les promoteurs et tout autre investisseur à retrouver la pleine valeur de ses actifs!  

Located near Montreal, Northex Environment is a well established company that uses emerging technologies to meet highly specific requirements in site environmental rehabilitation. It is the biggest treatment center in eastern Canada offering treatment of a wide range of highly contaminated soils. The company’s treatment operations allow the recuperation of at least 65% of the decontaminated soils annually for reuse in engineering projects and LEED construction. All Northex treatment projects are always elaborated in respect of a sustainable development.

Name: REDUX Recycling GmbH
Description:
Nachhaltiges Recycling von Lithium-Ionen-Akkus & -Batterien

Lithium-Ionen-Batterien sind die treibende Kraft hinter der Energieversorgung von Smartphones, Elektroautos, E-Bikes und vielen weiteren Geräten. In einer Zeit, in der mobile Kommunikation, Elektrofahrzeuge und DIY-Märkte florieren, steigt auch die Verwendung von Lithium-Ionen-Batterien rapide an. Gleichzeitig nimmt die Produktion von Lithium-Ionen-Batteriezellen deutlich zu.

Inmitten dieses Aufschwungs ist die nachhaltige Verwertung der Batterien von der Herstellung bis zum Ende ihrer Lebensdauer zu einem immer wichtigeren Thema geworden. Doch für uns bei Redux Recycling ist dies kein Problem, sondern unsere Passion. Als Komplett-Service übernehmen wir das Recycling sämtlicher Abfälle aus der Batterieherstellung, einschließlich Kathodenmaterial, sowie aller Arten von Lithium-Ionen-Akkus. Unser Einsatz modernster Technologie ermöglicht es uns bereits heute, beeindruckende Verwertungsquoten von 95 Prozent bei Metallen zu erzielen.

Bei Redux Recycling ist unser Ziel, eine umweltfreundliche Zukunft zu gestalten, indem wir die wertvollen Ressourcen der Lithium-Ionen-Batterien erhalten und wiederverwenden. Mit unserer führenden Recycling-Technologie und unserem ganzheitlichen Ansatz leisten wir einen bedeutenden Beitrag zur Schonung natürlicher Ressourcen und zur Förderung einer nachhaltigen Kreislaufwirtschaft.

Link zum Impressum: https://www.redux-recycling.com/de/impressum/

Link zur Datenschutzerklärung: https://www.redux-recycling.com/de/datenschutz/

Name: LOV NOW
Description: LØV NOW propose des composteurs collectifs et individuels étudiés pour une transformation optimale des biodéchets, une résistance maximale aux conditions climatiques et une ergonomie adaptée à un usage professionnel. Eco-conçus, les composteurs LØV NOW sont voués à durer !

Name: Mil-tek España
Description:
¿Cuánto tiempo dedica su personal a tareas como doblar cartón o trasladar residuos?

En Mil-tek Galicia ofrecemos soluciones líderes diseñadas para reducir hasta un 90% el volumen de residuos en sus instalaciones, generando ahorros en espacio y costos de manipulación desde el primer día.

Somos una empresa líder mundial en el suministro de prensas y compactadoras para minimizar los residuos en empresas de todo tipo y tamaño. Con más de 17 años de servicio, nos especializamos en prensas neumáticas con tecnología revolucionaria que utiliza aire comprimido para presionar y liberar la placa de prensado. Al funcionar exclusivamente con aire comprimido las máquinas están libres de aceite hidráulico, con lo que se descarta cualquier riesgo inherente de contaminación.

Name: Van Iersel Compost
Description:
Van Iersel Compost is al ruim 55 jaar actief als betrouwbare verwerker van groenafval tot hoogwaardige compostproducten en sterk in advisering op het gebied van compost, bemesting en bodembiologie. Ook verwerken we groenafvalstromen van bedrijven, gemeenten en particulieren tot biomassa voor het opwekken van groene energie. Van Iersel heeft vier locaties waar groenafval van openbare, particuliere en professionele bronnen worden ingenomen en verwerkt tot hoogwaardige groencompost en andere bodemverbeteraars. Zowel in Biezenmortel (hoofdkantoor) als in Deurne, Gilze en Ravenstein zullen onze mensen u van dienst zijn.

De locatie in Biezenmortel is gecertificeerd door de stichting RHP, zodat de geproduceerde compost ook gebruikt kan worden in bijvoorbeeld potgrondmengsels. Ook hebben we een BRL9335-certificaat voor het gecontroleerd samenstellen en verhandelen van grondproducten.

De voor het functioneren van het bedrijf ingerichte terreinen voldoen allemaal aan de wettelijke milieueisen en -normen. Er werken ongeveer dertig vakbekwame mensen die in het bezit zijn van de benodigde vakdiploma's en certificaten. Voor de activiteiten met betrekking tot de groencompostering en groenrecycling is Van Iersel aangesloten bij Belangenvereniging voor Verwerkingsbedrijven van Organische Reststoffen (BVOR).

Buiten de composten en compostproducten hebben we ook verschillende trommelzeven om te verhuren voor het uitzeven van diverse materialen zoals zand, grond, grind etc

Name: NOWRA National Onsite Wastewater Recycling Association
Description:
The National Onsite Wastewater Recycling Association (NOWRA) is the largest organization within the U.S. dedicated to educating and representing members within the onsite and decentralized industry.  Our members include educators, regulators, engineers, contractors, manufacturers, suppliers, service providers, and other parties in the protection of North America’s water resources and environment.  All segments of the industry are represented on NOWRA’s Board of Directors that provide broad perspectives to promote and sustain our industry and service to the public.  NOWRA headquarters is located in Westford, Massachusetts, with local constituent groups throughout the U.S. and Canada.

NOWRA was founded in 1992 to educate and serve its members and the public by promoting sound federal, state, and local policies, to improve standards of practice, and increase public recognition of the need for and benefits of onsite and decentralized wastewater infrastructure.  Decentralized systems provide effective and more affordable wastewater treatment solutions where traditional central sewerage systems might be impractical or unsuitable.  These systems can sustainably serve a single home, a neighborhood, or an entire community including commercial and industrial facilities.

Name: RADIANT SOLUTIONS COMPANY
Description:
Radiant is a technology development to create in kingdom green environment (OGE) was initially established to provide a wide range of environmental solutions, monitoring, and industrial hygiene services to a wide range of industrial and governmental clients
across the kingdom of Saudi Arabia. With the almost three-fold increment in industrial activities, accession to WTO, and tightening of the regulations, environmental business opportunities on regional and national levels have magnified……. With a clear VISION
The company intends to provide futuristic solutions to environmental problems being confronted by industries, ministries, and the public, directed towards minimization of losses, enhancement in quality, and value addition.

Our technology services are producing Bio Organic Waste Conversion, Renewable Energy (Solar), Water Treatment (Water Bifouling), and Plant Precision Systems (Hydro-Jetting), Our technical partners are Greenrich, and Envi care. We provide micro solutions where waste is composted at SOURCE from 1 ltr to multiple tons per day, to the ever-growing problem of waste piling up in the cities, thereby making the environment green by encouraging organic farming and re-establishing the
ecosystem by nourishing the soil with high microbial content of compost

Name: The Great Plastic Bake Off
Description: Why dump, burn or ship plastic waste around the world…if you can manage it locally with our FUSE Kitchens! The Great Plastic Bake Off (GPBO) aims to add value to plastic waste by converting it into multifunctional building materials, called Ekoduro. This principle is an important tool in the fight against global plastic pollution. It is an incentive for the storage, collection and upcycling of plastic waste and offers an alternative to dumping, incineration, landfilling or shipping it around the world. Our FUSE Kitchens can be placed worldwide according to a safe and plug-and-play principle.

Name: FABBCO
Description:
At FABBCO, we are pioneers in harnessing the remarkable potential of Black Soldier Fly (BSF) technology. We specialize in sustainable waste management and resource recovery through the innovative use of BSF larvae. Our mission is to revolutionize waste disposal and protein production while contributing to a more environmentally responsible future.

By utilizing BSF larvae, we turn organic waste streams from various sources, such as agriculture, food processing, and household waste, into valuable resources. These larvae are nature's efficient recyclers, converting waste into nutrient-rich biomass that can be used as a sustainable protein source for animal feed, aquaculture, and more.

At FABBCO, we are dedicated to sustainability, environmental stewardship, and helping businesses and communities reduce their carbon footprint. Join us in the journey toward a greener, more sustainable world with the help of Black Soldier Fly technology.

Name: ADVANCE INDUSTRIAL RECYCLING
Description: At Advance Industrial Recycling, we transcend the role of a typical waste management company. We proudly hold the mantle of environmental stewardship, dedicated to forging a cleaner and greener future. Our ethos is rooted in a fervent commitment to sustainability, driving us to pioneer innovative waste solutions. In the realm of waste management, we stand as vanguards, leading the charge towards a brighter tomorrow.

Name: Waste Recycling & Destruction Ltd
Description: Waste Recycling and Destruction Limited (WRD) offer a wide range of services to businesses operating within the food and beverage industry. Our team securely destroy products beyond recognition to ensure brand protection. From the receipt of items which are not fit for purpose we recycle, treat and process all available resources to ensure maximum recovery. Once the food and beverage waste has passed through our operation it is sent for Anaerobic Digestion (AD) to make renewable energy. By carefully de-packaging products and forwarding recyclable material to responsible third party re-processors commodities such as plastic and aluminium re-enter the market for tomorrows packaging. We help clients meet their Corporate Social Responsibility targets as WRD diverts 100% of waste from landfill.

Name: Innovationsstandort :metabolon
Description:
Früher war die Leppe Deponie eine reine Mülldeponie - heute zählt das Entsorgungszentrum Leppe zu den modernsten Entsorgungsstandorten Europas und ist Referenzort eines internationalen Fachpublikums. Durch das NRW-Strukturprogramm Regionale 2010 wurde der Deponie ein ganz neues Gesicht verliehen. Mit der Neuausrichtung wurde die Leppe Deponie zum Forschungs- und Innovationszentrum :metabolon für Stoffumwandlung und Umwelttechnologien ausgebaut.

Auf dem Innovationsstandort :metabolon steht mittlerweile das :metabolon-Folgeprojekt schon in den Startlöchern – die :bergische rohstoffschmiede. Das Projekt :bergische rohstoffschmiede entwickelt diesen Ansatz im Rahmen der REGIONALE 2025 am bestehenden Standort weiter. Ziel ist es, auch für Wirtschaftsakteure einen impulsgebenden Standort für Nachhaltigkeit im Bergischen RheinLand bereitzustellen. Am Forschungs- und Transferstandort erarbeitet die TH Köln mit einem breiten Forschungsnetzwerk Lösungsansätze zu zirkulärer Wertschöpfung für diverse Stoffströme. In enger Zusammenarbeit mit  Unternehmen werden relevante technische Fragestellungen identifiziert und bedarfsorientierte Lösungen erarbeitet.

Transport, déconditionnement, retour au sol : les Gloutons maîtrisent l'ensemble de la chaîne de valeur pour assurer une qualité et une traçabilité irréprochables.

Name: Metro Metals Northwest
Description: Metro Metals Northwest, Inc. is the largest industrial-based scrap metal company in the region, serving customers throughout the Northwest. Operating on 25 acres and a 75,000 square foot facility, our ferrous and nonferrous divisions combine efficient recycling with environmental responsibility.

Name: Recicladora Nacional de Panama S.A
Description:
Company Name: Recicladora Nacional de Panama S.A.
Established: 15 years ago
Specialization: Recovery, transformation, and sustainable management of waste
Capacity: 10,000 m2 of covered space and the highest capacity for compacting, packaging, and grinding in Panama
Market Position: One of the leading companies in its sector
Mission: To offer tailored solutions to its clients' needs and a service dedicated to excellence. Always generating options until the right solution is found.
Vision: To become the most innovative recycling company in the region, offering solid and high-quality performance.
Founder: Julio Arce, with over 18 years of experience in the recycling industry.

Export: Historically, it has exported over 200,000.00 tons of recyclable materials. It exports to different markets according to needs, opportunities, freight, and supply and demand. The most important markets are India, Indonesia, Ecuador, the United States, Spain, Portugal, Italy, and several countries in Central and South America.
Materials: Experience in materials of all types, from cardboard and paper to PET, LDPE, HDPE, ABS, PS, PP, HMS, UBC, COPPER among others.
Commitment to sustainability and the environment: A company committed to sustainability and the environment, which has consolidated its position as a leader in its sector thanks to its experience and service excellence.
Long-lasting relationships with clients: Ability to offer solutions tailored to each case, which has allowed it to establish long-lasting relationships with its clients.
Superior technical and logistical capacity: With technical and logistical capacity superior to that of the competition, Recicladora Nacional has become the preferred option.

Name: AC2V Réunion
Description:
Faites le tri dans vos déchets. AC2V propose des solutions de compactage et de valorisation des déchets à toutes les entreprises réunionnaises.

Depuis 2005, AC2V (Activité de Compactage et de Valorisation), concentre ses activités sur le conseil, le tri, le compactage et le recyclage de déchets sur l’ile de La Réunion. Aujourd’hui, sur un marché de plus de 170 900 tonnes de déchets annuels dont moins d’un tiers est valorisé, AC2V est fière d’apporter sa contribution à la préservation de notre environnement.

Name: Romuta Oy
Description:
Olemme täyden palvelun romukumppani. Ratkaisemme metallinkierrätyshaasteet ja optimoimme asiakkaidemme metallinkierrätystä tukemaan heidän liiketoimintaansa. Uskomme pitkiin suhteisiin, sillä kannattava metallinkierrätys rakennetaan pitkässä pelissä. 

Nämä ovat meidän hommia:

-tuotannossa syntyvän metallijätteen kierrättäminen
-koneiden- ja laitteiden purkaminen
-tehtaiden- ja rakennusten purkaminen tai nykyaikaistaminen
-pihojen siivoaminen metalliromusta

Romukumppanuudessa ei ole ainoastaan kyse vaihtolavoista, romujen tonnihinnoista ja tyhjennysväleistä. Tuomme möhkälemäiseen ongelmaanne selkeyden ja pistämme asiat järjestymään. Palastelemme metallinkierrätyshaasteenne ja etsimme ratkaisun, joka hyödyttää yritystänne parhaalla tavalla. Meillä on kokemusta haastavista kohteista ja olemme auttaneet lukuisia asiakkaita heitä taloudellisesti hyödyttävällä tavalla, hoitaen projektit laadukkaasti, turvallisesti ja ympäristöystävällisesti.

Meidän taskuistamme löytyvätkin ISO 45001-, 14001- ja 9001 sertifikaatit todisteena sitoutumisestamme ihmisten terveyteen, ympäristöasioihin ja asiakkaidemme tyytyväisyyteen.

Älä epäröi ottaa yhteyttä. Olemme oikea kumppani teille.


#metallinkierrätys #metalliromu #purkaminen #purkutyö #kiertotalous

Name: OXTREAT SOLUCOES DE TRATAMENTO DE AGUA

Name: The Women In Recycling Foundation
Description:
The Women In recycling foundation was founded from with   four environmental feminist,
In 2020 we found that in the plastic value chain women who are living with less than 2$ per day are involved in high percentage most of them are involve as waste pickers and waste sorters in the recycling companies, but these women are experiencing a varieties of constrains including patriarchy, lack of skills ,limited training opportunities and restricted mobility have prevented women from improving their capacity to sustain their live hoods and enter strategic employment opportunities in the plastic waste market condition.

Building on the idea success and strong recognizing demand of our solution we decided to register our group as Non—Governmental Organization the Women in recycling foundation (WORF)

OUR MISSION
•	To excel at promoting health environment for women, young women and women with disabilities through strengthening of waste management system, skills developments. knowledge sharing and recycling business development
 OUR VISION
•	To empower women through recycling businesses, thriving communities in which all are full participated and develop freely waste society.

Name: WISH Forum
Description:
The first WISH Forum Strategy was launched in January 2009, and has been regularly updated since then to reflect current issues and priorities.

Strategy is determined at bi-annual WISH conferences, which are attended by the WISH membership, the HSE and other interested parties.  This ensures the views and concerns of the industry are incorporated into the WISH Strategy.

The Strategy is encapsulated in a series of ‘blueprints’.  These form the framework for WISH activities between conferences.  In practical terms, the blueprint is progressed by a series of working groups tackling specific issues and actions.

To find out more about progress with blueprint’ actions and how you can get involved check out the updates in the WISH Working Groups.

Name: Trivalor
Description:
POUR UNE NOUVELLE ÉCONOMIE CIRCULAIRE : MOINS DE DÉCHETS, PLUS DE RESSOURCES.

Trivalor répond aux exigences du développement durable en offrant des solutions de recyclage innovantes et inédites au Sénégal visant à valoriser les déchets.

L'objectif de Trivalor est de rendre le tri et la valorisation des déchets simple, désirable et profitable à tous à travers une démarche responsable.

Name: POKKIT
Description: Chez Pokkit nous offrons une alternative innovante aux goodies classiques, souvent peu durables. Notre cendrier de poche écoresponsable, fabriqué en France à partir de matériaux biosourcés, est conçu pour être utilisé au quotidien. Léger, pratique et avec une fermeture aimantée, il offre une solution concrète pour lutter contre la pollution des mégots. Entièrement personnalisable, notre cendrier de poche permet aux entreprises de renforcer leur image tout en aidant à limiter l'impact des mégots sur la nature.

Name: Axe Skip Hire
Description:
Skip hire and waste management Services based in Axminster, serving Devon, Dorset and Somerset
We offer a quality service, whether you require a single skip, bulk collection or a multiple contract.

We pride ourselves on the service we offer and aim to satisfy most requests including multiple changes, same day turn around or hire and wait options.
Bulk collection service providing a service to those who cannot accommodate a skip off a public highway.

Name: MPM Environment Intelligence GmbH
Description:
MPM Environment Intelligence GmbH ist ein zertifizierter Entsorgungsfachbetrieb für Elektronik- und Leiterplattenrecycling. Seit den 1990er-Jahren entwickeln wir wirtschaftliche, umweltfreundliche und nachhaltige Prozesse zur Rückgewinnung wertvoller Rohstoffe. 

Von der E-Schrott Abholung bis zum Verwertungsnachweis profitieren Unternehmen, Kommunen und Recyclingpartner von klaren, transparenten Abläufen.

 UNSERE MISSION
Wertstoffe im Kreislauf halten, Ressourcen schonen und rechtssichere Entsorgung mit wirtschaftlichem Nutzen verbinden.

 UNSERE LEISTUNGEN IM ÜBERBLICK

Elektronikschrott-Recycling – Fachgerechte Entsorgung und Verwertung von IT- und Industrieelektronik mit Nachweisführung nach ElektroG und WEEELABEX.

Leiterplatten-Recycling – Rückgewinnung von Kupfer, Edelmetallen und Kunststoffen aus bestückten und unbestückten Leiterplatten.

Recycling von Bohr- und Fräsmehlen – Automatisierte Aufbereitung metallhaltiger Produktionsrückstände zur Gewinnung von Kupfergranulat.

Beratung zu Umweltmanagement & Arbeitssicherheit – Unterstützung bei ISO-14001-Projekten und Compliance-Fragen im betrieblichen Umweltschutz.

 WAS UNS AUSZEICHNET
•	Langjährige Expertise für nachhaltiges E-Schrott-Recycling
•	Zertifizierte Erstbehandlung nach ElektroG und WEEELABEX
•	Hohe Recyclingquoten und transparente Nachweise
•	Prozesskompetenz aus über 30 Jahren Industrieerfahrung
•	Eigene Forschung im Kunststoffrecycling (Solvolyse-Verfahren)

MPM bieten umfassende Recyclinglösungen für Leiterplatten, Industrieelektronik und Elektroaltgeräte, die höchsten Umwelt- und Sicherheitsstandards gerecht werden. Mit modernsten Technologien schaffen wir zukunftsweisende Prozesse, die den Weg in eine ressourcenschonende Zukunft ebnen.

 Impressum: https://www.envint.de/impressum/

Name: Sunreuse Association
Description:
La SUNREUSE ASSOCIATION es un Sistema Colectivo de Responsabilidad Ampliada del Productor (SCRAP) de Aparatos Eléctricos y Electrónicos (RAEE) y de Pilas y Acumuladores constituido con el compromiso y el apoyo de Productores de Aparatos Eléctricos y Electrónicos y Pilas y Acumuladores.

SUNREUSE ASSOCIATION está autorizada con ÁMBITO NACIONAL como SCRAP de RAEE por el MINISTERIO DE TRANSICIÓN ECOLÓGICA Y RETO DEMOGRÁFICO con el Código de Autorización Nacional 14/SCR/RAP/CV del Registro de Producción y Gestión de Residuos de la Comunitat Valenciana según resolución del Director General del Calidad y Educación Ambiental de 6 de febrero de 2020.

Nuestro objetivo es gestionar toda clase de Residuos de Aparatos Eléctricos y Electrónicos (RAEE) según la clasificación en 7 categorías del Anexo III del R.D. 110/2015 de 20 de febrero de Residuos de Aparatos Eléctricos y Electrónicos, así como los residuos de Pilas y Acumuladores según el Real Decreto 710/2015, de 24 de julio, por el que se modifica el Real Decreto 106/2008, de 1 de febrero, sobre pilas y acumuladores y la gestión ambiental de sus residuos.

Name: Dabethon Global
Description: Dabethon Group Ghana is a Ghanaian youth climate enthusiastic group focused on mitigating effects of climate change on the environment through food waste management in rural and urban communities. The groups vision is to minimize the current effects faced by communities from climate change through educating the public especially the youth and imparting skills deemed to manage solid food waste for the progressive future.

Name: River Otter
Description: River Otter aims to destroy toxic forever PFAS chemicals in wastewater through transformation into renewable fuels, such as gasoline, diesel, and jet fuel. Our patented waste-to-renewable-fuel process could reduce landfill waste and greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions while driving forward the green energy transition through local renewable fuel production for immediate use. We will remove cancer-causing toxic chemicals from waste and water while harnessing the power of a green circular economy.

Name: PT. Oligo Infra Swarna Nusantara
Description: Oligo Infra Swarna Nusantara was established since 2020 and inaugurated formally in March 2022, in parallel with the signing of Cooperation Agreement with Municipality of Tangerang to develop Eco-friendly Integrated Waste Treatment Facility

Name: BIOELEKTRA Martin a.s.

Name: PT Nasional Hijau Lestari
Description:
PT Nasional Hijau Lestari is a limited Liability Company established under the laws of the Republic of Indonesia and is an affiliated party company of the State-Owned Enterprise Holding Mining Industry / MIND ID (PT Indonesia Asahan Aluminium (Persero), PT Antam Tbk, PT Bukit Asam Tbk, and PT Timah Tbk), which is engaged in the business of integrated B3 and Non-B3 Waste Management as well as environmental management, with the main industrial sectors served being oil and gas, mining, energy, manufacturing, plantations and hospitals and/or healthcare facilities.

The current shareholders in the NHL are PT Indonesia Asahan Aluminium (Persero), PT Antam Resourcindo, PT Bukit Multi Investama and PT Timah Investasi Mineral.

NHL is committed to create added value for customers through guaranteed service quality, professional support, and the implementation of up-to-date technology. NHL exists as a comprehensive solution to the company needs for compliance with statutory regulations achieving company targets.

Recycling and Waste to Energy 

More than 20 years of Experience in recovering alternative fuels and valuable materials from agricultural, industrial and other waste streams. 

A great player in waste lubes Re-refining business utilizing a state of the art distillation technologies.

Name: Elektronikos perdirbimas (Electronics Recycling)
Description:
Elektronikos perdirbimas is a company based in Vievis, Lithuania, specializing in the processing, disassembly, and recycling of waste electrical and electronic equipment (WEEE). 

Our operations focus on the manual disassembly of flat panel displays (FPDs) to ensure the safe recovery of materials and the preparation of components for reuse. 

We aim to reduce the amount of electronic waste and return valuable materials to the production cycle. Each year, our work helps prevent tons of electronic equipment from ending up in landfills, supporting a cleaner environment and the principles of the circular economy.

Name: HydroCawach Technologies Pvt Ltd
Description: Hydrocawach is a technology-driven company delivering advanced solutions in water & wastewater treatment, emulsion stability, cell lysis, depolymerization, micro mixing, and chemical process intensification — all powered by cutting-edge hydrodynamic cavitation technology.

Name: Hyperion Global
Description:
At Hyperion Global, we are committed to transforming waste management through innovative and sustainable solutions. We specialize in environmentally responsible disposal, secure destruction, and strategic donation services, helping businesses manage surplus, obsolete, or sensitive materials with efficiency and care.

Our approach goes beyond conventional waste management by providing tailored solutions that prioritize sustainability, compliance, and cost-effectiveness. Whether it’s the safe disposal of hazardous materials, certified destruction of proprietary products, or repurposing surplus goods through donation, we ensure every step contributes to minimizing environmental impact.

Serving a diverse range of industries—including retail, manufacturing, warehousing, and consumer goods—our expertise lies in creating seamless processes that meet both operational needs and sustainability goals. From bulk pickups and storage coordination to full-service waste diversion strategies, we handle the complexities so our clients can focus on their core business.

Join Hyperion Global in building a greener future by turning waste challenges into opportunities for positive impact. Let’s work together to reduce landfill waste, protect your brand, and promote environmental responsibility through innovative waste management solutions.

Visit us at hyperionglobals.com to learn more.

Name: Concessionária de Valorização de Resíduos Parque do Sol
Description:
Parque do Sol: Inovação e Sustentabilidade no Gestão de Resíduos no Baixo Sul da Bahia

O Parque do Sol é uma inovador concessão patrocinada intermunicipal, concebido pelo CIAPRA (Consórcio Intermunicipal de Águas e Resíduos do Baixo Sul da Bahia) em conjunto com o Governo do Estado da Bahia por intermédio da SEDUR e AGERSA, que selecionou a Torre como operadora do sistema, com o objetivo de transformar a gestão de resíduos sólidos na região. Localizado no coração do Baixo Sul da Bahia, o parque visa oferecer soluções sustentáveis e eficientes para o gerenciamento de resíduos, promovendo a economia circular e a preservação ambiental.

Este projeto é um marco para a região, que abrange diversos municípios, e tem como principais metas a redução do impacto ambiental, a recuperação de materiais recicláveis e estudos para viabilizar a geração de energia limpa por meio da valorização dos resíduos. Com a operação de um moderno centro de triagem e tratamento, o Parque do Sol representa um avanço significativo na gestão integrada de resíduos sólidos, alinhando-se aos princípios da sustentabilidade e da inovação.

Além disso, o parque contribui para a geração de emprego e renda, promovendo o desenvolvimento social e econômico local. Com foco em educação ambiental, o projeto também busca sensibilizar a população sobre a importância da destinação correta dos resíduos e o impacto positivo que uma gestão eficiente pode ter na qualidade de vida de todos.

O Parque do Sol é mais do que um aterro sanitário ou centro de reciclagem, é um exemplo de como a tecnologia e a colaboração entre o poder público e a iniciativa privada podem criar soluções que beneficiem toda uma região e promovam um futuro mais verde e sustentável para as próximas gerações.

Siga a página oficial para mais atualizações sobre o desenvolvimento do projeto e iniciativas relacionadas à sustentabilidade na Bahia.

#ParqueDoSol #GestãoDeResíduos #Sustentabilidade #CIAPRA #BaixoSulDaBahia #InovaçãoEcológica
