Description:
Die Palurec GmbH ist eine 100-prozentige Tochtergesellschaft des Fachverbandes Kartonverpackungen für flüssige Nahrungsmittel e.V. (FKN) und wurde im Jahr 2017 gegründet. 

Im Frühjahr 2021 wurde die Recyclinganlage der Palurec in Betrieb genommen. Hier werden aus den Kunststoff-Aluminiumanteilen (PolyAl) von Getränkekartons marktfähige Sekundärrohstoffe herstellt. 

Die Palurec ist die erste Anlage ihrer Art in Deutschland, die mit einem rein mechanisch-physikalischen Verfahren marktfähige Rezyklate produziert. Trennmedium ist ausschließlich Wasser, Lösemittel werden nicht eingesetzt.

Acht Millionen Euro haben die drei Hersteller Tetra Pak GmbH, SIG und Elopak GmbH in die 18.000 Tonnen-Anlage in der Nähe von Köln investiert. 

Ihren Rohstoff erhält die Palurec von Papierfabriken, die den Faseranteil des Getränkekartons insbesondere zur Herstellung hochwertiger Wellpappen-Rohpapiere nutzen. Dabei fällt als Produktionsrest ein Mix aus verschiedenen Kunststoffen und Aluminium an. Dieser wurde bislang hauptsächlich in Zementfabriken als emissionsarmer Brennstoff genutzt.

We envision a future in which our platform serves as the go-to resource for individuals and organizations looking to optimize their waste management practices and make informed decisions about the materials they use and dispose of. Passionate about sustainability and environmental stewardship? So are we!  With a commitment to technological advancement and eco-conscious practices, we harness cutting-edge processes to transform waste materials into valuable coal resources. Our team combines expertise in waste management, engineering, and renewable energy to drive forward a circular economy model, contributing to a greener, more sustainable future.

 Join us in our mission to make a tangible difference in the fight against climate change while creating economic opportunities and reducing reliance on traditional fossil fuels. Together, let's redefine waste management and energy production for a cleaner, brighter tomorrow.

#SOVODEB #GestionDéchets #Vosges #Entreprises #DéveloppementDurable #Economie circulaire

Changing the way waste is collected, managed and PERCEIVED!

Name: RECYGLASS SpA
Description:
En Recyglass valorizamos todos los tipos de vidrios, provenientes de múltiples usos: envases, vidrios laminados, float y templados, espejos, parabrisas, paneles solares y el vidrio presente en aparatos eléctricos y electrónicos. Estos residuos surgen de sectores productivos tan diversos como la industria de alimentos y bebidas, construcción, minería, energía, automotriz, manufactura, retail, electrónica y electrodomésticos.

Con casi 10 años de experiencia, transformamos estos residuos en materias primas valorizadas que se reintegran a los procesos productivos, asegurando trazabilidad, calidad técnica y un impacto ambiental positivo.

Desde nuestra planta en Peñaflor, en el corazón de la Región Metropolitana, cerca de los principales hornos de fundición del país, operamos de manera estratégica para conectar la recolección del vidrio con su transformación en materia prima valorizada, entregando eficiencia logística, trazabilidad y calidad técnica.

Nuestro propósito es claro:
Cerrar el ciclo del vidrio con calidad técnica, trazabilidad ambiental y una conexión real con la industria.
Si el vidrio está en tu cadena de valor, en Recyglass encontrarás un socio confiable para avanzar hacia la economía circular.

Description:

Fin dagli esordi, l’attività ha riguardato il riciclo e il commercio di una vasta gamma di rottami metallici provenienti dai principali cantieri navali e stabilimenti industriali della provincia spezzina. 
Per incrementare l’approvvigionamento di materiale, l’azienda ha sviluppato il business delle demolizioni sia in ambito industriale che navale.
Le demolizioni sono state un importante stimolo per nuovi investimenti, incentivando l’ingresso in nuovi settori. 
Negli ultimi anni, infatti l’azienda ha incrementato i propri servizi, aumentando la tipologia di rifiuti gestiti e offrendo alle aziende clienti soluzioni per valorizzare al meglio i propri scarti industriali.

 Nos projets agroforestiers, allient séquestration carbone, régénération des sols, développement de la biodiversité et création de valeur locale.

Ancrés dans les territoires, nous collaborons avec les acteurs locaux pour faire émerger des solutions concrètes, sobres et résilientes.

 Régénérer la terre, restaurer la vie, protéger notre avenir.

Name: Müller & Sohn GmbH & Co. KG
Description: We are a partner and processing service provider for the disposal, processing and recycling of aluminium scrap from metal processing companies. Does your production generate aluminium scrap? Then we should get to know each other. We turn what you consider to be annoying waste into a valuable asset: processing aluminium scrap is our speciality. We impress our customers with decades of expertise and customised solutions for each individual batch. You can sell us almost all qualities. Regardless of what is happening on the market, we will accept your quantities at competitive prices. Our logistics team will organise the process quickly and smoothly with a concept tailored to your needs. You can trust our reliability in all individual aspects. Müller & Sohn operates sustainably and environmentally friendly out of conviction. The greatest contribution to environmental protection is our task itself: Aluminium recycling saves considerable CO2 emissions. Not only WHAT we do follows the principle of sustainability, but also HOW we do it: We consistently act in an environmentally friendly manner - from proactive groundwater protection and e-mobility on the factory premises to our lorry fleet with low-emission BlueTEC diesel vehicles. Strict compliance with all environmental laws, ordinances and regulations is a matter of course for us and is regularly reviewed both internally and externally.

Name: Lotus Soluções Ambientais

A Lotus Soluções Ambientais foi constituída a partir da experiência de mais de 30 anos em desenvolvimento tecnológico de seu sócio fundador, tanto na área vegetal quanto em soluções para resíduos, aliando assim todo o conhecimento adquirido e a relevância desta atividade para toda a sociedade. Dafür ziehen wir gemeinsam an einem Strang – mit einem stabilen Führungsteam und gegenseitiger Unterstützung. Aus unserem Engagement wächst Stolz auf das gemeinsame Schaffen. Name: Kajaanin Romu Oy
Description:
Romusta puhtainta metallia

Metalli on ihmiskunnalle ainutkertaisen arvokasta, olipa se luonnossa malmina tai osana esineitä. Siksi me teemme kaikkemme, jotta kerran kiertoon otetusta ei tule jätettä.

Me olemme Kajaanin Romu, yksi suomalaisista kestävän tulevaisuuden tekijöistä. Valmistamme tarpeettomiksi käyneistä tavaroista Pohjolan puhtainta ja vastuullisinta metallia.

Etsimme, kehitämme ja hyödynnämme sinnikkäästi uusia menetelmiä, joilla saamme romujen rippeistäkin kaiken aineksen turvallisesti hyötykäyttöön. 

Muiden metallia kierrättävien yritysten kanssa muodostamme globaalin kaupunkikaivosten verkoston. Yhdessä olemme ekotehokkaan metalliteollisuuden puuttuva lenkki – kiertotalouden uusi muutosvoima – joka saa maailman riittämään.

Hundertprozentige Verwertung ist unsere Vision. Zwei Fünftel unseres Energiebedarfs erzeugen wir über die Kraft der Sonne schon selbst. Our continuing engagement with regulators and stakeholders help to position us in the forefront of innovative solutions and products.

Seit 1973 sind wir der Entsorgungsspezialist im Neckar-Odenwald-Kreis, Stadt- und Landkreis Heilbronn sowie im Main-Tauber-Kreis. Der in Jahrzehnten gewachsene Ruf als kompetenter und zuverlässiger Partner für Privathaushalte, Gewerbebetriebe und Kommunen hat sich inzwischen weit über regionale Grenzen hinweg verbreitet. Unsere Kunden schätzen sowohl unsere Flexibilität, als auch die Fähigkeit, selbst für schwierigste Entsorgungsprobleme maßgeschneiderte und kostengünstige Lösungen zu finden.

An unserem Firmensitz in Mosbach sowie an den Standorten Eberbach, Obrigheim, Tauberbischofsheim, Lauda-Königshofen und Michelstadt stehen Ihnen unsere Spezialisten fachkundig mit Rat und Tat zur Seite. Gerne helfen wir Ihnen bei allen Fragen rund um die Themen:

Sonderabfallzwischenlager

Name: Biofactory SpA
Description:
BIOFACTORY S.p.A. rappresenta uno degli impianti di compostaggio leader in Italia.
Il processo di compostaggio BIOFACTORY è certificato con Sistema di Gestione Integrato UNI EN ISO 14001.
BIOFACTORY recupera annualmente tramite processo bio-ossidativo aerobico più di 100.000 t di rifiuti così suddivisi:
RIFIUTI UMIDI
RIFIUTI VERDI
costituiti da scarti di potatura e della manutenzione di parchi e giardini, nonchè da rifiuti biodegradabili non destinabili al consumo umano.
Con il processo di trasformazione e stabilizzazione controllato di rifiuti organici, BIOFACTORY produce circa 40.000 tonn/anno di “ammendante compostato misto” e “ammendante compostato verde” di Qualità così definito ai sensi del D.Lgs 75/2010.
La qualità è garantita da un marchio di qualità di certificazione volontaria che viene conferito ai soci CIC, Consorzio Italiano Compostatori, a seguito di rispondenza a determinati requisiti quali la tracciabilità di prodotto e predefinite caratteristiche chimico-fisiche.
Il Compost BIOFACTORY (www.fertilnutro.it), iscritto anche al Registro dei Fertilizzanti consentiti in Agricoltura Biologica, può essere utilizzato tal quale in agricoltura, in particolare frutticoltura e orticoltura specializzata, e in pieno campo per migliorare la fertilità del suolo, oppure miscelato ad altre matrici per produrre substrati colturali professionali e da hobbistica utilizzati in orto-floro-vivaismo.
Con il processo di compostaggio si contribuisce ad un uso sostenibile delle risorse:
» Riducendo gli scarti organici e i rifiuti vegetali da avviare a smaltimento nelle discariche.
» Limitando l’impiego di risorse non rinnovabili per produrre fertilizzanti chimici.
» Chiudendo il ciclo di gestione degli scarti organici: dalla raccolta differenziata all’impiego del prodotto finito.

Dei rifiuti trattati meno del 2% viene smalitito in appositi impianti, sottoforma di plastica e altri inerti; più del 98% dei rifiuti viene quindi effettivamente recuperato.

Name: Greater Cairo Air Pollution Project and Climate Change Project
Description:
The Arab Republic of Egypt (Egypt) has been implementing an important economic reform program, which has resulted in improved macroeconomic conditions. The reforms, which have led to economic growth, reductions in inflation, and an improved climate for the private sector and competitiveness, have been supported by the international donor community, including through the

World Bank Programmatic Development Policy Financing and the International Monetary Fund’s (IMF) three-year Extended Fund Facility. Before the coronavirus (COVID-19) outbreak in late 2019, economic growth was robust and macroeconomic imbalances had broadly improved. Growth was 5.6 percent in 2019 (up from 5.3 percent in the previous year), inflation was curbed to return to single digits, and the debt-to-GDP ratio was brought to below the 100 percent mark.

The environmental conditions, however, remain challenging, particularly in Greater Cairo (GC).1 The main environmental challenges in GC are air and water pollution, as elaborated in Egypt – Cost of Environmental Degradation (COED) study (2019).2 Air pollution affects human health significantly leading to respiratory and cardiovascular diseases, morbidities and premature mortalities. The study has estimated that the economic cost of these health effects in GC alone at about 1.4 percent of the national Gross Domestic Product (GDP), annually.3

Ambient air pollution is the most significant environmental health issue in GC, and despite recent improvements, it still weighs heavily on the quality of life of its residents and the economy.

 Climate change will further exacerbate breathing conditions by creating more “natural dust” in GC. Climate change will contribute to more favorable conditions for self-incineration and the spread of solid waste fires.

Romana Maceri fornisce un insieme di servizi orientati alla gestione dell’energia nelle sue fasi tipiche di produzione, distribuzione, controllo e ottimizzazione, garantendo riduzione dei costi, pari comfort interno alle strutture servite, diminuzione delle emissioni inquinanti in atmosfera.

Name: Composmart
Description:
Depuis la loi AGEC de 2024, les collectivités sont censées proposer des moyens de compostage. Cependant, la mise en place de composteurs collectifs dans les résidences s’avère parfois compliquée, notamment en raison du manque d’implication, d’autonomie des habitants et de connaissances sur le compostage.
C’est dans ce contexte que Composmart, un composteur connecté, pourrait simplifier la gestion du compost à l’échelle d’une résidence et créer un lien social autour du compost entre les habitants. Grâce à des capteurs, cet outil améliore la qualité du compost. En parallèle, une application accompagne les utilisateurs dans la gestion quotidienne du composteur, en leur apportant des conseils pratiques basés sur l’expérience de la communauté Composmart et sur des études scientifiques.
Le but de Composmart est d’encourager et de faciliter l’utilisation du compost collectif dans les résidences, en impliquant les habitants à la fois individuellement et collectivement.

Name: Incycle Wert.Stoff.Management
Description:
Nachhaltigkeit heißt auch, (schadlose) Materialien in (schadlose) Kreisläufe zu bringen. Kreisläufe müssen aber erst nutzbar gemacht werden!
Incycle bringt Abfallstoffe als Wertstoffe in Kreisläufe.
Incycle optimiert Unternehmen für nachhaltige Materialströme.
Incycle senkt maximal die Abfallkosten!
Incycle spart dem Unternehmen bereichsübergreifend Zeit!
Incycle stellt maximale Daten-Nutzwerte zur Verfügung!
Seit über 20 Jahren erfreuen wir Unternehmen mit einfachen, wirkungsvollen und kostensenkenden Lösungen, die schnell, nach Ihren Bedürfnissen, pragmatisch umgesetzt werden können. 

Wir betreuen alle Projekte zur Optimierung des Abfallmanagements. Unsere Arbeit umfasst einen bewährten Prozess, der sich in vier Phasen gliedert:
1) Abfallanalyse und Auswertung inkl. der Logistikaufnahme (Werksbegehung)
2) Optimierungsansätze und Entwicklung eines abgestimmten Konzeptes
3) Vorbereitung und Unterstützung der Umsetzung von Maßnahmen
4) Erfolgskontrolle mit Hilfe des Abfallmonitorings

Mit unserer eigenen Software verarbeiten wir Ihre Abfall-Daten zu nutzbaren Informationen für interne und externe Kommunikation, erstellen umsetzbare Maßnahmen und ermöglichen eine kontinuierliche Erfolgskontrolle.

Dabei verlieren wir nie das definierte Ziel aus den Augen: ausschließlich Lösungen zu entwickeln, die optimale Wirtschaftlichkeit mit minimalem Aufwand und maximaler Wirkung verbinden.

È specializzata nel servizio di consulenza commerciale fondamentale per contrastare la crisi di mercato che sta interessando il nostro Paese e che negli ultimi anni ha investito il settore dei rifiuti.

Name: Zweckverband für Abfallwirtschaft Kempten
Description:
Der Zweckverband für Abfallwirtschaft Kempten (ZAK) wurde im Jahr 1972 unter der Bezeichnung "Zweckverband Müllverbrennungsanlage Kempten Stadt und Land" gegründet. Die Umbenennung in die heutige Bezeichnung erfolgte 1984 im Zuge der Aufnahme des Landkreises Lindau in den Zweckverband sowie der Erweiterung des Müllheizkraftwerkes (MHKW).

Somit umfasst der ZAK als entsorgungspflichtige Körperschaften die Landkreise Oberallgäu und Lindau sowie die Stadt Kempten.

Ziel ist es, die abfallwirtschaftlichen Aufgaben "Vermeiden, Verwerten und Entsorgen" gemeinsam zu lösen. Das heißt konkret: die Restmüllmengen zu minimieren, die Entsorgungssicherheit zu garantieren und abfallwirtschaftliche Anlagen bereitzustellen.

Am 14.03.1993 beschloss die Gesellschafterversammlung, die privatrechtliche Struktur noch weiter zu differenzieren. Es wurde als Überbau eine Holding GmbH gegründet, die die beiden anderen Gesellschaften ZAK Abfallwirtschaft GmbH und ZAK Energie GmbH als Töchter hält.

Our Presence in Africa:  Nigeria, Ghana, Senegal, Sierra Leone, Morocco, Tunisia, Kenya, Ethiopia Tanzania, Comoros, Madagascar, Mozambique, South Africa, Zambia, Botswana, Angola, South Sudan, Gabon…More in view soon.

Our Environmental Commitment & Compliance: 

ZEWA Group operates with a strong commitment towards environmental sustainability, public health, and regulatory compliance. Our practices align with:
•	The Basel Convention – Ensuring all activities involving hazardous electronic components are safely collected while processed responsibly and legally in accordance.
•	Sustainability Partnerships – Collaborating with organizations to design circular economy solutions, including refurbishment, reuse, and awareness programs.
•	Local & Global Standards – Complying with various local environmental laws and international best practices, supporting government efforts to develop formal e-waste frameworks, including guidance from the Global WEEE  Directive.
•	ISO 14001 Certification – Part of the ZEWA Group, holding various internationally recognized Environmental Management System certification.

 Visit our website for more information: www.zewa.africa

Name: Advanced ITAD
Description:
Welcome to the LinkedIn page of Advanced ITAD, where sustainability meets innovation in the realm of electronic recycling and IT asset disposition (ITAD).

Our leadership team boasts decades of specialized experience in recovery and refining, coupled with a keen understanding of evolving customer needs. Members of our team have held esteemed positions in industry trade groups such as the International Precious Metals Institute (IPMI), the International Association of Electronic Recyclers (IAER), Sustainable Electronic Recycling International (SERI), and the Institute of Scrap Recycling Industries (ISRI).

At Advanced ITAD, we believe in pioneering ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) excellence. For us, environmental stewardship is paramount in combating climate change and safeguarding the planet for future generations. Social responsibility drives our commitment to providing accessible processing technology while upholding human rights and environmental integrity. Our governance structure emphasizes transparency, accountability, and ethical decision-making at every level.

Central to our mission is electronic recycling, which not only forms the core of our business but also reflects our deeply ingrained values. We recognize the imperative of diverting hazardous toxins from landfills and employ environmentally certified operations to manage obsolete or unwanted equipment securely. Our ITAD services prioritize data protection, product recall management, and consumer safety.

Through our sustainable closed-loop mechanical process, we efficiently extract valuable materials like gold, silver, palladium, and copper from discarded electronics, minimizing environmental impact. Furthermore, we offer transparent sustainability reporting via our Carbon Avoidance Calculator, empowering clients to quantify and optimize their ESG efforts.

Join us in our journey towards a greener, more sustainable future. Connect with Advanced ITAD and be part of the solution.

Name: Reboxt
Description:
Welkom bij Reboxt, waar we actie ondernemen voor een groenere wereld, doos voor doos. Wij zijn een milieubewuste onderneming gevestigd in Rotterdam, en we zijn op een missie om de impact van verpakkingsafval op onze planeet te verminderen.

Bij Reboxt geloven we dat elke doos telt. Jaarlijks worden miljoenen dozen slechts eenmalig gebruikt voordat ze worden weggegooid, een verspilling van waardevolle grondstoffen en een belangrijke bron van vervuiling. Wij werken er hard aan om dit te veranderen.

Wist je dat: "Per ton aan hergebruikte dozen we -377kg Co2 uitstoot, -2026km  in het proces, -226kg Co2 uitstoot in het fabriceren, -20.000 liter water en 70% uitstoot in het proces kunnen besparen door wat we doen. 

We zamelen gebruikte, maar nog steeds bruikbare dozen in en geven ze een tweede leven waardoor zowel bedrijven als consumenten ze opnieuw kunnen gebruiken voor verzending of opslag. Onze service is niet alleen milieuvriendelijk, maar biedt ook een praktisch en kosteneffectief alternatief voor het kopen van nieuwe dozen.

Maar onze inzet stopt hier niet. Wij zijn ook actief betrokken bij de lokale gemeenschap in Rotterdam, en organiseren wekelijkse zwerfafval verzameldagen om onze stad schoon te houden.

Wij geloven dat verandering mogelijk is en dat iedereen een rol kan spelen. Of je nu een bedrijf bent dat op zoek is naar duurzamere verpakkingsoplossingen, een consument die zijn ecologische voetafdruk wil verminderen, of gewoon iemand die wil helpen om onze planeet schoon te houden, er is een plek voor jou bij Reboxt.

Doe mee met de beweging. Word vandaag nog een Inzamelaar of Hergebruiker. Samen kunnen we een verschil maken voor onze planeet.

#Reboxt #Duurzaamheid #Hergebruik #GroenRotterdam #Actie

Elke doos telt. Elke actie telt. Doe mee!

our mission is to help businesses dispose of their waste in a sustainable manner that fuels circular economy.We believe that waste should not be seen as a problem, but rather as a resource waiting to be repurposed.By adopting circular economy principles, we can create a more sustainable and efficient system that benefits both businesses and the environment.

Name: FAURE
Description:
La Maison Faure a été fondée en 1904 à Sérignan du Comtat par Alfred Faure.

D'abord vigneron et courtier en vins et alcools, ce comtadín s'est spécialisé par la suite dans le détartrage des foudres. Son fils Jean lui succède dans les années 1930, alors qu'apparaissent un peu partout les premières caves coopératives.

Au cours des années 1950 à 1980, Alfred Faure, fils de Jean, prospecte avec succès les vignobles d'Ardèche, du Beaujolais, du Macônnais, de Savoie et du Jura. Le moment est venu de doter l'entreprise d'infrastructures conformes à son expansion géographique.
En 1968, Alfred choisit d'abandonner les locaux du vieux Sérignan, exigus et peu accessibles, pour venir implanter son activité au nord du village, sur le site actuel du quartier St Marcel.

De 1989 à 2022, les Établissements Faure sont dirigés par Jean-Pierre Faure, arrière-petit-fils du fondateur Alfred, avant de transmettre la direction de cette société centenaire à son partenaire historique la Maison Margnat, famille de négociants en vins Marseillais s'étant diversifiés à la fin du 20eme siècle dans la production et le commerce des produits tartriques.

Specjalizujemy się w rekultywacjach i rewitalizacjach terenów zdegradowanych, w zagospodarowaniu odpadów mineralnych oraz z sektora wodno-ściekowego. Dział dokumentacyjny z powodzeniem opracowuje wnioski, raporty i operaty nawet dla najbardziej złożonych przedsięwzięć. Nasza wyspecjalizowana kadra, przy wykorzystaniu bogatego parku maszynowego, skutecznie wdraża proekologiczne rozwiązania i optymalizuje procesy zagospodarowania odpadów dla naszych klientów. Stawiamy na kompleksowość i profesjonalizm. Name: Dak Dynamics LLC
Description:
We are a modern electronics recycling company on a mission to make e-waste effortless.

We partner with municipalities, recycling centers, and local organizations to provide sustainable, no-hassle electronics recycling solutions across Alabama and beyond. From old laptops and desktops to servers, drives, and networking equipment, we collect, sort, and process it all with certified data destruction and zero-landfill practices.

Our flagship offering, TurnKey+, gives towns the ability to start accepting electronics with no upfront investment. We drop off a custom-built container, monitor fill levels, and handle all pickups, processing, and compliance - so communities can offer e-waste recycling without the headache.

What started as a side hustle with one truck has grown into a statewide network, and we’re just getting started. Our goal is to build the most efficient, community-focused e-waste collection system in the country, one municipality at a time.

If you’re a city, school, local leader, or recycler looking to simplify or add electronics recycling; we’d love to connect.

Description:
A área de gerenciamento de resíduos sólidos (GRS) atua tanto no âmbito ambiental quanto no sanitário, desde que o saneamento compreende drenagem, tratamento de esgotos e de água e também os resíduos. O GRS tem por objetivo reduzir o volume e dar tratamento adequado ao resíduo que for gerado, bem como criar, instaurar e gerir sistemas onde ocorra a conscientização dos responsáveis acerca das boas práticas ambientais, de forma que  ocorra a não geração, evitando perdas, a redução, reutilização, reciclagem e a destinação adequada.

Tendo em vista essa área, a LARS foi criada em 2016 como uma entidade estudantil da UFG que tem como intuito aproximar os estudantes interessados na área e disseminar conhecimento desta, por meio de palestras, reuniões, seminários, entre outros eventos com a participação da comunidade e realizando parcerias com outras instituições e entidades.

Die Entsorgergemeinschaft Transport und Umwelt e. V. engagiert sich als Mitglied in der Allianz pro Schiene e. V. sowie in der Europäischen Vereinigung der Gemeinschaften zur Zertifizierung von Entsorgungsfachbetrieben (EVGE).

Name: Variodin
Description:
Variodin differs from similarly working companies by:

The approach – individual solutions:
The regional waste occurrence and the local needs are always surveyed. Based on this, the required technologies are defined in the appropriate dimensioning.

Our focus - a closed production cycle:
Waste - recycling - energy production - energy storage

USP – flexibly combinable technologies:
Currently, five different technologies can be modularly combined, depending on the amount of waste and energy requirements. The integration of additional processes is given without great effort.

Tailored to demand – controllable energy generation:
Production can be throttled down to self-sufficiency and ramped up again immediately at peak times.

Just-in-time – plannable in the long term:
Our processes make it possible to produce and store a high-energy energy carrier and, if required, to produce clean, green energy in a wide variety of forms.

Almost everything – residues of all kinds:
This unsorted, directly on site and almost residue-free.

Name: Ecologica Sangro SpA
Description:
Ecologica Sangro Spa: più di un'azienda, un impegno per il futuro
Nata nel 1987 a Lanciano, in Abruzzo, Ecologica Sangro Spa è leader nella gestione dei rifiuti in Italia. Ma non siamo solo un'azienda: siamo una squadra di oltre 200 persone che ogni giorno si impegna per un futuro più sostenibile.

Crediamo nell'economia circolare: i rifiuti non sono un problema, ma una risorsa. Per questo ci impegniamo a recuperare e riciclare il più possibile, trasformando i rifiuti in nuovi prodotti.

Non solo tecnologia: la nostra forza è il nostro team. Persone competenti e appassionate che lavorano con dedizione per raggiungere gli obiettivi aziendali.

Responsabilità sociale: per noi è fondamentale. Promuoviamo la sicurezza sul lavoro, la formazione continua e il dialogo con le comunità locali.

Perché scegliere Ecologica Sangro Spa?

Un servizio efficiente e sostenibile, tecnologie all'avanguardia, un team di professionisti e un impegno concreto per la responsabilità sociale.

Scegli Ecologica Sangro Spa, scegli un futuro più sostenibile!

Name: Alsitech Spółka z o.o.
Description:
Jesteśmy specjalistami w bezpiecznym i ekologicznym usuwaniu odpadów niebezpiecznych. Dzięki nowoczesnej metodzie zescalania gwarantujemy skuteczną neutralizację substancji szkodliwych, minimalizując wpływ na środowisko.
Nasza firma od lat działa na rynku utylizacji odpadów niebezpiecznych, oferując innowacyjne rozwiązania zgodne z najwyższymi standardami ochrony środowiska. Metoda zescalania, którą stosujemy, pozwala na trwałe unieszkodliwienie odpadów poprzez ich stabilizację i integrację, co zapobiega ich dalszemu rozprzestrzenianiu się.
Nasze usługi
•	Utylizacja odpadów niebezpiecznych metodą zescalania
•	Transport i odbiór odpadów zgodny z przepisami
•	Doradztwo w zakresie gospodarki odpadami
•	Kompleksowa obsługa dokumentacyjna
Metoda zescalania
Metoda zescalania polega na stabilizacji odpadów niebezpiecznych poprzez ich połączenie z odpowiednimi materiałami wiążącymi, co prowadzi do powstania trwałej, nieprzepuszczalnej masy. Dzięki temu odpady stają się bezpieczne dla środowiska i mogą być składowane lub poddane dalszej obróbce zgodnie z obowiązującymi normami.
Dlaczego my?
•	Doświadczenie i profesjonalizm
•	Nowoczesne technologie i sprzęt
•	Pełna zgodność z przepisami prawa
•	Indywidualne podejście do klienta
•	Dbałość o środowisko naturalne

Name: Star Pollutech

Welcome to Star Pollutech, your trusted partner in biomedical waste management, dedicated to protecting public health and the environment through innovative and compliant solutions. Founded in 2019 and based in Sitapur, Uttar Pradesh, Star Pollutech was established with a clear mission: to revolutionize the handling of biomedical waste, ensuring that it is managed safely, responsibly, and sustainably.
At Star Pollutech, we offer a comprehensive range of services tailored to meet the specific needs of healthcare facilities, including hospitals, clinics, laboratories, and other medical institutions. Our services include secure collection and transportation of biomedical waste using specialized vehicles, ensuring safe handling from the point of generation to final disposal. We also emphasize proper waste segregation at the source to prevent cross-contamination and enhance the effectiveness of our treatment processes.
Our state-of-the-art facility is equipped with advanced technologies such as autoclaving, incineration, and chemical disinfection, all designed to neutralize hazardous waste while minimizing environmental impact. Compliance with regulatory standards is a cornerstone of our operations, and we provide detailed reporting and documentation to support our clients' compliance efforts.
Beyond our core services, we are committed to education and continuous improvement.  We offer training programs and consultation services to healthcare facilities, helping them implement best practices in waste management and reduce waste generation.
Choosing Star Pollutech means partnering with a team of experts dedicated to operational excellence, innovation, and sustainability. We are not just a service provider; we are your ally in creating a safer, healthier environment for future generations.
Join us in our mission to make a difference. Contact Star Pollutech today to learn more about how we can support your biomedical waste management needs.

Name: SITOM des Vallées du Mont-Blanc
Description:
Le SITOM des Vallées du Mont-Blanc est un syndicat à compétence de prévention et de traitement des déchets auquel adhèrent trois collectivités : la Communautés de Communes Pays du Mont-Blanc (CCPMB), la Communauté de Communes Vallée de Chamonix Mont-Blanc (CCVCMB) et la Communauté d’Agglomération Arlysère pour le secteur du Val d’Arly (6 communes), soit 20 communes et environ 62 000 habitants (population permanente).
 
La compétence de traitement est exercée par le SITOM des Vallées du Mont-Blanc sur l’intégralité du territoire des 3 EPCI compétents en matière de collecte :
•	Les ordures ménagères sont incinérées dans l’unité de valorisation énergétique située à Passy, propriété du SITOM, dont la gestion a été déléguée à SET Mont-Blanc, filiale de SUEZ (Délégation de Service Public).
•	Les déchets issus de la collecte sélective flux multilatéraux (emballages et papiers) en apports volontaires sont triés et conditionnés en centre de tri.
•	Le verre est recyclé en verrerie.

la compétence prévention des déchets s'exerce à travers:
 •	Les actions de communication et de sensibilisation des acteurs du territoire (particuliers, scolaires, professionnels, collectivités);
 •	La gestion des biodéchets par le compostage et le broyage des déchets verts.

Name: CSF Transformation & Valorisation des Déchets
Description:
Le Comité Stratégique de Filière Transformation et Valorisation des Déchets (CSF-TVD) rassemble les principaux acteurs publics et privés du secteur afin de structurer, renforcer et accélérer la transition vers une économie circulaire et durable.

Sa mission :
	•	Accompagner la transformation industrielle et l’innovation dans le recyclage, la réutilisation et la valorisation des matières ;
	•	Promouvoir la compétitivité des entreprises françaises du secteur des déchets et du recyclage ;
	•	Contribuer à la neutralité carbone et à la souveraineté en ressources du pays.

Le CSF-TVD agit en concertation avec l’État, les fédérations professionnelles, les entreprises, les organismes de recherche et les territoires pour faire de la France un leader de la valorisation durable des ressources.



 Mots-clés : économie circulaire, recyclage, valorisation des déchets, décarbonation, transition écologique, innovation industrielle, compétitivité durable, souveraineté industrielle, développement durable, filière française du recyclage.

Ubicata all’interno di uno dei più grossi poli estrattivi della Lombardia, Eureko nasce per rispondere ad una specifica problematica del settore inerti e aggregati.
L’estrazione di sabbia e ghiaia non è una soluzione ambientalmente ed economicamente sostenibile per costi energetici, complessità tecnica, sfruttamento del territorio, e per quantià di rifiuti inerti prodotti.
Negli anni ’80 Eureko ha attuato una scelta precisa costruendo un impianto per il riutilizzo di rifiuti inerti valorizzandoli nel mercato dei sottofondi stradali.
Negli anni successivi Eureko ha ampliato impianti ed autorizzazioni e attualmente produce materiali per conglomeratizi cementizi con i più alti standard qualitativi.

Name: SaniSan Ltd UK
Description:
Reviewed market research of 14 years of innovation within the toilet/sanitation market, including Gates Foundation Toilet Challenge winners. 
Our view is that nothing has changed in the context of developing countries and communities without toilets. In developed countries eg the UK has 5m households with pit latrines or septic tanks. SDG stats highlight the complexity and depth of the problem with billions of people having no access to safe healthy toilets. The elderly & kids are regularly drowning in these pit latrines. The impact of pit latrines on the environment water tables is horrific. Chemical toilets have enormous carbon footprints, transporting faecal sludge and equipment back and forth – and the chemicals?
March 2024 young adults from Uganda advised that 1 school in their area has approximately 1300 students & staff. They share 11 pit latrines between them.  This is simply not acceptable by any standards. We were aware of African schools generally being in this situation, but not the true scale of the problem. That is why we had already created a Community Interest Company in the UK to raise funds when we are ready, specifically for schools in Africa and hopefully with partners in similar locations.
We have successfully designed and tested the individual components of our design and are now creating a prototype of the complete unit. This allows us to shift into production mode and go to market. This is our SaniLoo toilet.
To reduce demand for toilet numbers, we also designed our own SaniSoir. This is an 8place male urinal for use in communal areas like bus stations and schools. This provides women with greater toilet access as it allows the budget to stretch much further.
Our SaniLoo and SaniSoir products can be installed by the local communities with minimal training.Parts for the installation are made by the local community kickstarting a self-sustainable localised circular economy activity. Clean, waterless, maintenance free,100% environmentally safe.

Name: Tanwaste
Description:
Nobody wants to burn waste, but many people are forced to. It shouldn’t be that way. 

We understand that affordable waste management is a public health issue, and we are here to help. 

INTERNATIONAL EXPEREINCE
Our team has experience delivering waste projects across the globe. That experience gets to be used locally. 

PROUDLY TANZANIAN
We are locally headquartered. We use local solutions. We employ and serve Tanzanians and this is a source of pride.

WE COLLECT OUR OWN WASTE
We live in the communities that we collect. Our high quality comes from serving our neighbors. 

We are proud to say that we can design a waste management strategy for our clients for almost all types of waste. We also are working hard to obtain new licences to be able to handle and dispose of a wider range of waste types. If you have any questions regarding a specific waste stream (even if it is not listed below), please get in touch. 

MUNICIPAL WASTE
We work with cities and towns across Tanzania to provide collection and disposal of MSW

MEDICAL WASTE
Medical waste collection and dissposal is critical to every clinic and hospital

MINE CAMP WASTE
We pride ourselves on serving remote mine camps and providing comprehensive waste management

PORT WASTE
Ports play an important part of the economy and need to have high quality and trusted waste services

LANDFILL DESIGN AND OPERATION
Sanitary landfills are replacing dump sites across the country and we are here to help in that transition

HAZARDOUS WASTE
There are few options within Tanzania regarding how to handle and dispose of Haz waste

OUR COMMITMENT TO IMPACT
For too long informal workers have been leaned on by waste management companies in the country. We aim to employ every person who handles waste from collection to disposal. 

We do this by engaging with informal workers who previously worked for free for the opportunity to scavenge through the waste. We offer paychecks, PPE, and the dignity of work.

Name: Ecoservice S.r.l.
Description:
Ecoservice Srl è un'azienda specializzata nella gestione dei rifiuti e nel riciclo dei materiali, nata nel 2006 con l'obiettivo di fornire soluzioni innovative per la gestione sostenibile dei rifiuti.

In particolare, la nostra attenzione si focalizza sulla gestione e il riciclo dei pneumatici fuori uso, dai quali produciamo un isolante acustico destinato all'edilizia. Grazie alla nostra lunga esperienza nel settore, siamo in grado di gestire ogni fase del processo di smaltimento e riciclo dei rifiuti, offrendo soluzioni personalizzate per le esigenze di ogni cliente.

Ci impegniamo a garantire un servizio efficiente e rispettoso dell'ambiente, utilizzando tecnologie all'avanguardia e rispettando le normative ambientali vigenti. Il nostro team di esperti è costantemente aggiornato sulle nuove tecnologie e normative ambientali, per garantire il massimo rispetto dell'ambiente e della sicurezza sul lavoro.

Grazie al nostro impegno nella gestione sostenibile dei rifiuti, siamo in grado di contribuire attivamente alla salvaguardia del nostro pianeta, fornendo servizi di qualità a basso impatto ambientale.

Il nostro isolante acustico, prodotto dal riciclo dei pneumatici fuori uso, è una soluzione innovativa e sostenibile per l'edilizia. L'isolante garantisce un'ottima protezione acustica, riducendo notevolmente l'impatto del rumore nell'ambiente circostante.

Siamo orgogliosi di essere un'azienda all'avanguardia nel settore del riciclo dei rifiuti e di contribuire alla costruzione di un futuro più sostenibile per tutti. Scegliere Ecoservice Srl significa scegliere un partner affidabile e impegnato nella gestione sostenibile dei rifiuti, per un futuro migliore per tutti.

Name: Chancho Limpio Circular
Description:
Chancho Limpio Circular SpA nace en Chiloé como una empresa pionera en economía circular aplicada a la gestión de residuos orgánicos municipales y comunitarios. Nuestro propósito es transformar desechos en soluciones sostenibles, escalables y de alto valor, contribuyendo a posicionar al archipiélago como referente en innovación ambiental y desarrollo rural con identidad.
Implementamos módulos circulares de tratamiento que convierten residuos en insumos útiles, reduciendo la huella ambiental y generando beneficios directos para las comunidades. Este modelo se articula con municipios, organizaciones y empresas, asegurando pertinencia territorial y fortaleciendo la confianza institucional.
Nuestro enfoque se basa en el triple impacto:
•	Ambiental: disminución de residuos y emisiones, valorización de recursos locales.
•	Social: participación comunitaria, educación ambiental y empleo rural digno.
•	Económico: eficiencia en la gestión municipal y generación de nuevos productos y servicios.
Actualmente avanzamos hacia la escalabilidad del modelo, con la meta de activar entre 5 y 8 módulos operativos y formalizar contratos municipales que consoliden la gestión circular en la región. Paralelamente, participamos en ferias de sostenibilidad y articulamos proyectos con fondos públicos y privados, integrando innovación, narrativa institucional y respeto por la identidad chilota.
En Chancho Limpio creemos que la economía circular no es solo una estrategia ambiental, sino una oportunidad para redefinir el desarrollo territorial: más limpio, más justo y más productivo. Nuestro compromiso es proyectar este modelo desde Chiloé hacia otros territorios, demostrando que la gestión de residuos puede convertirse en motor de transformación social y económica.

ECOSTRILL est à même de répondre à toute demande, dans les limites des exigences sanitaires, légales et réglementaires.

Les DASRI sont issus des activités de diagnostic, de suivi et de traitement préventifs, curatifs ou palliatifs dans les domaines de la médecine humaine et vétérinaire, et couvrent un ensemble de matières infectées telles que :
• déchets médicaux infectieux 
• déchets pathologiques 
• déchets pointus ou tranchants infectés 
• déchets infectieux liquides 
• déchets de laboratoires

Name: REMONDIS Recycling AG
Description:
Recytech, als Sparte der REMONDIS Recycling AG, ist nicht nur auf die Instandhaltung und Reparatur von Maschinen und Anlagen spezialisiert, sondern auch im Handel von Entsorgungstechnik tätig. Dazu gehört beispielsweise der Verkauf und die Bereitstellung von Presscontainern, Abrollcontainern und Absetzmulden.

Presscontainer
Diese Container werden häufig in der Entsorgungsbranche eingesetzt, um Abfälle effizient zu verdichten und das Volumen zu reduzieren. Recytech bietet verschiedene passende Modelle an, die sich für unterschiedliche Abfallarten eignen, sei es für Gewerbeabfälle oder Wertstoffe.

Abrollcontainer
Diese grossen Behälter sind ideal für den Transport und die Lagerung von sperrigen Abfällen. Sie werden oft auf Baustellen eingesetzt oder in der Landwirtschaft und Industrie verwendet. Recytech kann unterschiedliche Größen und Typen anbieten, angepasst an die spezifischen Bedürfnisse ihrer Kunden.

Absetzmulden
Diese Mulden sind kleiner als Abrollcontainer und werden oft für kleinere Bauprojekte oder zur temporären Lagerung von Abfällen genutzt. Auch hier bietet Recytech eine Vielzahl von Optionen, um den Anforderungen von Privatpersonen, Unternehmen und Kommunen gerecht zu werden.

Dienstleistungen
Zusätzlich zum Handel bietet Recytech auch Dienstleistungen rund um diese Produkte an, wie die Lieferung, Abholung, Wartung und Entleerung der Container sowie die fachgerechte Entsorgung des Inhalts. Die Kombination aus technischem Service, Handel und Entsorgungslösungen macht Recytech zu einem umfassenden Anbieter in der Recycling- und Abfallwirtschaft.

Name: UNITED GULF INDUSTRIAL OIL COMPANY
Description:
To be a leading global provider of  sustainable solutions for the recovery and  recycling of wastes and by-products from  the petroleum and petrochemical  industries.

UGIOC is a specialist with a 25-year track record in resource recovery and recycling of Oily  wastes and reﬁning of by-products from the petroleum and petrochemical industries. We collect,  transport, and reﬁne a broad range of hydrocarbon feedstocks at our state-of-the-art re-ﬁnery in  Jeddah, Saudi Arabia. Our ﬁnished products include market-ready fuels and petrochemical  industry feedstocks, which are exported to global markets.
Our state of the art reﬁnery in Jeddah is based on a modular design, offering maximum  flexibility with respect to treatment of feed types and production of custom ﬁnished products.  The key unit operations and technologies in our reﬁnery include:
The Manufacturing units consists of 18 distillation units having capacity of 600 MT / per day  can produce Petroleum Products of the lower boiling range as well as the relatively higher  boiling range.

At UGIOC, resource recovery and sustainability are key elements of our ethos, as reflected in choice of our technologies, operating methodologies, and policies.

UGIOC Is dedicated towards achieving circular economy through recycling, resource recovery, and compliance with internationally accepted ESG standards. Our vision is to foster our human capital, shareholder value, climate protection, economic & environmental sustainability, public health and wellbeing of our communities. 
 

Our scope of services cover collection, transport, processing, and re-refining of a broad range of hydrocarbon feedstocks and waste materials, with outputs that include market-ready fuels and petrochemical industry feedstocks for export of markets.
 
Human Capital development, Resource Recovery and Sustainability remain amongst the key elements of our ethos, governing the choice of our technologies, operating methodologies, and policies.

Name: eco BRICK Innovio
Description:
eco BRICK is a Greentech startup driving circular economy innovation by recycling traditionally unrecyclable materials.  
Key Features and Innovations
1. Waste Transformation:  
   - Processes over 40 types of waste, diverting ~99% of materials from landfills.  
   - Creates lightweight aggregates suitable for the cement and asphalt industries.  
2. Engineered Materials:  
   - Combines Thermosetting and Thermoplastic properties.  
   - Produces materials with enhanced attributes like:  
   - Lightweight composition  
   - Acoustic insulation  
   - Heat insulation  
3. Applications:  
   - Used in construction materials such as:  
     - Concrete and concrete blocks    
     - Self-leveling floors  
     - Mortar  
     - Asphalt  
4. Proprietary Technology:  
   - Employs a unique binder and machinery to produce high-quality recycled materials.  
Impact Goals
- Environmental: Offers a landfill alternative to reduce contamination.  
- Sustainability: Provides a greener, cost-effective option for the aggregate market.  
eco BRICK exemplifies innovation in sustainable construction by converting waste into valuable resources while addressing environmental challenges.

Name: JMX Ambiental e Biomassa
Description:
Idealizada pelo Sr. Jian Carlos Mendes, atuante na área de gestão de resíduos sólidos, a JMX foi fundada em 2018, no distrito de Miritituba, município de Itaituba, estado do PA.

Em 2023, a BINOTTO PARTICIPAÇÕES, holding com expertise na gestão empresarial e financeira, adentrou no quadro societário, viabilizando desta forma, o projeto de fornecimento de biomassa, visando atender a grande demanda por biomassa limpa e renovável para geração de energia.

Atualmente a JMX está localizada em Itaituba e Barcarena (PA), e em Santana (AP).

A JMX provê soluções para passivo ambiental que algumas empresas tem com os resíduos de seus processos industriais, onde muitas das vezes estes resíduos são destinados ao lixo ou não tem a destinação correta, acarretando num enorme passivo ambiental e problemas com o meio ambiente.

A JMX realiza os serviços de coleta, garantindo a destruição destes resíduos num local devidamente licenciado ou o reaproveitamento dos mesmos dando-lhes uma destinação correta, resolvendo desta forma o passivo ambiental das empresas além de contribuir com o meio ambiente.

Atualmente, a JMX tem 02 tipos de clientes:

1) Empresas industriais que necessitam da coleta de seus resíduos para solucionar seu passivo ambiental

2) Empresas industriais que necessitam de Biomassa limpa e renovável para geração de energia (como: caroço de açaí e fibra/cacho de dendê)

 « Avant qu’un déchet ne termine dans une benne, peut-on le réemployer dans le circuit de l’entreprise, ou même entre entreprises, pour en faire une ressource ? »

Depuis sa création, la société s’est spécialisée dans la revalorisation de matières, et plus particulièrement dans la récupération et la remise en circulation de mandrins issus de l’industrie papetière, en accompagnement direct de ses clients industriels.

Aujourd’hui, Codelo est certifiée Qualiopi et propose également des formations sur l’économie circulaire, allant de la sensibilisation à l’approfondissement, ainsi que des sessions dédiées à la gestion et à la valorisation des déchets.

Codelo Valorisation s’inscrit ainsi dans une démarche globale de transition écologique et d’innovation circulaire, au service des entreprises et des territoires.

Name: Galli Rodolfo e Figli S.R.L.
Description:
La nostra mission è, da sempre, molto chiara: Galli Rodolfo e Figli lavora a stretto contatto con le aziende produttrici di scarto, e per questo motivo recuperiamo qualsiasi tipo di rottame metallico derivante da lavorazioni industriali.

Selezioniamo, prepariamo e forniamo i nostri materiali in accordo alle vostre specifiche esigenze, dal ritiro alla consegna. Ci occupiamo di acciaio inossidabile, acciaio al carbonio e leghe, utilizzando solamente manodopera altamente qualificata per la raccolta e il trasporto di rifiuti non pericolosi.

Oltre settant'anni di esperienza nel settore hanno reso Galli Rodolfo e Figli uno dei principali commercianti italiani di rottami metallici. Abbiamo acquisito una solida reputazione per la fornitura di soluzioni personalizzate e flessibili ai clienti in tutto il mondo, dimostrando flessibilità e un approccio onesto al trading e costruendo relazioni di lunga data e di fiducia con i partner con cui lavoriamo

La nostra attività di recupero di metalli è iniziata con Luigi Bimbo Galli ed è stata trasformata in azienda di famiglia da Rodolfo Galli. Siamo diventati società di capitali nel 1979 con lo scopo di offrire un recupero di alta qualità per acciai al carbonio, acciai inossidabili e leghe operando nel Nord Italia. Oggi siamo un’azienda italiana leader che opera in tutta Europa, in Asia, in Africa, in Medio Oriente e Stati Uniti.

Questi i dettagli operativi:

 acciaio inossidabile
 acciaio al carbonio
 leghe
 raccolta del materiale
 servizio completo dalla produzione allo scarto.

Name: C.R.E. Centro Ricerche Ecologiche
Description:
La storia di C.R.E. è una storia di eccellenza, frutto di una esperienza di oltre 25 anni. Attraverso i propri impianti di Maccastorna (LO), e Meleti (LO), C.R.E. è in grado di recuperare ogni anno fino a 250.000 tonnellate di materiale, che viene reimmesso nella filiera produttiva e diventa una risorsa per la concimazione dei terreni.

L’azienda opera, dunque, come tassello nella catena della produzione alimentare, in conformità rispetto alle indicazioni delle Norme Comunitarie che promuovono il completo riuso e recupero di materiale altrimenti destinato a forme di smaltimento e incenerimento dannose per l’ambiente.
Non a caso, C.R.E. intrattiene rapporti di collaborazione con oltre 70 aziende agricole, che scelgono di utilizzare i fanghi biologici per dare nutrimento alle proprie colture e far crescere una produzione agricola riconosciuta, a livello internazionale, come il fiore all’occhiello della Lombardia.
C.R.E. occupa circa 25 dipendenti diretti e genera un indotto che crea lavoro per almeno 100 addetti.

Name: SludgeNet Dewatering Systems
Description:
SludgeNet's mobile dewatering system is an efficient & cost-effective method to dewater the sludge & solids generated at wastewater treatment plants. Typical waste activated sludge (WAS) generated by these facilities is 98% water which is transported as a liquid to a central dewatering facility where either a belt presses, centrifuge or drying beds will decant the water and the resultant solids are taken to the landfill/final disposal site. 
SludgeNet separates the solids and "gets the water out" returns it back to the plant & the resultant solids go directly from the wastewater treatment plants to the final Disposal Site (Landfill/Land-Application/Compost). 
SludgeNet a cost effective, environmentally friendly dewatering system which is quickly deployed, ‘maintenance lite’ which reduces cost and nuisance by minimizing heavy traffic movements by up to 85%.... the equipment is easily adaptable for Process Unit Cleaning.

Name: Sporadicate
Description:
At Sporadicate Inc., we are on a mission to eliminate plastic waste and restore contaminated land—using nature’s own master recycler: fungi.

We combine mycelium-powered plastic degradation, advanced PET recycling, and pyrolysis-to-fuel technology into a near-zero plastic waste solution. Our proprietary mycelium strains break down plastics and contaminants, while infused trees accelerate soil recovery. This integrated approach transforms waste into valuable products such as clean diesel, 3D printing filament, and organic compost—closing the loop on plastic pollution.

From municipal contracts like our first commercial site in Pocatello, Idaho to ongoing research partnerships with universities and environmental organizations, Sporadicate is proving that large-scale remediation can be both environmentally restorative and economically viable.

We’re driven by a vision of cleaner cities, revitalized ecosystems, and a circular economy where plastic waste is a resource, not a liability.

Join us—as a partner, investor, or supporter—and help build a future with near-zero plastic waste.

Specialties: Mycoremediation, Plastic Waste Solutions, Circular Economy, PET Recycling, Pyrolysis, Environmental Biotechnology, Waste-to-Value Systems

Name: D.A.R. Metall AG
Description:
D.A.R. Metall AG processes composite materials from production residues and post industrial waste, such as aluminium-plastic composed heating pipes. Using a dry-mechanical separation process, the composite inputs are separated, and pure aluminium granules as well as plastic regrind is produced. Due to the photovoltaic supported and energy efficient process, all of our products show a significantly low product carbon footprint. Aluminium granules are supplied in the steel industry and the plastic regrind, like LDPE, HDPE or PP are used as feedstock in the circular economy for mechanical and chemical recycling.
We supply ecofriendly aluminium, refractories and technologies for the steel industry. Moreover, consulting services and project development for GHG emissions accounting decarbonisation solutions forms our profile to act as a system supplier.

Name: Keloks Technologies
Description:
At Keloks, we are engineering next-generation wastewater intelligence systems to safeguard planetary health in the face of accelerating climate change.

Our flagship innovation, Wastexus, is designed for this critical moment. We are advancing an electrified, AI-enabled membrane bioreactor that dynamically adapts to climate-driven stressors, stabilizes treatment performance under variable loads, and maximizes nutrient recovery even in disrupted environmental conditions. By integrating mechanistic models, AI-powered simulation, high-resolution sensors, and economic optimization, Wastexus transforms wastewater from a climate-vulnerable liability into a resilient, circular resource stream.

Through these breakthroughs, Keloks is not just reacting to climate change, we are building the intelligent infrastructure needed to protect ecosystems, support food systems, and ensure water security in a warming world.

Name: GS-Food Waste Digesters
Description:
Revolutionizing Food Waste Management: Introducing Our GS-Food Waste Digesters.

Are you tired of traditional food waste disposal methods that are both cumbersome and environmentally unfriendly? Look no further than GS-Food Waste Digesters, the pioneer in sustainable waste management solutions. Our cutting-edge technology, backed by pending patents, offers a game-changing approach to the enzymatic aerobic digestion of food waste.

At GS, we specialize in manufacturing unique and innovative compostingmachine, capable of handling food waste volumes ranging from 80 liters to several thousand liters. Whether you're a small restaurant, a bustling hotel, or a large-scale food production facility, our composting machine is tailored to meet your needs.

What sets our digester machines apart is their ability to transform food waste into a valuable resource without the hassle of traditional garbage pickup methods. Garbage trucks create large CO2 emissions and use a lot of resources/manpower and fossil fuels. 
Driving around with food waste that contains on average 80% water is according to us unsustainable.

Unlike conventional composting machines, which produce solid waste streams, our digester process yields a liquid effluent that can be safely discharged into municipal sewers.

But that's not all. Our innovative technology doesn't stop at waste disposal. By diverting food waste from landfills and converting it into liquid waste, we contribute to the reduction of greenhouse gas emissions. Moreover, our systems integrate seamlessly with existing water treatment facilities, where they enhance biogas production and yield valuable bioplastics such as Polyhydroxyalkanoates (PHA).

Imagine a world where food waste is no longer a burden but a renewable source of energy and sustainable materials. With our liquid composting machines, that vision is within reach.

Join us in our mission to revolutionize food waste management. Together, we can make a difference—one digester at a time.

Nos integramos a los equipos de trabajo, como alguien más, nos tomamos mucho tiempo en el análisis, para identificar las causas de origen de los problemas, luego evaluamos alternativas de solución, para ello tenemos muchas alianzas con expertos en la materia y empresas proveedoras de tecnología, y seleccionamos en conjunto a la empresa y las soluciones a implementar.

Description:

Engineering Tomorrow’s Waste Solutions, Today

Hind Zero Waste Management Pvt. Ltd. is a pioneering organization committed to building a sustainable and circular future through cutting-edge waste management technologies. We specialize in the design, manufacturing, and implementation of state-of-the-art waste processing plants and equipment, tailored to meet the needs of every scale — from rural Gram Panchayats to urban Municipal Corporations.

At Hind Zero Waste, we believe that the path to zero waste starts with innovation at the grassroots level. Our mission is to empower every village, town, and city with smart waste processing infrastructure — driving decentralised solutions and reducing landfill dependency. Name: Pharma Envirocare India Private Limited
Description:
Indiscriminate disposal of including but not limited to expired,
unused and non-saleable pharmaceutical wastes pose a challenge to the Humans, Animals, Plants and the environment, that increases the risk of antimicrobial resistance (AMR).
Pharmaceutical waste from retail pharmacies/Stuckists'/ marketers (Brand Owners)/ Manufacturers in India lacks proper management, unlike the well-defined disposal mechanisms for biomedical waste from healthcare facilities and effluents from pharmaceutical manufacturers. This improper management leads to significant quantities of pharmaceuticals being discarded inappropriately, contributing to environmental pollution and posing health risks to humans and animals. Approximately 3 to 5% of drugs sold in India expire, with about 40% of these being discarded into the waste stream and ending up in landfills or water systems, leading to contamination and health issues.
Pharma Envirocare India Private Ltd., a tech-enabled clean tech and a social startup based in Chennai, India, aims to address this critical issue by establishing India’s first Common Pharmaceutical Waste Management Facility (CPWMF). Utilizing advanced Plasma Pyrolysis technology developed by the Institute for Plasma Research (IPR), Ahmedabad, the project will begin with a pilot facility in Chennai and expand to each state across the country. This project focuses on processing expired and unused waste from pharmacies /Stockists/ marketers (Brand Owners)/Manufacturers.

Name: KD Waste
Description:
ABOUT US
KD Waste Services (Pty) Ltd is a proudly South African and a 100% black, female-owned company. Our services include: wastewater removal and grease trap cleaning.

OUR MISSION
To serve our clients with fast and reliable waste removal services at an affordable rate.

OUR VISION
To positively contribute to the waste management process with integrity and professionalism, servicing the communities throughout our country.

OUR SERVICES
Liquid waste removal
Septic tank emptying
Thick sludge vacuuming
Spill response

We operate a fleet of vehicles known as Honeysucker trucks for fast, efficient drainage and cleaning of septic tanks, holding tanks, sumps, and grease traps. We do this without disrupting the operations of these facilitates.

Our trucks are equipped to remove all forms of wet waste and are designed to access almost any site, no matter how narrow the access point or roadway.

The waste vacuum trucks use a strong pneumatic pump to remove waste contents from septic tanks. This is then disposed of in an environmentally safe way at our local sewage disposal site.

Our tankers are constructed from Grade 3CR12 stainless steel. The vacuum units are powerful enough to remove waste from large municipal systems without any complications while still being light and mobile enough to manoeuvre through structures.

CLIENT CARE
Our staff are expertly trained to execute our projects efficiently and expediently. Transparent, consistent communication is the cornerstone of our business. Our staff are our greatest asset and are regularly trained and assessed, ensuring that our services are of the highest standard.

MANAGEMENT STRUCTURE
KD Waste Services have adopted a hands-on management system to increase client satisfaction. We have, through various processes, created a positive working environment thus allowing our employees to perform to the best of their abilities.

B-BBEE STATUS
We are a Level 1 Contributor, with 100% Black Female Ownership.

Sme hrdí na naše korene, tradičné hodnoty, popri tom sa náš pohľad upiera neustále do budúcnosti. Inovácie sú pre nás príležitosťou a zabezpečujú budúcnosť podnikania v globálnom hospodárstve.

Brantner na Slovensku so svojimi pätnástimi spoločnosťami zaujíma významné postavenie v odpadovom hospodárstve – v sektore komunálnych služieb zvlášť. Materská spoločnosť so sídlom v Rakúsku, Krems an der Donau, je garantom kvalitných a moderných riešení zberu, zneškodňovania či zhodnocovania odpadov.

Spoločnosti skupiny Brantner zabezpečujú zber, prepravu, zhodnocovanie a zneškodňovanie komunálneho odpadu, odpadu z priemyslu a obchodu. Triedime a zhodnocujeme druhotné suroviny, čistíme a opravujeme komunikácie, postaráme sa o verejnú zeleň či modernizáciu a prevádzku verejného osvetlenia. Okrem prevádzky skládok sa zaoberáme aj ich odplynením a výrobou elektriny zo skládkového plynu. V našom portfóliu nájdete aj zariadenie na výrobu alternatívnych palív pre cementársky priemysel.

Zamestnanci predstavujú základný pilier nášho úspechu. Ochrana životného prostredia a prírodných zdrojov sú každodennou súčasťou našej činnosti.

Spoločnosť Brantner Altgas s.r.o., je jedno z prvých zariadení na výrobu alternatívnych palív pre cementársky priemysel svojho druhu na Slovensku.
V tomto zariadení je moderná, veľkokapacitná technológia, kde sa mechanicky upravujú a kombinujú rôzne typy odpadov, ktoré slúžia ako alternatívne palivo pre cementársky priemysel.

Name: SUNFLOW (Solar Utilization for Functional Low-impact Outcomes in Water and energy)
Description:
Aprovechamiento de la Energía Solar para Aplicaciones Sostenibles en Medioambiente y Energía.
Nuestro equipo de profesores e investigadores del Departamento de Ingeniería Química de la Universidad Autónoma de Madrid se dedica a desarrollar soluciones sostenibles para los desafíos ambientales y energéticos actuales. Nuestras líneas de investigación incluyen:

Fotocatálisis para tratamiento de aguas y producción de hidrógeno: Desarrollamos tecnologías que purifican el agua y generan energía limpia simultáneamente.

Procesos avanzados de oxidación: Aplicamos métodos innovadores para eliminar contaminantes persistentes y emergentes en aguas residuales.

Adsorción de contaminantes: Investigamos técnicas eficientes y sostenibles para concentrar y eliminar contaminantes del agua.

Degradación catalítica de compuestos clorados: Nos enfocamos en descomponer contaminantes organoclorados difíciles de tratar.

Diseño y optimización de catalizadores: Trabajamos en mejorar la eficiencia y selectividad de reacciones químicas clave.

Nuestro objetivo es contribuir al desarrollo de tecnologías más limpias y eficientes, trabajando hacia un futuro más sostenible.

#IngenieríaQuímica #InvestigaciónSostenible #TratamientoDeAguas #EnergíaLimpia #UAM

Our Expertise Includes:

•	Industrial Fat, Oil, and Grease (FOG) Recovery Systems: Efficiently removing FOG from wastewater to improve environmental compliance and reduce treatment costs.
•	Modular System Design: Offering customisable configurations to suit various effluent types and industry requirements.
•	Sustainable Waste Solutions: Turning waste management expenses into revenue streams through the recovery and resale of valuable by-products.

Industries We Serve:

•	Dairy and Spreads: Achieving significant reductions in chemical usage and sludge production, with clients like Saputo/Dairy Crest and Arla Foods.
•	Snack Foods: Recovering high-quality vegetable oils from processes, serving clients such as KP Snacks and Humdinger Foods.
•	Meat Processing: Implementing systems that remove waste oils, fats, and solids, collaborating with companies like Monogram Foods and 2 Sisters Food Group.
•	Oil Processing and Packaging: Enhancing oil recovery processes for clients including Greenergy, Sime Darby  and Prince’s Foods.
•	Ready Meals and Large-Scale Processing: Supporting large-scale food production facilities, including those producing over 100,000 airline meals per day.

At Recoil Services, our team possesses the skills, resources, and experience to deliver optimal solutions tailored to your business needs. We are committed to helping you realise value from wastewater management challenges, ensuring compliance, efficiency, and profitability.

Contact us today to discover how Recoil Services can transform your waste management processes. Phone: 0333 335 0367 Email: admin@recoiluk.com

Come risultato dell'impegno volto a garantire la massima qualità e costanza nel processo di recupero dei materiali riutilizzabili, Lodigiana Maceri, nel tempo, ha sviluppato:
- Competenza sui processi produttivi

Description:
Green Line is the exceptional Italian partner for the collection and management of pre-consumer textile waste/production waste in the textile industry. Thanks to its experience and the important investments made in technology, it is able to transform textile scraps and waste into new and performing resources that can be reintegrated within the supply chain. All company activities are highly organized in processes that guarantee total traceability and transparency of the material, from collection, to processing, up to production. GREEN LINE is based on an important concept of environmental value and energy saving. In addition to the evident optimization of the use of resources (saving of virgin raw materials) which occurs as a logical consequence of the reintroduction of secondary raw materials in the processing cycles, there is also an evident reduction of the environmental impact of the entire life cycle of textile products. GREEN LINE is based on an important concept of environmental value and energy saving. In addition to the evident optimization of the use of resources (saving of virgin raw materials) which occurs as a logical consequence of the reintroduction of secondary raw materials in the processing cycles, there is also an evident reduction of the environmental impact of the entire life cycle of textile products. Today the theme of the circular economy and the recovery of raw materials is increasingly central to the strategies of brands and companies in the fashion chain and through recovery and selection processes, Green Line is able to support manufacturing companies in new and interesting projects aimed at enhancing waste destined to become waste and therefore simply disposed of, into high-performance resources to be used in future uses and creations in the fashion field. 
Certified company: UNI EN ISO 14001:2015 UNI EN ISO 9001:2015 Global Recycled Standard

In line with the government's "near-zero carbon emissions by 2050" policy, we develop the best waste solutions for all partners with sustainability, low-carbon, and reuse goals. Adhere to ESG: Starting from the three major strategies of Environmental, Social, and Governance, strictly control according to international standards, and properly handle various wastes for partners.

【Our Business】
Waste removal:

Owned treatment plant:

Name: easy recycle SHOP
Description:
Der easy recycle SHOP ist der Onlineshop für nachhaltige Abfall- und Rücknahmelösungen mit Fokus auf Digitalisierung und Kreislaufwirtschaft. Wir bieten Handwerk, Handel und Unternehmen bundesweit Rücknahme-Services, digitale Services im Entsorgungsmanagement und fachgerechte Entsorgung von Wertstoffen.

Unser Angebot im Überblick

Rücknahme: Wir holen u. a. Mineralwolle, Verpackungen (z. B. PE-Säcke, Big Bags) und Reststoffe zurück, damit die Materialien im Kreislauf bleiben.

Digitale Services: Mit unseren Tools („Waste S“, „Waste M“, „Zero Waste Begleitung“) dokumentieren, bilanzieren und optimieren wir die Abfallströme – inklusive Vertragsprüfung & Handling.

Entsorgung: Von Containern und Umleerbehältern bis hin zu Big Bags mit Abholung – wir sorgen für die Trennung, Verwertung und fachgerechte Behandlung von Wertstoffen und Abfällen.

Warum easy recycle SHOP?

Wir vereinen Nachhaltigkeit mit Pragmatismus: Einfach buchbar, digital nachvollziehbar, fachgerecht umgesetzt.

Transparenz in Abfallströmen, Recyclingquoten und Dokumentation.

Bundesweite Präsenz (Standorte u. a. Berlin, Stuttgart, Frankfurt, München, Köln etc.).

Unsere Mission
Wir wollen Kreisläufe effizient schließen und Ressourcenverschwendung minimieren – durch smarte Rücknahmesysteme, datengetriebene Abfallprozesse und eine konsequente Ausrichtung auf Nachhaltigkeit.

Atualmente empresa incubada no parque tecnológico (Oceantec) da Universidade Federal do Rio Grande, parceiro na busca de inovação, tecnologia e investimento para o empreendimento e o setor. 

Propomos a criação de valor na cadeia do resíduos orgânicos como forma de atingir melhor aproveitamento dos recursos naturais dentro do meio urbano, produzindo através da compostagem subprodutos como os compostos orgânicos sólido (adubo) e líquido (biofertilizante). 
Os nossos serviços incluem Coleta e tratamento de resíduos por planos de assinatura na cidade de São Lourenço do Sul; Consultorias para implantação de projetos de compostagem; Oficinas, palestras e mini cursos com recurso da ferramenta composteira didática. Os produtos incluem o Kit de compostagem doméstica de 45 litros e os Compostos orgânicos sólido e líquido.
Location: São Lourenço do Sul, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: Alpha Uv System

UV innovation is many times utilized where traditional chlorine sterilization can’t be applied and can be utilized in the high level oxidation process (AOP). Key advantages of UV innovation include: working on the taste, variety, pH, or smell of water, requiring no capacity, taking care of, or transportation of poisonous or destructive synthetics, powerful at inactivating many microorganisms including chlorine lenient microbes, and water reuse abilities to meet supportability goals.

Name: Raptor Recycle & Transfer

We knew this would provide a much cleaner, more efficient solution. Our patented process allows us to do this while still screening for hazardous waste. This is great, but how does it allow you to get on the road faster? Based in Worcester, our state-of-the-art facility holds all necessary Environment Agency permits and achieves an industry-leading 96% material recovery rate, far exceeding standard recycling methods. As solar energy adoption grows, so does the challenge of end-of-life panel waste. Without proper recycling, toxic materials can leach into landfills, and valuable resources like silicon, silver, and aluminum are lost. Pravas solves this through an innovative closed-loop process powered by renewable energy, ensuring every component is recovered without emissions.

Our advanced mechanical and chemical separation techniques efficiently break down panels into reusable materials: glass, aluminum, silicon, copper, and plastic. Unlike competitors who rely on energy-intensive shredding, our on-site processing minimizes carbon footprint while maximizing value. We offer tailored recycling services for solar farms, installers, and manufacturers, including collection logistics to streamline sustainability compliance.

Beyond environmental benefits, Pravas strengthens the UK’s energy independence by reducing reliance on imported raw materials. Our operations also support green job creation and align with national net-zero targets. With plans to expand capacity to 500,000+ panels annually by 2026, we’re pioneering a circular economy for the solar industry, where clean energy never becomes waste. 
Partner with Pravas to turn decommissioned panels into tomorrow’s renewable resources.

Name: Soil Systems
Description:
Soil Systems restores circularity in our natural environment by closing the loop between food waste and soil health. Currently, most restaurant and hospitality food waste ends up in landfill, releasing methane, a far more potent greenhouse gas than CO2. Meanwhile, UK soils are critically depleted, lacking in organic matter and storing just half of the carbon of healthy soils. 

Soil Systems has developed an alternative, circular solution where food waste from restaurants is fed back to our soils. Using an innovative fermentation method and rapid processing, the waste is transformed into nutrient-dense pellets, that lock in carbon and revitalise life in the earth.

Description:
'EnviroInvent Systems Pvt. Ltd.; has been founded under the aegis of 'LAHS Green India Pvt. Ltd.' with an intention to develop techniques and tools that can augment environment preservation for the generations to come. 'EnviroInvent' is a blend of technical, financial and commercial expertise with a singular objective: 'Sustainable Innovation', in alignment with our vision of a future where not only our resources are frugally and optimally used, but there is also a sense of responsibility towards the environment and a deep rooted respect for nature. 
Enviro Invent in association with LAHS Green India Pvt. Ltd., an ISO 9001:2008 certified company having extensive experience in Waste Management introduces a unique, indigenous, patented product - ‘Tow-Go’: - an ultimate solution to eliminate dumping grounds in India. 
Tow-go is an all-in-one, independent and multi-functional waste management vehicle. It is a moving Wet Waste Composter, which itself goes to the garbage, collects it and then shreds and dewaters it. Once the waste is collected, Tow-go is either on the move or parked at any convenient place for the digestion process where it converts the waste into dry, environment-friendly soil. Two – Go is 100% environment friendly green initiative.

Name: ZeroWaste Group
Description:
ZeroWaste Group began in 2008 with a goal to provide a sustainable solution to solve the worlds problems with recycling materials unfriendly to the environment.  Since then, our original plant has operated continuously for over 10 years using our proprietary "Sapphire" Thermolysis process to convert materials such as tires, plastics, medical waste, and others to their original forms such as Bio-Fuel, recovered carbon black, and other carbon.  We do this with NO measurable emissions into the atmosphere, which is the first of its kind.  Our process has been perfected over time so that we produce High-Grade Oil, High-Grade Recovered Carbon Black (rCB), and Bio-Char that enable our partners to achieve carbon neutrality as well as receive carbon credits.

ZeroWaste is now in an expansion phase bringing our technology and plants to other locations around the globe.

Description:

PLANES PERSONALIZADOS:

Nos adaptamos a las necesidades de cada cliente y cada planta. Analizamos los tipos de residuos y buscamos una solución óptima para cada uno, ayudando a resolver incluso situaciones que se puedan encontrar fuera de nuestras capacidades actuales. Buscamos brindar una solución hecha a la medida; un servicio que embone perfectamente con los requerimentos de cada cliente y socio comercial.


MATERIALES


PLÁSTICO: PET Botella, Cristal botella, Botella color, Preforma, PET garrafón, Policarbonato garrafón, Tapón de garrafón, Garrafa, Tote, Playo, Fleje, Rafia, Tarima plástica, Desperdicio de plástico duro.


CARTÓN: Corrugado, Caple / Multicapa, Sulfatado.


VIDRIO: Vidrio en diferentes presentaciones.


MADERA: Tarima, pedacería de madera.


OTROS: Rejilla metal, chatarra.



TRAZABILIDAD: Se lleva un control del proceso evolutivo de los materiales en cada una de sus etapas de reciclaje, hasta convertirse en producto terminado. Esta trazabilidad es la evidencia de que los materiales cumplen con el ciclo ecológico completo.

Actualmente tenemos presencia en Ciudad de México, Estado de México, Morelos, Michoacán y Tabasco.

Name: GWV Gesellschaft für Wertstoff-Verwertung mbH
Description:
Die Gesellschaft für Wertstoff-Verwertung mbH, kurz GWV genannt, gehört zu den Allroundern unter den Entsorgern im mittleren Neckarraum. Die GWV mbH ist ein renommierter Entsorgungsfachbetrieb und Rohstofflieferant in Baden-Württemberg mit 5 Standorten und 150 Mitarbeitern im Kreis Ludwigsburg. Zudem gehören noch 5 weitere Tochterunternehmen hinzu, durch die die Mitarbeiteranzahl auf über 300 Stück gestiegen ist.
Die Palette der Recyclingaktivitäten ist groß: sie reicht von der Bauschuttverwertung über die Kompostierung bis hin zur Herstellung von Hackschnitzel für Biomassekraftwerke. Sie wird ständig erweitert. Seit Gründung der GWV im Jahr 1990 mit Stammsitz in Remseck am Neckar lautet das Motto:
"Wir verwerten mit Sicherheit"
Um diesem Anspruch gerecht zu werden, hat die GWV in den letzten Jahren ein Netz von Sammelplätzen, Kompostier- und Sortieranlagen im Landkreis Ludwigsburg eingerichtet. Für den reibungslosen Betrieb sämtlicher Anlagen sorgen die GWV- Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter. Deren Engagement und Sachkompetenz sind der Garant für einen optimalen Service und schaffen die notwendige Vertrauensbasis für den Kunden.

In allen Recyclingfragen hat die GWV stets Pioniergeist bewiesen. Anlagen- und Verfahrenstechniken wurden ständig weiterentwickelt. Darüber hinaus hat die GWV zahlreiche Forschungs- und Untersuchungsprojekte initiiert und begleitet. Über Gesetzesänderungen hat die GWV frühzeitig informiert.
Die Zertifizierung als Entsorgungsfachbetrieb versteht sich für die GWV von selbst.
