Abbiamo elevato la tutela ambientale ricercando soluzioni ecosostenibili, sviluppando un Sistema di Gestione Ambientale ISO 14001:2015 nonché un Sistema di Gestione per la Qualità ISO 9001:2015.
E' in possesso del certificato n. 333-184/12 (Regolamento UE n. 333/2011).
L’impianto è autorizzato dall’Amministrazione Provinciale di Taranto, al trattamento dei veicoli fuori uso ed al trattamento e recupero di altri rifiuti, con abilitazione all’eventuale radiazione delle autovetture in ingresso.
Le attività gestite dalla nostra società sono le seguenti:
Trattamento di veicoli e mezzi fuori uso, industriali e non. 
Ritiro dei veicoli  e dei mezzi industriali da demolire con mezzi autorizzati.
Demolizione di impianti industriali; servizio di raccolta, trasporto, stoccaggio e recupero di rifiuti metallici ferrosi e non ferrosi.
Trasporto rifiuti  ferrosi e non anche eccezionali, rifiuti speciali pericolosi e non; offriamo un servizio di raccolta, trasporto, recupero e/o smaltimento di tutte le tipologie di rifiuti industriali pericolosi e non pericolosi prodotti da terzi e rientranti tra quelle appartenenti all’All. “A” dell’Autorizzazione Unica in nostro possesso. 
Nello specifico riciclaggio/recupero di cavi di rame.
La C.M.I. sud S.r.l., inoltre, è dotata di un cantiere Navale per la Manutenzione e la Demolizione di natanti fino a 60 mt. 
L'azienda acquista materiali ferrosi e non possedendo le attrezzature specifiche e le autorizzazioni al trattamento.
Infine effettua demolizioni industriali ed è disponibile a qualsiasi forma di collaborazione nell’ambito delle nostre competenze professionali.

Visit our store at 20222 FM 362 or check our website for more details.Pro Flo Aerobic Systems is a company that provides high-quality and affordable solutions for wastewater treatment. Pro Flo Aerobic Systems also has a sister company, Gatco Treatment Systems, that customizes and builds concrete septic tanks, pump tanks, and grease traps according to the customer's needs. Both companies are located in Waller, Texas, and have a store that offers a full line of aerobic and septic system products, such as pumps, control panels, drip emitters, gravelless pipe, PVC pipe and fittings, sprinkler heads, chlorine and chlorinators, decorative rocks, valve boxes, replacement aerators, and more. Customers can visit the store or call to place an order and receive fast and reliable service.

Pro Flo Aerobic Systems is committed to delivering excellent performance, reasonable prices, and years of worry-free and dependable operation for its customers. The company has several models of aerobic septic systems that can handle from 500 to 1500 gallons of sewage per day. Pro Flo Aerobic Systems is the best choice for wastewater treatment in Waller, Texas and beyond.

Name: Meldgaard Recycling US
Description:
US Solid Waste Authorities are under more pressure than ever to save costs and protect the environment. 

The good news is that you can simply slim your costs AND carbon footprint by Meldgaard processing the ash residue from your waste-to-energy plant.

5 ways we help

1.	We extract more metal from your ash than a W2E plant can

2.	We sell the extracted metal and transparently revenue share with you

3.	We treat the ash to make it into an aggregate to sell

4.	We shrink the amount of ash going to landfill by up to 75%

5.	We can mine your ash mono fills to further shrink volume & generate $$$

Meldgaard is already working with solid waste management authorities in the US to treat ash directly from their W2E plants.

There is no charge for Meldgaard to work with you. 

We make our money from sharing the revenue from metals extracted and aggregate produced.

Processing 1,200,000 tonnes of ash residue every year worldwide, we are true specialists in the field.

Meldgaard is the world leader in financing, designing, building and operating 3 types of ash recycling plants:

Mobile
Stationary
In W2E Plant

Contact us to see how ash processing can work for you too.

Not yet using a W2E plant, but considering commissioning one?  Get in touch early to make sure you have the facts about ash treatment.

Name: Carbon Custodians
Description:
Engineered in Australia. Unmatched in performance. Setting tomorrow's benchmarks today.

Carbon Custodians delivers revolutionary pyrolysis technology after decades of relentless engineering innovation. Our systems significantly outperform industry standards through proprietary flameless induction technology that enables precision temperature control, ensuring maximum carbon preservation with minimal energy input.

Our containerised mobile units transform waste into permanent carbon resources that sequester CO₂ for generations. Where others see waste, we create value:

- Process materials others can't. Extract value others won't.
- Continuous operation with no batch processing limitations
- Process high-moisture content biomass without pre-drying
- Self-sustaining operation after initial startup
- Bring processing directly to waste sources, eliminating transportation emissions

Our technology creates premium biochar products while generating verified carbon removal certificates. Through our Carbon Coin concept, we deliver precise measurement, verified sequestration, and true cost accounting where conventional carbon markets fall short.

We serve organisations across multiple sectors through flexible leasing arrangements that eliminate capital expenditure barriers while ensuring optimal system performance. 

Australian innovation. Local manufacturing. Global impact.

Transforming Today's Waste into Tomorrow's Legacy.

Our TDA REWAKE system recovers precious metals and rare earth elements from e-waste, while TDA MEDICWASTE safely sterilizes biohazardous materials on-site. Our unrivaled leadership team combines diverse expertise, visionary thinking, and an unwavering commitment to sustainability. Don't let waste hold you back – unlock its potential with Biomark Inc. Join us in unlocking the untapped potential of waste and creating a greener, more prosperous future. Name: LA Shaimos
Description:
We are a Los Angeles-based organization dedicated to help the Jewish community solve its shaimos problem. In Jewish tradition religious objects such as Torah scrolls and prayer books that are damaged, unusable, or no longer needed must be disposed of in a respectful manner, as they are considered sacred. Proper disposal methods can include burying the shaimos in a designated area, or placing it in a special storage area for eventual burial. Unfortunately, the Los Angeles Jewish community never created a system to handle its shaimos and years worth of sacred texts began to pile up. Late in 2021 LA Shaimos began its operations providing a crucial service to the Jewish community. 

Our mission is to help families, synagogues, schools, and religious organizations minimize and properly dispose of their shaimos in a convenient respectful  manner. We began by shipping large amounts of shaimos to neighboring states and when that became too much we opened a 2.5 acre site where shaimos can be disposed of respectfully. Our team understands the significance of shaimos, and we handle each collection with the utmost care and sensitivity. When you choose LA Shaimos, you can trust that your shaimos will be treated with the respect and expertise it deserves.

Binovate: Revolutionizing Recycling and Waste Management 

Binovate is an innovative, intelligent recycling bin designed to transform how we recycle and manage waste. Binovate is at the forefront of sustainable living solutions with its cutting-edge technology and user-centric design.

Key Features of Binovate:
 Smart Waste Sorting: Binovate utilizes advanced sensors and artificial intelligence to automatically sort different types of waste, reducing contamination and improving recycling efficiency.

 Data-Driven Insights: Binovate generates valuable data and insights on recycling habits, waste composition, and environmental impact, enabling informed decision-making and targeted sustainability initiatives.
 Seamless Integration: Binovate seamlessly integrates with existing waste management systems, ensuring efficient collection, transportation, and processing of recyclables.

We are passionate about creating a greener future, and Binovate is our step towards a more sustainable world. Join us in embracing this innovative solution, and let's work together to make a lasting impact on the environment. Together, we can build a future where recycling is smart, efficient, and accessible to all. #Binovate #Sustainability #RecyclingRevolution #WasteManagement

Name: MRG Rückbau und Recycling GmbH
Description:

Bereits Anfang der 1990er Jahre gegründet, verfügt unser traditionsreicher Familienbetrieb über die notwendige Expertise, um mit aktuellsten Verwertungsverfahren ganzheitliche Entsorgungslösungen zu gestalten und das Stoffstrommanagement unserer Kunden zu optimieren. 

Mit derzeit 55 kompetenten Mitarbeitern, großem Fuhrpark und rund 1.000 Containern ist MRG Entsorgung hervorragend aufgestellt, alle Herausforderungen bei der

Abfallentsorgung, der Gewinnung von Sekundärrohstoffen, der Entwicklung innovativer Recyclingprodukte sowie der Versorgung mit alternativen Energieträgern anzunehmen.
 

Schwerpunkte unserer Tätigkeit sind der Ankauf von Schrott und Metallen, die Verwertung von Altholz und Grünschnitt, die Entsorgung von Gewerbe-, einschließlich Sonderabfällen sowie der Handel mit regenerativen Brennstoffen, z.B. Holzbriketts oder Hackschnitzeln. 
Unsere Dienstleistungen schließen aber auch den Rückbau und Werkstoffanalysen sowie alle Bereiche der Abfall- und Recyclingberatung bzw. -schulung ein.

Name: FirstFruits Environmental Services Ltd. CIC
Description:
One man’s trash is another man’s treasure

Based at the Raines' Foundation Building in Bethnal Green, East London, First Fruits will collect green garden waste, waste food and waste construction wood and convert this to compost, charcoal, biochar and other sellable commodities including organically-produced vegetables and edible mushrooms, wooden furniture and timber.
FirstFruits provides volunteer and employment opportunities to marginalised people in East London, offering people practical experience to grow their skills and gain employment, or simply expand their social network and be a part of something positive for our community.
The choice of Raine’s Foundation School as the potential site for First Fruits is to honour the school and what it has achieved over the past 300 years and its founder Henry Raines and continue his and the school’s legacy in East London for years to come.

Turning back climate change, one street at a time

The first phase of the project is building a community composting site at Raine’s. This will receive waste from landscaping contractors, private individuals and small food producers. Composting will be done in open windrows, with worms and anaerobically with effective microorganisms in a process called bokashi.
A no-dig vegetable garden will be developed using compost generated on site, and FirstFruits will also set up a mushroom farm that will process waste coffee, wood chippings, sawdust and cardboard to cultivate gourmet mushrooms for the restaurant trade.
The project will provide employment, mentoring and training to individuals on the margins of society: people affected by homelessness, people with mental health or addiction issues, individuals that have passed through the criminal justice system, or vulnerable young people.

Name: ADEE - Alliance for Decarbonisation and Energy Efficiency
Description:
Alliance for Decarbonisation and Energy Efficiency (ADEE) is a non-profit organization based in Romania, dedicated to accelerating the transition toward a low-carbon, energy-efficient, and resilient economy.

ADEE acts as a collaborative platform connecting universities, public authorities, companies, technology providers, and civil society to design and implement practical solutions for decarbonisation and sustainable energy use. Our focus is on real-world impact—transforming strategies, studies, and policies into implementable projects.

Our key areas of action include:
	•	Energy efficiency in buildings and infrastructure
	•	Decarbonisation and renewable energy solutions
	•	Development of Energy Communities, in line with European and national legislation
	•	Professional training and capacity building
	•	Project preparation and access to financing

ADEE supports the analysis of existing studies, identification of optimal technical solutions, and facilitation of dialogue between stakeholders involved in implementation and funding. We act as a neutral catalyst, enabling informed decision-making and sustainable partnerships without commercial bias.

Through pilot projects, education, and strategic collaborations, ADEE contributes to the objectives of the European Green Deal, the Paris Agreement, and the UN Sustainable Development Goals, supporting local resilience, energy democracy, and long-term sustainability.

Name: Avashisht Shakti

About Us

Avashisht Shakti Pvt. Ltd. is a pioneering cleantech startup based in Delhi, India, transforming municipal solid waste into clean energy through innovative mobile plasma gasification systems. By combining electric on-board segregation vehicles (Vardaan) equipped with robotic manipulators and a compact plasma gasifier, we deliver decentralized, on-the-ground waste-to-energy solutions that drastically reduce landfill dependency and emissions.

Our vision is to build a scalable, smart, and sustainable ecosystem for urban waste management—one that integrates robotics, AI, and circular economy principles to create measurable environmental and societal impact.

Mission

To revolutionize urban waste processing by deploying smart, energy-efficient, and scalable infrastructure that:

Enables on-the-spot segregation with AI-enabled robotic systems.

Converts waste into syngas and clean energy via compact plasma gasification.

Reduces carbon emissions and landfill burden.

Promotes a circular economy and green urban operations.

Core Values

Innovation: Merging robotics, AI, and plasma tech for real-world impact.

Sustainability: Creating energy solutions that respect people and planet.

Scalability: Starting city-wise, expanding regionally.

Collaboration: Partnering with municipal bodies, environmentalists, funders, and tech experts.

Why Join Us?

Be part of a visionary cleantech startup building real-world impact in sustainability and robotics.

Engage in cross-disciplinary innovation—robotics, AI, engineering, and research all under one roof.

Grow with us—from a lean core team to a market leader in decentralized waste-to-energy.

Located in the vibrant innovation ecosystem of Delhi, India.

Name: Yellow submarine recycling, s.r.o.
Description:
Our pyrolysis plant utilizes a horizontal rotary drum reactor to convert rubber and plastic waste into valuable by-products, including pyrolysis oil, carbon black, syngas, and steel cord. The plant processes around 20 tons of waste per day, which amounts to over 5,000 tons annually, thanks to its two reactors.

Rubber waste recycling (e.g., tires) results in:

• 30-45% pyrolysis oil

• 20-30% carbon black

• 10-15% syngas

• 10-15% steel cord

Plastic waste recycling generates:

• 55-80% pyrolysis oil

• 3-8% carbon black

• 10-12% syngas

The process starts with raw material loading (no pre-grinding required), followed by heating and pyrolysis. As the temperature rises, the material decomposes, releasing gases that are separated. Heavy fractions condense into pyrolysis oil, while non-condensable gases are used to fuel the reactor. Any excess gas is burned off in a secondary chamber, with emissions cleaned through a scrubber before being released into the atmosphere.

After pyrolysis, carbon black is unloaded, packed, or processed further, and steel cord is removed for resale or further treatment. This technology ensures efficient recycling and energy recovery while maintaining a low environmental footprint .

ESG Leadership: Eliminates dioxin formation, reduces greenhouse gases by 99% vs incineration, and diverts waste from landfills. Creates green jobs while ensuring community safety through emission-free operation. Fully compliant with EPA and regulatory standards.

Turning Waste into Value
With PYROLY, we redefine the value of waste by offering sustainable fuel and energy production solutions. Our state-of-the-art systems can convert various waste materials including municipal solid waste, oil sludge, tires, plastics, organic waste, medical waste, agricultural waste, and more into valuable products such as pyrolysis oil, carbon black, liquid CO2, heat, and electricity.

Customized Solutions for Optimal Efficiency
Our PYROLY-EKOPYR complexes are tailored to meet the specific needs of our clients, ensuring the most cost-efficient production possible. Whether it's for industrial applications or smaller-scale projects, our technology guarantees complete environmental friendliness and maximum utilization efficiency.

Commercial Viability and Environmental Impact
By harnessing waste for fuel and energy production, our solutions not only reduce reliance on traditional methods but also contribute significantly to environmental preservation. With high-quality fuel products generated from waste, our clients can enjoy both economic profitability and environmental sustainability.

Empowering Energy Independence
Our PYROLY-EKOPYR plants offer infrastructure solutions that promote energy independence. By embracing Waste to Energy technologies, companies and countries can reduce their dependence on fossil fuels and imported energy sources, thereby mitigating environmental impact and fostering sustainable development.

Nós acreditamos na importância de inovar constantemente e, por isso, investimos em pesquisa e desenvolvimento de novas tecnologias, em parceria com universidades e organizações sem fins lucrativos. Nosso compromisso é sempre oferecer soluções que maximizem a eficiência com o mínimo de recursos, promovendo uma relação harmoniosa entre o ser humano e a natureza. Our Expertise

Wastewater Treatment: Our advanced wastewater treatment systems effectively remove contaminants and pollutants from municipal and industrial wastewater, ensuring compliance with environmental regulations.
Water Purification: Our water purification solutions deliver clean, safe, and potable water for residential, commercial, and industrial applications.
Process Water Treatment: We offer tailored solutions for specific industrial processes, such as cooling water treatment, boiler feedwater treatment, and chemical process water treatment.
Our Products and Services
Our product line encompasses a wide range of equipment, including:
Membrane systems: Reverse osmosis, nanofiltration, and ultrafiltration membranes for efficient separation and purification.
Biological treatment systems: Aerobic and anaerobic treatment processes for organic matter removal.
Chemical treatment systems: Coagulation, flocculation, and disinfection processes for contaminant removal.

Name: Lithium Battery Containers Ltd
Description:
Lithium-Ion Batteries: Powerful, Useful…but Hazardous....

Most lithium-ion batteries are generally safe but contain a lot of energy. If pierced, damaged, or defective, they are prone to dangerous reactions and rapid disassembly. Lithium-ion batteries therefore present a fire or explosion hazard from a thermal runaway event. The heat can quickly reach 2,000 C and propagate to adjacent modules and cells, so it is very dangerous and difficult to extinguish.

The Lithium Battery container has been tested following the United Nations’ Recommendations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods. The tests included drop tests at 1.8 metres, and a stacking test with 3 boxes stacked on top of each other and loaded with 1,800 kg for 24 hours.

The tests concluded that no flame or projectiles exited the package, the structural integrity was maintained, the emissions were managed, and the external temperature of the box did not exceed 100 oC. The packaging therefore met the requirements of ADR Packing Instruction P911 for damaged or defective lithium-ion cells and batteries. Vehicle Certification Agency (VCA) Certification The drop and stack test, plus the thermal runaway event test have been assessed by the VCA, and a ‘Certificate of Packaging Performance’ has been issued to confirm that the packaging design type has been tested by an accredited laboratory and has satisfied the relevant test requirements.

KSIDC established KEIL as a Special Purpose Vehicle with participation of 85 industries in the State. M/s United Phosphorus Ltd (now UPL Limited) was appointed as Developers for the project. UPL Limited and its group companies with a contribution of Rs. 6.51 crores, has the majority equity in the Company.

The Company is functioning at the 50 acres of land purchased in the name of Govt. of Kerala from FACT-Cochin Division, and leased to KEIL for 50 years. The company disposes hazardous waste generated in various industries in Kerala State in engineered landfills.

Name: Polirem
Description:
L’attività di Polirem si fonda sul riciclo del polistirolo.
Il polistirolo compattato trasformato in granulo viene utilizzato per la produzione di nuovi materiali plastici, come ad esempio i pannelli isolanti per l’edilizia e molti altri prodotti in commercio.
Si tratta di un circolo virtuoso che ha alla base una corretta differenziazione e separazione dei rifiuti riciclabili, evitando la strada dello smaltimento in discarica (costoso e dannoso per l’ambiente), a favore di un recupero delle materie prime secondarie che sia quanto più ecologico ed economico.
L’EPS di scarto può essere riciclato e riutilizzato all’infinito, senza mai finire in discarica creando valore in tutte le fasi di trasformazione.
Polirem srl è registrata all’Albo Nazionale Gestori Ambientali.
Protocollo n. 120285/2022 – Iscrizione n. MI78825 Sezione regionale della Lombardia, Categoria 8 Classe F.
In qualità di Intermediario Rifiuti autorizzato, possiamo acquistare il polistirolo direttamente dall’azienda (produttore del rifiuto) e cederlo all’impianto che offre le migliori condizioni di mercato in quel preciso momento.
Infatti le quotazioni del polistirolo dipendono da molti fattori, tra i quali in particolare: dimensione dei blocchi, densità di compattazione, provenienza e qualità del materiale, presenza di impurità (ad esempio resti di altri rifiuti), quantità di rifiuto per singolo carico, fattori logistici e, soprattutto, quotazione di mercato della materia prima (granulo vergine).
Rivolgendosi a Polirem sarà possibile monetizzare anche blocchi di polistirolo provenienti dalle cassette del pesce, da altri settori della GDO (si pensi ad esempio agli imballaggi di prodotti di elettronica), da scarti e ritagli di cappotto e altri prodotti isolanti impiegati in edilizia (anche di colore grigio/nero e con grafite, purché privi di residui cementizi), così come da seminiere, pannelli e contenitori utilizzati nel settore  orto-floro-vivaistico (purché adeguatamente ripuliti da residui e impurità).

  - Lập báo cáo đề xuất giấy phép môi trường;
  - Lập báo cáo đánh giá tác động môi trường (ĐTM);
  - Lập báo cáo công tác bảo vệ môi trường;
  - Lập báo cáo xác nhận hoàn thành công trình bảo vệ môi trường.
2. Thiết kế, thi công lắp đặt công trình môi trường
  - Thiết kế, thi công, vận hành, bảo trì hệ thống xử lý nước thải các loại;
  - Sản xuất thiết bị xử lý nước thải sinh hoạt và y tế.
  - Xử lý nước cấp cho các khu công nghiệp, khu dân cư, khu đô thị, nhà hàng, khách sạn, khu du lịch.
  - Xử lý nước uống đóng chai, nước nhiễm phèn, nhiễm mặn, khử trùng, làm mềm nước.
  - Thi công hệ thống cấp và thoát nước các loại.
3. Cung cấp máy móc thiết bị, vi sinh môi trường
  - Cung cấp hóa chất, vi sinh xử lý nước thải, vi sinh khử mùi bãi rác, vi sinh xử lý nitơ, vi sinh xử lý dầu mỡ, vi sinh xử lý bùn, giảm bùn thải.
  - Cung cấp thiết bị, máy móc quan trắc: Thiết bị quan trắc tự động nước thải, nước mặt, nước ngầm và không khí, ống khói thải.

Name: Lasanhoff Services, LLC
Description:
Title: Transforming Tires for a Sustainable Tomorrow

Overview:
Lasanhoff Services is a pioneering force in the tire recycling industry, driven by a mission to significantly diminish the state's scrap tire footprint. We specialize in grinding tires into high-quality rubber chips and powder, providing valuable raw materials to various industries. What sets us apart is our commitment to accessibility through the utilization of portable tire recyclers, enabling us to reach sites that lack traditional recycling resources.

Mission:
Our core mission is rooted in the reduction of scrap tire waste in the state. By employing advanced tire grinding technologies, we aim to convert discarded tires into versatile rubber chips and powder. These materials, in turn, serve as valuable resources for other industries, contributing to a more sustainable and eco-friendly future.

Services:
Lasanhoff Services leverages state-of-the-art portable tire recyclers to bring tire recycling solutions directly to sites that may otherwise lack the means for effective material recycling. Our on-site processing capabilities make tire recycling a viable option for a broader range of locations, enhancing overall environmental sustainability.

Future Goals:
Looking ahead, our vision extends beyond the reduction of state scrap tire footprints. We aspire to play a pivotal role in national tire waste reduction by implementing innovative processes. Our focus includes transforming recycled materials into fuel for power plants, thereby contributing to the clean energy sector. Additionally, we are actively exploring pyrolysis as a means to make our warehouse operations self-sustaining, aligning our practices with long-term environmental and economic sustainability.

Lasanhoff Services is dedicated to pushing the boundaries of tire recycling, demonstrating that environmental responsibility and industrial progress can go hand in hand. Join us in our journey towards a greener, more sustainable future.

Description:

Eko Serwis Szczecin jest siłą zespołu, który realizuje szereg niezwykle istotnych zadań. Nasza kadra posiaada wieloletnie doświadczenie w zakresie ochrony środowiska, logistyki i zarządzania. Dzięki temu w profesjonalny sposób oraz w zgodzie z duchem ekologii potrafimy podjąć współpracę dostosowaną do indywidualnych potrzeb klienta. Standardem już stała się wysoka jakość reprezentująca europejski poziom. Nasze dokonania w zakresie gospodarki odpadami sprawiły, że zostaliśmy uhonorowani tytułem „Partnera Polskiej Ekologii” w Narodowym Konkursie Ekologicznym „Przyjaźni środowisku” pod Honorowym Patronatem Prezydenta RP. Odznaczenie to jest dowodem naszej odpowiedzialnej postawy wobec prowadzonej działalności, ale też zobowiązuje do podejmowania dalszych, większych wyzwań.

W Eko Serwis Szczecin świadczymy usługi odbioru i zagospodarowania odpadów, dbając o środowisko naturalne. Odbiór i utylizacja odpadów oraz nieczystości płynnych stał się naszą zawodową misją. Działamy z zachowaniem wszelkich restrykcyjnych norm bezpieczeństwa. Nasi klienci mogą liczyć na profesjonalizm oraz sprawną realizację usługi. Specjalizujemy się zarówno w transporcie oraz zagospodarowaniu odpadów niebezpiecznych jak również innych niż niebezpieczne. Nasza praca to misja, gospodarowanie odpadami zatem służy społeczeństwu oraz planecie Ziemia i w tym kierunku z pełną odpowiedzialnością realizujemy powierzone nam zadania.

Name: ARGUSS, s.r.o.
Description: Arguss s.r.o. je spoľahlivým partnerom pre profesionálne nakladanie s odpadmi a recyklačné technológie na celom území Slovenska. Od roku 1994 poskytujeme komplexné riešenia – od zberu a prepravy až po materiálové a energetické zhodnotenie odpadov najrôznejších druhov. Naše portfólio zahŕňa recykláciu elektroodpadu s vysokou mierou využitia medi, hliníka, železa či skla, dekontamináciu zemín kontaminovaných ropnými látkami, spracovanie priemyselných kalov a odpadových vôd, kompostovanie biologicky rozložiteľných odpadov, riešenie havarijných stavov a starých ekologických záťaží, bezpečné odstraňovanie azbestu zo stavieb a čistenie priemyselných lapačov olejov a tukov. V roku 2024 sme inštalovali mobilný drvič s kapacitou viac než 47 000 tón stavebného a biologického odpadu ročne, a od roku 2025 spúšťame unikátnu technológiu na čistenie odpadových vôd od emulgovaných znečisťujúcich látok – jedinú svojho druhu na Slovensku. Ako zakladajúci členovia Asociácie podnikateľov v odpadovom hospodárstve (APOH) a Asociácie spracovateľov elektroodpadu (ASEO) sa riadime prísnymi normami kvality, čo potvrdzujú naše certifikáty ISO 14001:2015, ISO 9001:2015 a ISO 45001:2018. Sme hrdou súčasťou skupiny Green Partners Holding, kde spoločne budujeme cirkulárnu ekonomiku a chránime životné prostredie modernými technológiami a zodpovedným prístupom.

Name: SAVE THE FARMS Co.,Ltd.
Description:
Save the Farms is an innovative agri-tech company pioneering sustainable agriculture through circular economy solutions.
We transform waste resources into high-quality biochar, and harness the residual heat generated during its production to power advanced smart farm systems. This integrated approach enables eco-friendly cultivation of crops while minimizing environmental impact.

By combining waste-to-resource technology, precision farming, and smart distribution strategies, we aim to revolutionize food supply chains—delivering fresher, safer, and more sustainable produce to global markets.

Our mission is to connect farms, data, and markets while addressing climate change, improving resource efficiency, and ensuring food security. From biochar production to smart farming, we create a closed-loop system that redefines the future of agriculture.

Core Areas:

Waste-to-Resource & Biochar Production

Waste Heat Recovery & Smart Farm Systems

Eco-Friendly Crop Cultivation

Sustainable Agri-Food Supply Chain Innovation

Tagline: From Waste to Taste – Smart, Sustainable, Scalable

Il nostro Forno di lavora in assenza totale di ossigeno per lo smaltimento di rifiuto urbano (19.12.12) in grado di processare, ad esempio, circa 1.000-1.200 Kg./h di plastica triturata e non contenente metalli. Dall’Impianto si ricavano i seguenti sotto prodotti:

Olio combustibile in misura di circa 60% del peso di plastica processata, riutilizzabile interamente da 2 appositi gruppi elettrogeni bi-fuel in grado di produrre oltre 1 MW/h di energia elettrica.
Syngas che viene riutilizzato dai gruppi bi-fuel per sfruttare il basso potere calorico e ridurre il consumo di olio combustibile.

Name: BOABOB RECURSOS RECICLADOS - INDÚSTRIA E COMÉRCIO, LDA
Description:
BOABOB RECURSOS RECICLADOS - Nada se perde, tudo se transforma! 

A BOABOB RECURSOS RECICLADOS - INDÚSTRIA E COMÉRCIO, (SU), LDA é uma empresa angolana especializada no tratamento e reciclagem de resíduos de pneus, transformando materiais descartados em recursos valiosos para a indústria. Nosso compromisso é com a sustentabilidade e a inovação, contribuindo para a preservação do meio ambiente e o desenvolvimento econômico do país.

 O que fazemos?
Através de processos avançados de reciclagem, extraímos e comercializamos três produtos principais a partir de pneus inservíveis:
 Negro de carbono – Reutilizado em tintas, plásticos e novos compostos de borracha.
 Óleo combustível industrial – Alternativa sustentável para diversos setores industriais.
 Fios metálicos – Fornecidos para indústrias siderúrgicas e de construção.

 Nosso impacto:

Redução da poluição ambiental causada pelo descarte inadequado de pneus.
Geração de energia renovável e reaproveitamento de materiais essenciais.
Fomento à economia circular e ao desenvolvimento sustentável em Angola.
 Nosso compromisso:
Na BOABOB, acreditamos que o futuro depende das ações que tomamos hoje. Nosso objetivo é minimizar o impacto ambiental dos resíduos, promovendo soluções inovadoras e responsáveis para a reciclagem industrial.

 Junte-se a nós!
Seja como parceiro, cliente ou apoiador da sustentabilidade, estamos prontos para transformar desafios em oportunidades. Vamos juntos construir um mundo onde nada se perde e tudo se transforma!

#Reciclagem #Sustentabilidade #EconomiaCircular #Inovação #BOABOB

La satisfaction et la confiance de nos clients sont au cœur de tout ce que nous faisons.

La réactivité est notre maître-mot, nous comprenons l'urgence souvent associée à la gestion des déchets dangereux, c'est pourquoi nous nous engageons à être rapides dans nos actions et à répondre rapidement aux demandes de nos clients. Notre équipe est là pour fournir un soutien et des solutions dès qu'ils en ont besoin.

Rejoignez-nous chez Senice Environnement et ensemble, contribuons à un avenir plus propre et plus sûr pour les générations à venir. Contactez-nous dès aujourd'hui pour découvrir comment nous pouvons répondre à vos besoins en matière de gestion des déchets dangereux.

Name: Ecogreet
Description:
Ecogreet is bringing broken windshield and other glass into recycling chain.
Windshields are made of laminated glass, consisting of two glass layers with a Polyvinyl Butyral (PVB) interlayer.
- Recycling windshields involves separating the glass and PVB layers, which can be reused in various applications.
- Windshield recycling helps reduce waste, saves energy, and conserves raw materials.

Glass Recycling:

- Glass is 100% recyclable and can be recycled endlessly without losing its quality.
- Recycling glass saves energy, reduces greenhouse gas emissions, and conserves raw materials.
- Glass recycling helps reduce waste and supports sustainable development.

Name: SARL TOP ENVIRO
Description:
consommation puisque nous sommes plus nombreux sur terre ; notre planète se retrouve étouffée face à l'explosion sans précédent des quantités de déchets générés par diverses activités surtout anthropiques et dont la multiplication des efforts pour la réduction à la source, la valorisation ou bien encore l'élimination demeure impérative pour aboutir aux objectif du développement durable.
C'est de cela qu'est née la volonté de TOP ENVIRO d'épauler l'ensemble des intervenants à la question de la protection de l'environnement en Algérie, par la création d'une structure intégrale de gestion des déchets ; dans l'optique de constituer un maillon solide dans la chaine de l'économie circulaire et de se positionner comme un partenaire incontournable pour ce qui est de l'élimination des déchets ; dits dangereux et spéciaux dangereux par incinération.
La station d'incinération sophistiquée d'une capacité d'élimination spectaculaire, égale à deux "02"tonnes/heure, conçue pour les déchets solides et liquides les plus complexes, est composée d'un four rotatif abritant un foyer de combustion de trente « 30 m3 », suivi d'une chambre de combustion.
Soucieuse de la qualité des rejets et au respect des normes techniques et réglementaires exigées par les lois en vigueur, la société "SARL TOP ENVIRO" a équipée l'incinérateur d'une centrale d'épuration conçue de multiples chambres et colonnes pour le lavage de fumées ; incluant des technologies innovantes, ainsi que d'un dispositif de filtration avant rejet ; barrière aux polluants.

Name: Junk Labz
Description:
Currently, US  plastic recycling has a success rate of only 5%, equating to 48 million tons of plastic waste ending up in landfills or nature. This failure is due to the  long relay race of recycling handoffs which lacks transparency, usually ends in landfills and if it does work, only produces more single use plastic. Instead we are working to implement our own recycling service that does it all, starting from scratch, to learn the problems of the field and work hands-on to test our assumptions.

After many failures and lessons learned, I’m happy to share that we have set up an operational recycling program in Charlottesville where we take #5 plastic, the plastic type usually found as bottle caps and yogurt containers, but for us it’s in the form of pipette boxes from UVA research labs. A common waste stream in labs across the country. Due to a lack of #5 plastic recycling in Charlottesville, UVA would have sent these boxes to North Carolina to be processed. Through our established process, UVA collects, sorts, shreds, and melts this waste in our one stop shop to transform this wasted waste into a usable form. We started with this simple form of plastic, these boxes, to perfect the process before opening to consumer waste. Since receiving the shredding machinery in 2023 from a Jefferson Trust grant, we have shredded 1300 lbs of #5 plastic waste, and are now looking to build out our manufacturing capabilities.

In Fall 2024, we collaborated with JT Bachman and the UVA Architecture school’s ARCH 5500: Processing the Anthropocene. This course had students learn our recycling process through sorting boxes, shredding and crushing the waste into refined shreds, experimenting with melting and extruding techniques, creating their own 3ft x 3ft sheet of plastic, and constructing a final build from the recycling plastic for a final review. Bachman executed an excellent incorporation of the recycling process we have worked to create, and plans to teach the course Fall 2025.

Für wen ist das ruBio-System?

Die Vorteile von ruBio: Umweltfreundlich, effizient, kostensparend

Unser System verbessert Hygiene und Arbeitsabläufe, spart Kosten und reduziert CO₂-Emissionen. Durch den Wegfall von Kühlungen und die Abschaffung der "Restetonne" leisten wir einen aktiven Beitrag zum Umweltschutz.

Zertifiziert nach ISO 14001: Umweltzertifizierung gewährleistet

ruBio-System erfüllt HSP-Normen und ist ISO 14001-zertifiziert, garantiert umweltfreundliche Entsorgung in Biogasanlagen.

Investition in die Zukunft: Kosten, Finanzierung und Integration

Die Kosten variieren je nach Größe und können gekauft, geleast oder gemietet werden. Mit Kosteneinsparungen im Vergleich zur herkömmlichen Abfallentsorgung ist ruBio-System eine Investition in die Zukunft.

Name: PMI Restaurant Service Inc.
Description:
Our company excels in eco-friendly management, processing of used cooking oil, and comprehensive grease trap and restaurant equipment cleaning. We are dedicated to offering green solutions to the food service industry, ensuring operational efficiency and compliance with environmental standards.

At our core, we specialize in refining used cooking oil. Using advanced techniques, we transform waste oil into high-quality products, significantly reducing environmental impact and adding value to previously discarded materials. Our refining process includes filtering, degumming, neutralization, bleaching, and deodorization, ensuring the final product meets top-quality standards.

We also provide specialized grease trap cleaning services, essential for food service establishments to prevent blockages and ensure proper waste disposal. Our expertise extends to general restaurant equipment cleaning, where we use eco-friendly methods to maintain hygiene and safety standards, contributing to kitchen efficiency.

Sustainability is a key focus in our operations. We continuously seek innovative ways to minimize environmental impact, from refining processes to waste reduction in cleaning. Our commitment to eco-friendly practices is integrated into every aspect of our work.

Customer satisfaction is central to our approach. We build strong relationships with our clients, offering tailored solutions to their specific needs. Our team of skilled professionals is dedicated to providing reliable, high-quality service, fostering trust and long-term partnerships.

In summary, our company is a leader in sustainable waste management and equipment maintenance in the food service industry, combining environmental responsibility with operational excellence.

Im Winter muss das Abstreuen und Räumen der Straßen von Eis und Schnee gewährleistet sein.

Wir arbeiten für Städte und Kommunen, für Siedlungsgesellschaften, Industrie und Gewerbebetriebe lt. entsprechender Stadtsatzung oder individueller Vereinbarung. Wir betreuen seit Jahren große Open Air Veranstaltungen und Motorsportevents, Weihnachtsmärkte, Karnevals- und Rosenmontagsumzüge.

Neben der Reinigung der Veranstaltungsflächen bei Großveranstaltungen, stellen wir Ihnen auch sanitäre Anlagen zur Verfügung. Vor, während und nach der Veranstaltung sind wir für die Bewachung zuständig.

Auch für Ihre Reinigungs- oder Entsorgungsaufgaben sind wir kompetenter Ansprechpartner.

Wir sind zertifizierter Entsorgungsfachbetrieb nach Kreislaufwirtschaftsgesetz.

Name: La huerta del fuego
Description:
La Huerta del Fuego es un proceso comunitario de agricultura urbana en donde desarrollamos actividades de siembra, procesamiento de residuos orgánicos y pedagogía en torno a temas como la etnobotánica, crisis climática, problemas socio-ambientales, entre otros. Es un proceso colectivo autogestivo sin ánimo de lucro. Lo que nos motiva a cuidar y trabajar la tierra es nuestra convicción para realizar acciones asertivas frente al cambio climático y todas las problemáticas socioambientales que debemos tramitar como sociedad; creemos que el tejido social es el gran pilar para realizar los grandes cambios que nos demanda la naturaleza. 
La Huerta como espacio y proceso colectivo surge en agosto de 2020 como resultado de la juntanza de amigxs y vecinxs que decidimos pasar de las ideas a las acciones. Con el tiempo este proyecto nos ha enseñado el valor de cuidar y trabajar la tierra, y de las acciones colectivas. La Huerta es un lugar de encuentro donde se nutren las ideas y los sueños, un lugar que poco a poco se ha llenado de plantas, insectos, formas, aromas, colores, personas y la calidez de un segundo hogar, hemos hecho de un pastizal un lugar mágico. 
El grupo que lidera La Huerta es diverso y hemos descubierto el gran valor de compartir y de la enseñanza- aprendizaje, por ello la pedagogía desde el comenzo ha sido transversal. Desarrollamos encuentros y talleres en conjuntos para motivar a más personas a cuidar y trabajar la tierra; realizamos ollas comunitarias para que el encuentro en lo público sea más cálido; vemos en la diversidad un gran tesoro y que toda esta diversidad de personas y seres se encuentren en lo público es algo que nos da paz y nos ayuda aligerar la carga de lo urbano y del día a día.

Name: MASSRR e-Neermalya LLP
Description:
We are an emerging e-Waste Management Company with strong capabilities and focus on Electronic, Electrical & Instrumentation Waste (e-Waste) Collection, Processing and Disposal. 

The company has established its strong base in Mumbai, and shall strive to expand to other geographies in near future. MASSRR e-Neermalya LLP, primarily focuses on e-Waste generated by households, commercial establishments, private & Government Institutions, and Urban Local Bodies. We have a strong and top-notch process for generating awareness among the E-Waste Generators, conducting events for improving the collection, segregation of e-Waste, and processing / disposal of the same with Environmentally friendly methods. With only ~ 5% of E-Waste getting scientifically disposed of in urban societies in India, and an anticipated exponential rise in generation of E-Waste across the country, there is a dire need to develop and sustain large capacity to cater to the e-Waste Management. We work in close coordination with the Regulatory Authorities like; MPCB, CPCB and The Ministry of Environment & Forest (Government of India) to ensure appropriate compliances to the stringent norms for disposal of hazardous substances during the disposal process of e-Waste. Moreover, soon, MASSRR e-Neermalya LLP plans to induct their own State-of-the-art e-Waste processing / disposal facility to achieve the scale and processing efficiency. 

We cover entire range of e-Waste viz.; white goods, Information Technology products / instruments, Electrical appliances, and power / distribution equipment / components. 

We have a well experienced and qualified team with more than 200 man-years of experience. The Leadership team comprises of Post Graduates, Engineers, with Environmental Engineering and Waste Management specialization. Our office and warehouse is situated in Mumbai. MASSRR e-Neermalya LLP has all necessary approvals and licenses.

Name: ZEWA Madagascar
Description:
ZEWA Madagascar is a dedicated e-waste collection and preprocessing company operating under the umbrella of the ZEWA Group (Zero E-Waste Africa). As a strategic arm of ZEWA in the Indian Ocean region, we are committed to tackling the growing challenge of electronic waste (e-waste) in Madagascar through safe structured and well sustainable practices.

We plays a critical role in the regional implementation of ZEWA Group's vision: to establish a circular economy for electronics in Africa by promoting safe recycling, resource recovery, and zero environmental harm. We also operates with a strong commitment towards environmental sustainability, public health, and regulatory compliance, we aligns our practices with the Basel Convention on the Control of Transboundary Movements of Hazardous Wastes and Their Disposal, ensuring that all activities involving hazardous electronic components are carried out responsibly and legally.
Our Mission Is :
“To create a sustainable, zero e-waste future in Madagascar by leading the way in a safer, legal, and responsible manner while becoming a model for responsible e-waste management in the Indian Ocean region."

# We Provide :
1. Collection & Logistics : 
We offer on-site pickup with secure transport to ensure safe and efficient        e-waste collection.
2. Data Security & ITAD : 
We offer certified data wiping with compliance reporting to protect sensitive information.
3. Recycling & Processing:
 We perform safe dismantling,recovery & hazardous waste treatment in line with the Basel Convention.
4. Compliance & Certification:
Clients receive recycling certificates with traceability & audit reports for full transparency.
5. Sustainability & Consulting
We provide e-waste management planning, staff training, & circular economy consultation.
6. Extended Services:
Includes device refurbishment, buy-back/trade-in programs & producer responsibility partnerships under EPR schemes.

Visit Our Group Website For More Info : www.zewa.africa

Name: SOLINTED INTEGRAL SL
Description:
SOLINTED INTEGRAL SL es una empresa especializada en soluciones tecnológicas avanzadas para el tratamiento y valorización de residuos sólidos urbanos (RSU). Nuestro principal proyecto, el Centro Ecológico de Tratamiento Integral de Residuos (CETIR) Borox, es una iniciativa pionera en la economía circular, orientada a la transformación sostenible de residuos en energía y materias primas recuperadas.

Contamos con una planta piloto en Borox (Toledo), equipada con tecnología propia para la higienización mediante vapor de agua de los residuos, separación de fracciones valorizables, producción de biocombustibles sólidos (pellets), pirólisis avanzada y aprovechamiento energético del gas de síntesis.

Trabajamos en colaboración con entidades tecnológicas y empresas líderes en el sector para desarrollar nuevas soluciones, como la conversión de gas de síntesis en metanol, la valorización del biochar y la integración energética del sistema.

Nuestra misión es contribuir a un futuro más limpio, sostenible y eficiente mediante la innovación tecnológica aplicada a la gestión de residuos.

I nostri servizi

Smaltimento RAEE aziendale: Gestiamo il ritiro e il trattamento sicuro dei rifiuti elettronici, dalle apparecchiature informatiche obsolete agli impianti industriali, garantendo la piena conformità alle leggi locali e internazionali.

Riciclo e recupero materiali: Recuperiamo metalli, plastiche e componenti elettronici da apparecchiature fuori uso, contribuendo all’economia circolare e riducendo l’impatto ambientale.
 Ritiro e trasporto sicuro: Forniamo un servizio completo di ritiro e trasporto dei rifiuti elettronici direttamente presso la sede del cliente, garantendo sicurezza e efficienza.

Certificazioni di smaltimento: Forniamo certificazioni ufficiali che attestano il corretto smaltimento dei rifiuti elettronici, assicurando trasparenza e compliance con le normative.

Perché scegliere noi

Sostenibilità: Operiamo con un forte impegno verso l’ambiente, riducendo il volume di rifiuti elettronici destinati alla discarica e promuovendo il riciclo.
Affidabilità: Garantiamo un servizio efficiente e sicuro, con esperti che seguono ogni fase del processo.
Compliance: Rispettiamo tutte le normative in vigore, aiutando le aziende a evitare problematiche legali.
Contattaci per scoprire come possiamo aiutarti a gestire i tuoi rifiuti elettronici in modo responsabile, sicuro e sostenibile.

Revolve is revolutionizing organic waste management by transforming challenges into sustainable solutions. This dual approach restores ecosystems, boosts local economies, and fosters prosperity for rural farming communities.

At Victoria Falls, Zimbabwe—one of the seven wonders of the world—we’re committed to preserving its pristine beauty. By preventing organic waste from reaching landfills, we eliminate odors and protect the surrounding national park, complementing efforts to clear plastic waste.

Our mission is to create a circular economy by converting organic waste into valuable resources through innovative Black Soldier Fly farming and biochar production. We’re driving environmental restoration and economic empowerment, one community at a time.

Ready to join our mission or partner with us? Contact Revolve today to explore how we can collaborate for a sustainable future.

 Transforming waste. Restoring ecosystems. Empowering communities.

Name: DR MGR-ARI Technology Innovations Pvt Ltd
Description:
DR MGR-ARI Technology Innovations Pvt Ltd is a pioneering startup company established within the ecosystem of DR MGR Educational and Research Institute, committed to creating sustainable and innovative solutions for a cleaner environment. As a premier green technology initiative, the company focuses on addressing one of the most pressing environmental challenges of our time—e-waste management, with a core specialization in lithium recovery from waste batteries.

In collaboration with the Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO) and under the academic partnership of DR MGR Educational and Research Institute, the company successfully developed a cutting-edge process for extracting lithium from used lithium-ion batteries. Through rigorous R&D and technology development, more than 85% lithium recovery efficiency has been achieved and officially validated in the presence of DRDO experts.

Following this achievement, DR MGR-ARI Technology Innovations has progressed toward commercial-scale lithium extraction, aiming to meet the increasing demand for lithium in energy storage systems. The company is now preparing to manufacture lithium batteries aligned with industry standards, contributing to India's energy independence and the global clean energy transition.

Vision Statement
To become a global leader in sustainable e-waste recycling and lithium battery innovation, driving a cleaner, greener, and energy-secure future.

Mission Statement
To innovate and implement eco-friendly technologies that reduce electronic waste and recover valuable resources.

To deliver high-efficiency lithium recovery solutions that support India's energy and environmental goals.

To establish a circular economy by producing high-quality, commercial lithium batteries from recycled materials.

To collaborate with academic and industrial partners for continual research, development, and deployment of green technologies.

ChiCel Filters: Biodegradable chitosan based filters for removing heavy metal ions from wastewater.
ABChiCel Filters: Antibacterial filters to enhance water flow and treatment efficiency.

Chitosan-Grafted Cellulose Filter Paper (CGCFP-1-2282) that demonstrates promising heavy metal adsorption performance.
This product is highly suitable for various applications in laboratory and water treatment sectors, especially for the removal of heavy metal ions.
Key technical specifications include: Basis weight: 442 g/m²
Thickness: 1.45 mm, Pore size: 1 µm, Flow rate: 400 mL/min at room temperature
Rapid and efficient heavy metal adsorption: 50% Cu²⁺ adsorption within 10 seconds and 90% within 40 seconds at 5 ppm (pH 6.5), with \~14 mmol/g capacity in less than one minute
Adsorption capacities after multiple passes of 50 mL 5 ppm solutions: Cu \~28 mmol/g, Ni \~18 mmol/g, Fe \~18 mmol/g, Zn \~20 mmol/g
Layered filtration efficiency :One layer removes \~90% of Cu, Ni, and Fe ions, Two layers required for Zn ion removal 3 to 5 layers achieve over 98% removal of all tested metals.
Reusable and sustainable: regenerated by neutralization, and rinsing, maintaining performance over multiple cycles

Name: Riool-herstel
Description:
Riool-herstel.nl speelt een cruciale rol als toonaangevende expert in de sector van rioleringsherstel. Dit bedrijf onderscheidt zich door zijn diepgaande kennis en gespecialiseerde vaardigheden in relining-technieken, een revolutionaire methode die het landschap van rioleringsherstel drastisch heeft veranderd.

Wat is Relinen?
Relinen, ook wel bekend als relining, is een geavanceerde techniek die ontwikkeld is om beschadigde riolen te herstellen zonder de behoefte aan uitgebreide en vaak verstorende graafwerkzaamheden. Deze methode is niet alleen kosteneffectief maar ook tijdbesparend en minder belastend voor het milieu. Het proces houdt in dat een speciale, met hars geïmpregneerde kous in de bestaande rioolbuis wordt ingebracht. Eenmaal op zijn plaats, wordt deze kous uitgehard, waardoor er een nieuwe, naadloze buis binnenin de oude structuur ontstaat. Dit resulteert in een vernieuwde rioolleiding met een aanzienlijk verlengde levensduur.

Het Proces van Relinen
Het proces begint met een grondige inspectie van de beschadigde rioollijn. Moderne technologieën, zoals CCTV-inspectieapparatuur, stellen Riool-herstel.nl in staat om de exacte staat en locatie van de schade nauwkeurig te beoordelen. Deze stap is cruciaal omdat het een op maat gemaakte oplossing mogelijk maakt, afgestemd op de specifieke behoeften van elke klant.

Vervolgens wordt de rioolbuis zorgvuldig gereinigd en voorbereid op de relining. Dit zorgt ervoor dat de harsgeïmpregneerde kous optimaal kan hechten aan de binnenkant van de bestaande pijp. De kous wordt daarna, met behulp van speciale apparatuur, in de rioolbuis ingevoerd. Eenmaal op zijn plaats, wordt de kous uitgehard, vaak met behulp van UV-licht of warmte, wat resulteert in een sterke, duurzame en naadloze nieuwe pijpleiding binnen de oude.

Voordelen van Relining
De relining-techniek biedt tal van voordelen ten opzichte van traditionele herstelmethoden. Een van de meest significante voordelen is de minimalisatie van overlast.

Na podstawie naszych celów, wizji i strategii wypracowaliśmy główne wartości, takie jak ekologia, efektywność, bezpieczeństwo, terminowość, gwarancja ciągłego wsparcia. 

Posiadamy własną kopalnie surowców mineralnych, które mają bardzo szerokie zastosowanie w ochronie środowiska i gospodarce odpadami. Otrzymaliśmy zezwolenia na prowadzenie działalności w zakresie transportu i zagospodarowania odpadów. Prowadzimy działalność konsultingową i projektową. 

Jesteśmy doświadczonym partnerem w zakresie rekultywacji terenów zdegradowanych oraz składowisk odpadów o różnych powierzchniach. 

Naszym przesłaniem jest myśl odpad = surowiec. Stawiamy na ekologiczne rozwiązania, gdzie maksymalnie wykorzystujemy odbierane odpady tak, aby ograniczyć ich wpływ na środowisko. Uzyskaliśmy zgodę Ministerstwa Rolnictwa i Rozwoju Wsi na wprowadzanie do obrotu środków poprawiających właściwości gleby, których głównym składnikiem są właśnie odpady połączone z wydobywanym w naszej kopalni surowcem. Optymalizujemy  procesy ograniczając ilości odpadów oraz zwiększając poziomu recyklingu. 

Zajmujemy się doradztwem oraz pośrednictwem. Nasz zespół opracowuje i składa wnioski w tym, o zezwolenie na przetwarzanie odpadów do odpowiednich organów administracji publicznej. Współpracujemy z wyspecjalizowanymi kancelariami prawnymi, doradcami w zakresie gospodarki odpadami i nowoczesnych technologii oraz placówkami dydaktycznymi, takimi jak m.in. Uniwersytet Zielonogórski. 

Świadczymy usługi sporządzania sprawozdań odpadowych i obsługi systemu BDO, pośredniczymy w zagospodarowaniu odpadów. 

Gwarantujemy profesjonalne i innowacyjne wsparcie techniczne.

Name: AquaRecovery
Description:
En AQUA Recovery, creemos que cualquier esfuerzo destinado a mejorar la eficiencia con la que se usa el agua, tienen un impacto trascendental y positivo sobre las cantidades de agua que quedan disponibles para otras actividades humanas. 

Consideramos que los esfuerzos deben enfocarse en mejorar la gestión de grandes volúmenes de agua, precisamente, la que es utilizada en la manufactura de alimentos y que su composición natural y propiedades no ha sido mayormente afectada al involucrarla en el proceso.

Recibimos el agua excedente de la industria alimentaria; que se involucra por contacto directo con el alimento o por el resultado de la transformación de este, para procesarla y elaborar productos de alto valor nutritivo para el cultivo. Diseñado para el aprovechamiento del gran volumen de agua, las trazas de carga inorgánica y los nutrientes disueltos. 

La Isla Grande de Tierra del Fuego, ubicada en el extremo austral de Chile, es el lugar donde la Acuicultura, la Agricultura y Ganadería son macro-actividades económicas que conviven todo el tiempo. Además, la presencia de la industria alimentaria y sus actividades en la zona son un hecho gracias a las características propias de la isla, los recursos presentes y los beneficios tributarios que el estado a designado en zonas extremas. Considerando esto, además de la gradualidad con la que se hacen presentes los efectos del calentamiento global en esta región, es que se considera idónea para la ejecución del proyecto, estableciendo a la isla como pionera en esta práctica a nivel regional y nacional.

Name: Bio Recycling & Upcycling
Description:
Bio-waste is defined as biodegradable garden and park waste, food and kitchen waste from households, restaurants, caterers and retail premises, and comparable waste from food processing plants. With a share of 34 %, bio-waste is the largest single component of municipal waste in the EU! 

Recycling of bio-waste is key for meeting the EU target. Upcycling, also known as creative reuse, is the process of transforming by-products, waste materials, useless, or unwanted products into new materials or products perceived to be of greater quality, such as artistic value or environmental value.

The Food Waste Management Market encompasses the various strategies, technologies, and services aimed at reducing, recycling, and effectively managing food waste generated across different sectors including food manufacturing, retail, hospitality, and residential. It includes solutions such as composting, anaerobic digestion, waste-to-energy conversion, and redistribution of surplus food to minimize environmental impact, optimize resource utilization, and address societal concerns regarding food wastage.

Biorecycling can also uses enzymes to break down plastics, rather than the mechanical processes of shredding and heating. Enzymes are the biological catalysts that run the chemical processes inside cells and living things. Scientists are able to identify the specific enzymes that split plastic’s chemical bonds, depolymerising it back into its original base blocks.

Name: Trash2Pay
Description:
Trash2Pay is a decentralized waste management platform designed to make waste disposal transparent, auditable, and economically rewarding.

The platform connects households, businesses, waste collectors, recyclers, and regulators through low-cost micro-payments and immutable proof-of-service records, ensuring accountability across the waste management value chain.

Built on the Bitcoin SV (BSV) blockchain, Trash2Pay leverages scalability, low transaction fees, and data integrity to support sustainable waste systems, circular-economy initiatives, and ESG-driven programs, turning waste into measurable economic value.

Name: Doo Doo Duty Ltd
Description:
Doo Doo Duty Ltd & Doo Doo Duty Digestion CIC – Cleaning Up for a Greener Future

At Doo Doo Duty Ltd, we provide professional pet waste management services for households, businesses, and public spaces. Our goal is to keep communities clean while reducing environmental impact. From one-off deep cleans to regular waste collection (up to 80L pedal bins), we ensure cleaner, safer outdoor spaces for pet owners and businesses alike.

But we’re not stopping there. We’re in the process of launching Doo Doo Duty Digestion CIC, a Community Interest Company (CIC) focused on sustainable waste solutions. This initiative will explore diverting pet and food waste from landfills, using it to produce biogas and eco-friendly fertilizer, reducing harmful emissions while giving back to the community.

What We Offer:

 Pet waste removal for homes & businesses
 Street & park cleaning services
 Eco-friendly waste disposal solutions
 Sustainability-focused initiatives through our CIC

Building Partnerships for a Sustainable Future

We’re looking to partner with gardening businesses, food businesses, farms, and other eco-conscious organizations that share our vision. Together, we can create a sustainable waste cycle, turning waste into a valuable resource while benefiting local communities.

Why It Matters

Pet and food waste contribute to landfill waste, methane emissions, and pollution. Our work helps reduce these environmental risks, while our future CIC will reinvest into community projects, sustainability efforts, and local initiatives.

If you’re a business interested in working with us, let’s connect!

 DM us for more information or collaboration opportunities.

Name: BIODOLPHIN
Description:
Passionate about Environmental Sustainability and Public Health? Look no further!

At BIODOLPHIN, we are dedicated to revolutionizing sewage treatment solutions for a cleaner, healthier tomorrow. With over 2 years of experience in the industry, we specialize in providing cutting-edge sewage treatment technologies and services tailored to meet the unique needs of municipalities, industries, and communities worldwide.

Our comprehensive range of services encompasses the design, installation, operation, and maintenance of advanced sewage treatment plants. From conventional activated sludge systems to innovative membrane bioreactors, we leverage state-of-the-art technologies to ensure efficient removal of pollutants, safeguarding water resources and public health.

But our commitment doesn't stop there. We go beyond conventional treatment approaches, striving to develop sustainable solutions that minimize environmental impact and maximize resource recovery. Through initiatives such as anaerobic digestion and nutrient recovery, we aim to transform sewage by-products into valuable resources, contributing to circular economy principles and reducing our ecological footprint.

Moreover, at BIODOLPHIN, we prioritize collaboration and partnership. We work closely with our clients, regulators, and stakeholders to understand their unique challenges and objectives, co-creating tailored solutions that deliver measurable results. Our team of seasoned engineers, scientists, and technicians bring unparalleled expertise and dedication to every project, ensuring excellence from concept to completion.

Join us in our mission to create a cleaner, healthier world. Together, let's redefine sewage treatment for a sustainable future.

Seit 1973 stehen wir als Familienbetrieb für Zuverlässigkeit, Kompetenz und persönliche Beratung in der Entsorgungsbranche. Ob Privat- oder Geschäftskunde, wir bieten Ihnen maßgeschneiderte Lösungen für Ihre Entsorgungs- und Baustoffbedürfnisse.

 Unsere Leistungen auf einen Blick:

    Baumischabfälle
    Grünschnitt, Wurzeln und Stämme
    Eisen- und Metallschrott
    Asbesthaltige Baustoffe
    Erdaushub, Bauschutt (recyclebar/nicht recyclebar)
    Holz (alle Klassen), Rigips und Glas

 Unser Standort:
Seit 1987 sind wir in Burscheid ansässig und seit 1999 ein zertifizierter Entsorgungsfachbetrieb – geprüft vom TÜV Rheinland.

Wir sind stolz darauf, eines der letzten inhabergeführten Unternehmen der Branche zu sein, und setzen auf persönliche Beratung, Flexibilität und Pünktlichkeit.

 Kontaktieren Sie uns noch heute – wir freuen uns darauf, Ihnen weiterzuhelfen!

Name: Digital Waste Tracking WM
Description:
DWT are experts in Digital Waste Tracking specialising in high end retail across London. 

We provide our clients with individually barcoded waste sacks, once used our operatives will farm the data at curb side and on the move. Our operatives weigh and scan the sacks you get a full understanding the waste coming out of the site. All this information is feed up into a user friendly dashboard so you can see on a granular level what each site is generating.  

Once collected, each sack is split and hand sorted which overnight, will bring your recycling rates up to 90%+

We manufacture the sacks here in the UK and offer same day delivery and we have operatives available on WhatsApp to keep speed and service levels high. 

Customers sign up for the technology… But stay for the service.

Name: Aquapluz
Description:
Welcome to Aquapluz, the first-of-its-kind. Aquapluz is an app for water treatment as per National Green Tribunal (NGT) guidelines. We are committed to providing you with the best possible information at your fingertips.
 
Aquapluz is an app helping MSMEs, who do not have access to experts or expensive consultants, reduce water pollution by providing them with easy and simple plans for an Effluent Treatment Plant (ETP) that also caters to their needs.
 
Starting with the Textile industry, we plan on providing simple solutions to water pollution in other sectors such as leather, food processing, electroplating, etc, in the future.

We hope you get all the answers you are looking for and help us in making the world a cleaner and better place for future generations… 
 
If you have any questions or comments, please don't hesitate to contact us.

Name: Mr. E-Waste
Description:
At Mr. E-Waste, we believe that discarded electronics don’t mark the end — they mark a new beginning.

Founded in 2021, we are a creative social enterprise based in Temanggung, Central Java, Indonesia, focused on transforming electronic waste into handcrafted art and functional items. Our mission is to promote environmental awareness through upcycling, education, and sustainable design.

 What We Do:

Eco-Art Products – Keychains, wall décor, and accessories made from recycled circuit boards and components.

Custom Designs – Personalized gifts and corporate merchandise from e-waste.

Workshops & Campaigns – Hands-on learning for schools and communities on the impact of electronic waste and creative reuse.

Each piece we create carries a story — not just of waste, but of purpose, change, and a cleaner future.

 Let's build a greener world, one circuit at a time.

#Sustainability #CircularEconomy #EWasteArt #GreenInnovation #SocialImpact #MrEWaste
